description: The whole group will enjoy easy access to everything from this centrally located place. Large open floor plan with living room, dining room, work area, kitchen and full bath all on one floor. Front and back porch complete this level. Second floor has four good size bedrooms, all with closets and additional full bath. Great location near St. Peters, Albany medical, colleges, major highways 🛣️ and more. Offstreet parking and yard make this a great place to stop for some adventures
review: This was an awesome house. When we walked in after a long drive, we immediately felt right at home and the house was pristine with all the “right” amenities. The living room and dining rooms were spacious. The kitchen was immaculate and was fully stocked with beautiful and clean dishes, glasses and cutlery.  Close to the Crossgates Mall and Stuyvesant Plaza, location is great as well.  We had a fabulous family retreat during Thanksgiving while visiting my mother-in-law who lives nearby. You won’t be disappointed. This is a hidden gem.

description: Welcome to the Mansion Suite, a newly renovated historic gem in the heart of Center Square.  Through a private entrance, down a long foyer, you'll discover the grand Oak Room, an expansive living/dining room with dramatic fireplace mantel, paneling, beamed ceiling, stained glass windows. Adjacent to the lounge, is a stylish and fully equipped  kitchen with new stainless steel appliances.  Both bedrooms have new queen beds, beautiful natural woodwork and overlook a private and quiet courtyard.
review: david was very kind, clean, and had everything organised beautifully. the building itself is in such a beautiful, scenic area with stunning architecture all around you and just the perfect amount of city. but i didn’t have trouble knowing which lockbox was mine and which door i was going to. honestly probably a mistake on my behalf😹. still very highly recommend!

review: Great communication. Accommodating.  Clean, comfortable spot.  Thank you!

review: Comfortable little studio in a central location. Parking was a little tight on Friday evening, but was easy enough at other times.  The host was very nice and everything was as described.  This is a garden level apartment, and there were several bugs/spiders in the apartment/bathroom.  It wasn't a huge problem, but might be for someone with a phobia, so just something to note.  We would be happy to stay again at this apartment.

description: The room is large with Western exposure giving more bright light in the afternoons. There is a desk for working and a closet and dresser. The room is filled with original art.
review: A) Awesome host. B) Very comfortable room and house in suburban neighborhood. C) Easy access to and from highway. I had been hesitant about being “so far away from Troy” but really, it was just 20 minutes in non-rush hour traffic and well worth it. I anticipate continuing to make trips to this area and would be thrilled if there are future opportunities to stay with this host in this home.

Four queen beds and a queen air mattress accommodate up to 10. Ideal for large families and groups. Dive into Albany's history with modern comforts.
review: Took our kids to a concert at mvp arena, and stayed at this location. It was close enough to walk to the show without the kids complaining, and staying the night was pleasant and comfortable! Would definitely recommend.

review: Ed is the BEST host. I’ve stayed in 2 of his Airbnb rooms now, several times, and it always feels like “coming home”. Has everything you need and is less than 10 min walk to Albany med. Ed always replies promptly when I message him. I almost don’t want to tell you guys how much I like it here because it’s my little secret gem that I plan on staying at often! House is always spotless, quiet, and they have the best memory foam mattresses, so I sleep like an Angel.

The room is tastefully decorated with a spilt king purple hybrid 4 mattress, sitting area, and well lit desk. There’s a large closet and entertainment center as well. The bathroom is shared with one other room. A second shared bathroom is on the first floor of the home.
review: This is my second stay with Thomas. I appreciate the amenities they provide and it’s a friendly environment with everyone staying at the house! I would recommend it!

description: Discover a charming one-bedroom retreat with exposed brick walls and park views right in the heart of Albany. Just a leisurely 3-minute stroll from Albany Med, and mere minutes away from Downtown and state offices, this prime location is surrounded by a tapestry of distinctive and top-tier restaurants and bars, ensuring an unforgettable experience in the heart of our vibrant area. An ideal location for traveling nurses and visitors to the area, perfectly tailored to meet your needs.
review: Great place to stay! Nice little apartment in a great area. Erion was very easy to talk with and had clear instructions for checking in. Would definitely recommend.

description: Welcome to our garden apartment, nestled in a walkable neighborhood filled with diverse restaurants, cozy pubs, and the picturesque Washington Park. The apartment features a sound-dampened bedroom, ensuring a serene and peaceful retreat. Just steps away, you'll find the New York State Capitol, Empire State Plaza, The Egg, and the New York State Museum, making this location ideal for both relaxation and exploration.
review: My fiance, our dog, and I stayed here for a downtown wedding and we couldn't have been more pleased. There was a great setup for us to both work remotely during the day and the space was extremely clean and had everything we needed. We had to turn on the heat because it was the first super cold night of the season but the heat worked extremely fast and we'll that we only had to keep it at the high 50-60s. For what it's worth, the upstairs neighbor does wake up around 5am and you can hear footsteps through the ceiling around then, but it wasn't anything we couldn't handle since that's our usual wakeup time. Very communicative hosts and seamless check-in and check-out. Definitely will keep in mind if we ever visit Albany again!

description: Single family home with driveway close to Albany Med, St. Peter’s, St. Rose, U Albany, CDTA public transport, restaurants, downtown, and nightlife.   Recently renovated room packed with basic amenities.
review: THESE PEOPLE I BOOK WITH WHEN I CAN. THE VALUE IS GREAT., COMPANY IS GREAT. HOSTS ARE VERY CONSIDERATE AND FRIENDLY. STAYED IN A DIFFERENT ROOM THIS TIME, THE MATTRESS WAS EXTREMELY COMFORTABLE! ENJOYED STAY . MY HUSBAND AND I HOPE TO SEE THEM SOON!

review: The location was perfect for an appointment we had. I’m particularly happy that I chose this location for the parking. Other locations offered free street parking. Well, with lousy, slushy, rainy weather it was wonderful to park close to the entrance. Breakfast (which was also our night snack) was perfect: yummy Siggis yogurt, banana and low sugar granola. Comfortable bed, nice bathroom with the needed amenities, what else could we want?  Perfect for our needs. Thank you.

review: The place was clean and had everything we needed to enjoy our stay. I would definitely stay here again. Thank you!

Otherwise, excellent location and amenities, friendly communication from the host, and perfect space in the home. We will use it again if we come back. Thanks!

Get a great breakfast/lunch at Cafe Madison just a few blocks away.  A few minutes walk to St. Peter's Hospital and local shops. Book now for your luxury stay.
review: Apartment was as described and close to everything you may need. Plenty of room and comfortable. Chris was quick with response and ensured we had a good stay.

review: Phat was friendly with fantastic communication. He provided excellent recommendations on places to eat in the area.  Comfortable bed and beautiful backyard private space. Two thumbs up!

The outdoor patio, pool, and hot tub are available for guests to enjoy at no extra charge. The home is full of unexpected design and decor delights we know you will enjoy!
review: I have rented a good number of Airbnb's and houses through other platforms, but this was my first time renting a room within a private home. The great reviews of Thomas are all accurate - the space is spotless, very tastefully and thoughtfully furnished, and Thomas and co-host Delvin were amazing! The house is located in the more upscale en dof town, parking is off-street and easy. Delvin met me at the door and showed me around, and I got to meet the two lovely poodles who are very friendly and gentle. Thomas was present and very responsive with any questions I had, and greatly enjoyed chatting with him. The kitchen is to die for - and so is the very large upstairs suite. I visited out of season, but the pool and grounds were very well maintained and manicured. I'll be headed to Albany for business regularly, and this will always be my first choice to stay! As a woman traveling alone, it was a safe and cozy home away from home, and I can't wait to go back!

I appreciated the welcoming chocolate candy, not even hotels give you and charge more for the stay. Neighborhood felt safe, and building felt safe as well and was quiet morning and night. Definitely have no complaints, thanks for being responsive no matter the time and for being prompt.

review: This place was really great and super clean! The house itself is cozily decorated and comfortable, with a large kitchen, living room, and area where one can study or work. The bedroom I stayed in was very clean, came with towels provided, and had a key code on the door. The shared bathroom was always clean during my time there and had shampoo, conditioner, soap, and a blow dryer available to use. The grounds are full of green grass and flowers. The manager is very nice and helpful. He ensures the place is cleaned daily and gave me some tips on what to do in Albany. I would stay here again.

Having Lark St nearby is great!  The best part is definitely Lloyd as a host: incredibly responsive and meticulous. I hope to be back soon.

review: We felt safe and comfortable with the house and neighborhood.  Check-in was a breeze and Diana was very responsive when we contacted her about the heating system. She had us in contact with the maintenance company within minutes.  We were a family of 5 with adult children and there was plenty of room for all of us.

review: I had to book Jason’s place last minute due to some plumbing issues in my apartment and he was so helpful, arranging for an early check in and being flexible. The unit is lovely and the rain shower is awesome! Must stay!

review: We loved our stay here! The space was comfortable and very well appointed, it feels elegant and felt at the same time, and we felt right at home. One of the nicest Airbnb’s I’ve stayed in, would definitely recommend, and hope to return!

review: The apartment was very clean, well-maintained, and exactly as described. The host was responsive, kind, and made sure everything was in place for a comfortable stay. Once inside, I felt safe and at ease. That said, like many areas in downtown Albany, the surrounding neighborhood isn’t the safest. I wouldn’t recommend it to a woman traveling alone, especially at night. This is absolutely no fault of the host, but just something to be aware of when booking. Overall, the space itself was great, and the host clearly puts effort into making sure guests have a positive experience.

review: Dan’s place is fantastic. Perfect for a quiet getaway - especially if you’re looking to stay-in or get stuck with bad weather. Very stylish and cozy.

Lori was the kindest host we had during our New England round-trip and she personally took all efforts to make our stay felt like coming home.

description: Newly renovated single family home in the heart of Albany. The house is equipped with everything you need including the all important Nespresso coffee machine. You will find it warm and homey, but also simple and free of clutter that prevent you from making the space feel like your own. I want you to enjoy the freedom that comes with staying in an Air BnB and the comfort you would expect from a boutique hotel. Enjoy the fenced in backyard equipped with grill, firpit and hammock. Hello summer
review: We had a lovely stay at Diana’s place! It was exactly like the photos. Clean, comfortable and cozy! Each of the three beds had great mattresses which was an added perk and fun eye masks left for us at each bedside!  The upstairs bedroom was incredibly spacious and she really thought of everything for each room which made it feel like a home away from home.  The location was perfect for us to see family. We loved being able to wake up and make an easy cup of coffee and lounge around the house. It happened to snow while we were there which was lovely in the backyard to see. Our dogs really enjoyed the fenced in backyard as well!  Diana provided plenty of towels & toiletries for us to use which was much appreciated as well as the necessary products for doing some laundry!  Check in and check out were both very easy and Diana was great with communication pre, during & post stay.  We will definitely be booking again when we come back to town! Thank you for making our Thanksgiving great

description: Step into the charming and comfy 1BR/1BA apartment in the heart of Albany, NY. It promises a relaxing retreat bordering picturesque Washington Park and funky Lark Street while being within walking distance to the vibrant downtown, which offers easy access to restaurants, shops, and exciting attractions.  The lovely design and the prime location will leave you in awe.  ✔ Comfy Queen Bedroom ✔ Open Design Living ✔ Fully Equipped Kitchen ✔ Smart TV ✔ Wi-Fi ✔ Free Parking  See more below!
review: My husband and I moved out of Albany several years ago and we were excited to visit the area again. This airbnb is a nice space in a good location in Albany (with a coveted parking spot in Center Square!), but there were a few things that could have been improved. I don't know if there were issues because we visited right after Christmas, but I feel as though a lot of details were overlooked.  	 Check in is at 3pm. The host had asked what our ETA was and I had let them know we were aiming for around 3pm. We showed up around 3:30pm and the unit was still being cleaned. Seeing as checkout is at 11am, I wouldn't think this would be an issue. Upon arrival, there was absolutely no toilet paper. After about 10 minutes, we were provided with one roll. There was a full load of  laundry running in the drier and the dishwasher was running as well. 	  The bathroom could use some love. There was dirt of a questionable sort on the hanging hand towel. A curtain or a privacy filter would be welcomed on the bathroom window as the blinds did not completely cover it.  While in the bathroom I could clearly see into neighboring windows, meaning they could also see me! The bathroom did have nice argan oil shampoo and conditioner, but body soap was not provided so make sure to bring your own. 	 We would have liked to have coffee using the Keurig coffee maker, however there were no Keurig pods as advertised in one of the photos. The bottled waters were appreciated.  	 Other reviews commented on noise due to a nearby bar. Outside noise wasn't too much of an issue during our stay, as it was ~10 degrees out, but we could hear cars and buses outside, so I could see how noise could be an issue in the warmer months.  	 There is no temperature control in this unit. It was very cold when we were there and the unit stayed on the colder side. A small space heater was provided.  	 The bed has a memory foam mattress, was comfortable, and we slept well. The bedroom does get pretty bright in the morning, so sleeping in may not be an option for you unless you wear a sleep mask.  	 The living space was set up nicely and the furniture was very comfortable.  	 Overall, this was a good space, but better attention to detail would have made this great. Hopefully the hosts take notice and improve for their future guests.

description: Our recently remodeled one-bedroom apartment boasts a park view, easy parking and is close to downtown Albany. We have an easy walk to groceries, Government Buildings, Albany Law School, College of Pharmacy, VA and Albany Medical Center Hospitals, and Lark Street restaurants and nightlife. The living area features a queen size futon and views of the sunset most evenings, and the bedroom features a luxurious queen-sized memory foam bed and access to our quiet garden where the sun rises.
review: This place is a gem. We loved staying here. James was an excellent host and always responsive to our messages. The space is clean and comfortable. It is also close walking distance to the hospital and lots of local restaurants. I would love to stay here again in the future.

review: The apartment is in a basement. It smelled absolutely horrible. It was humid and muggy. The windows were sealed shut so you couldn’t open them. To top it off, there was carpet everywhere in the room in a BASEMENT unit which added to smell. Like why would you put carpet. There’s only one overhead light which is not bright off. One small container for water which ran out in 3 hours. do yourself a favor, do not stay here.

There’s spot for one car (and then I believe street parking for other cars).  The host is wonderful and accommodating.

review: My stay was amazing… Highly recommend, Rosie  has everything you need for your stay. She is very accommodating and will help you out in any way that she can. The space was spacious and cool, especially for this summer weather.. I will be definitely coming back for another stay.

review: This is a beautiful place!.. i loved it will definitely stay again soon.. Me and my 🐶 had a great time.

We highly recommend a stay here and plan on retuning when in the area.

Private balcony w/ seating Up to 4 NON-SMOKING guests Toiletries included  Message me anytime. Hope to welcome you soon!
review: Nice histrionic place, clean and remodeled, the neighborhood not that great, the parking is an issue (meter parking), noisy, close to highway and railroad! The location downtown Albany. Great host, very helpful.

description: My place is close to University of Albany, shopping malls and plazas, bars, restaurants, the airport, the city center, parks, art and culture. You’ll love my place because of the location, the ambiance, the outdoors space, fully renovated, newly furnished, nice yard, awesome double rear deck,  open floor plan and central air.   My place is good for couples, solo adventurers, business travelers, families (with kids), big groups, and furry friends ($50 pet fee w/ booties included).
review: Peter was a great host and went above and beyond. The house was spotless and very comfortable. When we travel to the albany area again, we will definitely look to stay here again!

description: Welcome to our charming studio in the heart of Albany's Center Square. Nestled in one of the oldest homes in the neighborhood, the space has been restored to blend history with modern convenience. Recently renovated, it features a modern bathroom with rain shower. The décor is a nod to mid-century aesthetics.  This cozy studio is a stone's throw away from Albany's main attractions within easy walking distance. Experience a unique blend of past and present in this delightful Albany retreat.
review: Jason was very helpful when I had a question or needed any assistance with the door’s lock keypad. I didn’t care for the tap water taste and he generously brought two water bottles over. Truly a very kind and attentive host!

description: 800 sqft rustic style master suite in the heart of Albany, NY. Cozy up by the fire or take a dip in the pool or hot tub. Enjoy a Purple hybrid 4 luxury mattress. Originally a farmhouse, the home has been extensively renovated to highlight all of the original architecture and offer every luxury to guests. The outdoor patio, pool, and hot tub are available for guests to enjoy at no extra charge. The home is full of unexpected design and decor delights we know you will enjoy!
review: I have stayed here several times.  Tom always takes great care to make sure my stay is comfortable and relaxing. He truly is the ideal host.

description: Cozy first floor 2-Bedroom located in a Pre-war building. Unit offers hardwood floors, well equipped bedrooms, bathrooms and kitchen.  Only a 10 min walk to fabulous cafe and restaurants on Madison Avenue.  Everything you've been looking forward right at your finger tips.   >Nearby ○ 3 Min to Saint Rose  ○ 4 min to St Peters ○ 7 min to Albany MED ○ 5 Min to Lark Street ○ 7 Min to Downtown ○ 7 Min to SUNY Albany ○ 8 Min to Palace Theater
review: Diana's home was lovely! The bed was extremely comfortable and the space was as described. However, we had a scheduling conflict and submitted a request to change the reservation date, which was denied because it Diana said it was "past the window to submit." After reading airbnb's policies, it says guests can submit change requests up until the time of check out, so I was confused about why that reason was provided. All and all, the plans worked out and we were able to stay the full stay, but it would have been frustrating if our change request was denied with little explanation why.

description: This beautifully renovated and brightly decorated brownstone in historic Albany is your perfect getaway. Located just minutes from charming downtown, guests can enjoy all Albany has to offer.   This spacious bedroom and living area has an abundance of natural light creates a very comfortable environment! This property comes with a fully stocked kitchen, in unit washer/dryer, free resident lot parking, and a fenced shared backyard with bbq for guests to enjoy.  Long term stays available.
review: Linda’s place is awesome! It is a roomy apartment with a seating area, a TV on the wall, a kitchenette, a beautiful bedroom, and a great bathroom. I came here for a rowing race on the Hudson River, which didn’t give me a whole lot of time to enjoy Linda’s place. The location is excellent! For me it was close enough to the Hudson River to be able to walk there. It is also on walking distance to a number of good restaurants and pubs in downtown Albany. I wish I had more time! I will remember this for another trip.

description: Relax in our cozy home on a quiet one-way street. Plenty of free street parking available. With a large dining and living room, fully stocked kitchen, and furnished private room, our home is the perfect affordable stay for working professionals, students, and people in-between housing.   Newly furnished and renovated in 2017. Minutes from major universities and hospitals. Entire home is 3 bed 1 bath (you have a private bedroom with door lock). CDTA Bus stop 1 block away.
review: The place is very good, clean and well maintained. It has easy access to good varied restaurants, stores and transportation, all within walkable distances. Its a nice place with all amenities one would look for from a short to a long extended stay. Chad has the things well organized and one can easily know what, where and how in the house from the moment one steps inside. Looking forward to stay here whenever in Albany.

description: Welcome to our newly renovated two-bedroom apartment located on the second floor, just minutes away from Albany Med, and across from Washington Park. Easy access to state offices and MVP arena all within walking distance. The neighborhood is brimming with restaurants, bars, and beautiful architecture, making it one of the most desired areas in Albany. Perfect for both short-term and long term visits. Our apartment offers comfort and convenience in an ideal location.
review: Exactly what we needed to be close to our friend who lives just around the corner. Erion’s place was exactly as described, extremely clean, comfortable and convenient. The parking spot was another big plus. Would definitely stay again. Erion was helpful, responsive and clear in every interaction. Easy 5 stars.

description: Welcome to our studio which located at hearth of Albany. Close to Bus Station, Train Station, Business and finance district, MVP Arena, SUNY Albany headquarters, night life and historic places. All kind of restaurant and bars in walking distance. 1 bedroom with queen bed , bathroom and kitchen. Kitchen has all utensils.
review: Good for a short stay max 2 people. Apartment was very clean and I was left with drinks and snacks which was very nice. Fully stocked kitchen and bathroom. My only complaint would be that the hallway getting to the apartment smelled like heavy smoke from the other neighbors. Other than that host was very responsive and easy parking.

description: Welcome to our Newly Renovated, three bedroom two bathroom apartment. ☺️ Please note, this apartment is located in a Four Family Apartment Complex.   We are located in a walkable neighborhood within the charming Melrose area, located less than ten minutes from the University of Albany, downtown Albany, as well as many restaurants and attractions! We are pet friendly.   *Please note, this unit is on the second and third floor of a four family unit. Two flights of stairs upon entrance. No parties*
review: This home was beautiful! It was quiet and a wonderful place to stay while we were in town. There is a set of narrow stairs to navigate upon entry (a little tricky if you have big suitcases), but once you get into the unit it’s really lovely.  Thaddeus was an amazing host - super communicative, kind, and thoughtful! We had a great stay.

description: BOOK our affordable basement-level suite in the quiet neighborhood of Albany's Pastures. Great location near Albany Med, MVP Arena, Empire State Plaza, Library, Lark Street, State Offices, courts, restaurants, entertainment; easy access to local and regional bus routes and highways (I-787, I-90 and I-87). 10-hour metered parking in front, free after 5 PM and weekends.  Accommodates up to 3 NON-SMOKING guests. Toiletries included.  Message me anytime. Hope to welcome you soon!  -Earl
review: Earl is a great host and responds quickly.  Highly recommended.  This is my second time staying and I will be again in the future.

description: Step into the charming and comfy 1BR/1BA apartment in the heart of Albany, NY. It promises a relaxing retreat bordering picturesque Washington Park and funky Lark Street while being within walking distance to the vibrant downtown, which offers easy access to restaurants, shops, and exciting attractions.  The lovely design and the prime location will leave you in awe.  ✔ Comfy Queen Bedroom ✔ Open Design Living ✔ Fully Equipped Kitchen ✔ Smart TV ✔ Wi-Fi ✔ Free Parking  See more below!
review: Great place! Central, active neighborhood. Great food right out the door. We were not bothered by noise at all, there’s just a nice city hum that’s to be expected in this neighborhood.

description: Welcome to the Mansion Suite, a newly renovated historic gem in the heart of Center Square.  Through a private entrance, down a long foyer, you'll discover the grand Oak Room, an expansive living/dining room with dramatic fireplace mantel, paneling, beamed ceiling, stained glass windows. Adjacent to the lounge, is a stylish and fully equipped  kitchen with new stainless steel appliances.  Both bedrooms have new queen beds, beautiful natural woodwork and overlook a private and quiet courtyard.
review: David’s place is a lovely landing pad on a leafy tree lined street in Albany! Loved seeing his art around the apartment. Beautiful and spacious place to stay in a great neighborhood! Would def stay again.

description: Spacious, comfortable unit less than 10 minutes from downtown Albany, 5 minutes from AlbanyMed, and walking distance to St. Peter's Hospital, Maria College, Buckingham Lake, CVS, and restaurants. Features a dining area with air fryer and microwave (no stove), an office, and basic workout equipment. Ideal for short getaways or extended stays, perfect for traveling nurses, doctors, remote workers, and anyone seeking a peaceful neighborhood.
review: Love the place! It was awesome! Very peaceful, private and just the perfect getaway. Public accommodations were in walking distance and in miles of driving. The space provided just enough I was like this is good. Hasan is a very superb friendly host, responsive to all messages during the stay, and was very accommodating to any specific questions or concerns on my trip. I highly recommend and will stay again when visiting Albany.

description: Enjoy the private and clean comfort of our freshly renovated bungalow in Albany's quaint Helderberg Neighborhood. Some of the regions most cherished restaurants on New Scotland Avenue are within a two block walk. Close accessibility to both Albany Med Hospital and Saint Peters Hospital as well as Albany Law, The Albany School of Pharmacy and Russell Sage College. This home features a newly renovated fully functioning kitchen, a luxurious bathroom with a walk-in shower and full size tub.
review: Lovely home, fantastic host. No complaints! It would be a lovely place to stay for a weekend or for a couple months.

description: Welcome to this rustic second-floor apartment in Albany, New York! This newly remodeled three-bedroom, one-bath gem is perfect for a comfortable stay for up to six guests. Step into a piece of history with original hardwood floors dating back to 1890. The spacious dining area is ideal for gathering, and the apartment features a 65-inch smart TV for your entertainment needs. Need to catch up on work? We've got you covered with a dedicated work desk. Book now for an unforgettable experience!
review: My family and I stayed here for one night, as we were passing through Albany. It was clean, with a fully stocked kitchen and comfortable beds. The electric fireplace was a nice touch, and helped to keep the apartment warm at night. The balcony was a lovely extra addition. We had no trouble parking even though it was night time. It definitely seemed to be an area with a lot of college students, but the apartment was quiet. We will definitely keep this place in mind if we’re passing through albany again, and would recommend staying here to anyone!

description: Welcome to our studio which located at hearth of Albany. Close to Bus Station, Train Station, Business and finance district, MVP Arena, SUNY Albany headquarters, night life and historic places. All kind of restaurant and bars in walking distance. 1 bedroom with queen bed , bathroom and kitchen. Kitchen has all utensils.
review: Etem is a fantastic host. Super responsive, the place was clean and cozy, and worth the price. While heat was available, the Airbnb did not have Air Conditioning as seen in the photos which led to some discomfort while sleeping. This would cause me to wake up in the middle of the night to get water and even take a shower one night due to the amount I was sweating, even with the windows open in fall. However that is my singular only complaint. The place was spotless, affordable, and nearby various Albany attractions such as the NYS museum and Capitol plaza. The doors are keypad locked, allowing for a safe and secure environment. Etem is incredibly kind and friendly and responds to you in a timely manner. The AirBnB is also close to a bus stop, perfect for affordable and convenient transportation! Dishes, ice trays, soap and towels provided to make you feel right at home. Overall 5/5 stars would definitely come back in winter but if they don’t have AC, I’m unsure if I would in the summer

description: Urban Oasis!  2nd Floor guest bedroom in residential home.  Shared entrance.  Shared bath with one other guest room.  Use of kitchen and washer/dryer. Street parking.  Use of driveway, if necessary.  Walking distance to Albany Med, Albany Pharmacy, Albany Law School, College of St. Rose and Sage College.  On Main bus line.  10 minute drive from downtown.
review: Ed and his wife were great hosts.  I would highly recommend for anyone looking for a cozy comfortable room in close proximity to downtown Albany.  Felt like home away from home.

description: Just moments from Albany Medical Center, this renovated 1-bedroom apartment exudes brightness and is tastefully furnished with high-end designer furniture and decor, ensuring a delightful living experience. Situated on one of the area’s finest blocks of classic Victorian mansions, this building stands as a beacon of elegance. With proximity to Albany Medical Center, universities, and more, the location is truly unbeatable.
review: Elizabeth's apartment is fully modernized and tastefully decorated with lots of nice art on the walls.  The pictures don't lie. The location is good: walking distance to Washington Park and other Albany sites - even the capitol if you're a good walker -and there's a nice green area across the street.   The bathroom is well equipped, as is the kitchen - mostly.  It lacked  a toaster and measuring spoons, but we managed. The neighborhood is attractive and safe, but the building in which the apartment is located (on the second floor) was quiet but could use some TLC, especially the front stairs and railing. This was a bit off-putting at first, but we got used to it. Overall, for those wanting a clean, attractive and well-located apartment in Albany, Elizabeth's is a good bet.

description: Nestled in the heart of the city, our Airbnb exudes an enchanting charm with its stylish and romantic decor. Positioned on a vibrant city street, immerse yourself in the lively urban atmosphere. This energetic environment will carry some background noise. We prioritize your comfort and recommend bringing earplugs for light sleepers to ensure a restful stay. Corner store -1 min Airport, bus & train station -15 min. Outdoor cameras $250 indoor smoking violation fee $250 pet cleaning fee, no pets
review: Do to flight times and other peoples schedules i was going to be stranded with my suitcase for about 9 hours, so I reached out to sonya. she was so gracious to extend my stay and was accommodating throughout the entire trip. the cutest airbnb i’ve stayed in, she has great taste. would definitely stay here again!

description: One beautiful one bedroom garden level apartment in close proximity to all the best that downtown Albany has to offer. Next to Lark Street, Washington Park, Rockefeller Plaza, Historic State Street, museums, cafes, bars, shopping, and grocery stores. Its a 5 min walk to Albany Med, the VA Hospital, the Albany Law School, Pharmacy School, and Nursing School. 1 mile to Sage College and New Scotland Restaurants.
review: The apartment is clean, spacious (for 1-2 people) and very well equipped with new appliances, including a washer and dryer. It was an excellent value for the money. It's in an urban area that could get a bit noisy at times, but it never interrupted our sleep.  We were always able to get street parking.

description: BOOK this attic loft in a renovated historic 200 year-old building in a quiet neighborhood of Albany's Pastures. review: We loved staying at this space. It is so stylish and cozy being in the loft. Everything was incredibly clean and comfortable. The host was great at communicating and very thorough with instructions so there was no confusion. Definitely would recommend this spot to anyone!

Accommodates up to 3 NON-SMOKING guests. Toiletries included.  Message me anytime. Hope to welcome you soon!  -Earl
review: My second stay at Earl's place.  It's super clean and he's super fast to respond to messages and the apartment is right in the middle of everything.  Unfortunately I had a couple of clompers who put shoes on and clomped around above me for 90 minutes starting just before 6 am.  Even pulling furniture through the place, but it was time to get up anyway.  Would be happy to stay here a third time when I'm next in town.

description: 1st floor studio in Historic Brownstone 1800's across the street from Washington park. Beautiful woodwork throughout with all the comforts & amenities of home. Quiet area where you can walk or jog in the park or just enjoy a cup of coffee outside. Choice of restaurants and stores on Lark street, movie theater, hospitals and malls all in close proximity. We are located on State street in Albany in a desirable residential area. ((NO PARTIES!!))
review: Stayed at Lloyd's place a second time and it was just as good as the first. No issues at all, the place is fantastic. Extremely clean, easy to find everything that you need, and an excellent location in Albany. Would definitely stay here again and recommend it if you’re looking for a place to stay in the area.

description: A lovely 3 bedroom is apt in Center Square that is perfect for families and traveling professionals.  A 2 min. walk to Washington Park, Lark Street shops and restaurants, and a  5 mins to  Empire Plaza, State Capital and Legislative Office Building or Albany Medical Center, Albany Law School or Albany Medical School. It's the ideal getaway spot for a group of friends, families, or working professionals visiting New York's Capital.
review: I absolutely loved my stay! Beautiful location, host was super responsive and helpful throughout my stay, and photos were accurate! Perfect for singles AND families!

description: (21 years of age or older ONLY) NON- SMOKING.. NO PARTIES Allowed.  Cozy basement apartment in a historic brownstone in the heart of "Center Square".  Surrounded by shops, restaurants, and night life. Walking distance to Albany Med, State Offices, The State Capital, and The Empire State Plaza. 30 mins from Saratoga Raceway. 50 mins from Lake George. 1/2 mile Palace theater
review: We would definitely recommend this apartment for anyone visiting Albany! Great space, quiet and close to everything you need and want in Albany. This apartment has it all ..........and an amazingly comfortable bed! We loved it!

description: Regular breakfast free  Lunch packed $5 Dinner Plate $10  We updated cleaning protocol because of COVID-19 pandemic  OUR PRIORITY IS ORGANIC LIFE SO OTHER THING IS LESS IMPORTANT  FREE LAUNDRY  AIR CONDITIONING  No parking space on premises just street parking . Internet High speed WiFi, This building is 100 years older. We don't use chemical pesticides ,chemical cleaning stuff.We use Vinegar,baking powder,biological pesticides . Therefore not fancy clea
review: Great place.  Adam prepares healthy food options for you to enjoy.  Thank you for a great stay.

description: Live in style! This TRENDY apt has top quality appliances, modern finishes and is located at a PRIME downtown Albany location.   4K Smart TV with Netflix, fully stocked kitchen & bathroom with all travel essentials, high speed internet! Free street parking. Available for long term stays!  **Important To prevent underage parties, weekend bookings are only available for 25+. When reserving, please share a photo of your ID that matches your name on Airbnb or your LinkedIn profile.
review: Very nice and comfortable place. Linda was an awesome hostess. They was very quick with responding to our messages. I will definitely stay here again next time I visit Albany.

description: Welcome to our garden apartment, nestled in a walkable neighborhood filled with diverse restaurants, cozy pubs, and the picturesque Washington Park. The apartment features a sound-dampened bedroom, ensuring a serene and peaceful retreat. Just steps away, you'll find the New York State Capitol, Empire State Plaza, The Egg, and the New York State Museum, making this location ideal for both relaxation and exploration.
review: We had a great stay here! Perfect location with lots to do in walking distance. Clean and comfortable. We were offered a pack n play for our toddler which was a nice touch, even though we didn’t need it. Easy self check in. Street parking- we didn’t have any issue with finding a spot by the apartment. We’d definitely stay again!

description: Old style comfort.  Large high ceiling studio w kitchen facilities and private walk in shower    Queen size bed.  Lots of windows.  Ceiling fan. Window a/c.   Old world ambience with large mirrors and wallpaper.  Street level.  No stairs.  Parking at the door in driveway.  Porch w rocking chairs. Lots of garden. Park  called Greenway across the street.  Walk to post office hospital lots of eateries Starbucks.  15minute bus service from new Scotland ave to downtown.  Wi-Fi 5 G. Lockbox entry.
review: Elizabeth is a delightful person. I couldn’t reach her until the 2nd day and had some trouble with the hot plate, but once I reached her she attentively got things working . I would just advise you not to use both burners on the hot plate and make toast at the same time.   The neighborhood is wonderful. The street opens up into a broad courtyard that is peaceful with lots of old trees, birds, nice houses, and hardly any traffic.  Dog walkers is about all I saw.  It’s one block from New Scotland but completely quiet.

description: Our recently remodeled one-bedroom apartment boasts a park view, easy parking and is close to downtown Albany. We have an easy walk to groceries, Government Buildings, Albany Law School, College of Pharmacy, VA and Albany Medical Center Hospitals, and Lark Street restaurants and nightlife. The living area features a queen size futon and views of the sunset most evenings, and the bedroom features a luxurious queen-sized memory foam bed and access to our quiet garden where the sun rises.
review: Great spot if you want to get a feel for Albany.  A nice cozy modern apartment, was perfect for our stay.  James left us some delicious bagels and jams/spreads for breakfeast. Only a short drive to some bars and great resturaunts. You can also get to different areas of Albany and other towns easily from this location.  The apartment is very clean, would stay here again.

review: Our stay was nice. We felt this was exactly how the photos presented it to be and the cleanliness was great. We wished there was a light at the front door as we arrived after dark. The keypad was tough to lock when leaving but she does specify how to get it to lock and that it may be tricky. The location is right in the city so there was normal city noise, however at nighttime it appeared for us to be a bit unsafe of an environment and utilized an Uber instead of walking as originally planned. Also we were unsure of where to park, and were notified on this app in the middle of the night to move the car, which we did not see until morning time upon checking out. Thankfully no ticket or towing. Overall was great and we would stay again if we are in the area for an event.

review: We liked the apartment a lot, and would recommend it to anyone staying in Albany.  One minor point - we were using the apartment to cook and there was a lot of leftover takeaway food in the oven from a previous guest which we had to clean out ourselves (easy to miss though). If it wasn’t for that I would have given 5 stars.

review: This was a great place to stay. The space was really nice and clean and chic. The location was right downtown. The host was great and gave us a spot in the private parking lot! Will return again whenever I am in Albany!

review: We spent one night in this cozy apartment. Very clean and comfortable place. Easy check in and Earl was a very attentive host. Thank you!

description: Enjoy a comfortable stay in a truly one of a kind home in Albany. This former retreat has  loads of amenities to enjoy; two dining room, two living rooms, three porches, a full kitchen, huge yard, gazebo, coffee bar and more! The room has a desk and TV. Walk to eateries, grocery, and cinema.
review: It’s very rare to find a comfortable bed at an AirBnB; this mattress, bed, linens, and pillows here; they were better than a 5 star hotel’s bed!! It was clean, quiet, peaceful, I slept like a baby, and I will ask to stay here again! The neighborhood was gorgeous and lined with beautiful trees. The hosts were gracious and accommodating. It was an all-around great experience! Thank you!  Kelly  Gizmo xo 🐶

review: This is the second time I’ve stayed with Elizabeth. Very homey studio w/ full size fridge and coffee provided. Amazing value for price!

description: This newly renovated 2BR/1BA apartment, situated on the first floor of a two-family house, offers sophistication and space. Enjoy a separate entrance and convenient location in downtown Albany, with grocery stores, restaurants, bars, nightlife, hospitals, and parks just steps away. With public transportation and ample street parking nearby, this is the perfect place to call home.
review: Elizabeth was a lovely host.  Her place was stylish, comfortable and clean.  There were many thoughtful touches throughout.  In particular, we found the beds to be comfortable.  Additionally, Elizabeth was kind, helpful and very quick to respond to our numerous requests during the trip.  The biggest issue we had was that because the apartment is in an old building, we could not control the heat in the apartment.  It was uncomfortably hot in there at times and we had trouble sleeping with the heat.  Elizabeth did respond and try to solve the issue, but this was a factor that made our stay less than ideal.  It’s also important to note that the apartment is on a Main Street and we heard music playing loudly through the night, though I can’t say if that was due to the busy street or just someone’s apartment in the building or a neighboring one.

description: Stylish 1BR + loft apartment in downtown Albany with private second-floor entry and secure building access. Walk to shops, restaurants, and historic sites. Features full kitchen, Smart TV, and cozy, modern design. Great for work trips or getaways in the city. Parking not included — but you’ll be right in the center of it all!
review: The building changed it's entry method and still had some kinks, but the host went out of their way to help. We attended the Women's NCAA basketball tournament at the MVP Arena. It was an easy walk to parking garages, the arena, and many restaurants and bars.

description: Urban Oasis!  2nd Floor master bedroom in residential home.  Queen sized bed. Private bath. Mini-refrigerator, microwave and sitting area in room. Shared entrance but access to full kitchen, bath, bedroom, laundry and parking. Walking distance to Albany Med, Albany Pharmacy, Albany Law School, College of St. Rose and Sage College.  On Main bus line.  10 minute drive from downtown
review: The room is much bigger and prettier in person! Parking is readily available in front of the house on the street. Check in was simple and smooth. The room was immaculately clean. I loved that the sheets smelled fresh out of the wash!  Ed was very responsive and hospitable. He recommended this amazing breakfast place close by that we went both days we were there. The house is located close to the city center and was perfect for us!

description: Spacious studio with hardwood floors, fully equipped kitchen, clean and bright. Large modern bath .  Full Cable TV and WiFi. Walking distance to the new Renaissance Hotel. Walk to everything downtown! The Empire Plaza  and the Egg are  across the street.You can't get any closer, to the MVP Arena,  as well as Restaurants, bars, churches. Walk to  Capital and the new Capital Convention Center. Laundry facilities in the apartment
review: Gregg is a friendly and responsive host and he made communication easy. The place was perfect for taking the bar exam - walking distance from the general testing center and a 7 min drive from Albany Law School. The place was secure and spacious, and the area was quiet.

review: Terra was amazing and so was her place. The bed felt like sleeping on clouds, now I feel like I need a new bed. The place is completely remodeled and beautiful.  Like the 1 reviewer said the place is by a bar but with the fan provided I had no issue falling asleep. The place is right the middle of everything and walking distance to the egg.  I would 100% stay here again. Like the place terra the host is amazing.

description: This historic property is close to everything making it easy to plan your visit. The room is tastefully decorated with a spilt king purple hybrid 4 mattress, sitting area, and well lit desk. There’s a large closet and entertainment center as well. The bathroom is shared with one other room. A second shared bathroom is on the first floor of the home.
review: Eclectic, chic, well appointed…take every positive adjective you can think of and apply it to Tomas’s listing. Like one of the other guests said, “I want to live here!” Me too y’all, me too.

description: This is Albany’s best! Enjoy a cozy stay in one of Albany’s oldest and most unique homes. This historic farmhouse was built in 1821 and completely restored and renovated in 2010. Your room is the master suite complete with a deep soaking tub, remote controlled gas fireplace, king size bed, single pull out American Leather couch, and double sinks. The pool is open from May until October. Hot tub is open year round. Enjoy a perfect romantic getaway!
review: What a beautiful place! I thoroughly enjoyed my stay here. The bed was super comfy, and I had a great night’s sleep.  It was dark when I arrived, and I put directions in through Waze, and it took turning around a few times to locate the house, but it’s right there. The home is stunning and hosts are nice and helpful. I’d love to stay again if I’m ever in the area again. Thank you!

description: Enjoy Pine Hills, one of the last walking communities in Albany. Walking distance to many popular restaurants, food market, hospitals, parks, schools, movie theater, pharmacy, library and laundromat.  Keep it simple at this peaceful, private and centrally-located place.
review: Great location. Very close to several dining locations! Nice host who was very quick to respond to any questions! WiFi was spotty at times but was able to reconnect pretty quickly.

description: This unique apartment is designed after the rich boxing history of Mohammed Ali in the old Public School 14 Building.   Nearby ￮ 3 Min to Times Union Center ￮ 5 Min to Albany Law ￮ 7 Min to Palace Theater  ￮ 10-15 min to SUNY & St. Rose  Ask us for more info!  Airports ￮ 18 Min to Albany International Airport  Amenities ￮ Full-sized Pool Table ￮ Designer Curated Aesthetics ￮ Wide-Open for Mingling ￮ King Bed ￮ Work Station ￮ Yoga Station  Listing ￮ Entire Apartment for 4-6
review: We stayed for a weekend while visiting friends and family. Diana was very reachable throughout the whole weekend for anything we needed! Loved the pool table and my boyfriend was obsessed with the video game as well. Easily ordered Uber’s to get around, and close enough to bars and restaurants in Albany. The snacks provided are a nice touch as well!

description: The best location in Albany. This room is cozy with large windows. The closet is big and ideal for longer stays. You’ll live the living areas with ornate woodwork and natural light throughout. Walk to eateries, grocery, and cinema. The yard is massive with a screened in gazebo. Come relax!
review: Enjoyed my stay at Thomas’s listing. The house was nice and very clean. Thomas was easy to communicate with.

description: (21 years of age or older ONLY) NON- SMOKING.. NO PARTIES Allowed.  Cozy basement apartment in a historic brownstone in the heart of "Center Square".  Surrounded by shops, restaurants, and night life. Walking distance to Albany Med, State Offices, The State Capital, and The Empire State Plaza. 30 mins from Saratoga Raceway. 50 mins from Lake George. 1/2 mile Palace theater
review: Sue's is an excellent host. Her AirBnB was clean and in a great location. It is a great place to stay for a weekend get-away in Albany.

description: Spacious warm studio in 1840 house close to hospitals and downtown. Own bath flat screen cable tv wireless internet ground floor. Double bed coffee tea fridge microwave and parking. Suit 1. On park walk to post office cvs Chinese sports bar. Comfortable and decorated with taste. Irish host
review: It’s a private room with an attached private bath. Furnished just as nice as any B&B. Liz and her brother were there when I arrived and she was very hospitable and accommodating. Also great communication in advance. Would definitely stay there again.

description: BOOK our affordable basement-level suite in the quiet neighborhood of Albany's Pastures. Great location near Albany Med, MVP Arena, Empire State Plaza, Library, Lark Street, State Offices, courts, restaurants, entertainment; easy access to local and regional bus routes and highways (I-787, I-90 and I-87). 10-hour metered parking in front, free after 5 PM and weekends.  Accommodates up to 3 NON-SMOKING guests. Toiletries included.  Message me anytime. Hope to welcome you soon!  -Earl
review: Earl was a great host.  I appreciated the fact he was do accommodating at a very last minute basis. Space was a little small but was perfect for what I needed

description: Welcome to our studio which located at hearth of Albany. Close to Bus Station, Train Station, Business and finance district, MVP Arena, SUNY Albany headquarters, night life and historic places. All kind of restaurant and bars in walking distance. 1 bedroom with queen bed , bathroom and kitchen. Kitchen has all utensils.
review: Inside was ok, but the building and block left something to be desired. I probably wouldn’t stay again, I just didn’t feel very safe in that neighborhood.  AC was working  in the bedroom, but the rest of the apartment was unbearably hot.

description: Welcome to the Plaza Suite, a newly renovated studio condo in an historic Center Square mansion.  Enter through a grand reception hall/art gallery and climb the oak staircase to the sunny and spacious second floor apartment. There's a nice view of State Street and the Empire State Plaza.  Features include: a new fully equipped kitchen, comfy lounge area, dining /work table, renovated vintage bathroom, walk-in closet and new queen bed. Feel free to enjoy a glass of wine in the art gallery.
review: Would definitely stay again. David was always quick to respond, with easy check in instructions listed. Really eclectic spot!

Great location near Albany Med, MVP Arena, Empire State Plaza, Library, Lark Street, State Offices, courts, restaurants, entertainment; easy access to local and regional bus routes and highways (I-787, I-90 and I-87). 10-hour metered parking in front, free after 5 PM and weekends. description: The room is large with Western exposure giving more bright light in the afternoons. There is a desk for working and a closet and dresser. The room is filled with original art.
review: Diana’s home was lovely and restful. I enjoyed my night there. Diana is a very friendly host, and very accommodating. I highly recommend her place.

description: Welcome to the Plaza Suite, a newly renovated studio condo in an historic Center Square mansion.  Enter through a grand reception hall/art gallery and climb the oak staircase to the sunny and spacious second floor apartment. There's a nice view of State Street and the Empire State Plaza.  Features include: a new fully equipped kitchen, comfy lounge area, dining /work table, renovated vintage bathroom, walk-in closet and new queen bed. Feel free to enjoy a glass of wine in the art gallery.
review: We had a great stay on State Street.  The place was well appointed and very inviting. We took the advice of the listing and, after dinner at a place on Lark Street, had our glass of wine while touring the artwork in the halls, and it had quite a range.  Back in the room, we lounged on the couch and enjoyed the view which included some of the Plaza lit up for the night. We had such a lovely time there for our 6th anniversary! Thank you so much!

description: Stay in our 4-bedroom townhouse-style 2nd+3rd floor apartment nestled in a renovated, historic 200-year-old building located in Albany's serene Pastures neighborhood. Just a short walk from landmarks like the Albany Medical Center, Times Union Center, Empire State Plaza, and vibrant Lark Street. Easy access to I-787, I-90 & I-87. Four queen beds and a queen air mattress accommodate up to 10. Ideal for large families and groups. Dive into Albany's history with modern comforts.
review: Would stay here again. Was a perfect location for mvp! He was very responsive and easy to communicate with! All 6 of us were very comfortable and happy with the stay!

description: This stylish light-filled space is perfect for traveling professionals, cozy 2 bedroom apartment minutes from hospitals, parks, and great restaurants. Very walkable location right next to Albany Medical Center.  ~ fast wi-fi ~fully equipped kitchen  ~55” smart tv ~free off street parking  ~contactless self check-in
review: Michaela save us on a last minute situation. We were able to reserve the property less than 12 hours prior to arrival. We were left on a jam by another host that failed to confirm our reservation and Michaela was very responsive and helpful.

description: Private studio apartment with separate entrance on the garden level of owner-occupied home. Quiet and walkable area short distance from Empire Plaza, Capitol, Albany Med, Center Square, and Downtown. Plenty of FREE on-street parking available. Self check in, so we don’t have to interact unless you want to. Let us know if you have any questions and look forward to hosting you!
review: This was probably one of the best Airbnb's I have ever stayed in. Jake and Kate were so accommodating, and there was even a cute little book with all of the past visitors that had great things to say too! My brother really enjoyed our 3 night stay here, and if/when we return to Albany, I'll definitely book again!

description: Spacious studio with hardwood floors, fully equipped kitchen, clean and bright. Large modern bath .  Full Cable TV and WiFi. Walking distance to the new Renaissance Hotel. Walk to everything downtown! The Empire Plaza  and the Egg are  across the street.You can't get any closer, to the MVP Arena,  as well as Restaurants, bars, churches. Walk to  Capital and the new Capital Convention Center. Laundry facilities in the apartment
review: The bed was wonderfully comfortable, the location perfect for walking to attractions as well as plenty of bars and restaurants. There's several parks in walking distance as well, including one across the street. It was a great spot in the heart of Albany. Greg was great at responding regarding my parking request, too. I recommend making arrangements for parking in advance, since it's a crowded historical neighborhood. And for me the old house and it's character are charming. I completely appreciated there was coffee and a few kitchen essentials to help me after a late night arrival after airline delays. Self check in is my favorite, and it was easy, even in the dark.

description: Beautiful and spacious 2 bedroom, 1.5 bathroom in a downtown historic brownstone. Recently renovated with modern updates. 2 floors of living space. Outdoor space. Walking distance to many points of interests, restaurants, bars, and breweries.
review: I stayed here for one night while passing through Albany and really enjoyed it. The place was clean, comfortable, and had everything I needed. Check-in was easy, and the host provided clear instructions, which I appreciated. The location is great—right in downtown Albany, so it was super convenient to walk to a few local spots. I checked out a nearby bar and had dinner at a restaurant just a few blocks away—both had a nice vibe and good food. It was nice being able to explore a bit without needing to drive. Overall, a solid stay. Would definitely book again if I'm in the area.

description: This historic property is close to everything making it easy to plan your visit. The room is tastefully decorated with a spilt king purple hybrid 4 mattress, sitting area, and well lit desk. There’s a large closet and entertainment center as well. The bathroom is shared with one other room. A second shared bathroom is on the first floor of the home.
review: This is absolutely a fantastic stay. Easy everything, clean, amazing surroundings.  I enjoyed my immensely.

description: Discover Lark Street - A Hip Albany Neighborhood. With countless restaurants, cafes, art galleries, special events, and more, this funky arts and entertainment district is a major Albany hotspot. The Spot on Lark is a beautifully renovated 1850s era 4 - story brick building, in the heart of Lark Street, and a perfect oasis to relax and explore. We have taken ample time to carefully craft this space with tasteful décor, to maximize its potential and ensure your enjoyment
review: The apartment is bright, airy and well decorated and the wifi is strong. There are plenty of great restaurants, shops and a grocery store nearby. Brian was easy to interact with and quick to reply to any questions I had. I would happily stay here again if I find myself in Albany.

description: Cute single family bungalow (1200sqft) in a convenient location with the lots of restaurants, bars and shops right around the corner.   Totally renovated with open floor plan.  77” 2023 LG B3 OLED TV  just added to living room with Sonos surround + sub!  3 Bedrooms with 1 King bed, 2 Queen beds, 1 Full sized bed and 2 airbeds can be added upon request.  Easy Parking two lane driveway by house.  $50 pet fee, please inquire before booking, thank you!
review: This was a *perfect* stay for several extended family members and myself when we gathered to visit other family in Albany. Lots of beds, extremely clean, and Piotr was flexible with an early check-in. Exactly what we needed!

description: Stay in Albany's Grand House! Relax in this gorgeous, light-filled 600-sf guest suite in the historic Mansion District with dramatic 14-ft ceilings, marble fireplaces, modern art, fresh flowers & plants. Suite includes bedroom, living room w/sleeper sofa, work station & private bath. Perfect for couples or a family! Walk to downtown, MVP Arena, Lark Street, bars & restaurants. 24/7 entry. EV charger (non Tesla). Lovely garden. Coffee, snacks & reliable WiFi. Super clean, comfortable & private.
review: The hosts was super friendly and the place was awesome! The place is close by from the train station and was even more beautiful that pictures. The living room and bedroom were extremely clean and spacious. The private bathroom was very nice and clean as well. Phat and Karley were responsive and so kind, offering to give us a ride to and from the train station. We also got great recommendations on which restaurants to visit. If life would ever bring us to Albany again, we will definitely return to this Airbnb!

description: This full apartment is located on the 3rd floor in this beautiful Victorian. All the comforts of home. Nothing shared,has a full bathtub,full kitchen,one bedroom with a queen bed. Living room and an office,located next to Albany Medical Center and close to law schools and universities.
review: Thank you! This place really suited our needs while in Albany. I would recommend this apartment for those wanting good accommodation near the colleges of Sage.

description: Welcome to the Plaza Suite, a newly renovated studio condo in an historic Center Square mansion.  Enter through a grand reception hall/art gallery and climb the oak staircase to the sunny and spacious second floor apartment. There's a nice view of State Street and the Empire State Plaza.  Features include: a new fully equipped kitchen, comfy lounge area, dining /work table, renovated vintage bathroom, walk-in closet and new queen bed. Feel free to enjoy a glass of wine in the art gallery.
review: Overall the stay at David's place was very good and could have been great except for an incident Friday night involving the first floor guest(s). When I returned  to the house after attening a concert there were several police officers at the house responding to the noise and other unacceptable activity based out of the first floor space. David was on site and was resposive and resloved the issue. I was told that in the course of events a permanent renter at the house was injured. I am a very savvy traveler and accustomed to radom unsettling events so my response was measured - except in response to the Albany Police Officer I spoke to who was extremely rude and dsimissive. That too was no surprise. I believe David was very responsive and handled the scene as well as could be expected. I do wish he would have sent me a private message to inquire how I was doing before I checked out.

description: This beautifully renovated and brightly decorated brownstone in historic Albany is your perfect getaway. Located just minutes from charming downtown, guests can enjoy all Albany has to offer.   This spacious bedroom and living area has an abundance of natural light creates a very comfortable environment! This property comes with a fully stocked kitchen, in unit washer/dryer, free resident lot parking, and a fenced shared backyard with bbq for guests to enjoy.  Long term stays available.
review: We had a fabulous one night stay at Linda’s apartment. It was exactly as the pictures show and her directions were spot-on. The place is very clean, the bed super comfy and the shower hot and strong (our 3 most important things!). There was plenty of room. The lighting was great. We even loved the coffee. We didn’t mind the stairs (we are in our 60’s), but be warned that they are curvy, and once you’re up to the third floor, you may not want to go back down for a while. Amtrak trains go by right across the street but the place is well insulated and so quiet you barely hear them. We also slept very well with no evening noise. The neighbors were so friendly and helpful. The apartment looks to be in an area undergoing gentrification (maybe described as “gritty”) but we loved it and felt totally safe. We would absolutely stay again and recommend it to others.

description: 1st floor studio in Historic Brownstone 1800's across the street from Washington park. Beautiful woodwork throughout with all the comforts & amenities of home. Quiet area where you can walk or jog in the park or just enjoy a cup of coffee outside. Choice of restaurants and stores on Lark street, movie theater, hospitals and malls all in close proximity. We are located on State street in Albany in a desirable residential area. ((NO PARTIES!!))
review: Lloyd was an exceptional host! His response times were expedient, and his air bnb was extremely clean, cozy, and unique. It’s located only minutes from great restaurants and entertainment, and the view of Washington park was beautiful. We will definitely be back!

description: Welcome to our newly renovated 4BR/2BA Dutch-inspired cottage on 1.5 private acres in a forest setting. Perfect for family/friend gatherings. Enjoy an open floor plan with a fully equipped kitchen, cozy living, and all the modern amenities you need for a relaxing visit.  Located only a few minutes from downtown Albany, SUNY Albany, AMC & Albany College of Pharmacy.
review: Nanette is a great host and her property has been beautifully renovated and styled. We felt right at home from the moment we walked in. Location is easy to find, peaceful and quiet. We have no hesitation in recommending Nanette’s property.

description: Escape to an ultra-modern blackjack lounge with this unique studio for two. Located in the heart of central downtown Albany, you're only minutes away from the Times Union Center and major tourist attractions.  Or, stay here while you visit your kids at nearby SUNY Albany, Saint Rose, and other colleges - then come back to your room in style.
review: Not exactly a great location- disappointing coming from out of town- there was nothing around the area. The unit was decent, roomy but painted over. I didn't really see $160 a night as a good deal as the buyer

description: Charming 1 Bedroom + Workstation apartment in Downtown Albany. Centrally located and easy walking! Free Fast and Furious Arcade Game. Pets allowed! 2nd FL apartment with an elevator on site!   Enjoy hardwood floors, a custom kitchen, soaking bathtub, and central AC. Features a Queen bed, pull-out couch, workstation with monitor, and free WiFi. Includes access to a shared washer/dryer.   For long term stays over 1 month, a monthly parking space will be included. Parking garage close by.
review: Was great to stay at Dillon’s place while my husband and I were in town for a concert at MVP arena- super easy walk! As others have mentioned heard neighbors/dogs a little bit, but didn’t bother us too much! Just a couple minor cleanliness things (hair on pillow/shower), but would recommend for anyone needing a quick stay over in downtown Albany!

description: Enjoy the private and clean comfort of our freshly renovated bungalow in Albany's quaint Helderberg Neighborhood. Some of the regions most cherished restaurants on New Scotland Avenue are within a two block walk. Close accessibility to both Albany Med Hospital and Saint Peters Hospital as well as Albany Law, The Albany School of Pharmacy and Russell Sage College. This home features a newly renovated fully functioning kitchen, a luxurious bathroom with a walk-in shower and full size tub.
review: We had a lovely stay at Dan's place from start to finish.  The home was cozy and warm despite the freezing temperatures outside.  After the snowfall , Dan was outside shoveling and clearing the walkway late in the evening and then once again bright and early the following day. We certainly will return when visiting the area again.

description: The room is large with Western exposure giving more bright light in the afternoons. There is a desk for working and a closet and dresser. The room is filled with original art.
review: Excellent place to stay in a quiet Albany neighborhood. Easy street parking.  Bedroom is as described and Diana is a friendly welcoming host.

description: WELCOME! Our listing is designed with the business or casual traveler in mind This beautiful suite will give you all the comforts of home! Quiet residential area for nice walks and great restaurants. Close to all the highways as well. All bedding & pillow cases have PREMIUM protective covers on them at all times so feel completely safe and protected. All remotes and light switches are wiped down with Clorox wipes after each guest.  ((IMPORTANT)) NO PARTIES or SMOKING in or around the home
review: Lloyd’s place was perfect. Clear and through check-in directions. Super accommodating of a last minute request. Best of all the bed was super comfortable!

description: Come relax at a Hidden Gem in the heart of Albany, NY. It is centrally located between Albany Med hospitals and Saint Peters Hospital and in close proximity to the downtown college campuses of UAlbany, Saint Rose, Albany Pharmaceutical, Albany Law school and medical school, and the New York State capital.  Some of the best restaurants and pubs are just minutes from this central location.   It is only a 15-minute ride to the Albany International Airport.
review: Nori’s place was very comfortable. It’s always important to us to have a clean place to stay and comfortable beds to sleep in. Both of these were fulfilled. We all slept great! There is a Keurig which was great and put to use. If you are a tea drinker there was a tea kettle and tea available. The bathrooms were clean and well equipped with soaps and shampoo. I would definitely stay here again.

description: Urban Oasis!  2nd Floor master bedroom in residential home.  Queen sized bed. Private bath. Mini-refrigerator, microwave and sitting area in room. Shared entrance but access to full kitchen, bath, bedroom, laundry and parking. Walking distance to Albany Med, Albany Pharmacy, Albany Law School, College of St. Rose and Sage College.  On Main bus line.  10 minute drive from downtown
review: This is a beautiful suite in a grand old house across from a park.  The bed was comfortable, and the sitting area (two comfortable chairs, large screen TV and a fireplace) really made the suite feel like home.  It was a nice mix of old and new: classic tiles in the bathroom, with a new shower head (good temperature and pressure) and plenty of counter space and drawers, as needed.  Ed was also super accommodating and flexible. Highly recommended.

description: Enjoy a spacious yet cozy home in a quiet neighborhood with off-street parking. Minutes from restaurants, shopping, universities (UAlbany, Sage, St. Rose), parks, museums, hospitals(Albany Med, St.Peters) and State Capital Offices for those traveling for business.  We’re right off the main highway leading to the World Famous Saratoga Race Track (30 min) and Adirondack Mountains/Lake George (50 min)!   From this Air Force Family to yours, welcome to our home.
review: My coworkers and I stayed here for a week while working on an out of town project. Our entire stay was easy and enjoyable. We had plenty of space for the 5 of us and will likely book again for the next phase of the project.

review: This was a great find in a beautiful historic district in downtown Albany. Very close walking distance to all the great sites, situated on a quite green street. Truly a pleasure staying here and the hosts provided everything needed to make the stay comfortable and convenient. Highly recommended to anyone traveling to the capital area!

review: Honestly, I really just can't say enough good things about Lloyd's place on Washington Park. This will be the first place I look to the next time I'm in Albany. Lloyd's communication was excellent, his instructions were timely, clear and helpful. He has literally thought of everything. Have a question about something in the apartment? Lloyd is very likely to have already posted a small, tidy sign or note nearby to answer your questions. The check-in was very easy, and we loved the keypad lock (less to keep up with). I told my husband I could cheerfully live in this beautiful little studio apartment -- it's that good. Plus, the bed was literally the most comfortable I've ever slept on in an AirBnB. We were anxious about the street parking but we pulled right up and parked in front of the building at 6pm with no problem (can't guarantee that will be everyone's experience, but it sure worked for us). You cannot go wrong with this rental. Book with confidence!

description: Step into the charming and comfy 1BR/1BA apartment in the heart of Albany, NY. review: Terra's apartment is great -- it has everything you need, is clean, and is in a good location.   As a host, Terra was wonderful and very accommodating / accessible.  I highly recommend staying here.

review: A perfect spot for my trip to the Capitol. Really clear check in instructions with detailed step by step photos were so helpful. David was quick to respond to my parking questions.

description: Beautiful 2nd Floor apartment in the heart of Albany. We are located just steps away from Washington Park, Albany Med, local restaurants and bars. This space features refinished original hardwood floors, exposed brick and a built in fireplace with 50" Smart TV. Magnificent large kitchen. Second floor balcony. Free street parking only.
review: Scott had a wonderful home, everything was clean, close to the main parts of Albany. He responded in a timely manner , give good local advice. Would recommend to anyone visiting Albany.

description: Immaculate two level 3000 Sq. Ft. Bright & Sunny Cape Cod with 4 large bedrooms, Den, 2 full baths, living, dining & kitchen. Central Air & Heat. The house is situated in upscale Pine hills neighborhood on a quite dead end street with a Creek flowing through the back of the property. Peaceful & Serene View from Deck. Convenient location. Parking, Streaming Channels & WiFi included.  Relax on the deck overlooking creek with nature sounds. Short drive  to Ski Resorts.
review: This is a huge home at a great price overlooking a creek with a deck in a beautiful area. Staying here was just what we needed during our travels. With such amazing value, I even wondered if it was a share when we walked in but it was all ours! Buddha is in the garden and treats his guests with all the house a family could need. THANKS AGAIN!

description: Private bedroom, shared living room, and shared bathroom on the 2nd floor in my personal home with 2-3 guests. 3 fans in each bedroom. 16 inch memory foam mattress. Mini fridge, microwave, coffee maker, and toaster in the room.  No ac and no kitchen use. Self-check-in Owner-occupied house. On bus lines. You’ll love my place because of its uniqueness, location, and vintage finds.  Direct bus line to Greyhound, Amtrak, Mall, Empire State Plaza, , and Suny Albany.  Free street parking only.
review: Host was responsive and helpful in resolving a technical issue. Home was great, quite, and clean. thank you so much.

description: This charming townhouse is located in the historic district of Albany. This stay is surrounded by many great indoor and outdoor attractions. The State Capitol is a short 5 minute walk away. For those who enjoy trying new food or love their morning coffee, you can visit one of the many restaurants, bars and cafes located on Lark Street. No matter what reason you have for visiting Albany, this home away from home is the perfect stay!
review: Great host! The home was very clean, warm and cozy. We spent Christmas here and Jared left a nice gift for my family. Additionally, the house was very clean and came with kitchen filled with pots and pans. Jared was very responsive and communicative throughout our stay. I would definitely stay again when Albany and unreservedly recommend here.

Features include: a new fully equipped kitchen, comfy lounge area, dining /work table, renovated vintage bathroom, walk-in closet and new queen bed. Feel free to enjoy a glass of wine in the art gallery.
review: We enjoyed staying in this old home with lots of character. It was very clean and organized. I appreciated the selection of tea and coffee. The instructions on how to find and enter the place were straightforward. My only gripe was the parking, which can't be helped. Again, the instructions on where to park are easy to follow. If you're out and about during the day, it's not a problem. Parking on the square is close, easy, and free at night! David was easy to communicate with.

description: BOOK this 2-bed fl 2 apt. in a renovated historic two-century-old building in a quiet neighborhood of Albany's Pastures. review: This Airbnb is a gem! It's cozy and furnished with love to details. Located in a beautiful wooden house in a typical American neighborhood it offers all you need for a comfy stay while being affordable! (Plus a beautiful wooden floor that not only European hipsters will love.) Though we didn't have the opportunity to meet Elizabeth in person, communication was easy-going and replies were fast, including detailed instructions for an effortless check-in. Can recommend it in any case and would love to come back someday. This accommodation might work best for those with a (rental) car or those who rely on shuttle services like Lyft or Uber or bring/share a bike. Similar to other cities in the US of that size public transit is not fully developed and the Airbnb might be not accessible very well in off-peak time—though getting around by bus in Albany is definitely possible.

It is simple, uncluttered and clean, with plenty of light.  Check in is straightforward and easy.  We had absolutely no problems and enjoyed staying at Jerry’s place very much!
