review: Great place to stay! I had the best time there. Cute kitchen 🥰. There are so many good restaurants and coffee shops around. The place is just like in the photos. It is cozy and warm. I felt like I was home. Thank you, Sugey for being so nice and helpful.

description: A lovely 3 bedroom is apt in Center Square that is perfect for families and traveling professionals.  A 2 min. walk to Washington Park, Lark Street shops and restaurants, and a  5 mins to  Empire Plaza, State Capital and Legislative Office Building or Albany Medical Center, Albany Law School or Albany Medical School. It's the ideal getaway spot for a group of friends, families, or working professionals visiting New York's Capital.
review: Lori’s place was beautiful. There’s a lot of windows to allow plenty of sunlight in and located in a fun part of town. Lori was a great host and was very accommodating

description: This amazing Airbnb will give you all the comforts of home! Tastefully decorated with everything you need and then some!!  -> Grab-N-Go items (Coffee, Tea, Light Snacks) -> Smart LED Tvs in (2) Livingrooms & (2) Bedrooms -> NordicTrack & Peloton bicycles -> Smart locks with keyless entry -> Fast wireless WiFi -> Queen beds with premium mattresses & pillow covers -> Fully equipped + utensil stocked kitchen + Keurig Coffee  -> Full size washer/dryer   And much more so come and enjoy your stay!
review: We had a wonderful stay and Richard and Pricilla’s place! They really made us feel like a guest in their home. We’ve stayed at quite a few airbnbs and Richard and Priscilla’s place was stocked above an beyond what we typically experience. The fridge was stocked with water and seltzer and there were plenty snacks- something we always forget to grab- and it was so helpful to have that extra added touch. Their place was clean and cozy- there were plenty of linens and blankets. We were able to walk to many restaurants and Empire Live was just a quick mile walk. There was a glitch through airbnb to send the automatic check-in instructions, but Richard was *very* responsive and quick to resolve the issue! Highly recommend staying at Richard and Pricilla’s place!

description: Larson Gold sits in Albany's vibrant Center Square district, offering easy access to dining, shopping, and entertainment. With excellent public transportation and nearby highways, convenience is at your doorstep. Experience the city's rich cultural scene, diverse dining options, and lively nightlife, all within walking distance. Don't miss out on this perfect blend of historic charm and modern amenities.
review: Had a fine stay here. The place was cozy and warm but there were lots of stairs to walk up. Didn’t quite anticipate that so be weary if you have a hard time with stairs. The space itself was clean and a great bang for your buck but the area was a bit weird. Immediately upon arrival we were harassed by 2 homeless men. It’s fine we are from a city with lots of homeless but was not the most pleasant greeting. Make sure your belongings come up with you just to be safe and make sure you obey parking rules (can be a bit confusing) overall I would say the place was just fine for what we needed. We would stay here again!

description: Stay in our 4-bedroom townhouse-style 2nd+3rd floor apartment nestled in a renovated, historic 200-year-old building located in Albany's serene Pastures neighborhood. Just a short walk from landmarks like the Albany Medical Center, Times Union Center, Empire State Plaza, and vibrant Lark Street. Easy access to I-787, I-90 & I-87. Four queen beds and a queen air mattress accommodate up to 10. Ideal for large families and groups. Dive into Albany's history with modern comforts.
review: The family really enjoyed the stay (3 bathrooms was a big help for the number of people staying with us: 9). Staying so close to the bus station and Amtrak station was a huge bonus too! Earl was always responsive to any requests or questions that we had.

description: My place is close to University of Albany, shopping malls and plazas, bars, restaurants, the airport, the city center, parks, art and culture. You’ll love my place because of the location, the ambiance, the outdoors space, fully renovated, newly furnished, nice yard, awesome double rear deck,  open floor plan and central air.   My place is good for couples, solo adventurers, business travelers, families (with kids), big groups, and furry friends ($50 pet fee w/ booties included).
review: Piotr's house was perfect for our trip.  We had a group of 4 and Piotr was very accommodating.  The back deck/patio offered a nice place to sit outside and the neighborhood was nice and quiet.  I would definitely stay here again if I were in town.

description: BEAUTIFUL + LUXURIOUS renovated apartment with CHARACTER in a historic building.   This spacious 2 bedroom feature a bright reading nook in the master bedroom, an office space, a soaker tub, 4K Smart TV with Netflix, and high speed internet ready for you to use! It comes with a fully stocked kitchen, in unit washer/dryer, free resident parking, and a fenced shared backyard with bbq for guests to enjoy.
review: Linda was amazing. She was super responsive and helpful. The place was amazing in general. She provided a lot of things for us to use making us feel like home. I will definitely be returning to this place when I come back up to Albany. The one concern I have isn’t necessarily about the place or owner, but there are some sketchy people walking around at night near the gas station. Otherwise, great stay!

description: Comfortable single- family home in quiet residential neighborhood.  Large bathroom with a “guest sink” and two showers to choose from. Comfortable beds and a desk to work at. Free and easy on street parking, bus routes to downtown at both ends of the block. Close to hospitals, Albany JCC, library. Wide variety of restaurants nearby.
review: Diana was a great and helpful host (went above and beyond). Very nice house and neighborhood. Clean room, bathroom, place close to bus stop and downtown.

description: 2-bedroom 1st floor apt. w/ full amenities! Renovated historic 200-year-old building in quiet neighborhood of Albany's Pastures. Great location near Albany Medical Center, MVP Arena, Empire State Plaza, Library, Lark Street, State Offices, courts; easy access to local & regional bus routes and highways (I-787, I-90 & I-87).  Accommodates up to 6 NON-SMOKING guests. Toiletries included.   Save & BOOK this apartment today! Message me anytime. Hope to welcome you soon!  -Earl
review: Stayed for Labor Day weekend. Location was great in downtown. The parking spot and the back entrance was super convenient! Earl (the host) was super quick to respond when we had questions and did a great job being proactive as well!

description: Discover unmatched safety and comfort in Albany's historic "Center Square". Our meticulously sanitized brownstone, located near "Albany Medical" and walking distance to State Offices, is perfect for guests aged 21+ and non-smokers seeking a serene and secure retreat. Enjoy the convenience of a private parking spot just a short walk in back of the building and take advantage of our strategic location for easy access to Saratoga, Lake George, Palace Theatre, The EGG, and downtown Albany.
review: I stayed here while recovering from a medical procedure. The space was sparkling clean. The kitchen was well stocked and we enjoyed cooking dinner during our stay. I was there with my mom who has some trouble with stairs and the flight up to the apartment was hard for her. But otherwise, it was a beautiful stay and I highly recommend Dominick’s space. We would stay here again!

Suit 1. On park walk to post office cvs Chinese sports bar. Comfortable and decorated with taste. Irish host
review: Elizabeth’s place was just as shown in the photos - decorated to suit a Victorian home, with lovely antique tables and pictures and a claw foot bathtub. My goal while there was to focus on a book on writing and it was a perfect spot for it - quiet and peaceful. I’ll be back next time I need some uninterrupted time to write!

review: Wonderful experience. Friendly hosts. Lovely cats! We had a great time in the beautiful suite and backyard. Thank you!

review: Spent a week in the Albany area.  Diana’s place was my haven of rest and relaxation. Everywhere I went parking was alway on my mind and when I was heading to Diana’s place it was alway so nice knowing I had dedicated parking in the back no muss no fuss.

review: The apartment was beautiful. Comfortable, very clean, prime location. Getting into the building was easy and the on site parking was a great bonus given the location. Terra was very courteous and responded quickly.  I am definitely looking forward to using this location again.

We are near everything Albany has to offer.  Washington Park, an 81-acre estate that was designed in the late 1800s, is on the adjacent street.  The New York State Capitol, The MVP Stadium, Albany Medical Center, art museums, and restaurants are a brisk walk away, and it takes about a 5-minute drive to the SUNY Albany campus.
review: Great apartment: clean, smelled nice, we felt right at home, very comfortable. I appreciated the little things like the tea kettle, shower essentials, and chocolates & ice in the kitchen. The place is close to a beautiful park & there are several restaurants and a little market just around the corner. This is a wonderful place to stay for a few nights & I'd definitely come back!

The accommodations are gorgeous and elegant with a combination of great design and small personal touches everywhere. This is a great fit if you need to grade and write (as I did); make a meal (which I also did in the great kitchen); and just enjoy this neighborhood near the governor’s mansion.

Something to keep in mind if you have heavy luggage. Also, it would be great if the host could remove empty bottles from the shower area, as there weren’t any amenities provided. That said, everything else was great, and I’d definitely stay here again. It’s also very close to the bus station, which was a big plus!

The deco will keep you wandering around the rooms just looking at stuff and felt very cozy. 10/10! Thank you sharing your lovely space with us.

description: Place is within 2-3 miles of AMC, St. Peter's,  UAlbany, SUNY, College of St. Rose, Washington park, Empire State Plaza, and many other establishments.  Only 15 minute ride to the airport !
review: Very convenient!!! Location is close to a lot of places in Albany. Great place for anyone staying in the capital region for an undetermined amount of time.

description: This amazing Airbnb will give you all the comforts of home! Tastefully decorated with everything you need and then some!!  -> Grab-N-Go items (Coffee, Tea, Light Snacks) -> Smart LED Tvs in (2) Livingrooms & (2) Bedrooms -> NordicTrack & Peloton bicycles -> Smart locks with keyless entry -> Fast wireless WiFi -> Queen beds with premium mattresses & pillow covers -> Fully equipped + utensil stocked kitchen + Keurig Coffee  -> Full size washer/dryer   And much more so come and enjoy your stay!
review: If you want to stay in a home that's like a retreat in the middle of the city this is the place. The unit has literally EVERYTHING you need. A space for working. A lovely garden in back which is completely private. There are two workout bikes. My daughter and I were able to work out at the same time. Forget your yoga mat? No worries she's got you covered. Highly recommend 💚

description: The room is large with Western exposure giving more bright light in the afternoons. There is a desk for working and a closet and dresser. The room is filled with original art.
review: Truly enjoy the stay! The room was cozy, and the host was incredibly kind and warm. Planning to visit again next year.

description: 1st floor studio in Historic Brownstone 1800's across the street from Washington park. Beautiful woodwork throughout with all the comforts & amenities of home. Quiet area where you can walk or jog in the park or just enjoy a cup of coffee outside. Choice of restaurants and stores on Lark street, movie theater, hospitals and malls all in close proximity. We are located on State street in Albany in a desirable residential area. ((NO PARTIES!!))
review: My friend and I loved this quaint apartment! Lloyd was hospitable and was always in communication.  We left an article of clothing and Lloyd reached out to us to let us know and made arrangements for us to come get it.  Greatly appreciated.  We cannot say enough about our stay.   Charli

description: Regular breakfast free  Lunch packed $5 Dinner Plate $10  We updated cleaning protocol because of COVID-19 pandemic  OUR PRIORITY IS ORGANIC LIFE SO OTHER THING IS LESS IMPORTANT  FREE LAUNDRY  AIR CONDITIONING  No parking space on premises just street parking . Internet High speed WiFi, This building is 100 years older. We don't use chemical pesticides ,chemical cleaning stuff.We use Vinegar,baking powder,biological pesticides . Therefore not fancy clea
review: Adam's place is so unique, in all the best ways. The food - terrific! The room I had was simple, but exactly what I needed for a comfortable night. (Note: Since so many of us depend on our electronic devices now for GPS and communications, I wish more hosts would provide a power strip - Adam does!) He's an engaged and caring host, and I felt so well cared for... what a treat after too many hours driving. I'd gladly return - Thanks, Adam!

description: This amazing historical apartment is located in Downtown Albany, near the Palace Theater, MVP Arena, Capital Repertory Theatre, NYS Museums, restaurants, and cafes. 1 free parking permit space and small pet friendly. Amenities includes Keyless entry, Free wifi, Free Laundry on site, a kids Multi-game table, 1 Queen LED lite bed, with a blowup bed and a pull out couch. Please be cautious about parking. Albany City has street cleaning nights that prohibits certain side parking on Sundays & Mondays
review: If you’re looking for a walkable, downtown place to stay, this is it.  Parking spots were generally available either right in front of the apartment or across the street. No complaints! If you discovered something that needed attention, and let Stephanie know, she was on the case immediately. Very responsive. Enjoy!

description: Welcome to the Mansion Suite, a newly renovated historic gem in the heart of Center Square.  Through a private entrance, down a long foyer, you'll discover the grand Oak Room, an expansive living/dining room with dramatic fireplace mantel, paneling, beamed ceiling, stained glass windows. Adjacent to the lounge, is a stylish and fully equipped  kitchen with new stainless steel appliances.  Both bedrooms have new queen beds, beautiful natural woodwork and overlook a private and quiet courtyard.
review: This place is one of a kind, such a memorable stay! the historic home is unique and has all you need to feel right at home (coffee, drinks, even some oatmeal packets for breakfast). the details within are so interesting. even an art gallery in the (private feeling) common space in the foyer. what a gem. I recommend highly!

description: 2-bedroom 1st floor apt. w/ full amenities! Renovated historic 200-year-old building in quiet neighborhood of Albany's Pastures. Great location near Albany Medical Center, MVP Arena, Empire State Plaza, Library, Lark Street, State Offices, courts; easy access to local & regional bus routes and highways (I-787, I-90 & I-87).  Accommodates up to 6 NON-SMOKING guests. Toiletries included.   Save & BOOK this apartment today! Message me anytime. Hope to welcome you soon!  -Earl
review: Earl is a responsive and excellent host.  Definitely always quick to get back if contacted.  I have stayed in his spaces several times for work trips and will be happy to book again!  Few issues and a nice little apartment.

description: Stay in Albany's Grand House! Relax in this gorgeous, light-filled 600-sf guest suite in the historic Mansion District with dramatic 14-ft ceilings, marble fireplaces, modern art, fresh flowers & plants. Suite includes bedroom, living room w/sleeper sofa, work station & private bath. Perfect for couples or a family! Walk to downtown, MVP Arena, Lark Street, bars & restaurants. 24/7 entry. EV charger (non Tesla). Lovely garden. Coffee, snacks & reliable WiFi. Super clean, comfortable & private.
review: Phat and Karley were absolutely amazing. The suit was just as described and pictured. A super short walk to MVP arena.

description: Welcome to the Plaza Suite, a newly renovated studio condo in an historic Center Square mansion.  Enter through a grand reception hall/art gallery and climb the oak staircase to the sunny and spacious second floor apartment. There's a nice view of State Street and the Empire State Plaza.  Features include: a new fully equipped kitchen, comfy lounge area, dining /work table, renovated vintage bathroom, walk-in closet and new queen bed. Feel free to enjoy a glass of wine in the art gallery.
review: Overall, great place and great location! Perfect for my concert at the MVP arena, very walkable. Parking in the area is tricky, but made it work.

description: This charming townhouse is located in the historic district of Albany. This stay is surrounded by many great indoor and outdoor attractions. The State Capitol is a short 5 minute walk away. For those who enjoy trying new food or love their morning coffee, you can visit one of the many restaurants, bars and cafes located on Lark Street. No matter what reason you have for visiting Albany, this home away from home is the perfect stay!
review: Absolutely perfect spot! I booked for a last minute trip and Jared was more than kind to accommodate me on the same day. Great location, beautiful house, fully stocked with all the thoughtful details. I’ll be back for sure!

description: 1st floor studio in Historic Brownstone 1800's across the street from Washington park. Beautiful woodwork throughout with all the comforts & amenities of home. We are located on State street in Albany in a desirable residential area. ((NO PARTIES!!))
review: The stay was gorgeous and clean, as pictured. The bed was the softest bed I’ve ever encountered. Lloyd provided an instructional guide (for Wi-Fi, TV, local restaurants) that was incredibly helpful. While I did not meet Lloyd in person, he was excellent about communicating check-in/check-out, and everything else in between. I would absolutely stay at this property again.

description: Charming 5 room bed and breakfast located across from Washington Park in Albany, NY. Each room has a private bathroom and workstation. Guests have access to a shared kitchen, dining area, living space and small office nook with printer.
review: Amazing! Of all my stays, this was Ine of the best! Given the holiday, it was priced simlarly to a hotel room (i.e., Pricetag = $170), but if you're into Lux & want a *Stress-Free* weekend, this is It! Better than a hotel & Very lulux ❤️❤️❤️

description: BOOK this attic loft in a renovated historic 200 year-old building in a quiet neighborhood of Albany's Pastures. Great location near Albany Medical Center, MVP Arena, Empire State Plaza, Library, Lark Street, State Offices, courts; easy access to local & regional bus routes and highways (I-787, I-90 & I-87).  Great for traveling nurses!  Accommodates up to 5 NON-SMOKING guests. Toiletries included.  Save & BOOK our 3rd floor suite today! Message me anytime. Hope to welcome you soon!  -Earl
review: We biked the Empire State trail and stayed for just a night. Easy entry. Great communication. There was extra care taken to provide more than just the essentials.

description: 2-bedroom 1st floor apt. w/ full amenities! Renovated historic 200-year-old building in quiet neighborhood of Albany's Pastures. Great location near Albany Medical Center, MVP Arena, Empire State Plaza, Library, Lark Street, State Offices, courts; easy access to local & regional bus routes and highways (I-787, I-90 & I-87).  Accommodates up to 6 NON-SMOKING guests. Toiletries included.   Save & BOOK this apartment today! Message me anytime. Hope to welcome you soon!  -Earl
review: Absolutely horrible. Multiple issues with this host. First issue I faced was automatic replies, and lack of response to concerns I had. When I entered the apartment it was very dirty, unclean, dark, depressing and the bed as well as sofa were so uncomfortable I did not get any sleep that night. The dishes were greasy and I couldn’t cook myself dinner. I tried to adress my issues with Earl first but he was very disrespectful, blamed me for things and then I had no choice but to address the concerns with Airbnb. After I did, he still was very disrespectful to me and tried to get me to pay for everything. All he cares about is money and not the host. I recommend for him to be more respectful, renovate the apartment completely and respond to his hosts in a timely manner, not with automatic replies. I have never faced such issues with any other host and I travel for work constantly so this is a huge disappointment!

description: Cute single family home in a convenient location with the lots of restaurants, bars and shops right around the corner. It features a driveway with covered parking, a nice outdoor area and central air. My place is close to University of Albany, shopping malls and plazas, bars, restaurants, the airport, the city center, parks, art and culture. Parties and events are not allowed.
review: Peter’s place is lovely. It was the perfect location for us working at UAlbany for a week. Plenty of restaurants and convenience stores within walking distance (bakery, cafe, grocery, pharmacy etc). The house is very clean and comfortable. Bedrooms are a good size and the beds are great. Kitchen is ready to use and entertainment setup is easy to use (including fast, reliable internet). Plenty of places to walk and run in the area (try around UAlbany). Very happy with our stay.

description: Experience updated comfort in a Hystorical Building at Capital Square, Albany! Overlooking the iconic Capitol Building, this fully-furnished apartment offers a prime location with easy access to vibrant Lark Street and top-notch amenities. Enjoy a centralized location with street parking, and high-speed Wi-Fi. Perfect for both leisure and business travelers, doctors, nurses, students etc.
review: Love the flat, so quiet! Del is really helpful. Thank you!

description: Escape to an ultra-modern blackjack lounge with this unique studio for two. Located in the heart of central downtown Albany, you're only minutes away from the Times Union Center and major tourist attractions.  Or, stay here while you visit your kids at nearby SUNY Albany, Saint Rose, and other colleges - then come back to your room in style.
review: This apartment was clean, well organized, and had a bright airy feel with a cozy element.  The host is a great communicator and provided us with clear and concise information. l would definitely book.

description: Our spacious 2048 sq. ft. 5 bedroom. 2 bath, house is the perfect place for serious minded groups.   We welcome business travelers and family travelers looking for a quiet, sanitized gorgeous home for extended stays in the city. Our reviews emphasize that we offer the comfortable accommodations to meet all of your needed expectations. Welcome to Albany
review: We had mini family reunion with young children. This spacious house was perfect for 3 families with children aged 4, 3, and 1. There was no clutter or extra decorations for us to be worried about. Loved the wall mount TVs. We were able to give the children freedom to play and explore safely. Though the kids were sometimes loud, the sound didn’t carry through the other rooms. The dining room was large enough to seat all of us for family dinners. Definitely want to do this trip again

description: Escape to an ultra-modern blackjack lounge with this unique studio for two. Located in the heart of central downtown Albany, you're only minutes away from the Times Union Center and major tourist attractions.  Or, stay here while you visit your kids at nearby SUNY Albany, Saint Rose, and other colleges - then come back to your room in style.
review: Such a cute place! The layout is really fun and very open! Love love love the bathtub and the cute touches. Definitely would stay here again :)

description: Relax in a newly renovated one bedroom/one bathroom apartment located on the 2nd floor of a charming brownstone building. It features lofty ceilings with beautiful architecture and a newly updated kitchen. Conveniently located to the Palace Theater, Capitol Rep Theater, Times Union Center and the Empire State Plaza. This rental is in walking distance to many popular eateries, bars, and more to explore! Laundry on Site for Long-Term Stays
review: I stayed one week and really liked it. David is friendly host. I recommend his house for stay.

description: BEAUTIFULLY renovated and stylish apartment with CHARACTER in a brownstone building. PRIME location in the heart of downtown Albany, minutes from highway and walking distance to popular restaurants, and pubs.   Local attractions including The Egg, Empire State Plaza and Palace Theatre are less than 5 minutes away. 4K Smart TV with Netflix, stocked kitchen & bathroom, high speed internet ready for you to use!   Tenant permit street parking available. Available for long term stays!
review: Good Airbnb close to Central Albany. Located on a private street. Basement unit. Comfortable bed. Was missing a hairdryer and some toilet paper when I arrived and Linda kindly instacarted some over. Overall a pleasant stay.

description: 800 sqft rustic style master suite in the heart of Albany, NY. Cozy up by the fire or take a dip in the pool or hot tub. Enjoy a Purple hybrid 4 luxury mattress. Originally a farmhouse, the home has been extensively renovated to highlight all of the original architecture and offer every luxury to guests. The outdoor patio, pool, and hot tub are available for guests to enjoy at no extra charge. The home is full of unexpected design and decor delights we know you will enjoy!
review: We enjoyed staying at Thomas's clean and well-appointed unit.  A highlight was the use of the refreshing pool both in the evening and in the morning. The well-placed lighting in the back yard made our evening swim especially magical.

description: Old style comfort.  Large high ceiling studio w kitchen facilities and private walk in shower    Queen size bed.  Lots of windows.  Ceiling fan. Window a/c.   Old world ambience with large mirrors and wallpaper.  Street level.  No stairs.  Parking at the door in driveway.  Porch w rocking chairs. Lots of garden. Park  called Greenway across the street.  Walk to post office hospital lots of eateries Starbucks.  15minute bus service from new Scotland ave to downtown.  Wi-Fi 5 G. Lockbox entry.
review: Very comfortable studio and bed, convenient location near St Peter’s Hospital, restaurants, shops. Nice walkable neighborhood. Liz is a gracious host; this is one of my favorites in Albany.

description: Nestled in the heart of the city, our Airbnb exudes an enchanting charm with its stylish and romantic decor. Positioned on a vibrant city street, immerse yourself in the lively urban atmosphere. This energetic environment will carry some background noise. We prioritize your comfort and recommend bringing earplugs for light sleepers to ensure a restful stay. Corner store -1 min Airport, bus & train station -15 min. Outdoor cameras $250 indoor smoking violation fee $250 pet cleaning fee, no pets
review: Sonya is a really great host. I stay here for business trips. Has the feel of a hotel without the price tag of one. The area is always meticulously organized. Feels very inviting and chic. There is a disclaimer about the area that the host always alerts those staying; however, i’ve felt that this is in a generally safe place. I’m usually out and about, no complaints.

description: Prime Real Estate On the Bus Route - Free bus every 20 minutes.  This place is in the Heart of Albany, lots of things in walking distance. Bar and Restaurant Mania!  Minutes from: Suny Albany Downtown Albany Medical College Albany Law School St Peters Hospital Albany VA Medical Center Samaritan Hospital Albany Memorial Hospital Massry Family Children's Emerg Center
review: The apartment is nicely decorated and in a great, walkable area, but our experience was disappointing. Halfway through our stay, we found a rat in the apartment. The host said he’d notify building management but offered no further help. We kept hearing scratching noises at night and stayed only because moving mid-trip would’ve been a hassle. We requested a partial refund and got $70 out of an $850 stay, which didn’t feel adequate.  Then a full week after checkout, the host asked for $47 for a stained towel that looked more like mold. We had followed instructions and left towels in the tub, so it likely happened after we left. This stay had potential, but the way issues were handled left a bad impression.

description: Adorable, Updated, trendy & very clean! Great location & nice neighborhood. Walking distance to Albany Medical Center and close to downtown Albany. The one bedroom is comfortable with a memory foam king bed and a private patio with outdoor seating for your wine/coffee!The living room is beautifully decorated with a comfortable modern sofa (twin sleeper space). The adorable eat-in kitchen has granite counters and a table and chairs. Off street parking, coffee and WiFi included. Welcome
review: Kori is an awesome host! Always helpful and accommodating!  Will definitely stay here again!

description: Spectacular Modern two bedroom apartment in Downtown Albany's Historic Mansion District across the Governors mansion. Perfect for traveling professionals and/or families. 3 minute walk to The NYS Museum, Empire State Plaza, many local restaurants, The Capital , the MVP Arena, The legislative Office building, The Cathedral & Lark Street. A 3 minute drive to Albany Medical Center, Albany Law School & The VA Hospital.Exceptionally quiet street. If traveling with family, lots of nearby Playgrounds.
review: This place is AMAZING! Great location, clean and spacious, plus Johnny is an INCREDIBLE host. Never before have I encountered such a kind, gracious and accommodating host. Can't wait to come back to Albany.

description: A large suite located in a huge Victorian that’s very quiet. Suites have separate locks and are very private. The house maintains a very professional environment. Walking distance to hospitals, law schools and restaurants.
review: It was a nice Victorian house to stay in and to a certain extent I felt like I was part of either an Edith Wharton or Ernest Hemingway novel. They kept the place nice and clean, Bela and Laurie. The bed was quite comfortable.

description: Cute single family bungalow (1200sqft) in a convenient location with the lots of restaurants, bars and shops right around the corner.   Totally renovated with open floor plan.  77” 2023 LG B3 OLED TV  just added to living room with Sonos surround + sub!  3 Bedrooms with 1 King bed, 2 Queen beds, 1 Full sized bed and 2 airbeds can be added upon request.  Easy Parking two lane driveway by house.  $50 pet fee, please inquire before booking, thank you!
review: Peter was great to work with and very communicative. He checked in to make sure we had everything we needed. The parking was easy and on a quiet street with a perfect location near the stadium. Plenty of room and comfortable sleeping arrangements. Overall, very happy with the property!

description: This charming townhouse is located in the historic district of Albany. This stay is surrounded by many great indoor and outdoor attractions. review: This is the second time I've stayed at this place, both times the place was clean, well organized, and comfortable. Jared is a very accommodating host. Would definitely recommend.

description: Quiet suburban neighborhood minutes from downtown Albany. Guests have access to the kitchen, dinette and deck. Garage space is also available.  Private guest quarters include a large bedroom with a queen-size bed, desk and private bath. Guests also enjoy their own spacious living area with a large TV, massage chair, convertible couch, microwave, water cooler and exercise equipment.
review: Very congenial host. Great hospitality. Great location in an upscale community.

review: Earl’s loft was the perfect spot for my partner and I to house my sibling while passing through NY state. Albany is our meeting point since we both live east and west of the state. The directions and rules seem more complicated than they actually are- I think Earl has thought of everything when it comes to offering a space to stay. The location is actually perfect too bc you’re right next to the highway without any noise. The neighborhood was peaceful and we slept really well. It’s a great walk in the neighborhood and overall pretty safe.  Just beware you’ll need to lug your bags upstairs!!! :)  Earl also has a shampoo/conditioner/body wash dispenser in the shower, and items people need (and often forget) while traveling. Next time I’m in Albany I’ll definitely try to stay here again. Thank you!!!!

description: BEAUTIFUL + LUXURIOUS renovated apartment with CHARACTER in a historic building.   This spacious 2 bedroom feature a bright reading nook in the master bedroom, an office space, a soaker tub, 4K Smart TV with Netflix, and high speed internet ready for you to use! It comes with a fully stocked kitchen, in unit washer/dryer, free resident parking, and a fenced shared backyard with bbq for guests to enjoy.
review: Great apartment close to downtown Albany.  Easy check in, spacious rooms, even has a backyard.  Close walk to the Palace Theater where we saw a show while staying. Would definitely stay at Linda's place again!

review: This home was perfect for our stay and Richard and Priscela were very responsive and ensured we had everything we needed. It was a great home with local restaurants in walking distance on a quiet street. Very comfortable and cozy. I would most definitely stay here again!

description: Listing is designed with the business or casual traveler in mind PLEASE NO SMOKERS in the building *Newly renovated *Modern 1 bedroom w/Smart TVs that feels like home *Street parking *Equipped with coffee maker *Fridge *Wireless charger *Private bath *Across the street from the Capitol Building *Close to Highway I-87, I-90, I-787 & public transportation. review: Had a seamless experience.  The host was super responsive. Everything is as described.  Apartment was clean, comfortable, well-equipped and the building was quiet.

review: Scott’s place was very clean. Check in was extremely easy. Scott was very responsive to questions and gave informative answers. He was also accommodating with regards to timing! I highly recommend staying here.

review: This apartment was perfect! Really cool historic building, extremely clean and modern decor, however still very cozy. Super walkable location to downtown, to many restaurants and bars. Really easy access of the highway and convenient parking for two vehicles. Angela was extremely available for all questions and communicated with us the entire trip. We definitely recommend this stay!!

description: Cozy first floor 2-Bedroom located in a Pre-war building. Unit offers hardwood floors, well equipped bedrooms, bathrooms and kitchen. review: Diana was very friendly and wanted to make sure our stay was perfect. Quiet safe neighborhood.  Nice hot water for shower.

description: Step into the charming and comfy 1BR/1BA apartment in the heart of Albany, NY. It promises a relaxing retreat bordering picturesque Washington Park and funky Lark Street while being within walking distance to the vibrant downtown, which offers easy access to restaurants, shops, and exciting attractions.  The lovely design and the prime location will leave you in awe.  ✔ Comfy Queen Bedroom ✔ Open Design Living ✔ Fully Equipped Kitchen ✔ Smart TV ✔ High-Speed Wi-Fi ✔ Free Parking  See more below!
review: The space looks exactly like the pictures and has beautiful high ceilings! It's a great neighborhood with lots of bars and restaurants in the area. I personally enjoyed strolling at a nearby park near the lake. The host had slow response times, but regardless I would come back here anytime I visit Albany.

description: Our spacious 2048 sq. ft. 5 bedroom. 2 bath, house is the perfect place for serious minded groups.   We welcome business travelers and family travelers looking for a quiet, sanitized gorgeous home for extended stays in the city. Our reviews emphasize that we offer the comfortable accommodations to meet all of your needed expectations. Welcome to Albany
review: We are repeat guests!  This is a large, well-maintained old house on a residential street within walking distance of St Peter’s hospital, Maria College, and restaurants.  The bathrooms are all-new and upgraded, the kitchen is well-stocked, and the owner is friendly and helpful.

description: A beautiful newly renovated 2 Bedroom apartment. 1 bedroom is set up as office with a desk and chair and also a yoga mat and workout bands. The apartment is located 3 minutes walking from Albany Med, a few steps away from Washington Park, several minutes from State offices. The area is full of great restaurants, walking distance grocery store and boutique shops.
review: Erion's place was even better than we expected!  Spotless and it was so cozy and comfortable.  I was working remote during the week we were there and it was perfect for that.  Beautiful Washington Park is less than a block away, so that was a bonus.  Several great restaurants within walking distance.  It was like home away from home with perks.  Erion was fantastic and always responsive and available if we needed him.  6 stars for us and we will be back!

description: This amazing historical apartment is located in Downtown Albany, near the Palace Theater, MVP Arena, Capital Repertory Theatre, NYS Museums, restaurants, and cafes. 1 free parking permit space and small pet friendly. Amenities includes Keyless entry, Free wifi, Free Laundry on site, a kids Multi-game table, 1 Queen LED lite bed, with a blowup bed and a pull out couch. Please be cautious about parking. review: I enjoyed my stay, the place was in a great location, and there was everything you need for a few days stay or you could walk to get something from a bodega/market. I liked the view from the back porch; the heater and fan in the bedroom were nice. Great bar cart options - thought that was cool, though didn’t partake. I think the place is older and thus had some well used floors and was kinda dusty, but nothing too bad. There wasn’t a bunch of furniture so not much to put clothes out on but I made do with what there was. Great kitchen a nice stove! Loved the building location, it was great base for checking out the city. The washer/dryer was good and accessible, the place felt secure as well. Lastly the host was nice and responsive.  Overall I’d say better than a two star hotel pushing into a three star, and it ha a great place if you want a place where you can walk downtown! The price was reasonable for sure!

description: Hudson 3 is a first floor handicap accessible queen room with a large bathroom and ADA shower. Each room is equipped with a SmartTV and Apple TV as well as a desk.  This room is not pet friendly.  Complimentary Services: Continental Breakfast Onsite Parking Electric Parking Wi-Fi & Apple TV Keyless Entry Ensuite Guest Rooms ​ Paid Services: Cocktails Meeting Space Rentals Pets (If applicable) Early Checkin (1PM) Late Checkout (12PM)
review: We had a lovely stay at the Argus. Our room was next to the exterior door and we could hear people coming and going.  We enjoyed having cocktails and talking to Jess. She gave us some good restaurant recommendations and some good advice about moving to Albany

description: Relax in a newly renovated one bedroom/one bathroom apartment located on the first floor of a charming brownstone building. This rental is in walking distance to many popular eateries, bars, and more to explore!
review: Great stay in Albany. The interrior deco has preserved the flat original style. Right in front of the Tenbroeck mansion.

review: Very nice apartment, looks better than the pictures. Fully equipped and spacious enough for a group of 4. Scott responded quickly and was very hospitable. Would definitely book again.

description: Dog friendly, comfortable home with 3 bedrooms equipped with Chromecast equipped  TVs, comfortable beds, powerful ceiling fans, and vintage wood dressers in each room. Large, private back yard with two decks, grill, and a fire pit. Less than 2 miles from St Peter’s, Albany Medical Center. Off The historic Delaware ave- minutes from  winning restaurants, neat bars, world renowned  Ice Cream parlors, Normanskill Farm/ dog park, and walkable distance to St Rose Sports Park. Right off 787/ 87.
review: Cute place and very dog friendly! The backyard is such a lovely spot to hang with a pup. Conveniently located and we didn’t have any issues finding street parking on the block. The house has everything you need and is a cozy place to hang!

description: Discover Lark Street - A Hip Albany Neighborhood. With countless restaurants, cafes, art galleries, special events, and more, this funky arts and entertainment district is a major Albany hotspot. The Spot on Lark is a beautifully renovated 1850s era 4 - story brick building, in the heart of Lark Street, and a perfect oasis to relax and explore. We have taken ample time to carefully craft this space with tasteful décor, to maximize its potential and ensure your enjoyment
review: Very nice looking and cozy place to stay. Brian was a great host! I would definitely come back.

description: Step into the charming and comfy 1BR/1BA apartment in the heart of Albany, NY. It promises a relaxing retreat bordering picturesque Washington Park and funky Lark Street while being within walking distance to the vibrant downtown, which offers easy access to restaurants, shops, and exciting attractions.  The lovely design and the prime location will leave you in awe.  ✔ Comfy Queen Bedroom ✔ Open Design Living ✔ Fully Equipped Kitchen ✔ Smart TV ✔ Wi-Fi ✔ Free Parking  See more below!
review: The apartment was very bright and open and welcoming. The bed was super comfy. The location couldn't have been better in terms of cafes, restaurants, and bars.

description: Charming 2 Bedroom + Workstation apartment in Downtown Albany. Centrally located and easy walking! NFL Blitz Arcade Game. Pets allowed! 2nd FL apartment with an elevator on site!  Enjoy hardwood floors, a custom kitchen, soaking bathtub, and central AC. Featuring a King Bed, Queen bed, pull-out couch, workstation with monitor, and free WiFi. Includes access to a shared washer/dryer.  For long term stays over 1 month, a monthly parking space will be included. Parking garage close by.
review: Giving this 4 stars because the cleanliness could’ve been a bit better. There were fingerprints on some mirrors and hair balls behind garbage cans. However, the location was very convenient and the price was a good match.

description: WELCOME! Our listing is designed with the business or casual traveler in mind This beautiful suite will give you all the comforts of home! Quiet residential area for nice walks and great restaurants. Close to all the highways as well. All bedding & pillow cases have PREMIUM protective covers on them at all times so feel completely safe and protected. All remotes and light switches are wiped down with Clorox wipes after each guest.  ((IMPORTANT)) NO PARTIES or SMOKING in or around the home
review: Everything is very clean, smells nice and has everything you need for a small comfortable living space! Street parking conviently right outside the side the door! Has fans, an AC that keeps it a comfortable temperature. And the key pad door locks make it really nice for easy acess so you dont have to remember a key when you leave. And definitly a more than reasonable price!

description: BOOK this 2-bed fl 2 apt. in a renovated historic two-century-old building in a quiet neighborhood of Albany's Pastures. Great location near Albany Medical Center, MVP Arena, Empire State Plaza, Library, Lark Street, State Offices, courts; easy access to local & regional bus routes and highways (I-787, I-90 & I-87).  Private balcony w/ seating Up to 4 NON-SMOKING guests Toiletries included  Message me anytime. Hope to welcome you soon!
review: Very convenient location! Super easy access to the freeways, very close proximity to the train station, and walking distance to the NY State Plaza. The apartment was clean and well stocked. Angela was very responsive and great to work with.

description: Charming 5 room bed and breakfast located across from Washington Park in Albany, NY. Each room has a private bathroom and workstation. Guests have access to a shared kitchen, dining area, living space and small office nook with printer.
review: This place grew on me as I spent more and more time there. I had to extend my stay twice and ended up staying 5 days. There was no response to my messages and I found that very unusual not my regular airbnb experience with other hosts. I had to talk to the main office to extend my stay in both cases. But when my door code changed, Terra was available on the phone to help right away. So I am a bit confused, she is available on the phone and not responding to messages. Terra's place is not a typical airbnb. It has multiple rooms that she is renting out with a common sitting area, dining room and kitchen. It took me a while to figure things out. I finally was able to adjust the temperature. One night I was sitting with a hat and my coat on in my room- I was cold. There is coffee and tea plus breakfast items, fruit cream cheese, peanut butter etc. You can cook in the kitchen. They want you to leave the dishes in the sink and then they clean them. I am staying there again next week.

description: Visiting Albany for work, vacation, or to visit family? The Twitchell Estate is a spacious 4BR home that will be perfect for your stay. This elegantly designed Boho Chic rental comes with amenities such as self-check-in, Netflix, Disney+, Apple TV, and many other streaming options if you're looking to relax indoors, and a private laptop-friendly office with Wi-Fi if you need to get work done. Enjoy free coffee and tea in the stocked kitchen, with everything you need to feel like you are at home.
review: Great spot from which to explore Albany.  The location is in a safe neighborhood and central to many things in the Capital region.  Brian's place is clean and prepared, you will feel right at home - relaxed and ready for the next days adventure!

description: Old style comfort.  Large high ceiling studio w kitchen facilities and private walk in shower    Queen size bed.  Lots of windows.  Ceiling fan. Window a/c.   Old world ambience with large mirrors and wallpaper.  Street level.  No stairs.  Parking at the door in driveway.  Porch w rocking chairs. Lots of garden. Park  called Greenway across the street.  Walk to post office hospital lots of eateries Starbucks.  15minute bus service from new Scotland ave to downtown.  Wi-Fi 5 G. Lockbox entry.
review: It's all good. We hope to stay with Elizabeth again in the future. Thank you.

description: 1 bedroom with high ceiling and natural light. Fully stocked kitchen with complimentary Netflix. Centrally located in South End of Albany in converted school. Great value with off street parking included
review: Stayed here for a week, for work and was overall satisfied. The apartment was spacious and very clean, and host was  responsive. Although the neighborhood was a bit rough,  and not is not much to do, once in the apartment I felt comfortable and at home. The apartment was very clean, and the bed was decent. Worked for the time I needed it.

description: Enjoy Pine Hills, one of the last walking communities in Albany. Walking distance to many popular restaurants, food market, hospitals, parks, schools, movie theater, pharmacy, library and laundromat.  Keep it simple at this peaceful, private and centrally-located place.
review: DO NOT RENT THIS PLACE. LET ME REPEAT, DO NOT RENT THIS PLACE. At least until the owner drastically lowers price for the unit or renovated a vast portion of it.  I paid about $2050 monthly for the unit, and it's the worst quality I have seen for this amount of money. I lived in units that cost $1900 and $1700 and they vastly outshine this piece of garbage.  Let me tell you that those other units were not in the basement of a building, and had working TVs that were not partially functioning. I had to invest in a digital antenna that cost $12 at Walmart to watch any local channels, and I'm sure the owner had 12 bucks to spare. Living in the basement was its own bundle of joy, as I heard every goddamn footstep, door opening and effing sneeze the guy on top would do every so often. This was never a thing in my cheaper units from the past. The window covers were old and breaking down and I had to patch areas with pieces of paper so I wouldn't be seen sleeping.

description: BOOK this attic loft in a renovated historic 200 year-old building in a quiet neighborhood of Albany's Pastures. Great location near Albany Medical Center, MVP Arena, Empire State Plaza, Library, Lark Street, State Offices, courts; easy access to local & regional bus routes and highways (I-787, I-90 & I-87).  Great for traveling nurses!  Accommodates up to 5 NON-SMOKING guests. Toiletries included.  Save & BOOK our 3rd floor suite today! Message me anytime. Hope to welcome you soon!  -Earl
review: Clean, cool looking apt.,  good location for where we wanted to be.  Many extras in the apt.  I would stay there again if I am ever in that area.

description: Urban Oasis!  2nd Floor guest bedroom in residential home.  Shared entrance.  Shared bath with one other guest room.  Use of kitchen and washer/dryer. Street parking.  Use of driveway, if necessary.  Walking distance to Albany Med, Albany Pharmacy, Albany Law School, College of St. Rose and Sage College.  On Main bus line.  10 minute drive from downtown.
review: Perfect. No other words. The room is perfect. The communication. Check-in and checkout. Quiet. Clean. Ed gave me an help in the day of my arrival. Strictly recommended. Keep it up, Ed!

description: (21 years of age or older ONLY) NON- SMOKING.. NO PARTIES Allowed.  Cozy basement apartment in a historic brownstone in the heart of "Center Square".  Surrounded by shops, restaurants, and night life. Walking distance to Albany Med, State Offices, The State Capital, and The Empire State Plaza. 30 mins from Saratoga Raceway. 50 mins from Lake George. 1/2 mile Palace theater
review: A great stay in a great location!  I spent one night at Sue’s place as I was passing through Albany.  It was comfortable, clean, and convenient, including finding parking on the street.

description: This is Albany’s best! Enjoy a cozy stay in one of Albany’s oldest and most unique homes. This historic farmhouse was built in 1821 and completely restored and renovated in 2010. Your room is the master suite complete with a deep soaking tub, remote controlled gas fireplace, king size bed, single pull out American Leather couch, and double sinks. The pool is open from May until October. Hot tub is open year round. Enjoy a perfect romantic getaway!
review: When we found, it seemed almost too good to be true. Everything was as perfect as it seemed online. Thomas is the most thoughtful, gracious host; Justin was also an amazing help.  He provided us with all the information we needed and showed us around. The flat is just perfect! Kitchen is compact and contains everything one needs. Overall 10/10.

description: Great location within walking distance to the Capital. It is a good size bedroom with WiFi internet . Private full bath.  We provide in the room a small refrigerator, Microwave ,coffee pot,iron ,hair dryer and  TV. Lots of entertainment nearby. Brew pubs, restaurants, the NYS Museum. Governor's Mansion. Washington Park.Capital Rep Theater as well as the Palace Theater.
review: The room was exactly what I expected. Everything was extremely clean and the room has lots of space! There was a little noise from the people who live above, but nothing major. I slept very soundly. The shower has excellent water pressure! I always feel that’s worth noting. There’s convenient street parking out front. I didn’t have a problem finding a space. I didn’t see Gregg, but he responded very quickly. The location is great if you’re interested in visiting the Empire State Plaza, State House, and the USS Slater. This was my first trip to Albany and I would definitely stay here again.  Also, if you’re looking for a great breakfast/lunch place, try Iron Gate Cafe. So good!!! It’s about a 5 minute drive away.

description: Welcome to The Urban Nest! Your stylish retreat in Albany’s Center Square! Spotless, beautifully designed 1BR garden apartment in a historic brownstone, short walk to Washington Park, MVP Arena, the Capitol, Empire State Plaza, and top restaurants. Enjoy a king bed, in-unit laundry, workspace, a fully equipped kitchen guests rave about, Smart TV, and fast WiFi. Immaculate, cozy, and perfectly located. Relax and feel at home. Perfect for couples, professionals, or weekend getaways.
review: This was the perfect match for exactly what my fiancé needed during his stay in Albany. The space was gorgeous, with every possible amenity we could ask for, and every detail perfectly apportioned to the space. We felt like we were in a modern NYC. The space not only look great, but was clean and smelled delicious (every time I walked in I commented on how much I loved how it smelled!).  Dan and Lua were THE most gracious hosts - extremely responsive, clear in their communication and wildly forward thinking in taking care of us! We will undoubtedly be back!

description: This cozy first-floor apartment is perfect for a comfortable stay in a prime location. It's within walking distance to local hospitals, colleges, and just steps away from Madison Ave and Lark St, known for their vibrant restaurants, bars, and shops. Ideal for those visiting for work, school, or leisure, the apartment offers a charming and convenient base to explore the best of the area. Whether you're here for a short trip or longer stay, you'll feel right at home!
review: This is a very nice place that's located right around Washington Park. Great restaurants nearby on Lark Street and Central Ave. Very responsive host. I especially enjoyed the coffee bar that's set up in the kitchenette. The bed is very comfortable. The building is older and has little insulation between the top unit so I could hear all the footsteps of the above tenant, but putting on my sound machine helped. So if that bothers future guests just bring a white noise machine or play white noise on the phone. I would recommend this stay and would book here again.

description: Cute single family bungalow (1200sqft) in a convenient location with the lots of restaurants, bars and shops right around the corner.   Totally renovated with open floor plan.  77” 2023 LG B3 OLED TV  just added to living room with Sonos surround + sub!  3 Bedrooms with 1 King bed, 2 Queen beds, 1 Full sized bed and 2 airbeds can be added upon request.  Easy Parking two lane driveway by house.  $50 pet fee, please inquire before booking, thank you!
review: Peter is a great host, very responsive, accommodating, and easy-going. He has a very beautiful home, newly remodeled, rare find and a great value. The beds, linens and furniture are very comfortable and stylish. The place is in a quiet spot yet walking distance to good restaurants and take out places & the CVS store. The kitchen is spacious and full with cooking supplies. Had a nice time staying with my 2 children and they did not want to leave the house and my son even ranked the place at "34 on a scale of 10!". Overall, a great experience, and would gladly stay again.

description: Spacious Pine Hills flat with many recent updates including refinished hardwood floors, all new windows and a completely remodeled kitchen, including brand new appliances. This unit also has a private laundry room as well as an entrance foyer. There is off street parking and the building is located within walking distance to 2 primary bus routes. This unit is also within walking distance of popular restaurants, Juniors, The Point, Cafe Madison and Kismet Mediterranean Grill.
review: Great place in quiet neighborhood.  Driveway parking is a tremendous benefit. Loved having 2 bathrooms and laundry room with washer and dryer.     Maybe less appropriate for people who are bothered by upstairs bigfoot neighbors. Not a tremendous problem but the coming and goings do catch you at off times.   Very sensitive smoke alarm  that I am sure disturbed the upstairs neighbors.  Keep a broom handy if cooking to reset alarm and be sure to always use vent hood fan.   Thermostat setting was not a problem with the little portable heater to offset any chill. One giant step at the top of the front steps may inhibit some occupants that are less agile.  My aunt looked at it as a daily gage of her abilities.  Made her realize that she may be more limited than she thinks.    Needs a thorough deep cleaning but the standard wipe down cleanliness was good.   Our stay for two weeks was great overall.

description: Enjoy a comfortable stay in a truly one of a kind home in Albany. This former retreat has  loads of amenities to enjoy; two dining room, two living rooms, three porches, a full kitchen, huge yard, gazebo, coffee bar and more! The room has a desk and TV. Walk to eateries, grocery, and cinema.
review: Kind and graceful host. Very responsive. Gracious and warm house guests. Beautiful and clean home. Home away from home. Grateful!

description: This unique place has a style all its own. Three levels of space all to yourself. Central located in Downtown Albany. Fully stocked kitchen to make meals at home or plenty of near by restaurants to explore. Spacious bedroom with attached bathroom. Work area to get some work done before hanging out to catch up on some Netflix shows. Your home away from home for a night or more of you choose.
review: I want to be kind, but this was not our favorite place, tho it has potential. It’s in an old school. It’s within walking distance of many sights, but in a sketchy neighborhood that is dirty & rundown; we didn’t feel safe, especially at night. The carpeting seemed dingy & the wood floors were peeling & buckling. It was clean, tho the kitchen table remained sticky despite my scrubbing it. One of the kitchen counters had raw edges & metal poles holding it up. There were no drain stoppers on the rusty drain covers. it is not maintained well overall. The shower was tiny & had a shower curtain that was 6” too long. There were no luggage racks & no place to hang anything. The A/C wasn’t great – it worked OK the first night but not after that. The only windows are in the living room, so it’s kind of dark. Parking is free in a private lot across the street, which was nice. Diana was very nice & fairly responsive. It wasn’t awful & the price was right, but I would look somewhere else next time.

description: BOOK this 2-bedroom 2nd floor apt. w/ full amenities! Renovated historic 200-year-old building in quiet neighborhood of Albany's Pastures. Great location near Albany Medical Center, MVP Arena, Empire State Plaza, Library, Lark Street, State Offices, courts; easy access to local & regional bus routes and highways (I-787, I-90 & I-87).   Accommodates up to 6 NON-SMOKING guests. Toiletries included.  Save & BOOK this trendy suite w/ deck today! Message me anytime. Hope to welcome you soon!  -Earl
review: We enjoyed our stay there. It was perfect for our trip. We would stay again.

description: Urban Oasis!  2nd Floor master bedroom in residential home.  Queen sized bed. Private bath. Mini-refrigerator, microwave and sitting area in room. Shared entrance but access to full kitchen, bath, bedroom, laundry and parking. Walking distance to Albany Med, Albany Pharmacy, Albany Law School, College of St. Rose and Sage College.  On Main bus line.  10 minute drive from downtown
review: This was a very lovely home! The room I stayed in was spacious, pretty, and the bed was very comfy. Everything about it was just really nice, and I felt right at home. Excellent value!!

description: Old style comfort.  Large high ceiling studio w kitchen facilities and private walk in shower    Queen size bed.  Lots of windows.  Ceiling fan. Window a/c.   Old world ambience with large mirrors and wallpaper.  Street level.  No stairs.  Parking at the door in driveway.  Porch w rocking chairs. Lots of garden. Park  called Greenway across the street.  Walk to post office hospital lots of eateries Starbucks.  15minute bus service from new Scotland ave to downtown.  Wi-Fi 5 G. Lockbox entry.
review: This place was even more beautiful in person! Check in and check out was very easy, and everything went very well during our stay. We only stayed one night but I would definitely come back if I was staying in Albany for longer!

description: This 1st floor one bedroom in a Historic Brownstone 1800's across the street from Washington park. Beautiful woodwork throughout with all the comforts of home. Great area where you can walk or jog in the park or just enjoy a cup of coffee outside. Choice of restaurants, stores & shops on Lark street. Movie theater, hospitals and malls are all in close proximity. We are located on State street in Albany in a desirable residential area with easy Uber or Lyft service available. ((NO PARTIES!!))
review: Great place to stay. Incredibly clean and comfortable. Lloyd also is easy to contact! Highly recommend.

description: 800 sqft rustic style master suite in the heart of Albany, NY. Cozy up by the fire or take a dip in the pool or hot tub. Enjoy a Purple hybrid 4 luxury mattress. Originally a farmhouse, the home has been extensively renovated to highlight all of the original architecture and offer every luxury to guests. The outdoor patio, pool, and hot tub are available for guests to enjoy at no extra charge. The home is full of unexpected design and decor delights we know you will enjoy!
review: Beautiful home with fun art decoration and memorabilia. Helpful and friendly host. The loft was perfect with a comfy bed and the feel of a luxury suite. Wish we could've spent a couple more nights!

description: Great location within walking distance to the Capital. It is a good size bedroom with WiFi internet . Private full bath.  We provide in the room a small refrigerator, Microwave ,coffee pot,iron ,hair dryer and  TV. Lots of entertainment nearby. Brew pubs, restaurants, the NYS Museum. Governor's Mansion. Washington Park.Capital Rep Theater as well as the Palace Theater.
review: Very nice place with everything that is important a clean comfortable bed, clean and hot shower and large quiet room. Located in a nice brownstone the room is on the street level.  I was able to park on the street in front of the building but the spaces are limited. Gregg offer a garage around the block but I did not use it. Gregg was quick to answer any questions and the entire stay was pleasant.

description: This charming townhouse is located in the historic district of Albany. This stay is surrounded by many great indoor and outdoor attractions. The State Capitol is a short 5 minute walk away. For those who enjoy trying new food or love their morning coffee, you can visit one of the many restaurants, bars and cafes located on Lark Street. No matter what reason you have for visiting Albany, this home away from home is the perfect stay!
review: Jared’s place was very clean and pristine exactly how it’s describe and pictured. Its location is within walking distance of the MVP arena! Very pleased with my experience!

description: Stay in our 5-bedroom 3-story townhouse nestled in a renovated, historic 200-year-old building located in Albany's serene Pastures neighborhood. Just a short walk from landmarks like the Albany Medical Center, Times Union Center, Empire State Plaza, and vibrant Lark Street. Easy access to I-787, I-90 & I-87. Five queen beds and two queen air mattresses and couches accommodate up to 16. Ideal for large families and groups. Dive into Albany's history with modern comforts.
review: Earl was super helpful and responsive! A central location with 5 great bedrooms. Our soccer team was up for a weekend and it was a great space for everyone to stay.

description: This 1st floor one bedroom in a Historic Brownstone 1800's across the street from Washington park. Beautiful woodwork throughout with all the comforts of home. Great area where you can walk or jog in the park or just enjoy a cup of coffee outside. Choice of restaurants, stores & shops on Lark street. Movie theater, hospitals and malls are all in close proximity. We are located on State street in Albany in a desirable residential area with easy Uber or Lyft service available. ((NO PARTIES!!))
review: Very happy with my stay at the townhouse. Everything was clean and very user friendly.   Lloyd was a great host and was a very helpful through the entire process.

description: Our recently remodeled one-bedroom apartment boasts a park view, easy parking and is close to downtown Albany. We have an easy walk to groceries, Government Buildings, Albany Law School, College of Pharmacy, VA and Albany Medical Center Hospitals, and Lark Street restaurants and nightlife. The living area features a queen size futon and views of the sunset most evenings, and the bedroom features a luxurious queen-sized memory foam bed and access to our quiet garden where the sun rises.
review: A great place to stay when visiting Albany.  We really appreciate James letting us park on the street using his guest pass.  The apartment was very safe.  You enter through the front door and then you have another door on your right to enter into the apartment.  Both doors have locks.  The shower worked great.  We enjoyed the Keurig coffee machine every morning.

description: This tastefully decorated room has more than enough space for you to get cozy by the fire. A queen size bed, couch, sitting chair, and oversize beanbag all welcome you to this very comfortable space. The bathroom is shared with one other guest room. There is a half bath on the first floor shared with the entire house as well as an outdoor shower.
review: You are doing yourself a disservice staying anywhere else, and I’m not the kind of nice that pays false compliments. If the host is slacking, I’ll throw more shade than a sycamore, and you can trust it’s well deserved.  The property is everything you could want. No. Seriously…I want the property. You will too.  Do the next best thing and book it, you won’t love your place all that much anymore, but you sure will have a great stay.

description: Welcome to our newly renovated 4BR/2BA Dutch-inspired cottage on 1.5 private acres in a forest setting. Perfect for family/friend gatherings. Enjoy an open floor plan with a fully equipped kitchen, cozy living, and all the modern amenities you need for a relaxing visit.  Located only a few minutes from downtown Albany, SUNY Albany, AMC & Albany College of Pharmacy.
review: Antoinette’s cottage was beautiful, peaceful, and spacious enough for our entire group. Exactly as advertised and listed at a great price. She was also very clear with instructions and quick to respond to messages. She made the entire process extremely easy and user-friendly. Would absolutely recommend to anyone looking for a relaxing stay.

description: This vibrant and eclectic 2-bedroom, 1-bath apartment is located on the first floor of a quiet residential neighborhood—just steps from great restaurants with outdoor seating, a local grocery store, and more. You’ll be close to everything: major hospitals, universities, and cultural venues are minutes away. Whether you’re here for work, study, or a city getaway, enjoy the comfort of a thoughtfully designed space, walkable convenience, and the bonus of off-street pa
review: Diana has taken great care to provide a very comfortable home here in Albany. Admittedly we were a little caught off guard by the dated entry but pressed on and found gem of an apartment inside! There is no A/C in the kitchen and we arrived on a very hot day but the fans she provided helped greatly. Just something to consider if you're arriving in summer. It's clear that the cleaners pay attention to detail as the whole apartment was spotless. The apartment is a older home and with that comes it's own charms and quirks. Absolutely worth it and we will stay again!

description: Step into the charming and comfy 1BR/1BA apartment in the heart of Albany, NY. It promises a relaxing retreat bordering picturesque Washington Park and funky Lark Street while being within walking distance to the vibrant downtown, which offers easy access to restaurants, shops, and exciting attractions.  The lovely design and the prime location will leave you in awe.  ✔ Comfy Queen Bedroom ✔ Open Design Living ✔ Fully Equipped Kitchen ✔ Smart TV ✔ Wi-Fi ✔ Free Parking  See more below!
review: Very stylish place in a great location. It's just a walk away from local bars and restaurants. It was clean and Terra was good at communicating. Would definitely recommend to those looking for a place to stay in Albany.

description: This newly renovated 2BR/1BA apartment, situated on the first floor of a two-family house, offers sophistication and space. Enjoy a separate entrance and convenient location in downtown Albany, with grocery stores, restaurants, bars, nightlife, hospitals, and parks just steps away. With public transportation and ample street parking nearby, this is the perfect place to call home.
review: Superb property with well appointed touches close to everything in Albany.  There's a market directly across the street and plenty of local parking.  The property is sparkling clean and as an Airbnb Superhost you can tell that Elizabeth has really taken the time to ensure you have a great stay.

description: Spacious studio with hardwood floors, fully equipped kitchen, clean and bright. Large modern bath .  Full Cable TV and WiFi. Walking distance to the new Renaissance Hotel. Walk to everything downtown! The Empire Plaza  and the Egg are  across the street.You can't get any closer, to the MVP Arena,  as well as Restaurants, bars, churches. Walk to  Capital and the new Capital Convention Center. Laundry facilities in the apartment
review: Greg was nice but it was a creepy and dirty basement apartment in a sketchy neighborhood with random items scattered all over the place, like a huge kitchen sink leaning against the wall opposite the apartments front door. We got there and even though the lockbox opened and we could get our keys, someone had locked it from the inside so we couldn't get in. After calling Greg to let us in, and seeing the state of the place, my friend and I immediately booked a hotel room online and stayed there instead.

description: This amazing Airbnb will give you all the comforts of home! Tastefully decorated with everything you need and then some!!  -> Grab-N-Go items (Coffee, Tea, Light Snacks) -> Smart LED Tvs in (2) Livingrooms & (2) Bedrooms -> NordicTrack & Peloton bicycles -> Smart locks with keyless entry -> Fast wireless WiFi -> Queen beds with premium mattresses & pillow covers -> Fully equipped + utensil stocked kitchen + Keurig Coffee  -> Full size washer/dryer   And much more so come and enjoy your stay!
review: Such a great stay! What a beautiful place, well set up, really clean, so many little touches to make it feel like home! Richard and Priscela were responsive and so so kind! The whole process and experience was great!

description: Our recently remodeled one-bedroom apartment boasts a park view, easy parking and is close to downtown Albany. We have an easy walk to groceries, Government Buildings, Albany Law School, College of Pharmacy, VA and Albany Medical Center Hospitals, and Lark Street restaurants and nightlife. The living area features a queen size futon and views of the sunset most evenings, and the bedroom features a luxurious queen-sized memory foam bed and access to our quiet garden where the sun rises.
review: James was very easy to communicate with prior to and during our stay. He provided us with local/organic breakfast items. He was also kind enough to leave a bottle of champagne for our anniversary celebration. I would definitely recommend this location.

description: Adorable, Updated, trendy & very clean! Great location & nice neighborhood. Walking distance to Albany Medical Center and close to downtown Albany. The one bedroom is comfortable with a memory foam king bed and a private patio with outdoor seating for your wine/coffee!The living room is beautifully decorated with a comfortable modern sofa (twin sleeper space). The adorable eat-in kitchen has granite counters and a table and chairs. Off street parking, coffee and WiFi included. Welcome
review: Overall good. Shower kind of dirty. Upstairs a little loud. Pet friendly with private space out back to do potty. Walk way flooded and got shoes wet but liked that we could park off the street. I think it was a little overpriced due to the amount of space and lack of extras such as no toothpaste provided no new sponge provided no doggie bags provided also a little over priced due to the expectations for us regarding ensuring the place is left pristine “just as it was when we entered” including cleaning up all pet dander. How?

description: Escape to an ultra-modern blackjack lounge with this unique studio for two. Located in the heart of central downtown Albany, you're only minutes away from the Times Union Center and major tourist attractions.  Or, stay here while you visit your kids at nearby SUNY Albany, Saint Rose, and other colleges - then come back to your room in style.
review: Beautiful loft styled apartment. Very cozy, comfortable and super clean. I enjoyed my stay 😊

description: A cozy private apartment. The Blair Suite, named after the original owner of this beautiful 1890's Victorian, is located on the basement floor. It has it's own private entrance on the side of the home. Located in historic Albany, close to everything, hospitals, schools, museums, restaurants and Washington Park.
review: Great suite. Had everything you could need and was extremely cozy. Highly recommend.

description: Comfortable single- family home in quiet residential neighborhood.  Large bathroom with a “guest sink” and two showers to choose from. Comfortable beds and a desk to work at. Free and easy on street parking, bus routes to downtown at both ends of the block. Close to hospitals, Albany JCC, library. Wide variety of restaurants nearby.
review: Is home a place or a feeling?  Looking for a beautiful, quiet and relaxing place? Diana’s. Looking for a top-notch host? Diana. Want to feel like you rented an entire house for yourself? Or want to have over the top pleasant interaction and conversation with a host? Diana’s. Need to study/work/get things done? Or want to chill out, relax and enjoy a beautiful home? Diana’s.  Want to hop on/hop off from your bed to the grass to the couch to the carpet to the hard wool floor, upstairs, downstairs...barefoot? Diana’s.  Want to get cozy in your pijamas indoors? Or want to sunbath, lay on a chaise long and roll on the grass? Diana’s.  Want to have breakfast in a garden? Or prefer to have lunch and dinner in a garden? Diana’s.  Want to have a one of a kind Airbnb experience with superb hospitality? Honestly, Diana and Diana’s place is the correct answer to all your questions and needs!

Located just minutes from charming downtown, guests can enjoy all Albany has to offer.   This spacious bedroom and living area has an abundance of natural light creates a very comfortable environment! This property comes with a fully stocked kitchen, in unit washer/dryer, free resident lot parking, and a fenced shared backyard with bbq for guests to enjoy.  Long term stays available.
review: Lovely place in a funky, as in good, part of town.  Charming, super clean, comfy bed, excellent bathroom.  Looking forward to staying here again!

description: The Rose Haven space  Welcome to The Rose Haven Apartment! Once you are ready to rest and relax, retreat to the lovely bedroom, where you can recharge after an exciting day of adventuring throughout the City of Albany.

Literally on the corner of Washington Park, which is a great spot to take a beautiful walk. A couple of issues came up, and Miguelino was very responsive by text and by phone. Thank you!

Free street parking only. Book today to ensure your dates!  10 minute drive to the heart of downtown 16 minute drive to Albany International Airport
review: Had a great stay at the Allen house. Walkable to nice restaurants, and the house itself was pristine with a lot of character. Highly recommended.

Finding Haitian food (AJW Caribbean Restaurant) during my last days was amazing. So yummy!  I do hope one day they have laundry, but there’s laundry within a 10/15-min walk. Otherwise, great place!

review: This was a wonderful place to stay! Jake and Kate thought about everything for this Airbnb, and we felt right at home. We would definitely stay here again!

But the best part was Stephanie’s amazing responsiveness when we reached out with questions. We loved it!

review: Sue's place is ideal for the young and hip.  The location is near Washington park and Lark street (lots of quaint shops and restos).  Walking distance to Immaculate Conception Cathedral and Museum.  Bus stop for the nearest malls is very  accessible.

We truly hope you enjoy this space as much as we do!
review: The space was just as described. Todd responded immediately to any questions we may have had. The only issue for us was that the mattress was on the soft side but this comes down to personal preference.  Todd was a great host.

review: The apartment was clean, spacious and nice. Lloyd was helpful when needed. Limited food choices nearby. The park was clean. Did overhear sirens often but never observed any crime. Parking was not an issue.

review: Brian was a great host and super responsive when we couldn’t find the building (our own fault!). The place was very clean and comfortable. Thanks Brian!

review: Our stay at Gregg’s was great! We had trouble getting in (our fault) but Gregg came right away to help us. The space is nice, comfortable, private, and large. We enjoyed our stay and would recommend.

review: Peter’s place was accurately described and Peter was a very responsive and accommodating host.  He had everything we needed already in the house and was always available if we needed something.  He is local so he was able to keep up with yard and recommend restaurants and other services.  The neighborhood was quiet and is close to highway to get it other areas north of Albany. His place worked well for my family of four and I would recommend his place to others especially if you work near Albany proper.
