The lovely design and the prime location will leave you in awe.  ✔ Comfy Queen Bedroom ✔ Open Design Living ✔ Fully Equipped Kitchen ✔ Smart TV ✔ Wi-Fi ✔ Free Parking  See more below!
review: The photos are totally accurate. Wonderful space! Tall antique ceilings, new kitchen & bath. Stylishly decorated, great ventilation. Kitchenware well-stocked (I cooked): pots & pans, utensils, baking dishes, cheese graters, etc. etc.  Across the street from a deli where I picked up some salad & delicious cornbread for like $2. LOCATION is a huge advantage: around the corner from restaurants, shops, and bars on Lark St. Yes there can be a wee bit of noise on a nice night from the outdoor patio at "Oh bar" but nothing that my earplugs didn't drown out.  Check-in super easy with the code. Parking pass. Fantastic communication. Terra was able to let me have a late check-out at 4:00 because my flight didn't leave until 6:30 pm, which was incredibly considerate since another guest was due at 5:00. Will totally stay here again when I return to Albany.

Also convenient was a Thai restaurant just next door with excellent food. We loved that our unit had toiletries  you might need along with coffee, creamer, sugar/sweetener, granola bars and oatmeal. If games are your thing, you're in heaven here. From the NFL Blitz game machine in kitchen to life size Connect Four in living room and more games on top of the fridge, you can have much entertainment. Not enough, TVs in each bedroom and living room with streaming services available. My colleague, friends, and I really enjoyed this cozy and homey place, so much we regretted having to leave. Great hosts on top of it all made this AirBnB visit extraordinary. Much appreciated.

description: The Rose Haven space  Welcome to The Rose Haven Apartment! This unique oasis is nestled in the heart of the City of Albany, New York, offering a perfect location near Historic Washington Park. It promises a secluded romantic getaway immersed in the dreamy natural ambiance of Washington Park.   Once you are ready to rest and relax, retreat to the lovely bedroom, where you can recharge after an exciting day of adventuring throughout the City of Albany.
review: For the Checkin he send good information, would have helped if he added that you have to go between the two buildings. comunication was very good. Apartment inside looks like the pictures and is very nice. The house looks a little conserning at first sight but i had no issues.

description: Welcome to our newly renovated two-bedroom apartment located on the second floor, just minutes away from Albany Med, and across from Washington Park. Easy access to state offices and MVP arena all within walking distance. The neighborhood is brimming with restaurants, bars, and beautiful architecture, making it one of the most desired areas in Albany. Perfect for both short-term and long term visits. Our apartment offers comfort and convenience in an ideal location.
review: Great place to stay! I would stay again. Place was very clean and in the middle of lots of food and across from a park.

description: Welcome to our newly renovated, one bedroom apartment in the heart of the charming Melrose neighborhood in Albany, NY, conveniently nestled between UAlbany and downtown. ☺️ Please note, this apartment is apart of a four family apartment complex.   This pet friendly space includes an outdoor sitting area and small patio.
review: Excellent little spot. Easy to get in and quiet neighborhood gave me a chance to relax on the porch often. Good spaces in the house and all the basics - good towels - a stocked Kpod supply - and pretty clean for an old house.  Would recommend for anyone that is more on the quiet side and wants a place to suit.  Walkable to parks,  restaurants, and pubs - great location!

description: This charming townhouse is located in the historic district of Albany. This stay is surrounded by many great indoor and outdoor attractions. The State Capitol is a short 5 minute walk away. For those who enjoy trying new food or love their morning coffee, you can visit one of the many restaurants, bars and cafes located on Lark Street. No matter what reason you have for visiting Albany, this home away from home is the perfect stay!
review: An extremely quiet place for being within city limits.  An older home but very clean and all the amenities that you need.  It fit our family and gave everyone space.  Thanks Jared, for sharing your home with us.

description: 800 sqft rustic style master suite in the heart of Albany, NY. Cozy up by the fire or take a dip in the pool or hot tub. Enjoy a Purple hybrid 4 luxury mattress. Originally a farmhouse, the home has been extensively renovated to highlight all of the original architecture and offer every luxury to guests. The outdoor patio, pool, and hot tub are available for guests to enjoy at no extra charge. The home is full of unexpected design and decor delights we know you will enjoy!
review: Beautiful home, and the loft was perfect,  just as described.   Our stay was super comfortable and relaxing, will definitely go back. Loved the pool, and our dog loved the backyard. Overall amazing stay.

description: This home is a gorgeous 100 year old Victorian   This suite is located on the 2nd floor. All the comforts of home! Tv and mini fridge in room.  We supply towels, linens and starter toiletries.  A very clean and quiet setting makes  for a comfortable stay here at the Inn.
review: The Host was easy to communicate with. The space is clean, comfortable and quiet. Everything you need is there. You can choose to utilize the common space or just stay in the room. It was one of the easiest AirBnB experiences I have had.

description: This 2nd floor one bedroom in a Historic Brownstone 1800's across the street from Washington park. Beautiful woodwork throughout with all the comforts of home. Great area where you can walk or jog in the park or just enjoy a cup of coffee outside. Choice of restaurants, stores & shops on Lark street. Movie theater, hospitals and malls all in close proximity. We are located on State street in Albany in a desirable residential area with easy Uber or Lyft service available.  ((NO PARTIES!!))
review: We were able to get on-street parking in front of the building, and the walk to restaurants in the evening and the following morning was easy. Everything was extremely labeled and easy to access, and there was even a tower fan in the bedroom to help circulate air and block out any street noise. The apartment was pretty and kept very clean.

description: Comfortable single- family home in quiet residential neighborhood.  Large bathroom with a “guest sink” and two showers to choose from. Comfortable beds and a desk to work at. Free and easy on street parking, bus routes to downtown at both ends of the block. Close to hospitals, Albany JCC, library. Wide variety of restaurants nearby.
review: Great stay, comfy, clean, cozy and quiet location. Exactly as described but better in person. Thank you

description: This 1st floor one bedroom in a Historic Brownstone 1800's across the street from Washington park. Beautiful woodwork throughout with all the comforts of home. Great area where you can walk or jog in the park or just enjoy a cup of coffee outside. Choice of restaurants, stores & shops on Lark street. Movie theater, hospitals and malls are all in close proximity. We are located on State street in Albany in a desirable residential area with easy Uber or Lyft service available. ((NO PARTIES!!))
review: My family and I appreciate Lloyd's flexibility in allowing us to check in at the last minute. We had a safety issue that occurred at our previous Airbnb. I told Lloyd what happened and there wasn't any judgement. Lloyd is super responsive and an excellent host. Check in and check out was easy. The apartment building sits adjacent to the iconic Washington  Park. You are in walking distance of restaurants. You will feel right at home once you enter his beautiful apartment. I would definitely stay here again when I return to Albany! Beautiful apartment Lloyd!

description: My place is close to University of Albany, shopping malls and plazas, bars, restaurants, the airport, the city center, parks, art and culture. You’ll love my place because of the location, the ambiance, the outdoors space, fully renovated, newly furnished, nice yard, awesome double rear deck,  open floor plan and central air.   My place is good for couples, solo adventurers, business travelers, families (with kids), big groups, and furry friends ($50 pet fee w/ booties included).
review: House was super clean! Plenty of blankets and towels! Had everything we needed for cooking! The AC kept us cozy and the tvs were such a plus! Would most definitely come back and i would absolutely recommend to a friend.

description: This unique apartment is designed after the rich boxing history of Mohammed Ali in the old Public School 14 Building.   Nearby ￮ 3 Min to Times Union Center ￮ 5 Min to Albany Law ￮ 7 Min to Palace Theater  ￮ 10-15 min to SUNY & St. Rose  Ask us for more info!  Airports ￮ 18 Min to Albany International Airport  Amenities ￮ Full-sized Pool Table ￮ Designer Curated Aesthetics ￮ Wide-Open for Mingling ￮ King Bed ￮ Work Station ￮ Yoga Station  Listing ￮ Entire Apartment for 4-6
review: The location of this unit is very sketchy and didn't feel safe. The unit itself is very nice and secure.  We were given the wrong code to get into the building and couldn't get a hold of the host. Eventually someone else came to the door and we were able to slip in.  We received the correct code later that evening.  We stayed here for 2 days. We ran out of coffee pods the first morning, the host didn't respond to our request for more till that evening saying that they'd bring more the next morning, but they never did.  Not the best experience.

description: Our home is a sanctuary of space and elegance. It boasts high ceilings, polished wooden floors, and open lounging areas where you can mingle or find a quiet corner. 	Enjoy our kitchen for a cup of coffee or savor a movie night in the living room. 	Our sun-drenched patio is perfect for a morning stretch or an evening wind-down with a glass of wine. Step outside, and you’re in the heart of the city’s most walkable district. A short stroll takes you to eateries catering to all taste buds.
review: Great place to stay. Super comfy. No complaints.

description: Enjoy the private and clean comfort of our freshly renovated bungalow in Albany's quaint Helderberg Neighborhood. Some of the regions most cherished restaurants on New Scotland Avenue are within a two block walk. Close accessibility to both Albany Med Hospital and Saint Peters Hospital as well as Albany Law, The Albany School of Pharmacy and Russell Sage College. This home features a newly renovated fully functioning kitchen, a luxurious bathroom with a walk-in shower and full size tub.
review: The house is very sweet, nicely appointed with appropriate period furniture that matches the style and age of the house.  Everything is updated and in great shape, beautifully painted, with nice windows, good temperature control and a nice amount of space for our needs.  Check in was earlier and check out was later than usual, which I believe is a very helpful bonus, though we weren't able to take advantage of this due to our own schedule. Dan was incredibly flexible and helpful to us when we needed to cut our trip from two days to one at the very last minute and we are grateful to him.

description: This 2nd floor one bedroom in a Historic Brownstone 1800's across the street from Washington park. Beautiful woodwork throughout with all the comforts of home. Great area where you can walk or jog in the park or just enjoy a cup of coffee outside. Choice of restaurants, stores & shops on Lark street. Movie theater, hospitals and malls all in close proximity. We are located on State street in Albany in a desirable residential area with easy Uber or Lyft service available.  ((NO PARTIES!!))
review: Lloyd is hands down one of the best Airbnb hosts I’ve ever encountered. The communication was easy and he pays extra attention to the details in the hosting apartment. The location is perfect, beautiful park nearby and walkable to tons of restaurants. Lloyd’s place is great for our weekend getaway in Albany, but also well equipped or a longer stay. We would love to stay at this apartment again.

description: This completely modernized garden-level space provides a charming and unique atmosphere while also being centrally located in the Capital Region of New York.   My partner and I have taken ample time to carefully craft this space to maximize its potential and ensure your enjoyment. Featuring a fully loaded kitchen with stainless steal appliances, marble countertops, exposed brick throughout, tasteful decor, and your own private patio. We truly hope you enjoy this space as much as we do!
review: I had a fantastic stay at Todd’s lovely unit in Albany. The location was perfect, the apartment was spotless, and the host was extremely helpful and communicative. Cleanliness: The apartment was immaculate. Fresh linens and towels were provided, and everything was neatly arranged. Location: Situated right in the city, it was within walking distance to many restaurants. The neighborhood felt safe and vibrant. Amenities: The apartment had all the amenities I needed, including a fully equipped kitchen, a comfortable bed, and high-speed Wi-Fi.  Host Communication: Todd was very responsive and provided clear instructions for check-in/check-out. He also was able to accommodate my special requests, which was much appreciated. Comfort: The apartment was cozy and well-decorated, making it feel like a home away from home.  I would highly recommend Todd’s apartment to anyone visiting the city. It provided everything I needed for a comfortable and enjoyable stay, I will be back this summer!!!

description: Charming 1 Bedroom + Workstation apartment in Downtown Albany. Centrally located and easy walking! Free Fast and Furious Arcade Game. Pets allowed! 2nd FL apartment with an elevator on site!   Enjoy hardwood floors, a custom kitchen, soaking bathtub, and central AC. Features a Queen bed, pull-out couch, workstation with monitor, and free WiFi. Includes access to a shared washer/dryer.   For long term stays over 1 month, a monthly parking space will be included. Parking garage close by.
review: Great place!  Very clean. Everything in the apartment is brand new and modern. Top of the line fixtures. The place was very quiet. I was traveling for business and it was perfect. Definitely will be staying again whenever I’m in Albany.

description: Nestled in the heart of the city, our Airbnb exudes an enchanting charm with its stylish and romantic decor. Positioned on a vibrant city street, immerse yourself in the lively urban atmosphere. This energetic environment will carry some background noise. We prioritize your comfort and recommend bringing earplugs for light sleepers to ensure a restful stay. Corner store -1 min Airport, bus & train station -15 min. Outdoor cameras $250 indoor smoking violation fee $250 pet cleaning fee, no pets
review: We had a short stay at the apartment in Albany. Sonya described us everything in advance. The only thing was that the lock was making noises during the night and we didn‘t feel so secure. But apart from that the apartment was very cute and tidy.

description: Nestled in the heart of the city, our Airbnb exudes an enchanting charm with its stylish and romantic decor. Positioned on a vibrant city street, immerse yourself in the lively urban atmosphere. This energetic environment will carry some background noise. We prioritize your comfort and recommend bringing earplugs for light sleepers to ensure a restful stay. Corner store -1 min Airport, bus & train station -15 min. Outdoor cameras $250 indoor smoking violation fee $250 pet cleaning fee, no pets
review: Overall, the stay was what we needed for a night in between a couple destinations on a road trip. We arrived on a weekend night, which may affect perception. However, I would have to agree with the review below that suggests the surrounding area did not at first seem extremely safe. While initially worried, the fan in the room drowned out any outside noise, and we were pleasantly surprised waking up in the light the next morning. We found a nice coffee and bagel shop close by and were on our way. So, the space was what we needed, very clean, had some extra touches with water and snacks, but I would avoid the streets immediately north and east at night.

description: This completely modernized garden-level space provides a charming and unique atmosphere while also being centrally located in the Capital Region of New York.   My partner and I have taken ample time to carefully craft this space to maximize its potential and ensure your enjoyment. Featuring a fully loaded kitchen with stainless steal appliances, marble countertops, exposed brick throughout, tasteful decor, and your own private patio. We truly hope you enjoy this space as much as we do!
review: Very convenient to downtown Albany and the conference center. It was nice to start my day and end my day with a walk to and from the conference. I felt at home in Todd’s place.

description: Welcome to our newly renovated, one bedroom apartment in the heart of the charming Melrose neighborhood in Albany, NY, conveniently nestled between UAlbany and downtown. ☺️ Please note, this apartment is apart of a four family apartment complex.   This pet friendly space includes an outdoor sitting area and small patio.
review: Lovely place. Thaddeus was so easy to deal with and very amenable. Made bringing our pup an ease. She was right at home and slept in her bed while we attended our family event. Thank you for a wonderful stay.

description: Newly renovated single family home in the heart of Albany. The house is equipped with everything you need including the all important Nespresso coffee machine. You will find it warm and homey, but also simple and free of clutter that prevent you from making the space feel like your own. I want you to enjoy the freedom that comes with staying in an Air BnB and the comfort you would expect from a boutique hotel. Enjoy the fenced in backyard equipped with grill, firpit and hammock. Hello summer
review: Diana is very responsive to any questions or needs. The home was very clean and in a great neighborhood. I enjoyed the stay and will stay again in the future. The Christmas tree was a nice surprise during the holidays!

description: Welcome to our newly renovated, spacious studio. Work efficiently at your dedicated desk, and savor the convenience of a fully divided kitchen. Only 5 minutes' walk from Albany Med, moments from Washington Park and Lark Street, and a short stroll to downtown Albany and state offices. Surrounded by a large variety of restaurants and local bars. Modern amenities including a full bathroom with efficient  washer and dryer.
review: Justin and Erion were kind and reliable hosts. Kindly gave great, honest recommendations for restaurants and places nearby that made our Albany experience worthwhile. The place is also exactly as listed and pictured. Great price for all the amenities, comfort.

description: Our spacious 2048 sq. ft. 5 bedroom. 2 bath, house is the perfect place for serious minded groups.   We welcome business travelers and family travelers looking for a quiet, sanitized gorgeous home for extended stays in the city. Our reviews emphasize that we offer the comfortable accommodations to meet all of your needed expectations. Welcome to Albany
review: We had a great stay!  It’s a large old house, well-maintained throughout, with a renovated kitchen and beautiful new bathrooms.  It was spotlessly-clean, the kitchen was very well-supplied, and the laundry machines worked well.  There are two off-street parking spots.  The hosts were nice, and easy to reach by text.  We will definitely be back!

description: BOOK this 2-bedroom 2nd floor apt. w/ full amenities! Renovated historic 200-year-old building in quiet neighborhood of Albany's Pastures. Great location near Albany Medical Center, MVP Arena, Empire State Plaza, Library, Lark Street, State Offices, courts; easy access to local & regional bus routes and highways (I-787, I-90 & I-87).   Accommodates up to 6 NON-SMOKING guests. Toiletries included.  Save & BOOK this trendy suite w/ deck today! Message me anytime. Hope to welcome you soon!  -Earl
review: Absolutely loved staying at Earl's place. The apartment was beautiful and super spacious, and made us feel at home instantly. Earl was so reactive and always eager to help -- even when I got my reservation dates all wrong! I was in Albany for my attorney admission and the house was conveniently located near the state office building. I'd definitely recommend this place to anyone visiting!

description: "The Red House," an inspiring 4-bedroom, 2nd-floor apartment nestled in the heart of Albany. This charming space features beautifully refinished 130-year-old hardwood floors, creating a warm and inviting atmosphere. A custom stone fireplace, complete with a 50-inch Samsung Smart TV, serves as the focal point of the living area. The kitchen is fully equipped for whipping up a meal. The dishwasher and laundry are conveniently located in the unit. Front and back balconies! Free street parking.
review: This was an exceptional apartment. Since it was our first experience with an Airbnb I was skeptical.  However, I was quite impressed. It was spacious enough to fit our family of 8. It was very clean and the hosts provided every single necessity, nothing was amiss as we stayed here. Each room was equipped & comfortable. The host we communicated with was Brigid, she was professional & kind and we appreciate her efforts. Great Airbnb & hosts!

description: BOOK this 3rd floor studio loft in a renovated historic two-century-old building in a quiet neighborhood of Albany's Pastures. Great location near Albany Medical Center, MVP Arena, Empire State Plaza, Library, Lark Street, State Offices, courts; easy access to local & regional bus routes and highways (I-787, I-90 & I-87).  Queen bed + twin bed + futon Up to 4 NON-SMOKING guests Toiletries included  Save & BOOK this unit today! Message me anytime. Hope to welcome you soon!  -Earl
review: Angela’s place was kept clean. The key is left in the front door as part of check in. However, the apartment door lock would not lock properly. Angela stated she was not aware of the issue. She did have it fixed the next day, but a night with the lock broken staying in that area  did not instill confidence in our safety.

description: Charming 5 room bed and breakfast located across from Washington Park in Albany, NY. Each room has a private bathroom and workstation. Guests have access to a shared kitchen, dining area, living space and small office nook with printer.
review: Very clean and tidy rooms- nice kitchen and common spaces for coffee/working.  Had everything I needed and checkin/out was easy!  The location is very walkable to Albany Med and Lark St.  The house is right across from the park and on a main road so if you are very sensitive to traffic/people noise I would request to stay in one of the rooms towards the back of the house and you’d be fine!  I had the giant house all to myself one night- it was great!

review: Everything was great! Wonderful host who truly prioritizes his guests. Great location! Very comfortable place :)

Easy access to state offices and MVP arena all within minutes distance. The neighborhood is brimming with restaurants and bars, making it one of the most desired areas in Albany. Perfect for both short-term and long term visits. Our apartment offers comfort and convenience in an ideal location.
review: We had a nice stay. Erion was a gracious host. He answered any questions we had and responded quickly. The Airbnb is in a nice and quiet neighborhood. Apartment is spacious and clean . I will book again

description: This 1st floor one bedroom in a Historic Brownstone 1800's across the street from Washington park. Beautiful woodwork throughout with all the comforts of home. Movie theater, hospitals and malls are all in close proximity. We are located on State street in Albany in a desirable residential area with easy Uber or Lyft service available. ((NO PARTIES!!))
review: This is a great Airbnb and is true to its description. Lloyd is very responsive to messages. His home is super clean with easy check-in. Since my brother and I stayed here to go to a concert in Saratoga, we did not check out the local area. My brother loved the extra large and thick towels. The beds were really comfortable too. Wonderful place to stay and if I am in the area again, I would definitely stay here again.

description: Enjoy a spacious yet cozy home in a quiet neighborhood with off-street parking. Minutes from restaurants, shopping, universities (UAlbany, Sage, St. Rose), parks, museums, hospitals(Albany Med, St.Peters) and State Capital Offices for those traveling for business.  We’re right off the main highway leading to the World Famous Saratoga Race Track (30 min) and Adirondack Mountains/Lake George (50 min)!   From this Air Force Family to yours, welcome to our home.
review: Spacious and super clean. 5 bedrooms,  2 bathrooms, a comfortable living room,  and a very well stocked kitchen. Plan to come back.

description: Great location within walking distance to the Capital. It is a good size bedroom with WiFi internet . Private full bath.  We provide in the room a small refrigerator, Microwave ,coffee pot,iron ,hair dryer and  TV. Lots of entertainment nearby. Brew pubs, restaurants, the NYS Museum. Governor's Mansion. Washington Park.Capital Rep Theater as well as the Palace Theater.
review: To start off, I should say that there really isn't a better deal than Gregg's place in central Albany. I looked. It is easy to get to and is very convenient for anyone trying to do New York Bar related things. As a man traveling alone, and in Albany for less than a full day, it was all I needed. Gregg was very quick in communicating with me.    I should mention, though, that the room is in the basement and can seem a bit odd. There's not much light and there are cobwebs around. The bathroom is upstairs and the shower is in a closet. There's no sink or water access on the basement level. If you're planning to stay for any length of time, this might not be ideal. But, again, for one night, as a guy traveling on his own, this worked just fine and was a great deal.

description: Welcome to our charming studio in the heart of Albany's Center Square. Nestled in one of the oldest homes in the neighborhood, the space has been restored to blend history with modern convenience. Recently renovated, it features a modern bathroom with rain shower. The décor is a nod to mid-century aesthetics.  This cozy studio is a stone's throw away from Albany's main attractions within easy walking distance. Experience a unique blend of past and present in this delightful Albany retreat.
review: Jason's place was perfect and comfortable. He was a great host. It snowed the night before and he made sure the path and walk were all clear before I left for work the next morning.

description: "The Red House," an inspiring 4-bedroom, 2nd-floor apartment nestled in the heart of Albany. This charming space features beautifully refinished 130-year-old hardwood floors, creating a warm and inviting atmosphere. A custom stone fireplace, complete with a 50-inch Samsung Smart TV, serves as the focal point of the living area. The kitchen is fully equipped for whipping up a meal. The dishwasher and laundry are conveniently located in the unit. Front and back balconies! Free street parking.
review: Great stay for a work trip. Very responsive hosts. Thanks!

Movie theater, hospitals and malls are all in close proximity. We are located on State street in Albany in a desirable residential area with easy Uber or Lyft service available. ((NO PARTIES!!))
review: Consider yourself fortunate and do not hesitate to make a reservation if you find this listing is available for your visit to Albany. If we had not had a tight schedule and a plane to catch we would have extended our stay. We would have loved an extra day to enjoy the park and the neighborhood. The ambiance, the comfortable accommodations and the great location of this apartment and the building made this stay a highlight of our 10 day fall foliage trip. Lloyd went out of his way to make this booking work for our last minute request. This was a standout Air BnB memory for us!

description: Stay in our 5-bedroom 3-story townhouse nestled in a renovated, historic 200-year-old building located in Albany's serene Pastures neighborhood. Just a short walk from landmarks like the Albany Medical Center, Times Union Center, Empire State Plaza, and vibrant Lark Street. Easy access to I-787, I-90 & I-87. Five queen beds and two queen air mattresses and couches accommodate up to 16. Ideal for large families and groups. Dive into Albany's history with modern comforts.
review: Absolutely wonderful stay at Earl's place.  So many rooms and so much space for my whole group to spread out, something we are not used to with 6 of us.  Thank you so much, 100% would stay again.  So clean and had great air conditioning in the top room.

description: Spacious studio with hardwood floors, fully equipped kitchen, clean and bright. Large modern bath .  Full Cable TV and WiFi. Walking distance to the new Renaissance Hotel. Walk to everything downtown! The Empire Plaza  and the Egg are  across the street.You can't get any closer, to the MVP Arena,  as well as Restaurants, bars, churches. Walk to  Capital and the new Capital Convention Center. Laundry facilities in the apartment
review: street parking is a little tricky. if you have a car, you must move it across the street each night.  And it's cool at night in this basement studio, but there are extra blankets and a space heater in the closet

description: Listing is designed with the business or casual traveler in mind PLEASE NO SMOKERS in the building *Newly renovated *Modern 1 bedroom w/Smart TVs that feels like home *Street parking *Equipped with coffee maker *Fridge *Wireless charger *Private bath *Across the street from the Capitol Building *Close to Highway I-87, I-90, I-787 & public transportation. Long term stays available. Please inquire with dates needed for more info. Traveling nurses, doctors, lobbyists, students are welcome.
review: Nice place with a great view. The building is old but the apartment was clean. The noise from the pipes is a bit loud at times but otherwise a fine place to stay right next to the government building.

This unique oasis is nestled in the heart of the City of Albany, New York, offering a perfect location near Historic Washington Park. It promises a secluded romantic getaway immersed in the dreamy natural ambiance of Washington Park.   Once you are ready to rest and relax, retreat to the lovely bedroom, where you can recharge after an exciting day of adventuring throughout the City of Albany.
review: Instructions were clear & the unit was exactly like the pictures. Neighboring units and outside activities were a little noisy during the night time hours. Overall, a good stay, for the price and location.

description: The room is large with Western exposure giving more bright light in the afternoons. There is a desk for working and a closet and dresser. The room is filled with original art.
review: 100% recommend Diana's place. It is a place where you can feel like you're home. Cozy, warm, tidy, clean, stylish. The house is well decorated with paintings. Diana is a very very nice host. She is sincere, kind and thoughtful.

description: Welcome to our newly renovated one-bedroom apartment located on the second floor, just minutes away from Albany Med and Saint Peters, walking distance from neighborhood park. Easy access to state offices and MVP arena all within minutes distance. The neighborhood is brimming with restaurants and bars, making it one of the most desired areas in Albany. Perfect for both short-term and long term visits. Our apartment offers comfort and convenience in an ideal location.
review: Great place. WiFi was really fast. Very responsive owner. Downstairs neighbor was a bit noisy but not late at night.

description: Welcome to your cozy Albany retreat! Enjoy a comfortable stay in this well-appointed space, perfect for travelers looking for convenience and relaxation. Your booking includes free parking and a complimentary breakfast to start your day right. Located near shops, restaurants, and downtown Albany, this home offers easy access to local attractions. Whether you’re here for business or leisure, you’ll love the comfort and convenience of this stay. Book now for a relaxing experience
review: The bed bug issue alone should shut this place down... This was one of my worst Airbnb experiences. The listing is misleading — it’s a room in a low-budget hotel (2 stars at best) that hasn’t been adapted for Airbnb guests. On Day 2, I reported multiple issues: • Broken toilet that never fully worked • Door didn’t lock from the outside (safety issue) • Only one outlet far from the bed • Extremely thin pillows • Bed bugs discovered on the last day I reached out at 9 AM but didn’t get a response until 5 PM, and it was a generic checkout message. When I followed up, the hosts were dismissive and told me to talk to the front desk. They didn’t acknowledge the bed bugs until after checkout and offered no real apology or urgency. Their final message blamed the “mid class hotel” for the condition. That comment was made after being made aware of bed bugs. Affordable pricing does not excuse the poor state of the room or lack of support. I wouldn’t stay here again and don’t recommend it

description: Relax in our cozy home on a quiet one-way street. Plenty of free street parking available. With a large dining and living room, fully stocked kitchen, and furnished private room, our home is the perfect affordable stay for working professionals, students, and people in-between housing.   Newly furnished and renovated in 2017. Minutes from major universities and hospitals. Entire home is 3 bed 1 bath (you have a private bedroom with door lock). CDTA Bus stop 1 block away.
review: Chad is an excellent and gracious host! I would use his services again. Greatly recommend!!!!

description: Step into Fortune Suites, a recently revamped Two-bedroom apartment ideally situated within 8 to 10 minutes' drive of Albany Med, Times Union Center, and other local attractions. Street parking is hassle-free, accommodating up to 4 Non-smoking guests. Toiletries are provided, and we kindly request keeping noise levels down after 9:00 pm. Rest assured, high-speed internet is included for your convenience. Welcome and enjoy your stay!
review: I walked in at 11:30pm and left within 15 minutes because I didn't feel safe and the place gave me the creeps. The street and adjacent sidewalk are directly under the first floor bedroom window which has a window A/C and no security gate covering it.  Ask for photos of the front of the building, hallway entrance and surrounding neighborhood before deciding if you want to book. Ask for unretouched photos of the interior, which feels cramped compared to the spacious interior represented in listing. The interior seems slapped together in a hurry and with no care for quality.

description: This stylish place to stay is perfect to stop for a night or stay longer. Open living/kitchen area is perfect to hang out with family and friends. One bedroom with plenty of closet space. Bonus tv in bedroom with updated bathroom. Centrally located close to U-Albany, St. Rose, St. Peter’s & Albany Med to name a few. Quiet residential neighborhood walkable to great restaurants on Madison Avenue. Come and relax at your home away from home.

review: Very responsive. Answered quickly. The house interior was amazing, impeccable. House was clean and well decorated. Parked my new car in the street, no issues.

review: Another great stay at Dan's house.  This is an excellent choice for Albany near the medical center and downtown.  Highly recommend.

With public transportation and ample street parking nearby, this is the perfect place to call home.
review: Elizabeth's place is super comfortable, super clean and super convenient. The neighborhood is great with a theatre and grocery across the street. College of St. Rose is just a block away. I highly recommend Elizabeth's apartment!

We also felt it was quiet and private. We struggled a little in the kitchen as there weren’t many pots, pans or mixing bowls, and no kitchen towels. The bed was comfortable! We were within walking distance to places we wanted to see and overall we had a great experience!

review: very unique and special place. stands out from all other places I've stayed in Albany. We will definitely be back soon!  Jerry and del were amazing hosts!

review: Our host, Rachel, was very welcoming, courteous and willing to accommodate us in anyway possible.  The location was perfect for our trip.  Our accommodations were just as described, clean and had everything we needed.

review: My family and I loved staying here. It is in a perfect location for exploring downtown Albany. Many shops and restaurants nearby and the capital is only a 5 minute walk. If we ever go back to Albany, this is the place we would love to stay at again. Thanks for everything Jared.

review: Linda was very responsive and helpful. Place is well kept and in a great location. Would stay here again.

description: Private studio apartment with separate entrance on the garden level of owner-occupied home. Quiet and walkable area short distance from Empire Plaza, Capitol, Albany Med, Center Square, and Downtown. Plenty of FREE on-street parking available. Self check in, so we don’t have to interact unless you want to. Let us know if you have any questions and look forward to hosting you!
review: We had a great stay for 2 people! It was an easy and smooth check in. Jake and Kate provided great information. The space looked just like the pictures and was private. Parking was easy and we recommend anyone to stay here if you’re visiting Albany like we did :)

description: Relax in a newly renovated one bedroom/one bathroom apartment located on the first floor of a charming brownstone building. It features lofty ceilings with beautiful architecture and a newly remodeled kitchen. Conveniently located to the Palace Theater, Capitol Rep Theater, Times Union Center and the Empire State Plaza. This rental is in walking distance to many popular eateries, bars, and more to explore!
review: Cool place on the first floor of an old row house. Perfect size for one person. Comfortable bed and sofa. Easy to park. Outside the window is the Ten Broeck mansion. A short walk to the Palace Theatre and the Theatre District. Albany is more hilly than I expected. Overall, great value, helpful and responsive host.

description: Welcome to our newly renovated, spacious studio. Work efficiently at your dedicated desk, and savor the convenience of a fully divided kitchen. Only 5 minutes' walk from Albany Med, moments from Washington Park and Lark Street, and a short stroll to downtown Albany and state offices. Surrounded by a large variety of restaurants and local bars. Modern amenities including a full bathroom with efficient  washer and dryer.
review: Justin and his team were excellent hosts. they were very responsive and able to accommodate us even on short notice. I would recommend any property that they host

description: Welcome to our charming studio in the heart of Albany's Center Square. Nestled in one of the oldest homes in the neighborhood, the space has been restored to blend history with modern convenience. Recently renovated, it features a modern bathroom with rain shower. The décor is a nod to mid-century aesthetics.  This cozy studio is a stone's throw away from Albany's main attractions within easy walking distance. Experience a unique blend of past and present in this delightful Albany retreat.
review: Great stay, communicative host. This place is super close to the legislative office building and is priced comparably to the state rate in a hotel. Definitely recommend for staffers! After a long work week, it was nice to stay in a place that felt homey and comfortable! And the bathroom is gorgeous.

description: Urban Oasis!  2nd Floor guest bedroom in residential home.  Shared entrance.  Access to full kitchen, shared bath, bedroom, laundry and parking. Walking distance to Albany Med, Albany Pharmacy, Albany Law School, College of St. Rose and Sage College.  On Main bus line.  10 minute drive from downtown
review: Great Place ! Ed was an excellent host ! The place is neat and clean and highly recommended.

description: 2-bedroom 1st floor apt. w/ full amenities! Renovated historic 200-year-old building in quiet neighborhood of Albany's Pastures. Great location near Albany Medical Center, MVP Arena, Empire State Plaza, Library, Lark Street, State Offices, courts; easy access to local & regional bus routes and highways (I-787, I-90 & I-87).  Accommodates up to 6 NON-SMOKING guests. Toiletries included.   Save & BOOK this apartment today! Message me anytime. Hope to welcome you soon!  -Earl
review: Great place to stay for me and my friends. The location is great, a quick Uber to the main bars/restaurants. Earl was very responsive with communication and made the check in very easy. Had all the needed accommodations.

description: Comfortable single- family home in quiet residential neighborhood.  Large bathroom with a “guest sink” and two showers to choose from. Comfortable beds and a desk to work at. Free and easy on street parking, bus routes to downtown at both ends of the block. Close to hospitals, Albany JCC, library. Wide variety of restaurants nearby.
review: This was my second stay at Diana's beautiful home. As expected it was sparkling clean just like the first time and I had a wonderful stay! Diana and her Kitty Finn are the best hosts! Highly recommend!

description: BOOK this 2-bed fl 2 apt. in a renovated historic two-century-old building in a quiet neighborhood of Albany's Pastures. Great location near Albany Medical Center, MVP Arena, Empire State Plaza, Library, Lark Street, State Offices, courts; easy access to local & regional bus routes and highways (I-787, I-90 & I-87).  Private balcony w/ seating Up to 4 NON-SMOKING guests Toiletries included  Message me anytime. Hope to welcome you soon!
review: Really an exceptional value, with one caveat - location looks (but probably is not) a bit sketch.  If you park in spot provided it is a rather long walk around the block to get to the front door and while I experienced no issues, I imagine this could cause some worry for a suburbanite.  There is very accessible metered street parking. Once inside, you will find a very nice unit - very spacious with all the necessary room to spread out, work, cook, etc.  No d/w and a small (but surprisingly powerful) countertop micro - minor niggles.  Very comfortable bed, and although window AC it was turned on before arrival and in combination with ceiling fans did as good (maybe better) as some central setups.  Never heard peep from downstairs occupant, 3rd floor a vacant unit that probably is not frequently rented (building footprint suggests it would be rather small).  Easy code lock and you end up with 3 sets of locks between you and street, so you and your belongings are certainly secure.

description: Welcome to our charming studio in the heart of Albany's Center Square. Nestled in one of the oldest homes in the neighborhood, the space has been restored to blend history with modern convenience. Recently renovated, it features a modern bathroom with rain shower. The décor is a nod to mid-century aesthetics.  This cozy studio is a stone's throw away from Albany's main attractions within easy walking distance. Experience a unique blend of past and present in this delightful Albany retreat.
review: Very nice place exactly what we expected. Very well located I had a great time. Will stay there again next year hopefully.

description: 2-bedroom 1st floor apt. w/ full amenities! Renovated historic 200-year-old building in quiet neighborhood of Albany's Pastures. Great location near Albany Medical Center, MVP Arena, Empire State Plaza, Library, Lark Street, State Offices, courts; easy access to local & regional bus routes and highways (I-787, I-90 & I-87).  Accommodates up to 6 NON-SMOKING guests. Toiletries included.   Save & BOOK this apartment today! Message me anytime. Hope to welcome you soon!  -Earl
review: I highly recommend staying with Earl. The location is perfect. Within walking distance to everything.  All the added food.. water.. coffee etc. Was such a nice touch. Early was easy to deal with and very helpful.

description: Relax in a newly renovated one bedroom/one bathroom apartment located on the first floor of a charming brownstone building. It features lofty ceilings with beautiful architecture and a newly remodeled kitchen. Conveniently located to the Palace Theater, Capitol Rep Theater, Times Union Center and the Empire State Plaza. This rental is in walking distance to many popular eateries, bars, and more to explore!
review: The place is super cute and very comfortable.   We found it well stocked with needed items (including a fan!). Nice and quiet.  No neighborhood noise.   The location is excellent.  I’d be pleased to stay there again.

description: Regular breakfast free  Lunch packed $5 Dinner Plate $10  We updated cleaning protocol because of COVID-19 pandemic  OUR PRIORITY IS ORGANIC LIFE SO OTHER THING IS LESS IMPORTANT  FREE LAUNDRY  AIR CONDITIONING  No parking space on premises just street parking . Internet High speed WiFi, This building is 100 years older. We don't use chemical pesticides ,chemical cleaning stuff.We use Vinegar,baking powder,biological pesticides . Therefore not fancy clea
review: I know that sometimes Airbnb guests tend to get a little flowery or repetitive with their reviews, but you ought to believe every glowing review you read of Adam's place. The place was very well kept and Adam was an incredibly gracious, gentle, and attentive host. I think what really impressed me the most were the details. My towel was wrapped in plastic, there was a makeup mirror in the room (not that it was much use to me, but I could still appreciate its utility), the fan was on when I got there, Adam personally stood out in the street when I was backing my car out. When it was time for me to check out at 6 a.m., he had a bagged breakfast and lunch ready for me to take.  Adam's got a real heart for hospitality and the only thing I wish I could have changed was my own schedule so I could've stayed longer. I hope I get the chance to come back.

description: Welcome to our garden apartment, nestled in a walkable neighborhood filled with diverse restaurants, cozy pubs, and the picturesque Washington Park. The apartment features a sound-dampened bedroom, ensuring a serene and peaceful retreat. Just steps away, you'll find the New York State Capitol, Empire State Plaza, The Egg, and the New York State Museum, making this location ideal for both relaxation and exploration.
review: This spot was super nice to stay in! The hosts were very friendly and responsive! Everything was very clean and the atmosphere was lovely. It is in a very walkable area, the Albany Institute of History and Art is close by, there’s a very good Mexican restaurant down the street, and everything felt very safe. I really enjoyed my stay!

description: Enjoy the private and clean comfort of this centrally-located brownstone.  The building is over 100 years old and has been renovated to reflect a modern style.  We are near everything Albany has to offer.  Washington Park, an 81-acre estate that was designed in the late 1800s, is on the adjacent street.  The New York State Capitol, The MVP Stadium, Albany Medical Center, art museums, and restaurants are a brisk walk away, and it takes about a 5-minute drive to the SUNY Albany campus.
review: Rabia's place is excellent! We found it to be a perfect home base for a night out in Albany. Check-in/check-out was totally easy, and the unit itself is beautiful.

description: Listing is designed with the business or casual traveler in mind PLEASE NO SMOKERS in the building *Newly renovated *Modern 1 bedroom w/Smart TVs that feels like home *Street parking *Equipped with coffee maker *Fridge *Wireless charger *Private bath *Across the street from the Capitol Building *Close to Highway I-87, I-90, I-787 & public transportation. Long term stays available. Please inquire with dates needed for more info. Traveling nurses, doctors, lobbyists, students are welcome.
review: This was a very affordable and easy to book listing. The location is great and it was very nice to be able to walk to shops and restaurants in Center Square. You are also very close to beautiful Washington park and right off the highway. The building and the unit are definitely old but I appreciated the charm.

description: Spacious Pine Hills flat with many recent updates including refinished hardwood floors, all new windows and a completely remodeled kitchen, including brand new appliances. This unit also has a private laundry room as well as an entrance foyer. There is off street parking and the building is located within walking distance to 2 primary bus routes. This unit is also within walking distance of popular restaurants, Juniors, The Point, Cafe Madison and Kismet Mediterranean Grill.
review: Where do I begin. Situated in one of the last walking neighborhoods in Albany, Pine Hills is a gem. Close to restaurants supermarket, pharmacy. If safety is your this. Two blocks from a police station.  The apt. Beautifully remodeled. Well appointed. Has everything your need. Speaking of which I have left the best for last. The kitchen. Spacious, top of the line appliances and all the kitchen hardware you need.  David was super responsive and helpful. If your headed for Albany, this is we’re you want to stay Felix and Sonia.

description: Welcome to the Mansion Suite, a newly renovated historic gem in the heart of Center Square.  Through a private entrance, down a long foyer, you'll discover the grand Oak Room, an expansive living/dining room with dramatic fireplace mantel, paneling, beamed ceiling, stained glass windows. Adjacent to the lounge, is a stylish and fully equipped  kitchen with new stainless steel appliances.  Both bedrooms have new queen beds, beautiful natural woodwork and overlook a private and quiet courtyard.
review: After well over 100 Airbnb stays, I can say that this was in the top five. Fabulous value, amazing interior, great location, beautifully furnished with tasteful and eclectic choices. Numerous thoughtful touches. Only a few Airbnb hosts put themselves in the shoes of guests, when considering inclusions. 10 out of five!

description: Enjoy a spacious yet cozy home in a quiet neighborhood with off-street parking. Minutes from restaurants, shopping, universities (UAlbany, Sage, St. Rose), parks, museums, hospitals(Albany Med, St.Peters) and State Capital Offices for those traveling for business.  We’re right off the main highway leading to the World Famous Saratoga Race Track (30 min) and Adirondack Mountains/Lake George (50 min)!   From this Air Force Family to yours, welcome to our home.
review: WE WERE A PARTY OF 8 & WE WERE SO COMFORTABLE STAYING IN CRAIG’S HOUSE!! VERY SPACIOUS AND CLEAN. CRAIG WAS ALSO VERY RESPONSIVE AND HAD EVERYTHING WE NEEDED IN THE HOUSE INCLUDING GAMES FOR A GOOD TIME!!! UPSTAIRS GYM WAS ALSO A PLUS!!!

description: Enjoy a comfortable stay in a truly one of a kind home in Albany. This former retreat has  loads of amenities to enjoy; two dining room, two living rooms, three porches, a full kitchen, huge yard, gazebo, coffee bar and more! The room has a desk and TV. Walk to eateries, grocery, and cinema.
review: The home was absolutely lovely! We arrived late (around 9pm) and found the bed without bedding, Thomas replied within 20 minutes and helped direct us to where to find some, which was great! A bit chilly, but plenty of blankets to fix that! Overall, a nice place to stay!

description: A cozy private apartment. The Blair Suite, named after the original owner of this beautiful 1890's Victorian, is located on the basement floor. It has it's own private entrance on the side of the home. Located in historic Albany, close to everything, hospitals, schools, museums, restaurants and Washington Park.
review: Bela's place is in a great location (center of Albany). Easy walking distance to Albany Medical Center and Historic downtown. Safe location. Private entrance and off-street parking are available. Bela was very fast in responding to questions and an extremely flexible host. Would stay again in a heartbeat.

description: The whole group will enjoy easy access to everything from this centrally located place. Convenient 1st floor unit with ample bedrooms, livingroom, dining room and spacious kitchen. Off street parking spot included.
review: Straightforward, easy, and clean. Clear and friendly communication. We were just in town for a short trip and Diana's place fit the bill perfectly for us.

description: Visiting Albany for work, vacation, or to visit family? The Twitchell Estate is a spacious 4BR home that will be perfect for your stay. This elegantly designed Boho Chic rental comes with amenities such as self-check-in, Netflix, Disney+, Apple TV, and many other streaming options if you're looking to relax indoors, and a private laptop-friendly office with Wi-Fi if you need to get work done. Enjoy free coffee and tea in the stocked kitchen, with everything you need to feel like you are at home.
review: Communication was excellent with the owners of this Airbnb and myself. I was very happy with how our stay turned out. The pictures don’t do it justice how nice their place actually was. Big spot and very comfortable and clean. Thank you for hosting me! I would come back 10/10 times.

description: This 2nd Floor 2BR apartment shines with beautiful hardwoods, an open flow, a newer bathroom, a newer King sized "Purple" gel flex mattress, and a new Queen "Kingsdown Prime" mattress. Reclining couch in living room; full but small kitchen, Keurig; laundry; parking, ceiling fans, window ACs. Prime location close to airport, highways, eateries; less than 10 minutes to downtown Albany/MVP Center/Hospitals; 20min to Rivers Casino; 40 min to SPAC/Saratoga Racetrack; 1hr to Lake George/Great Escape!
review: John’s place was perfect for our short stay. Clean and comfy. Near pretty much everything. They live in the same building and communicate very quickly and are so friendly. Would stay here again for sure.

description: This historic property is close to everything making it easy to plan your visit. The room is tastefully decorated with a spilt king purple hybrid 4 mattress, sitting area, and well lit desk. There’s a large closet and entertainment center as well. The bathroom is shared with one other room. A second shared bathroom is on the first floor of the home.
review: The place was gorgeous and the bed was quite comfortable. Everything was very clean. Justin and Thomas were both friendly and helpful. We enjoyed our stay!

description: This Suite has been refurbished completely. A beautiful and comfortable Suite that has everything a guest needs! Nice decor with a queen bed, desk, cable TV, WiFi, ironing board, blow dryer and your own private bath. Private entrance close to front of house.  The Inn at South Lake is a large Victorian with multiple dorm style suites. Each suite has it's own private lock. A very quiet, professional atmosphere .
review: I really enjoyed my stay.  The location is close to great bars and restaurants.  The house is spacious and has old charm.  I extended my stay 2 times which shows how much I enjoyed this may stay.   Bela is professional and covers all the bases very well.

description: Welcome to Capital City Escape, a stylish  3-bedroom, 1.5-bathroom home in the heart of Albany, NY.   This newly renovated space offers all the comforts of home, including a fully equipped kitchen, washer and dryer, and a sleek, contemporary design. Whether you're planning a family getaway or a fun trip with friends, this cozy yet sophisticated retreat is the perfect place to relax and explore Albany!
review: We had a great stay at Nori’s place! Wonderful location and very cute and clean space.  It had everything we needed!

description: BEAUTIFULLY renovated and stylish apartment with CHARACTER in a historic building. 4K Smart TV with Netflix, and high speed internet ready for you to use! This property comes with a fully stocked kitchen, in unit washer/dryer, free resident lot parking, and a fenced shared backyard with bbq for guests to enjoy.   This unit is located on floor 1 and is available for long term stays.
review: Very comfortable and clean home. Really enjoyed staying here. Would definitely recommend staying here. Looking forward to another stay!

description: This stylish light-filled space is perfect for traveling professionals, cozy 2 bedroom apartment minutes from hospitals, parks, and great restaurants. Very walkable location right next to Albany Medical Center.  ~ fast wi-fi ~fully equipped kitchen  ~55” smart tv ~free off street parking  ~contactless self check-in
review: I have stayed at many Airbnb and this is the first time I left due to my discomfort with conditions…it is ideally located if you are needing to be at the hospital .  If I was in my early 20’s I MAY have stayed..it felt very similar to college housing.  I arrived 4 days after a snow storm and no sidewalks, steps , driveway were cleared…the melt freeze cycle created mounds of thick ice on the steps making it dangerous to walk on …particularly carrying anything.  The Kitchen is worn, stained and grim…..After traveling 6 hours,  visiting the hospital and preparing for a work meeting….I was not willing to stay and wait/hope that someone would come and clear the steps and side walk.  I did not find it welcoming or comfortable.  I notified Airbnb and  Micaela immediately.  Micaela offered a 20% refund and took no responsibility for the conditions.I walked by the property 3 days on my was to the hospital…continued to be the only sidewalk and steps for 2 blocks not cleared. Speaks for itself .

description: My home is within walking distance of the Capital, the Empire State Plaza, Albany Medical Center, and many restaurants and museums. It's directly across from beautiful Washington Park, and it's an ideal location for medical students,  nurses,  people taking the bar exam, or here on business. I'm fully vaccinated as of May.  Please note resident cats and acknowledge that you're aware. Thanks!!
review: I had a wonderful stay at Alice‘s Place. Good location, very easy communication. Was very nice meeting Alice.

description: Urban Oasis!  2nd Floor guest bedroom in residential home.  Shared entrance.  Access to full kitchen, shared bath, bedroom, laundry and parking. Walking distance to Albany Med, Albany Pharmacy, Albany Law School, College of St. Rose and Sage College.  On Main bus line.  10 minute drive from downtown
review: Great hosts, knew the area well. Very hospitable.  Place is within a 5 minute walk to the medical center, great for interviews

description: Adorable, Updated, trendy & very clean! Great location & nice neighborhood. Walking distance to Albany Medical Center and close to downtown Albany. The one bedroom is comfortable with a memory foam king bed and a private patio with outdoor seating for your wine/coffee!The living room is beautifully decorated with a comfortable modern sofa (twin sleeper space). The adorable eat-in kitchen has granite counters and a table and chairs. Off street parking, coffee and WiFi included. Welcome
review: Nice place. Private entrance with parking spot. Would stay again

description: Comfortable single- family home in quiet residential neighborhood.  Large bathroom with a “guest sink” and two showers to choose from. Comfortable beds and a desk to work at. Free and easy on street parking, bus routes to downtown at both ends of the block. Close to hospitals, Albany JCC, library. Wide variety of restaurants nearby.
review: My room at Diana's was so comfortable and clean. Easy access to bus lines, and Diana has knowledge of where to go, what to do. She has a beautiful home and had hot coffee every morning! She is available if you need her, but gives you all the privacy you need. I wish there were a 10-star rating!

description: Stay in our 5-bedroom 3-story townhouse nestled in a renovated, historic 200-year-old building located in Albany's serene Pastures neighborhood. Just a short walk from landmarks like the Albany Medical Center, Times Union Center, Empire State Plaza, and vibrant Lark Street. Easy access to I-787, I-90 & I-87. Five queen beds and two queen air mattresses and couches accommodate up to 16. Ideal for large families and groups. Dive into Albany's history with modern comforts.
review: Earl was very responsive, the place was huge and had plenty of space. It was exceptionally clean and they even had a big living/game room. I would stay again.

description: Welcome to our charming studio in the heart of Albany's Center Square. Nestled in one of the oldest homes in the neighborhood, the space has been restored to blend history with modern convenience. Recently renovated, it features a modern bathroom with rain shower. The décor is a nod to mid-century aesthetics.  This cozy studio is a stone's throw away from Albany's main attractions within easy walking distance. Experience a unique blend of past and present in this delightful Albany retreat.
review: I had a great stay at Jason's place, which was just as described. I was in town for a conference and could easily walk to it (near the Empire State Plaza) from his house, which I loved. The neighborhood is filled with charming blocks and with close proximity to restaurants and coffee shops. Jason was super-communicative and responsive, made parking and check-in/check-out a breeze. Like many others commented, the shower and the espresso are A++++. Nice treats. :)

description: Immaculate two level 3000 Sq. Ft. Bright & Sunny Cape Cod with 4 large bedrooms, Den, 2 full baths, living, dining & kitchen. Central Air & Heat. The house is situated in upscale Pine hills neighborhood on a quite dead end street with a Creek flowing through the back of the property. Peaceful & Serene View from Deck. Convenient location. Parking, Streaming Channels & WiFi included.  Relax on the deck overlooking creek with nature sounds. Short drive  to Ski Resorts.
review: We came to town for our daughter's Halloween wedding and stayed 4 nights at Akhilesh's place. We were 6 -- my husband and I, our son and his wife, and their 2 little girls, 3 and 20 months. It was very clean and organized, we found everything we needed. I particularly have to recommend this home if you are traveling with children. There is a toddler bed and a playroom, which our granddaughters especially enjoyed. The neighborhood is great, and the location is convenient to I87. Akhilesh accommodated our slightly early arrival, which we appreciated.

description: Welcome to our newly renovated two-bedroom apartment located on the second floor, just minutes away from Albany Med, and across from Washington Park. Easy access to state offices and MVP arena all within walking distance. The neighborhood is brimming with restaurants, bars, and beautiful architecture, making it one of the most desired areas in Albany. Perfect for both short-term and long term visits. Our apartment offers comfort and convenience in an ideal location.
review: Went to stay for a long weekend in Albany at Erion's 2 bedroom. I was meeting up with my college age son to spend time together, go over grad school applications and get in some quality time together.  The apartment was great.  Two really nice sized bedrooms and a great living room/kitchen/office nook combination.  Really nice accommodations but also really inviting and cozy.  I could have moved in!- it was that relaxed and comfortable.  The kitchen has an open access window to living room with bar stools so we sat there and talked and cooked which also spending time on the comfy couch watching TV. There were tons of channels included.  You could have 3-4 there too if you brought a blow up mattress for the Living Room.  There were great bars and restaurants walking distance with the park right there for walks as well. Great little neighborhood.  We had a great time. Erion was completely available for any little questions from the start of booking to the end. Highly recommend.

description: A peaceful 1-bedroom apartment nestled in a quiet residential area of Albany. minutes away fromMarket 32 and local restaurants andSt. Rose College, Downtown Albany is7-minute drive away, Albany Med just 5 minutes, and Saint Peters only 3 minutes, convenience is at your fingertips. The apartment is part of a 4-unit house, offering privacy and thick walls for a noise-free environment.Free street parking is never a problem to park.
review: Erion was an awesome host! So welcoming and so kind! Very flexible and the place was so amazing I decided to stay another night, of course Erion was the most helpful accommodating host! I cannot wait to go back, and I hope to always stay with Erion!

description: This 2nd Floor 2BR apartment shines with beautiful hardwoods, an open flow, a newer bathroom, a newer King sized "Purple" gel flex mattress, and a new Queen "Kingsdown Prime" mattress. Reclining couch in living room; full but small kitchen, Keurig; laundry; parking, ceiling fans, window ACs. Prime location close to airport, highways, eateries; less than 10 minutes to downtown Albany/MVP Center/Hospitals; 20min to Rivers Casino; 40 min to SPAC/Saratoga Racetrack; 1hr to Lake George/Great Escape!
review: We had a great stay at John's . we were welcomed with a thoughtful and kind card. The rooms were pleasantly well decorated and free if clutter. super clean! We slept super well. some great restaurants for any budget nearby. We felt really at home and John was helpful and responsive when needed.

description: Larson Blue sits in Albany's vibrant Center Square district, offering easy access to dining, shopping, and entertainment. With excellent public transportation and nearby highways, convenience is at your doorstep. Experience the city's rich cultural scene, diverse dining options, and lively nightlife, all within walking distance. Don't miss out on this perfect blend of historic charm and modern amenities.
review: Great place! Loud at night but only due to the central location. Host provided ear plugs but I didn’t need to use them. Nightlife is active!

description: Dog friendly, comfortable home with 3 bedrooms equipped with Chromecast equipped  TVs, comfortable beds, powerful ceiling fans, and vintage wood dressers in each room. Large, private back yard with two decks, grill, and a fire pit. Less than 2 miles from St Peter’s, Albany Medical Center. Off The historic Delaware ave- minutes from  winning restaurants, neat bars, world renowned  Ice Cream parlors, Normanskill Farm/ dog park, and walkable distance to St Rose Sports Park. Right off 787/ 87.
review: The house was charming, quant, and well adorned, just as Anthony described. It suited our stay perfectly and our little dog loved the fenced in back yard. Anthony was a kind and gracious host, quick to respond to my questions.

description: Private studio apartment with separate entrance on the garden level of owner-occupied home. Quiet and walkable area short distance from Empire Plaza, Capitol, Albany Med, Center Square, and Downtown. Plenty of FREE on-street parking available. Self check in, so we don’t have to interact unless you want to. Let us know if you have any questions and look forward to hosting you!
review: Great little apt, in a great location if you want to be near Washington Park and downtown Albany. Exactly as described, with great hosts - I'll definitely see if it's available every time I come to town (I grew up in Albany, come back regularly to visit my father who's in a retirement place and doesn't have an extra bedroom, so this is perfect). All the thumbs up!

description: This is Albany’s best! Enjoy a cozy stay in one of Albany’s oldest and most unique homes. This historic farmhouse was built in 1821 and completely restored and renovated in 2010. Your room is the master suite complete with a deep soaking tub, remote controlled gas fireplace, king size bed, single pull out American Leather couch, and double sinks. The pool is open from May until October. Hot tub is open year round. Enjoy a perfect romantic getaway!
review: Perfect accommodations while visiting family in hospital.  Room was comfortable and clean.  The fireplace and deep soak tub were much appreciated.  Love the Velveteen Rabbit passage hung in the stairway.  Great vibe.

description: Come relax at a Hidden Gem in the heart of Albany, NY. It is centrally located between Albany Med hospitals and Saint Peters Hospital and in close proximity to the downtown college campuses of UAlbany, Saint Rose, Albany Pharmaceutical, Albany Law school and medical school, and the New York State capital.  Some of the best restaurants and pubs are just minutes from this central location.   It is only a 15-minute ride to the Albany International Airport.
review: House is located in quiet neighborhood with a 10 minute car ride to downtown Albany and some great restaurants. We loved the house itself and immediately felt at home. Accommodations were very comfortable in all rooms and immaculate.  We are 5 adults and all agree we would enjoy another stay there.

description: Please note this is a NO FRILLS stay.  I don't offer amenities outside of fresh towels and soap.  I keep expenses low so I can keep low cost for stay.  Enjoy key pad private bedroom and your own full bath in my home.   My dog is not socialized so he stay in my closed door office when I have guests.  You can park your car in my driveway.  Minutes to St. Peter's,  Albany Med,  SUNY Albany, NanoTech, stores and restaurants.
review: The place and the host were absolutely delightful. I would recommend staying to my family and friends. Thank you Donna, for a stress free stay and being so accommodating.

description: Welcome to our studio which located at hearth of Albany. Close to Bus Station, Train Station, Business and finance district, MVP Arena, SUNY Albany headquarters, night life and historic places. All kind of restaurant and bars in walking distance. 1 bedroom with queen bed , bathroom and kitchen. Kitchen has all utensils.
review: Pictures were as shown. The area is depressed but you’re fine if you walk around during the day- I would say be in before 10pm. The place was mostly clean and bed was fine, definitely bring your own pillows! The floors were however disgusting because my feet were black at the bottom. Pretty well stocked and Etem was responsive when I would reach out to him and ask him questions or clarification. You get what you pay for. Overall wasn’t bad.

description: BOOK this 1st floor apt in a renovated historic 200 year-old building in a quiet neighborhood of Albany's Pastures. Great location near Albany Medical Center, Times Union Center, Empire State Plaza, Library, Lark Street, State Offices, courts; easy access to local & regional bus routes and highways (I-787, I-90 & I-87). Great for traveling nurses!  1 Queen sized bed, and 1 Queen sized air mattress.  Save & BOOK this unit today! Message me anytime. Hope to welcome you soon!  -Earl
review: Had a fantastic stay at Earl's! The AirBnB was clean and very cozy and larger than it seems in the pictures. Kitchen has all the equipment you would need. Great location near the bus station. Earl is very helpful!

description: This tastefully decorated room has more than enough space for you to get cozy by the fire. A queen size bed, couch, sitting chair, and oversize beanbag all welcome you to this very comfortable space. The bathroom is shared with one other guest room. There is a half bath on the first floor shared with the entire house as well as an outdoor shower.
review: This place felt like the great Gatsby. It was way more than I ever expected. The house, property, and surrounding area is amazing. One of the best Airbnbs I’ve been too.

description: This vibrant and eclectic 2-bedroom, 1-bath apartment is located on the first floor of a quiet residential neighborhood—just steps from great restaurants with outdoor seating, a local grocery store, and more. You’ll be close to everything: major hospitals, universities, and cultural venues are minutes away. Whether you’re here for work, study, or a city getaway, enjoy the comfort of a thoughtfully designed space, walkable convenience, and the bonus of off-street pa
review: Had a great stay! The place itself was so nice and perfect location for having my dog with me. Had all the amenities we needed.  Will definitely be staying again next time I'm in Albany!

description: Pack lightly. 4th floor 1BR walkup in a safe area downtown Albany.Street parking only.There is public transit.Ideal for quiet: working professionals 1 day visits, Bar Exam takers, interns, job interviewees. Across the street fromNYS Capitol,NYS Education office, Cathedral, SUNY Albany Downtown,State Exams, I787, Route 9,Washington square park, and all fine dining/Lark Street, LGBTQIA+ friendly. 5 min  Greyhound bus. Seeking friends. I am a parent and student who is at the library often.
review: Great stay! The place was clean, comfortable, and exactly as described. Check in was smooth, and the host was responsive and helpful throughout. Would definitely stay here again!

description: Visiting Albany for work, vacation, or to visit family? The Twitchell Estate is a spacious 4BR home that will be perfect for your stay. This elegantly designed Boho Chic rental comes with amenities such as self-check-in, Netflix, Disney+, Apple TV, and many other streaming options if you're looking to relax indoors, and a private laptop-friendly office with Wi-Fi if you need to get work done. Enjoy free coffee and tea in the stocked kitchen, with everything you need to feel like you are at home.
review: Spacious and cozy home! Good location. Brian is a very responsive host.

description: This home is a gorgeous 100 year old Victorian This suite is located on the 2nd floor. All the comforts of home! A very clean and quiet setting makes for a comfortable stay here at the Inn. Perfect for the business traveler or Traveling nurses that have contracts with one of the local hospitals located minutes away.
review: It was perfect Airbnb! Everything was clean and I liked the antique interior! The size of the room was the same as the picture, and it was convenient because it was close to the bus stop and the park! If I have a chance, I would like to stay again:)

description: BEAUTIFULLY renovated and stylish apartment with CHARACTER in a historic building. 4K Smart TV with Netflix, and high speed internet ready for you to use! This property comes with a fully stocked kitchen, in unit washer/dryer, free resident lot parking, and a fenced shared backyard with bbq for guests to enjoy.   This unit is located on floor 1 and is available for long term stays.
review: Linda’s stay was amazing! Extremely walkable, clean, spacious, and free parking. Highly recommend.

description: Spacious studio with hardwood floors, fully equipped kitchen, clean and bright. Large modern bath .  Full Cable TV and WiFi. Walking distance to the new Renaissance Hotel. Walk to everything downtown! The Empire Plaza  and the Egg are  across the street.You can't get any closer, to the MVP Arena,  as well as Restaurants, bars, churches. Walk to  Capital and the new Capital Convention Center. Laundry facilities in the apartment
review: Gregg's place is perfect for a night in Albany.  It's incredibly close to the Capitol and the Plaza and within short walking distance to some favorite local bars and restaurants.  The apartment is great for someone who needs a quick place to stay, the bed was comfortable and the kitchen amenities are great for business travelers.  I would definitely stay again!

description: Step into the charming and comfy 1BR/1BA apartment in the heart of Albany, NY. It promises a relaxing retreat bordering picturesque Washington Park and funky Lark Street while being within walking distance to the vibrant downtown, which offers easy access to restaurants, shops, and exciting attractions.  The lovely design and the prime location will leave you in awe.  ✔ Comfy Queen Bedroom ✔ Open Design Living ✔ Fully Equipped Kitchen ✔ Smart TV ✔ High-Speed Wi-Fi ✔ Free Parking  See more below!
review: I came to Albany to look for apartments as I need to relocate in September. My initial correspondence when booking with Terra asked for some advice on areas that were nice because it seemed she knew Albany well, she never acknowledged it. The day of my arrival I still had no correspondence so I asked about parking because it said there was parking and I was going to be there in about an hour, still no communication/response.  Ok no problem, I finally get to Albany and I follow the instructions from the listing since nothing else was sent to me. The passcode was wrong, didn’t know where to park and what door to enter. When I messaged about this I was sent an automated email with different/more exact instructions. We tried the lock with the new password and we still were having trouble so I rang one of the numbers which was just messaged to me, no answer. Bottom line, bad communication. Place was decent but extremely noisy. Cars revving engines, loud music and people screaming til 4am.

description: Discover unmatched safety and comfort in Albany's historic "Center Square". Our meticulously sanitized brownstone, located near "Albany Medical" and walking distance to State Offices, is perfect for guests aged 21+ and non-smokers seeking a serene and secure retreat. Enjoy the convenience of a private parking spot just a short walk in back of the building and take advantage of our strategic location for easy access to Saratoga, Lake George, Palace Theatre, The EGG, and downtown Albany.
review: Excellent home away from home. Dominick came highly recommended and he and the apartment lived up to them. Cannot recommend enough. Will be back

description: Place is within 2-3 miles of AMC, St. Peter's,  UAlbany, SUNY, College of St. Rose, Washington park, Empire State Plaza, and many other establishments.  Only 15 minute ride to the airport !
review: It is a good place to stay, worth the money. The host is responsive and very easy to communicate as well as very flexible! It was a good stay.

description: This private apartment is meant to be a home away from home for our guests!  We've done our best to create a calming, yet whimsical space to encourage relaxation on your vacation, business trip or whatever brought you to our city. The flat is located in the heart of the historic Center Square neighborhood in Albany and is short walk from many great restaurants and bars on Lark St., and beautiful Washington Park.  We hope you enjoy the space as much as we've enjoyed preparing it for you!
