review: Beautiful, well decorated and impeccably clean space. It was a delight not stay there! It's very close to many of the best spots in Albany - Lark Street, the Plaza, and Washington Park and some great restaurants, cafes and bars.

description: Welcome to this rustic second-floor apartment in Albany, New York! This newly remodeled three-bedroom, one-bath gem is perfect for a comfortable stay for up to six guests. Step into a piece of history with original hardwood floors dating back to 1890. The spacious dining area is ideal for gathering, and the apartment features a 65-inch smart TV for your entertainment needs. Need to catch up on work? We've got you covered with a dedicated work desk. Book now for an unforgettable experience!
review: Great place - nicely renovated with great communication.  The living room and dining room are really comfy and nicely appointed.  The AC units keep the place a very pleasant temperature even on 90 degree days.   The only flaw is (like others mentioned) the beds are uncomfortable.  The double beds kinda sink toward the middle so you’re on a weird angle and there is no back support.

description: Perfect place to relax with your family or stopover on a work trip. A quiet, suburban neighborhood that is close enough to everything. 5 min drive to UAlbany and St Peter's Hospital. 15 min drive to downtown Albany. 18 min drive to Albany Int'l Airport. 5-10 min drive to plenty of restaurants and pubs.
review: Nori's place was excellent! The house was located in a safe and quiet residential neighborhood, and not far from SUNY's uptown campus and many great restaurants (all within 5-8mins). The house was newly renovated, clean, and well organized. The towels and bedding were clean and soft, and we especially enjoyed the King bed with our 20 mnth old toddler. The bathrooms were super clean and Nori had lots of nice details in the kitchen, including coffee for the morning. I saw bad review that mentioned water damage, but that was absolutely not true. The place was really nice and my whole family thoroughly enjoyed the stay. I highly recommend this place and would stay again with zero hesitation. Thanks again Nori for being a great host!

description: Private studio apartment with separate entrance on the garden level of owner-occupied home. Quiet and walkable area short distance from Empire Plaza, Capitol, Albany Med, Center Square, and Downtown. Plenty of FREE on-street parking available. Self check in, so we don’t have to interact unless you want to. Let us know if you have any questions and look forward to hosting you!
review: Jake and Kate’s place is sweet, intimate and safe. Had everything you may need for a stay away from home. Peaceful and quiet, even though they have a golden retriever, I never heard a peep out their dog. Must be well trained. Great, cool hosts. They have this Airbnb thing on automatic. I wish them both the best of luck with all their future guests. It was lovely to stay with them.

description: This unique apartment is designed after the rich boxing history of Mohammed Ali in the old Public School 14 Building.   Nearby ￮ 3 Min to Times Union Center ￮ 5 Min to Albany Law ￮ 7 Min to Palace Theater  ￮ 10-15 min to SUNY & St. Rose  Ask us for more info!  Airports ￮ 18 Min to Albany International Airport  Amenities ￮ Full-sized Pool Table ￮ Designer Curated Aesthetics ￮ Wide-Open for Mingling ￮ King Bed ￮ Work Station ￮ Yoga Station  Listing ￮ Entire Apartment for 4-6
review: Wow!  This was by far the best air bnb stay by far!  The place is huge and has a lot of great amenities. You can’t go wrong. If you’re in Albany for business or pleasure, I highly recommend.

description: Spacious studio with hardwood floors, fully equipped kitchen, clean and bright. Large modern bath .  Full Cable TV and WiFi. Walking distance to the new Renaissance Hotel. Walk to everything downtown! The Empire Plaza  and the Egg are  across the street.You can't get any closer, to the MVP Arena,  as well as Restaurants, bars, churches. Walk to  Capital and the new Capital Convention Center. Laundry facilities in the apartment
review: Can't beat the location in this great old building. Minutes fro the State Museum and downtown. Quaint. Convenient. And I will definitely stay again.

description: Hello, thanks for checking out my listing! This is a vintage home with a private twin bedroom. Living room, dining room, kitchen, front porch with rocking chair and AM sun, and back deck with two seating areas in warmer weather. The back yard is quiet and serene with more wildlife to watch than you might expect in the city! Guest should expect lots of peace and privacy.  Expect a homey feel, and a safe and clean space.
review: Emily wa very flexible and accommodating. Her place was nice and hospitable. I would stay there again if I am back in Albany.

description: Stay in a clean, quiet home with 2 friendly housemates. Renovated in 2023, this co-living space offers: 	•	Private bedroom (furnished) 	•	Shared bathroom 	•	Fully furnished common areas 	•	Fast Wi-Fi 	•	In-home laundry 	•	off-street parking 	•	Shared entry  Perfect for short or long stays. Convenient, comfortable, and move-in ready!   You will be centrally located 10–15 mins to 3 hospitals, medical centers, downtown Albany, night-life and both shopping malls.
review: Host was very responsive, was always notified about another tenant checking in or checking out in another room. The shared space was clean and paper towels and cleaning supplies were well stocked and supplied for us. The neighborhood is quiet and very walkable, felt safe here. Laundry and dryer in basement was very helpful. The only thing I wanted to mention is sometimes it could be loud because the bedroom doors are not that soundproof so sometimes overlapping schedules with the other roommates moving around might wake me up and vice versa. I put in foam earplugs and that helped! Overall solid stay and would recommend!

description: MODERN beautifully furnished apartment with UNIQUE spiral staircase. Newly renovated, cozy and trendy! PRIME location in the heart of downtown Albany and walking distance to popular restaurants, and cafes on Lark Street. Local attractions including The Egg, Empire State Plaza, Times Union Center are less than 5 minutes away. 4K Smart TV with Netflix, stocked kitchen & bathroom, high speed internet ready for you to use! Free street parking. Available for long term stays!
review: Linda was very quick at getting back to me. I had no issues and everything was as expected. It was super clean and really stylish. Loved the staircase!

description: Experience modern comfort in Albany's "Center Square".  This first-floor sanctuary in an elegant stone building offers 24/7 surveillance and a hardwired fire alarm system. Enjoy a bright living space, modern kitchen, and sleek bathroom. Ideal for short or extended stays. Private parking included. Surrounded by shops, restaurants, and nightlife. Walk to Albany Med, State Offices, The Capitol, and Empire State Plaza. 30 mins to Saratoga Raceway, 50 mins to Lake George, 1/2 mile to Palace Theater.
review: This brownstone is fantastic. Soaring ceilings and doors, windows onto Washington Ave, right next to Lark St and all the tasty restaurants. Parking in back is special in this locale. Hardwood floors, amazing large person’s bathroom, huge kitchen with island and seating. TVs everywhere. A very special place in downtown Albany.

description: A cozy private apartment. The Blair Suite, named after the original owner of this beautiful 1890's Victorian, is located on the basement floor. It has it's own private entrance on the side of the home. Located in historic Albany, close to everything, hospitals, schools, museums, restaurants and Washington Park.
review: Great place to stay!! Appreciated the privacy, fully stocked kitchen, access to washer/dryer and private parking.  Highly recommend and would definitely stay here again!

description: This unique apartment is designed after the rich boxing history of Mohammed Ali in the old Public School 14 Building.   Nearby ￮ 3 Min to Times Union Center ￮ 5 Min to Albany Law ￮ 7 Min to Palace Theater  ￮ 10-15 min to SUNY & St. Rose  Ask us for more info!  Airports ￮ 18 Min to Albany International Airport  Amenities ￮ Full-sized Pool Table ￮ Designer Curated Aesthetics ￮ Wide-Open for Mingling ￮ King Bed ￮ Work Station ￮ Yoga Station  Listing ￮ Entire Apartment for 4-6
review: We had a great stay! We visited the area for RPI’s family weekend. RPI only 15 minutes away. Having the pool table was fun. All descriptions and instructions on parking and check in were spot on. Very comfortable beds and just a cool spacious place.

description: A cozy private apartment. The Blair Suite, named after the original owner of this beautiful 1890's Victorian, is located on the basement floor. It has it's own private entrance on the side of the home. Located in historic Albany, close to everything, hospitals, schools, museums, restaurants and Washington Park.
review: Lovely quiet basement apartment, ideal for guests who wish for a private and secluded place. Extremely comfortable and perfectly warm! Bela was also quick to respond to any needs. Great place, would definitely visit again!

description: Welcome to your Beacon apartment!  Step into the warm embrace of your Beacon Avenue apartment. Experience the charm of this spacious, large 2-bedroom home nestled in the heart of Albany.  Comforts of a complete home where space and luxury come together seamlessly.  Your new apartment can accommodate up to 4 guests, along with a dedicated work-from-home space with an adjustable standing desk & WiFi.  Enjoy nearby shopping & dining just minutes away, immersing yourself in Albany's vibrant tapestry
review: Great place; great location. Quiet neighborhood. Friendly and responsive hosts. Would happily stay here again!

description: Step into the charming and comfy 1BR/1BA apartment in the heart of Albany, NY. It promises a relaxing retreat bordering picturesque Washington Park and funky Lark Street while being within walking distance to the vibrant downtown, which offers easy access to restaurants, shops, and exciting attractions.  The lovely design and the prime location will leave you in awe.  ✔ Comfy Queen Bedroom ✔ Open Design Living ✔ Fully Equipped Kitchen ✔ Smart TV ✔ Wi-Fi ✔ Free Parking  See more below!
review: Place was great,  hosts were extremely gracious and cooperative.  We enjoyed our stay and would definitely stay again.    Plus the parking was an added bonus

description: Live in style! This TRENDY apt has top quality appliances, modern finishes and is located at a PRIME downtown Albany location.   4K Smart TV with Netflix, fully stocked kitchen & bathroom with all travel essentials, high speed internet! Free street parking. Available for long term stays!  **Important To prevent underage parties, weekend bookings are only available for 25+. When reserving, please share a photo of your ID that matches your name on Airbnb or your LinkedIn profile.
review: Clean and nice apartment. Stayed for business. Good location. Would recommend.

description: Regular breakfast free  Lunch packed $5 Dinner Plate $10  We updated cleaning protocol because of COVID-19 pandemic  OUR PRIORITY IS ORGANIC LIFE SO OTHER THING IS LESS IMPORTANT  FREE LAUNDRY  AIR CONDITIONING  No parking space on premises just street parking . Internet High speed WiFi, This building is 100 years older. We don't use chemical pesticides ,chemical cleaning stuff.We use Vinegar,baking powder,biological pesticides . Therefore not fancy clea
review: Adam was an amazing host, and made my first AirBnB experience wonderful. The food he cooked was absolutely delicious,  and he made it based on my diet. The room was clean and comfortable, perfect for relaxing after work. While the neighborhood seems sketchy, it's very quiet. I felt perfectly safe there, and felt very comfortable leaving my car parked in his back lot all week. Adam goes above and beyond to see that his guests are comfortable and happy. Wish I had been able to stay here for another week!

description: Welcome to our newly renovated 4BR/2BA Dutch-inspired cottage on 1.5 private acres in a forest setting. Perfect for family/friend gatherings. Enjoy an open floor plan with a fully equipped kitchen, cozy living, and all the modern amenities you need for a relaxing visit.  Located only a few minutes from downtown Albany, SUNY Albany, AMC & Albany College of Pharmacy.
review: We had a great time at Nanette's place. It was comfortable and clean, and had all the things we needed. We got to see some fun wildlife, and our teenagers had lots of space.

description: Adorable, Updated, trendy & very clean! Great location & nice neighborhood. Walking distance to Albany Medical Center and close to downtown Albany. The one bedroom is comfortable with a memory foam king bed and a private patio with outdoor seating for your wine/coffee!The living room is beautifully decorated with a comfortable modern sofa (twin sleeper space). The adorable eat-in kitchen has granite counters and a table and chairs. Off street parking, coffee and WiFi included. Welcome
review: Kori was wonderful to work with.  Due to weather forecast we had to arrive a day early.  Kori worked hard to have it ready for our early arrival. The bed was very comfortable.

description: This historic property is close to everything making it easy to plan your visit. The room is tastefully decorated with a spilt king purple hybrid 4 mattress, sitting area, and well lit desk. There’s a large closet and entertainment center as well. The bathroom is shared with one other room. A second shared bathroom is on the first floor of the home.
review: Such a seamless, perfect experience! We tend to be anxious when booking a shared space, but Thomas made us feel very comfortable and safe. We will 100% be back when visiting Albany in the future! Book this listing!!!!!

description: Adorable, Updated, trendy & very clean! Great location & nice neighborhood. Walking distance to Albany Medical Center and close to downtown Albany. The one bedroom is comfortable with a memory foam king bed and a private patio with outdoor seating for your wine/coffee!The living room is beautifully decorated with a comfortable modern sofa (twin sleeper space). The adorable eat-in kitchen has granite counters and a table and chairs. Off street parking, coffee and WiFi included. Welcome
review: Nice place overall. Plenty of small thoughtful things.  Bed was comfy.  Shower door needs attention.  Good value on price. kori is very responsive to requests.

description: WELCOME! Our listing is designed with the business or casual traveler in mind This beautiful suite will give you all the comforts of home! Quiet residential area for nice walks and great restaurants. Close to all the highways as well. All bedding & pillow cases have PREMIUM protective covers on them at all times so feel completely safe and protected. All remotes and light switches are wiped down with Clorox wipes after each guest.  ((IMPORTANT)) NO PARTIES or SMOKING in or around the home
review: Easily the best Airbnb we have stayed at. Very clean and comfortable. Lloyd would help in anyway he could to make sure we had a great stay!

description: Welcome to the Whisky House! Featuring 3 floors with plenty of space to host a corporate event or celebrate with loved ones. Walking distance from downtown and Center Square nightlife, the Whiskey House is the perfect location for a bachelor or bachelorette party, birthday celebration getaway, anniversary, you name it! Whatever the occasion, the Whiskey House is your home away from home.  *We DO NOT have a full size stove/oven - pocket kitchen with smaller amenities (microwave/fridge) available*
review: This place was spacious and nice however it does not include an oven it came with a dirty toaster oven and 2-piece burner that you plug up that was not clean either.  The internet service sucked the first night we had no internet service at all it was out. The second day internet service was back up and running however it cuts off. I feel like due to no oven and poor internet it only gets three stars from me. I did get good response when emailed. The house was clean and nicely kept.

description: Charming 2 Bedroom + Workstation apartment in Downtown Albany. Centrally located and easy walking! NFL Blitz Arcade Game. Pets allowed! 2nd FL apartment with an elevator on site!  Enjoy hardwood floors, a custom kitchen, soaking bathtub, and central AC. Featuring a King Bed, Queen bed, pull-out couch, workstation with monitor, and free WiFi. Includes access to a shared washer/dryer.  For long term stays over 1 month, a monthly parking space will be included. Parking garage close by.
review: We loved the location of the apartment, as well as all the extra little amenities included as part of our stay. From the toddler supplies left out for us, to the board games and arcade game, we felt very welcomed. We thought the price was a good value too and we would absolutely book again for a stay in downtown Albany!

description: Place is within 2-3 miles of AMC, St. Peter's,  UAlbany, SUNY, College of St. Rose, Washington park, Empire State Plaza, and many other establishments.  Only 15 minute ride to the airport !
review: Beautiful home in a nice and quiet neighborhood. I was able to stay last minute which was very helpful! The room was very spacious and exactly what I needed.  F’s was an amazing host and I would definitely stay again. Highly recommend!

description: Newly renovated, modern and bright! Live in style in the heart of downtown Albany. Located at a PRIME location and walking distance to popular restaurants, and cafes on Lark Street. All the local attractions including The Egg, Empire State Plaza, Times Union Center are less than 5 minutes away. 4K Smart TV with Netflix, fully stocked kitchen & bathroom with all travel essentials, high speed internet ready for you to use! Free street parking. Available for long term stays!
review: Linda was very kind and gave great instructions on the check-in protocol prior to our arrival. The airbnb was clean and clutter free. We were in town for a concert at MVP arena and this was the perfect spot for us to stay. Quick and easy walk to the arena! We also had a great dinner right around the corner at Cafe Capriccio and would recommend to anyone looking to have an authentic and delicious Italian meal.

description: Forget your worries in this spacious and serene space. Open floor plan with updated kitchen & bath. Great space to call home for a night or several months. Walking distance to several great restaurants in area. Close to universities, hospital and major malls. Off street parking is located directly behind building.
review: Clean and organized place, giving you what you need in an air b and b. Plenty of room with two bedrooms. Close to everything, especially the University within a few minutes drive. This is a 1st floor apartment. Would stay again.

description: BEAUTIFULLY renovated and stylish apartment with CHARACTER in a brownstone building. This spacious unit features high 10 ft ceilings , a 4K Smart TV with Netflix, stocked kitchen & bathroom, high speed internet ready for you to use! Tenant permit street parking available.
review: We were in Albany  for a concert at the MVP arena it was a super easy quick walk from the apartment though the original route we took was a bit sketchy. The host was nice and very helpful. The  apartment was perfect and we felt comfortable and safe there.

description: Cute single family bungalow (1200sqft) in a convenient location with the lots of restaurants, bars and shops right around the corner.   Totally renovated with open floor plan.  77” 2023 LG B3 OLED TV  just added to living room with Sonos surround + sub!  3 Bedrooms with 1 King bed, 2 Queen beds, 1 Full sized bed and 2 airbeds can be added upon request.  Easy Parking two lane driveway by house.  $50 pet fee, please inquire before booking, thank you!
review: Great place. Lots of room for several. Clean. Centrally located. Parking and Peter was very hospitable.

description: Escape to an ultra-modern blackjack lounge with this unique studio for two. Located in the heart of central downtown Albany, you're only minutes away from the Times Union Center and major tourist attractions.  Or, stay here while you visit your kids at nearby SUNY Albany, Saint Rose, and other colleges - then come back to your room in style.
review: We absolutely loved staying at Diana’s place! Everything was clean and the space was sunlit, roomy, and fun. Way better than staying at a hotel! Diana is definitely a SUPER host!

description: Enjoy the entire house and surrounding area being at the center of Albany. Near everything like children’s park and new basketball court and outdoor exercise bars, also close to one of the bast grocery stores in Albany (Honest Weight Food Co-op) within 5 minutes!  One street over from the bus stop and just the right distance to be close to the main highway without too much traffic. Impeccable cleaning to make sure you always feel comfortable
review: Alexis provides a hidden gem getaway in the heart of the city! The private green space, two FULL bathrooms and excellent AC/heat are luxury. Family friendly space with lots of kids and a washer/dryer combo. I gladly recommend and will stay again soon!

description: This fully furnished 2-bedroom bungalow is ideal for monthly stays (30+ nights) and includes utilities, high-speed Wi-Fi, and in-unit laundry. Located just 10 minutes from Albany Medical Center and St. Peter’s Health Partners, it's perfect for travel nurses, digital nomads, corporate professionals, relocating families, or those visiting for medical care. A comfortable and convenient home base for work, family, or exploring New York’s capital region.
review: I am making this house my place to stay when visiting Albany. It was exactly as the pictures showed and perfect in all of the ways. Almost don't even want to say it cause I want it available every time I go to visit! 🤭 It's not convenient to any sights but as it is my hometown it was perfect for the places I needed and is an easy stop of the Thruway if you are passing through.

description: Adorable, Updated, trendy & very clean! Great location & nice neighborhood. Walking distance to Albany Medical Center and close to downtown Albany. The one bedroom is comfortable with a memory foam king bed and a private patio with outdoor seating for your wine/coffee!The living room is beautifully decorated with a comfortable modern sofa (twin sleeper space). The adorable eat-in kitchen has granite counters and a table and chairs. Off street parking, coffee and WiFi included. Welcome
review: My boyfriend and I stayed here for the weekend during our visit to Albany. This place is very quiet and cute. We felt very comfortable staying here. We were able to visit so many places that were less than 15 minutes away (MVP Arena, The Capitol Building, The NYS Museum). The Cornerstone Mall is very close by as well. The house was neat and clean. The location is private and quiet. Kori was very responsive to any questions or concerns we had. This was definitely worth the value.

description: Immaculate two level 3000 Sq. Ft. Bright & Sunny Cape Cod with 4 large bedrooms, Den, 2 full baths, living, dining & kitchen. Central Air & Heat. The house is situated in upscale Pine hills neighborhood on a quite dead end street with a Creek flowing through the back of the property. Peaceful & Serene View from Deck. Convenient location. Parking, Streaming Channels & WiFi included.  Relax on the deck overlooking creek with nature sounds. Short drive  to Ski Resorts.
review: Spacious home. Good value and location. Host communicates well.

description: Beautiful 2nd Floor apartment in the heart of Albany. We are located just steps away from Washington Park, Albany Med, local restaurants and bars. This space features refinished original hardwood floors, exposed brick and a built in fireplace with 50" Smart TV. Magnificent large kitchen. Second floor balcony. Free street parking only.
review: Scott was great when I need a last minute place to stay. The place really looks great and the photos don’t do it justice.  While I didn’t get a chance to utilize the kitchen it was a nice touch having that available to me... and it’s huge. It was great that there was an office room for me to get some work done before bed.  I was thoroughly impressed by my stay here and able to a good nights sleep away from home because I typically don’t. PS those white noise machines are an awesome touch definitely recommend using those.

description: Private studio apartment with separate entrance on the garden level of owner-occupied home. Quiet and walkable area short distance from Empire Plaza, Capitol, Albany Med, Center Square, and Downtown. Plenty of FREE on-street parking available. Self check in, so we don’t have to interact unless you want to. Let us know if you have any questions and look forward to hosting you!
review: I came up here for an event in Rhinebeck and we really enjoyed our stay. It had every little thing you could think of. Plus lots of extra linens and a fan which we were very thankful for. The hosts were very kind and hospitable as well!

description: Stay in our 4-bedroom townhouse-style 2nd+3rd floor apartment nestled in a renovated, historic 200-year-old building located in Albany's serene Pastures neighborhood. Just a short walk from landmarks like the Albany Medical Center, Times Union Center, Empire State Plaza, and vibrant Lark Street. Easy access to I-787, I-90 & I-87. Four queen beds and a queen air mattress accommodate up to 10. Ideal for large families and groups. Dive into Albany's history with modern comforts.
review: Really nice spot for getting around the NY Capital Region. Earl was always available and helpful. Can’t beat the price for such a large space. Eight people fit very comfortably.

description: Beautiful and spacious 2 bedroom, 1.5 bathroom in a downtown historic brownstone. Recently renovated with modern updates. 2 floors of living space. Outdoor space. Walking distance to many points of interests, restaurants, bars, and breweries.
review: We stayed at the property to go to a concert at the Palace Theater in Albany. The property is so close by you can see the tour buses right down the street. The property was clean and felt safe. We had a great time and Able was very friendly and easy to communicate with. Instructions were clear and access was easy and safe.  For concerts at the palace you probably won’t find a better unit.

description: The whole group will enjoy easy access to everything from this centrally located place. Sun filled top floor unit with spacious bedrooms-well equipped kitchen and modern bath. Convenient location near highway and major hospitals/universities. Malls-restaurants and shopping all close by. Quiet residential neighborhood makes it lovely to walk to close by restaurants to grab a bite to eat outside. Come spend a night or two and be our guest
review: Clean but old building. Top floor but no AC in the living room/kitchen. Overhead fan in the living room was noisy.

description: A lovely 3 bedroom is apt in Center Square that is perfect for families and traveling professionals.  A 2 min. walk to Washington Park, Lark Street shops and restaurants, and a  5 mins to  Empire Plaza, State Capital and Legislative Office Building or Albany Medical Center, Albany Law School or Albany Medical School. It's the ideal getaway spot for a group of friends, families, or working professionals visiting New York's Capital.
review: Lori is a great host. helpful and responsive. The home was well kept and very comfy. The location is walkable and convenient to 2 great areas with restaurants and more.

description: Step into the charming and comfy 1BR/1BA apartment in the heart of Albany, NY. It promises a relaxing retreat bordering picturesque Washington Park and funky Lark Street while being within walking distance to the vibrant downtown, which offers easy access to restaurants, shops, and exciting attractions.  The lovely design and the prime location will leave you in awe.  ✔ Comfy Queen Bedroom ✔ Open Design Living ✔ Fully Equipped Kitchen ✔ Smart TV ✔ Wi-Fi ✔ Free Parking  See more below!
review: The cutest, well kept place in a convenient part of town. Thanks to this place, my stay was incredible! Thank you so much!!!!

description: Welcome to your home away from home in Albany, NY! Garden-level apartment in the heart of the vibrant, historic Center Square. Enjoyable blend of comfort and convenience. Walkable to Washington Park, award-winning restaurants, local coffee shops, boutiques, and the NYS State Capitol. Ideal for couples, solo travelers, weekend getaway, work trip, a longer term stay, or a peaceful and centrally located retreat. You’ll love the character, walkability, and charm of this thoughtfully appointed space.
review: Am a frequent guest at this listing, have always been incredibly satisfied with my accommodations, the amenities  and most of all the trustworthy, helpful and reliable hosts. Great place. Highly recommend this listing, will continue to return every chance I get. Thanks guys!

description: Immerse yourself in this meticulously updated 2-bedroom unit, where modern amenities and chic designer furnishings ensure a delightful stay. This elegant abode is mere steps from renowned restaurants, iconic landmarks, and vibrant nightlife. Enjoy the convenience of being centrally located in the capital region, with local hospitals just a stone's throw away. With its bright, clean, and professionally furnished interiors, this unit promises a welcoming retreat in the heart of the city
review: Our stay at this Airbnb was not what we expected. When we arrived, we waited over an hour in the heat due to a lock problem. The property wasn’t clean, but the host sent cleaners after a few days. The listing said it had a washing and drying machine, but it didn’t. The building had them, but they weren’t working, forcing us to use a laundromat, which was costly. The host refunded us for this. Some daily items were missing, but she sent them when asked. The biggest issue was rodents. Someone came right away when we told her about it, but it wasn’t a professional. They set up traps but we were told to “toss the dead mouse in the trash” if they worked, which was not okay. It took days to get a professional, and we kept seeing rodents in the kitchen and living room until we checked out. This was very stressful and uncomfortable. The host eventually fixed most of the issues and refunded us 20% for our troubles. Although she was helpful, the ongoing problems made our stay unpleasant.

description: Spacious Pine Hills flat with many recent updates including refinished hardwood floors, all new windows and a completely remodeled kitchen, including brand new appliances. This unit also has a private laundry room as well as an entrance foyer. There is off street parking and the building is located within walking distance to 2 primary bus routes. This unit is also within walking distance of popular restaurants, Juniors, The Point, Cafe Madison and Kismet Mediterranean Grill.
review: We have been staying at David's place for few months.  We were looking for the place that could accommodate our Canadian and US Crew  members for engineering work. We have found everything that we were looking for; clean and comfortable place with few bedrooms, FEW restrooms, well equipped kitchen, great parking, walking distance to grocery shopping and restaurants. David responded to our emails in minutes. We definitely would come back if needed and we can recommend this place highly. Thank you David.

description: Welcome to the Mansion Suite, a newly renovated historic gem in the heart of Center Square.  Through a private entrance, down a long foyer, you'll discover the grand Oak Room, an expansive living/dining room with dramatic fireplace mantel, paneling, beamed ceiling, stained glass windows. Adjacent to the lounge, is a stylish and fully equipped  kitchen with new stainless steel appliances.  Both bedrooms have new queen beds, beautiful natural woodwork and overlook a private and quiet courtyard.
review: Great large space. We did in fact explore the art gallery (which you get access to by staying at the Airbnb) and I’d say def explore…. If you dare ;-)

description: Welcome to our newly renovated 4BR/2BA Dutch-inspired cottage on 1.5 private acres in a forest setting. Perfect for family/friend gatherings. Enjoy an open floor plan with a fully equipped kitchen, cozy living, and all the modern amenities you need for a relaxing visit.  Located only a few minutes from downtown Albany, SUNY Albany, AMC & Albany College of Pharmacy.
review: We had a wonderful stay at this beautiful cottage! Everything was perfect and our hosts were wonderful as well! The property is beautiful and the cottage is exquisite! We would love to come back and stay here again.

description: Charming 2 Bedroom + Workstation apartment in Downtown Albany. Centrally located and easy walking! NFL Blitz Arcade Game. Pets allowed! 2nd FL apartment with an elevator on site!  Enjoy hardwood floors, a custom kitchen, soaking bathtub, and central AC. Featuring a King Bed, Queen bed, pull-out couch, workstation with monitor, and free WiFi. Includes access to a shared washer/dryer.  For long term stays over 1 month, a monthly parking space will be included. Parking garage close by.
review: Dillon’s place was great! Convenient location, comfortable beds and amenities, and clear communication. Would absolutely recommend as a jumping off point for a weekend upstate!

description: Once a retreat, then a convent—now it’s your cozy home away from home. Enjoy a well-lit room with a Purple Hybrid 4 queen bed, desk, and 75" TV. Relax in two family rooms, cook in the spacious kitchen, or sip coffee on one of four enclosed porches. Walk to groceries, restaurants, and the movies, or hop on the bus right outside. Whether for a short trip or long stay, comfort and community await you here.
review: Over the past few months, I have consistently chosen to stay at Thomas’s rental. It's well-maintained, conveniently located near my workplace, peaceful, and overseen by an excellent host, all for a reasonable price. I would definitely suggest this place to friends or anyone I know.

description: Step into the charming and comfy 1BR/1BA apartment in the heart of Albany, NY. It promises a relaxing retreat bordering picturesque Washington Park and funky Lark Street while being within walking distance to the vibrant downtown, which offers easy access to restaurants, shops, and exciting attractions.  The lovely design and the prime location will leave you in awe.  ✔ Comfy Queen Bedroom ✔ Open Design Living ✔ Fully Equipped Kitchen ✔ Smart TV ✔ Wi-Fi ✔ Free Parking  See more below!
review: I stayed here while in Albany for work and was very happy with my choice. The location was amazing, the house was clean and comfortable. The host was extremely accommodating - very responsive to messages and eager to make my stay as great as possible. I asked about an iron and while there wasn't one in the house, the host offered to buy one and deliver it the next day. I would stay again.

description: Spend your visit in Albany in our amazingly beautiful place! The house has just been renovated. Every room has its own separate bathroom. The house is conveniently located near the downtown as well as Saint Rose College. The parking lot is also provided. There are many restaurants, pubs and local attractions within reach.
review: Visiting Albany for a few days for a family reunion. Peter ‘s house was recently renovated and is beautiful condition. The location is great, in downtown Albany right next to the College of Saint Rose. Supermarket walking distance as well as a great coffee shop.  Also, plenty of offstreet parking. Only challenge was there are a lot of stairs in the house. My mom had a little trouble going all the way up to the third-floor bedroom.  But it worked out fine, and based off other reviews we had anticipated she would have to climb stairs.  Just a heads up if you have someone who has mobility issues.  But the house is basically brand new. High quality high-end fixtures and appliances, and very comfortable beds, great place.

description: This is Albany’s best! Enjoy a cozy stay in one of Albany’s oldest and most unique homes. This historic farmhouse was built in 1821 and completely restored and renovated in 2010. Your room is the master suite complete with a deep soaking tub, remote controlled gas fireplace, king size bed, single pull out American Leather couch, and double sinks. The pool is open from May until October. Hot tub is open year round. Enjoy a perfect romantic getaway!
review: Good place to stay. Stayed from 9/23-9/27/24, room was comfortable and private. Communal areas were nice, Beautiful decorations!  I would recommend this airbnb for anyone who is staying in the area.

description: You'll Love this Newly renovated Modern Charming Place to stay. Enjoy the spacious back yard for fresh air or relax inside enjoying the detailed wood accent Throughout the unit with a touch or Brick Detailing.   Short Drive or 10-15minute walk to local attractions and theatre. Less than a minute walk to convenience stores. 15 Minute drive to Albany international Airport/Amtrak and Greyhound station.  Early Check-In may be possible after 2pm  $250 indoor smoking violation fee $250 animal cleaning
review: Very clean and beautiful apartment. Could have more dish ware. Very friendly and communicative host.

description: BOOK this 1st floor apt in a renovated historic 200 year-old building in a quiet neighborhood of Albany's Pastures. Great location near Albany Medical Center, Times Union Center, Empire State Plaza, Library, Lark Street, State Offices, courts; easy access to local & regional bus routes and highways (I-787, I-90 & I-87). Great for traveling nurses!  1 Queen sized bed, and 1 Queen sized air mattress.  Save & BOOK this unit today! Message me anytime. Hope to welcome you soon!  -Earl
review: Great place, great host.  Easy check in, lots of communication. Central location to everything in Albany right by the freeway entrance

description: Welcome to our exceptional apartment in Albany! Discover a blend of style, comfort, and a prime location. Just steps from the State Capitol, Empire State Plaza, museums, and the Hudson River, our home offers unparalleled access to Albany's top attractions. Immerse yourself in local culture with nearby cafes, boutiques, and historic landmarks. Experience Albany like never before. Book your stay for a memorable adventure!
review: The building was newly renovated, so a few minor things went wrong.  Rodney was always accessible and saw to any issues right away.  And as I say, these were only minor things; for example, the refrigerator door did not close properly.  I would gladly stay with Rodney again.

description: The whole group will enjoy easy access to everything from this centrally located place. The Red Brick House is a newly renovated, 4 stories/3000sq ft space with 4be/3.5ba and walking distance to Downtown Albany's top attractions.  Amenities included: ✔ Game Room ✔ Hot Tub ✔ Private Yard w/ BBQ and Outdoor Games ✔ Fully Equipped Kitchen ✔ High-Speed Wifi ✔ Free Parking (up too 3 vehicles) ✔ eV Lvl 2 Charging ✔ Office & Exercise Equipment ✔ Washer/Dryer & AC ✔ Mini-crib & Baby Accessories
review: Yasiel and Rachel were AMAZING!! I booked this airbnb through work for 4 gentlemen that typically stay in hotels. They LOVED the house and continuously expressed how nice and clean it was.. they actually requested we use this house any time we have work in the area! If I had any questions Yasiel and Rachel were incredibly quick to respond and so friendly. I ran into some last minute changes on our side and they were more than willing to accommodate anything we needed. Truly great people to work with :)

description: Immaculate two level 3000 Sq. Ft. Bright & Sunny Cape Cod with 4 large bedrooms, Den, 2 full baths, living, dining & kitchen. Central Air & Heat. The house is situated in upscale Pine hills neighborhood on a quite dead end street with a Creek flowing through the back of the property. Peaceful & Serene View from Deck. Convenient location. Parking, Streaming Channels & WiFi included.  Relax on the deck overlooking creek with nature sounds. Short drive  to Ski Resorts.
review: We enjoyed this large, comfortable, and tastefully decorated home for a low-key New Year's get together for two families with 3 school-aged kids between us. The house is much bigger inside than it appears from the front; there are four bedrooms with large beds plus an extra room with children's toys and games. The bathrooms are large, clean, and well-equipped. We all fit around the dining room table and had plenty of room to play board games together in the living room. The kitchen has a decent selection of equipment and basic supplies that we used to make breakfast and dinner for ourselves during our stay. We know the area well and didn't need recommendations for what to do around town, but for those not familiar with the Capital Region there are plenty of regional guides to give you ideas for activities. The house was immaculate. We appreciated the easy and streamlined check-out instructions.

description: Located just 15 minutes from Albany International Airport, our cozy and modern Airbnb is the perfect place for travelers, business professionals, and adventure seekers looking for a convenient and comfortable stay.  > Prime Location – Quick access to Albany Airport, major highways, and downtown attractions/major stores.   > Comfortable & Clean > Self Check-In > Fast Wi-Fi & Work-Friendly> Fully Equipped Kitchen > Free Off-street Parking
review: The place was very nice and had a homey feeling.     The neighborhood seemed a little rough but we didn’t have any issues.   We just needed a place to crash so we didn’t have to drive home after a party.

description: Welcome to The Urban Nest! Your stylish retreat in Albany’s Center Square! Spotless, beautifully designed 1BR garden apartment in a historic brownstone, short walk to Washington Park, MVP Arena, the Capitol, Empire State Plaza, and top restaurants. Enjoy a king bed, in-unit laundry, workspace, a fully equipped kitchen guests rave about, Smart TV, and fast WiFi. Immaculate, cozy, and perfectly located. Relax and feel at home. Perfect for couples, professionals, or weekend getaways.
review: We have a lovely time! The place was very clean and has several nice flourishes, including bottles of water for us, and record player with records, and books to read. The place was right in a very cool street in Albany with lots of restaurants but still felt quiet at night. We would be lucky to stay at a place like this again!

description: Charming 5 room bed and breakfast located across from Washington Park in Albany, NY. Each room has a private bathroom and workstation. Guests have access to a shared kitchen, dining area, living space and small office nook with printer.
review: Perfect for a quick stop in Albany. Great park across the street. Very good coffee shop just a few minute walk down the street.

description: Come relax at a Hidden Gem in the heart of Albany, NY. It is centrally located between Albany Med hospitals and Saint Peters Hospital and in close proximity to the downtown college campuses of UAlbany, Saint Rose, Albany Pharmaceutical, Albany Law school and medical school, and the New York State capital.  Some of the best restaurants and pubs are just minutes from this central location.   It is only a 15-minute ride to the Albany International Airport.
review: The place is clean and bright. Nori was responsive and easy to communicate with, and we enjoyed our stay. Overall the place met our expectations. It's clear that no one lives in the space itself and that it's constantly being rented as an airbnb - not much character or charm, and cheaply furnished/appointed. But for a long weekend with a family it's perfect.

description: Urban Oasis!  2nd Floor guest bedroom in residential home.  Shared entrance.  Shared bath with one other guest room.  Use of kitchen and washer/dryer. Street parking.  Use of driveway, if necessary.  Walking distance to Albany Med, Albany Pharmacy, Albany Law School, College of St. Rose and Sage College.  On Main bus line.  10 minute drive from downtown.
review: Ed and Anne were very responsive.   They haloed with a nice dining selection.    The room and bathroom were  very comfortable and very clean.

description: Discover Lark Street - A Hip Albany Neighborhood. With countless restaurants, cafes, art galleries, special events, and more, this funky arts and entertainment district is a major Albany hotspot. The Iconic Downtown Apartment is a beautifully renovated 1850s era 4 - story brick building, in the heart of Lark Street, and a perfect oasis to relax and explore. We have taken ample time to carefully craft this space with tasteful décor, to maximize its potential and ensure your enjoyment
review: A lot of good things about this place… I love the high ceilings and the beautiful kitchenette space. The neighborhood is really fun , restaurants and cafés. things I didn’t like… There were someone’s used towels left in the bathroom… I couldn’t get the lights in the living room to turn on… Noise on the street or in the apartment building itself until late hours of the morning. Granted it was a holiday and I also brought earplugs so it was OK. The host was very communicative and quick to respond. I didn’t make these complaints because I was just there for one short night. Had to get up early the next day and leave so I didn’t feel like it was worth it.

description: In the heart of Albany, our expansive home offers you a quaint, private room. Experience the charm of staying in a spacious dwelling while enjoying the conveniences of a central location, ideal for those who explore on foot. Our home exudes elegance with its lofty ceilings, intricate detailing, and spacious common areas. Feel free to relax in the lounge, brew coffee in the kitchen, or take in some fresh air on our terrace. The shared bathrooms are modern, clean, and equipped with essentials.
review: I love this place! I will so be back. The location is amazing, the hosts were super kind, helpful and thoughtful. The bed was so comfortable too, I got incredible sleep. They even have offer Reiki services! It's such a beautiful, enchanted space, the common areas especially. They are super accomodating and  sweet. I came to Albany to visit a friend but I feel like I would go back just to relax. I knew nothing about Albany and feel so lucky I found this place. Thank you so much!!!

description: Cute single family bungalow (1200sqft) in a convenient location with the lots of restaurants, bars and shops right around the corner.   Totally renovated with open floor plan.  77” 2023 LG B3 OLED TV  just added to living room with Sonos surround + sub!  3 Bedrooms with 1 King bed, 2 Queen beds, 1 Full sized bed and 2 airbeds can be added upon request.  Easy Parking two lane driveway by house.  $50 pet fee, please inquire before booking, thank you!
review: Peter and his home are amazing! The attention to detail he has in his home, the cleanliness, layout and warmth of his home made my visit the best ! I will definitely be staying here again

description: Welcome to this rustic second-floor apartment in Albany, New York! This newly remodeled three-bedroom, one-bath gem is perfect for a comfortable stay for up to six guests. Step into a piece of history with original hardwood floors dating back to 1890. The spacious dining area is ideal for gathering, and the apartment features a 65-inch smart TV for your entertainment needs. Need to catch up on work? We've got you covered with a dedicated work desk. Book now for an unforgettable experience!
review: Scott was great about communication and the apartment was super cute. It could have been a little cleaner TBH… even with our shoes off our feet/socks were black and the shower was dirty.  One thing I think that’s helpful to know is this isn’t a great place to stay with small children - the stairs are treacherous (not the owners fault I just think people should know.)  It is also surrounded by college housing and kids were partying all night…I mean like truly all night. So that’s the main reason I’d say it’s not suitable for children. This would just have been helpful for me to know prior to booking. Otherwise our stay was fine & check in/check out was easy.

description: Discover Lark Street - A Hip Albany Neighborhood. With countless restaurants, cafes, art galleries, special events, and more, this funky arts and entertainment district is a major Albany hotspot. The Iconic Downtown Apartment is a beautifully renovated 1850s era 4 - story brick building, in the heart of Lark Street, and a perfect oasis to relax and explore. We have taken ample time to carefully craft this space with tasteful décor, to maximize its potential and ensure your enjoyment
review: Brian was an exceptional host from time of booking and throughout our entire stay! 100% recommend booking this airbnb if you're staying in the Albany area. Lark St is a fantastic location and easy walking to capital and surrounding shops. 5 stars all the way!!!

description: This stylish light-filled space is perfect for traveling professionals, cozy 2 bedroom apartment minutes from hospitals, parks, and great restaurants. Very walkable location right next to Albany Medical Center.  ~ fast wi-fi ~fully equipped kitchen  ~55” smart tv ~free off street parking  ~contactless self check-in
review: This place was the dirtiest Airbnb I have encountered in 10yrs. Also, deadbolt did not latch completely and the creepy basement was right out of “Taken”…except Liam Neeson never came to save us. Either the property manager is lazy or this is just a remote foreign company and owners never lay eyes on it.

description: Great location within walking distance to the Capital. It is a good size bedroom with WiFi internet . Private full bath.  We provide in the room a small refrigerator, Microwave ,coffee pot,iron ,hair dryer and  TV. Lots of entertainment nearby. Brew pubs, restaurants, the NYS Museum. Governor's Mansion. Washington Park.Capital Rep Theater as well as the Palace Theater.
review: Convenient, comfortable. Basement apartment— not a lot of light but if you are using it just as a place to stay overnight and not particularly hang out, it’s great. Gregg was very responsive and friendly. Parking was easy. A great deal.

description: Listing is designed with the business or casual traveler in mind PLEASE NO SMOKERS in the building *Newly renovated *Modern 1 bedroom w/Smart TVs that feels like home *Street parking *Equipped with coffee maker *Fridge *Wireless charger *Private bath *Across the street from the Capitol Building *Close to Highway I-87, I-90, I-787 & public transportation. Long term stays available. Please inquire with dates needed for more info. Traveling nurses, doctors, lobbyists, students are welcome.
review: Great location in historic building with old elevator. Excellent view of Capitol and other sites looking downtown. Great access to museums, downtown and Center Square.  Good if you like to get up early with the sunrise.

description: Situated on historic Madison Avenue, our property is surrounded by the charm of Albany's rich history and modern amenities. Just steps away from local cafes, restaurants, and boutique shops, you'll experience the true essence of city living. Explore nearby attractions such as the New York State Capitol, MVP Arena, Albany Medical Center , Lark Street and Washington Park, all within easy reach from our doorstep.
review: Locked the key fob in the apartment by accident . Made one call to the host they had no problem helping out at 12 am . The apartment was spotless with a nice view of downtown.

description: Private studio apartment with separate entrance on the garden level of owner-occupied home. Quiet and walkable area short distance from Empire Plaza, Capitol, Albany Med, Center Square, and Downtown. Plenty of FREE on-street parking available. Self check in, so we don’t have to interact unless you want to. Let us know if you have any questions and look forward to hosting you!
review: We have stayed in many Airbnbs, this one was such a sweet surprise. Super affordable, great location, everything you need plus some extras (snacks!). The bed was super comfy and the pullout was well equipped for our son. We loved the park across the street and got to attend the Tulip Festival. Jake and Kate were great communicators, let us check in early and provided recommendations. We will definitely stay again if in Albany, exceeded our expectations!

description: This comfortable one bedroom apartment comes furnished to entertain and with a welcome drink! Stay in the capital region’s most historic neighborhood full of beautiful architecture and cultural attractions. Walkable to some of Albany’s best restaurants including Dove and Deer, Albany’s most charming upscale bar. A full kitchen comes equipped with all your basic cooking needs, but if you don’t feel like cooking enjoy preferred access and discounts at Dove and Deer.
review: The host was responsive and very helpfull. The place was clean and exactly like the pictures. Location is great too. Overall very satisfy with the place and the host. Highly recommend.

description: Enjoy a stylish experience at this centrally-located place in College Town. close to downtown and all it's restaurants and bars, Washington park and the Plaza. There’s albany medical and st Peter's  Hospital are about a mile away as well Saint Rose, Albany law and UAlbany.
review: The stay was fine. The apartment was clean and the location was convenient for my needs. The host was responsive to my questions.

description: Welcome to your home away from home in Albany, NY! Garden-level apartment in the heart of the vibrant, historic Center Square. Enjoyable blend of comfort and convenience. Walkable to Washington Park, award-winning restaurants, local coffee shops, boutiques, and the NYS State Capitol. Ideal for couples, solo travelers, weekend getaway, work trip, a longer term stay, or a peaceful and centrally located retreat. You’ll love the character, walkability, and charm of this thoughtfully appointed space.
review: Have stayed at this listing many times over the last year and have always had an excellent stay - highly recommend. Great host, clean, comfortable & convenient. Will definitely return! :)

description: Welcome to our newly renovated one-bedroom apartment located on the second floor, just minutes away from Albany Med and Saint Peters, walking distance from neighborhood park. Easy access to state offices and MVP arena all within minutes distance. The neighborhood is brimming with restaurants and bars, making it one of the most desired areas in Albany. Perfect for both short-term and long term visits. Our apartment offers comfort and convenience in an ideal location.
review: Had another airbnb booked for the night and the host was completely unresponsive and never provided check in instructions. airbnb canceled it and helped me get rebooked elsewhere, which ended up being this location. Erion responded immediately and despite the incredibly short notice, accepted the reservation. Couldn't have worked out better honestly, the place was immaculate. I would absolutely recommend this listing to anyone looking for accommodations in the area. Parking on the street and off was nice and there were many restaurants and things to do less than 2 minutes down the road.

description: Our home is a sanctuary of space and elegance. It boasts high ceilings, polished wooden floors, and open lounging areas where you can mingle or find a quiet corner. 	Enjoy our kitchen for a cup of coffee or savor a movie night in the living room. 	Our sun-drenched patio is perfect for a morning stretch or an evening wind-down with a glass of wine. Step outside, and you’re in the heart of the city’s most walkable district. A short stroll takes you to eateries catering to all taste buds.
review: Great place to stay. Responsive host. Easy to check in. Clean place. Would recommend.

description: Located in the heart of Albany, only 7 minutes from SUNY Albany and 4 minutes from St. Peter's Hospital, Casa Bancroft is a charming Mid-Century modern home that has everything you need for a comfortable stay. The first level of the home is exclusively yours with an inviting living area, sun-filled dining, a fully equipped kitchen, two refreshed bathrooms and three spacious bedrooms. Stay just 10 minutes from Downtown, Washington Park, MVP arena and of course “The Egg”!
review: We had an amazing stay at Cindy's place. The instructions were very clear to check-in and check-out of the place. The place was very clean and organized. Cindy responded promptly to all our questions. Highly recommend this place. Can't ask for a better host. Will definitely visit again!

description: Step into Fortune Suites, a recently revamped Two-bedroom apartment ideally situated within 8 to 10 minutes' drive of Albany Med, Times Union Center, and other local attractions. Street parking is hassle-free, accommodating up to 4 Non-smoking guests. Toiletries are provided, and we kindly request keeping noise levels down after 9:00 pm. Rest assured, high-speed internet is included for your convenience. Welcome and enjoy your stay!
review: The apartment is great and clean. It’s a short distance from any point of interest in downtown Albany like restaraunts and the MVP arena. The host is very quick to reply and transparent in communication. It is overall a great stay.

description: BEAUTIFULLY renovated apartment with CHARACTER in a historic building. This is a ground floor unit with direct fenced backyard access and a private patio! Ideal for pet owners! 4K Smart TV with Netflix, and high speed internet ready for you to use! This property comes with a fully stocked kitchen, in unit washer/dryer, free resident lot parking, and a fenced shared backyard with bbq for guests to enjoy.
review: Great home for a calm and relaxing get-a-way! House is exactly as pictured and nice and cool if you come on a hot day! Very quiet neighborhood with a nice backyard area and a grill. Loved my stay here! Would recommend 1000%.

description: Welcome to your home away from home in the heart of Albany! Nestled on a quiet street, this beautifully renovated 3-bedroom, 2.5-bathroom luxury residence offers a rare blend of comfort, style, and convenience—perfect for families, friends, business travelers, and weekend explorers alike.
review: Nori has created an absolutely gorgeous home for guests. It is inviting and full of natural light and attention to details. The interior design is meant to promote a sense of luxurious relaxation and it delivers.  The location is super convenient, we're walking distance to restaurants, while still being on a quiet street The host are very responsive and kind, we had a lovely time and would come back and encourage others to enjoy the space! Thank you for hosting us.

description: Private bedroom shared livingroom and shared bath on the 2nd fl  Mini fridge, microwave, coffee maker, toaster and fans in room. No kitchen access Owner occupied. 40 inch Tv with Firestick Security cameras exterior cameras and motion sensors in common areas, and shared halls.   NO extra visitors Keyless bedroom and main entry locks Walking distance to Albany Medical Center, colleges, and Washington Park. (2-3 blocks) Direct bus line to/from Suny Albany,   Amtrak, mall and DT Albany
review: Returning guest. Convenient location. Responsive host.  Comfortable bed. Will book here again when in Albany, if it’s available.

description: Welcome to our newly renovated one-bedroom apartment located on the second floor, just minutes away from Albany Med and Saint Peters, walking distance from neighborhood park. Easy access to state offices and MVP arena all within minutes distance. The neighborhood is brimming with restaurants and bars, making it one of the most desired areas in Albany. Perfect for both short-term and long term visits. Our apartment offers comfort and convenience in an ideal location.
review: Helpful and responsive host. Clean and organized place. No hassle with check in or check out. Highly recommend.

description: One beautiful one bedroom garden level apartment in close proximity to all the best that downtown Albany has to offer. Next to Lark Street, Washington Park, Rockefeller Plaza, Historic State Street, museums, cafes, bars, shopping, and grocery stores. Its a 5 min walk to Albany Med, the VA Hospital, the Albany Law School, Pharmacy School, and Nursing School. 1 mile to Sage College and New Scotland Restaurants.
review: Such a graceful host. Very responsive and caring. The place is cozy and well decorated.

description: Discover Lark Street - A Hip Albany Neighborhood. With countless restaurants, cafes, art galleries, special events, and more, this funky arts and entertainment district is a major Albany hotspot. The Iconic Downtown Apartment is a beautifully renovated 1850s era 4 - story brick building, in the heart of Lark Street, and a perfect oasis to relax and explore. We have taken ample time to carefully craft this space with tasteful décor, to maximize its potential and ensure your enjoyment
review: Brian's place is absolutely gorgeous! It was perfect; exactly as pictured! Clean, comfy and absolutely lovely in a great location. Walking distance to many fun local shops, restaurants and nightlife. Brian was great at communicating and check-in/check-out was easy and smooth. I would definitely recommend staying here and I will do so again if I come back to the area.

description: MODERN beautifully furnished apartment with UNIQUE spiral staircase. Newly renovated, cozy and trendy! PRIME location in the heart of downtown Albany and walking distance to popular restaurants, and cafes on Lark Street. Local attractions including The Egg, Empire State Plaza, Times Union Center are less than 5 minutes away. 4K Smart TV with Netflix, stocked kitchen & bathroom, high speed internet ready for you to use! Free street parking. Available for long term stays!
review: Amazing place in a great area of Albany, very close to many spots while also being tucked away from the busy streets. Inside looked beautiful and clean. Linda was great at communicating with us. Would definitely stay here again!  Also, check out Bull and Bee downstairs, really cool new spot!

description: This 2nd Floor 2BR apartment shines with beautiful hardwoods, an open flow, a newer bathroom, a newer King sized "Purple" gel flex mattress, and a new Queen "Kingsdown Prime" mattress. Reclining couch in living room; full but small kitchen, Keurig; laundry; parking, ceiling fans, window ACs. Prime location close to airport, highways, eateries; less than 10 minutes to downtown Albany/MVP Center/Hospitals; 20min to Rivers Casino; 40 min to SPAC/Saratoga Racetrack; 1hr to Lake George/Great Escape!
review: Host was very friendly and personable. Place was very cute and artsy, as well as clean. We were very happy with and would recommend to anyone needing a place to stay in the area.

description: Cute single family bungalow (1200sqft) in a convenient location with the lots of restaurants, bars and shops right around the corner.   Totally renovated with open floor plan.  77” 2023 LG B3 OLED TV  just added to living room with Sonos surround + sub!  3 Bedrooms with 1 King bed, 2 Queen beds, 1 Full sized bed and 2 airbeds can be added upon request.  Easy Parking two lane driveway by house.  $50 pet fee, please inquire before booking, thank you!
review: Peter was easily reached, communicative and a great host. The house is clean and within walking distance of stores and restaurants. Stocked with just about anything you could want. The backyard has a cute little dog run and we were able to stay in the home with another couple and their two dogs with enough space and privacy for all of us.

description: This unique place has a style all its own. Three levels of space all to yourself. Central located in Downtown Albany. Fully stocked kitchen to make meals at home or plenty of near by restaurants to explore. Spacious bedroom with attached bathroom. Work area to get some work done before hanging out to catch up on some Netflix shows. Your home away from home for a night or more of you choose.
review: Good location for my family visit. Coincidentally, this is in the old Phillip Schuyler High School, from which my father graduated in 1940! Kinda cool to know he'd been in the same space as I was.

description: Immaculate two level 3000 Sq. Ft. Bright & Sunny Cape Cod with 4 large bedrooms, Den, 2 full baths, living, dining & kitchen. Central Air & Heat. The house is situated in upscale Pine hills neighborhood on a quite dead end street with a Creek flowing through the back of the property. Peaceful & Serene View from Deck. Convenient location. Parking, Streaming Channels & WiFi included.  Relax on the deck overlooking creek with nature sounds. Short drive  to Ski Resorts.
review: We stayed here for six weeks during the covid-19 outbreak.  It made a great home away from home, and Chris was very helpful when we needed to extend our stay.  The home was much larger than expected - 4 bedrooms plus an office/baby room.  My son loved the toys.  The location is perfect.  The neighbors were super nice and we enjoyed hearing the mini waterfall in the back of the house.  Very convenient location to stay and we will consider it when we are back in the area for holidays and events.  Thanks, Chris!

description: Charming 5 room bed and breakfast located across from Washington Park in Albany, NY. Each room has a private bathroom and workstation. Guests have access to a shared kitchen, dining area, living space and small office nook with printer.
review: Save our want for regular coffee (could only find decaf), our stay at Terra's was exactly what we needed. The design is thoughtful, the location is splendid (if you want to be located right on top of Washington Park), and the accommodations comfortable. We'd be keen to stay again.

description: Welcome to our exceptional apartment in Albany! Discover a blend of style, comfort, and a prime location. Just steps from the State Capitol, Empire State Plaza, museums, and the Hudson River, our home offers unparalleled access to Albany's top attractions. Immerse yourself in local culture with nearby cafes, boutiques, and historic landmarks. Experience Albany like never before. Book your stay for a memorable adventure!
review: Stayed one night last week and three nights this week. Book it! It’s exactly as it appears in the pictures. Building feels safe at any hour and there is a parking lot 2 short blocks away for $15 per 24 hours. But there’s always evening parking on the block. Great food all around. Try out Rain just up the block. Rodney is proactive, responsive, and determined to provide a wonderful experience.

description: Forget your worries in this spacious and serene space. Open floor plan with updated kitchen & bath. Great space to call home for a night or several months. Walking distance to several great restaurants in area. Close to universities, hospital and major malls. Off street parking is located directly behind building.
review: We really enjoyed our stay! The neighborhood was friendly and a nice area to walk our dog. We highly recommend Diana's place and would stay again. :)

description: Welcome to this charming room in Albany completely remodeled to the studs in '21! Centrally located in the peaceful Pine Hill neighborhood. It’s walking distance to restaurants, bars, grocery store & historic Washington Park. 2 mi to SUNY and 1 mi to Albany Medical. Great for couples, traveling nurse, business professionals. Street parking available in front of the house. Your room is smart TV equipped with live cable for watching all your guilty pleasures, so feel free to bring your own login !
review: We had a very relaxing stay at EIhadj’s apartment. The apartment is very clean and cozy with some decoration. Although the bathroom and living rooms are shared space, it is noise free. The apartment is well-located to get access to restaurants and a beautiful park called Washington state park too. Thanks so much for everything! Elhadj

description: Beautiful 2nd Floor apartment in the heart of Albany. We are located just steps away from Washington Park, Albany Med, local restaurants and bars. This space features refinished original hardwood floors, exposed brick and a built in fireplace with 50" Smart TV. Magnificent large kitchen. Second floor balcony. Free street parking only.
review: Incredibly clean!  Looked like a brand new renovation. The kitchen is very pretty!

description: Listing is designed with the business or casual traveler in mind PLEASE NO SMOKERS in the building *Newly renovated *Modern 1 bedroom w/Smart TVs that feels like home *Street parking *Equipped with coffee maker *Fridge *Wireless charger *Private bath *Across the street from the Capitol Building *Close to Highway I-87, I-90, I-787 & public transportation. Long term stays available. Please inquire with dates needed for more info. Traveling nurses, doctors, lobbyists, students are welcome.
review: Pros: apartment is as advertised, responsive host, very convenient location.  Cons: while the apartment does the trick, the building is pretty run down, and the bed is not very comfortable.  Overall the place works if you just need a place to crash for a night or two

description: Place is within 2-3 miles of AMC, St. Peter's,  UAlbany, SUNY, College of St. Rose, Washington park, Empire State Plaza, and many other establishments.  Only 15 minute ride to the airport !
review: The room was comfortable. It was a short stay but I was impressed with the quick and friendly responses to my many questions. The room was better than in the pictures that were posted. I was happy with my stay.

description: Enjoy a spacious yet cozy home in a quiet neighborhood with off-street parking. Minutes from restaurants, shopping, universities (UAlbany, Sage, St. Rose), parks, museums, hospitals(Albany Med, St.Peters) and State Capital Offices for those traveling for business.  We’re right off the main highway leading to the World Famous Saratoga Race Track (30 min) and Adirondack Mountains/Lake George (50 min)!   From this Air Force Family to yours, welcome to our home.
review: The home was lovely. Craig was able to accommodate my family of 9. We came to Albany for my sister’s graduation at UAlbany. Even with 9 people in the home, it was still spacious and did not feel cluttered. Easy instructions to follow, clean and a beautiful place to stay in. Will definitely recommend and stay again if I visit Albany and need a space of this size.

description: Forget your worries in this spacious and serene space. Open floor plan with updated kitchen & bath. Great space to call home for a night or several months. Walking distance to several great restaurants in area. Close to universities, hospital and major malls. Off street parking is located directly behind building.
review: Dianas place was so great I booked twice. Great neighborhood, very clean place and off street parking. Highly recommend

description: This home is a gorgeous 100 year old Victorian   This suite is located on the 2nd floor. All the comforts of home! Tv and mini fridge in room.  We supply towels, linens and starter toiletries.  A very clean and quiet setting makes  for a comfortable stay here at the Inn.
review: The place and location was great, especially if you were working in Albany Medical Center. I did have some minor issues with the shower and check in, however, that was quickly resolved with great communication. Would definitely recommend for others to stay here. Hosts are great!

description: Our spacious 2048 sq. ft. 5 bedroom. 2 bath, house is the perfect place for serious minded groups.   We welcome business travelers and family travelers looking for a quiet, sanitized gorgeous home for extended stays in the city. Our reviews emphasize that we offer the comfortable accommodations to meet all of your needed expectations. Welcome to Albany
review: Michael and Flerida's place was absolutely perfect for our stay. The house is huge! Plenty of space for everyone, TV's in each room loaded up with Netflix, Hulu etc. Great kitchen and dinning room table to make dinners if you are not looking to eat out. Dunkin Donuts and CVS 2 blocks away was nice if you need a quick coffee or drugstore run. Their home is stocked up with all you need for a comfortable stay. The kitchen has everything you need for cooking, spices, basic condiments and plenty of pots and pans. Lovely neighborhood too, would definitely recommend to a friend. Thanks Michael and Flerida!

description: "The Red House," an inspiring 4-bedroom, 2nd-floor apartment nestled in the heart of Albany. This charming space features beautifully refinished 130-year-old hardwood floors, creating a warm and inviting atmosphere. A custom stone fireplace, complete with a 50-inch Samsung Smart TV, serves as the focal point of the living area. The kitchen is fully equipped for whipping up a meal. The dishwasher and laundry are conveniently located in the unit. Front and back balconies! Free street parking.
review: I had a great one-night stay! The host was extremely responsive and super friendly throughout the entire process. I really appreciated being able to check in early after giving a heads up a couple of days in advance—it made our travel day so much easier. On top of that, the host kindly offered a late check-out after learning about our situation, which was incredibly thoughtful and accommodating. Would definitely stay again and highly recommend!

description: Welcome to our garden apartment, nestled in a walkable neighborhood filled with diverse restaurants, cozy pubs, and the picturesque Washington Park. The apartment features a sound-dampened bedroom, ensuring a serene and peaceful retreat. Just steps away, you'll find the New York State Capitol, Empire State Plaza, The Egg, and the New York State Museum, making this location ideal for both relaxation and exploration.
review: Great location -- the place is super convenient for a well-rounded visit to Albany.  Lots of space, and though it is in the basement, the upside is access to a sweet outdoor spot. The place was super clean!  Easy communication with Ben. Will return if coming to Albany again.

description: Live in style! This TRENDY apt has top quality appliances, modern finishes and is located at a PRIME downtown Albany location.   4K Smart TV with Netflix, fully stocked kitchen & bathroom with all travel essentials, high speed internet! Free street parking. Available for long term stays!  **Important To prevent underage parties, weekend bookings are only available for 25+. When reserving, please share a photo of your ID that matches your name on Airbnb or your LinkedIn profile.
review: Place is beautiful! Everything is up to date and clean. Street parking was never a problem, always close by. Not the most walkable area, we used Ubers for the most part but without an issue. Had a great stay!

description: BOOK this 2-bed fl 2 apt. in a renovated historic two-century-old building in a quiet neighborhood of Albany's Pastures. Great location near Albany Medical Center, MVP Arena, Empire State Plaza, Library, Lark Street, State Offices, courts; easy access to local & regional bus routes and highways (I-787, I-90 & I-87).  Private balcony w/ seating Up to 4 NON-SMOKING guests Toiletries included  Message me anytime. Hope to welcome you soon!
review: Angela's place far exceeded my expectations and I will definitely stay again next time I am in the area. The apartment was spotless and had all of the amenities you'd need. My friends and I were attending an event at the MVP Arena and we had a short, safe walk. Truly a hidden gem!

description: Thoughtfully updated with modern amenities and chic designer furnishings this 2 bedroom 1 bathroom apartment with an office will make you look forward to coming home! This elegant unit is a set in a historic building on one of the most beautiful streets in Albany’s fabulous Center Square neighborhood. Footsteps  away from great restaurants, cafes, and upscale nightlife.  Check out “Dove and Deer” less than a block away the many other upscale offerings the neighborhood provides.
review: My father and I came in town for a basketball tourney at MVP Arena and Elizabeth's place worked out well for us. The location was very desirable and safe. The apartment itself was comfortable although the renovation job wasn't the best.  For example, the floors are uneven and some boards stick up (watch your toes!), the doors don't latch very well (bathroom in particular), and the back door should really have a deadbolt lock instead of just a knob lock. There was also a lot of dust on the fans and fixtures, so I'd rate the cleanliness as just OK. The hallway outside the unit was filthy with construction dust which forced us to remove shoes in the apartment (thankfully we travel with house shoes). Elizabeth was very nice, but it was clear that English wasn't her first language as some of the instructions didn't make sense. For example, it took me 15 min to locate the unit because the incorrect unit info was given. The address also didn't match exactly. However, I'd still recommend it.

description: This newly renovated 2BR/1BA apartment, situated on the first floor of a two-family house, offers sophistication and space. Enjoy a separate entrance and convenient location in downtown Albany, with grocery stores, restaurants, bars, nightlife, hospitals, and parks just steps away. With public transportation and ample street parking nearby, this is the perfect place to call home.
review: Beautiful space, great location!  Definitely recommend this place! Host quick to respond and very helpful!  Only one small comment... I couldn’t find an outlet, to plug my phone in, by the bed

description: Relax in a newly renovated one bedroom/one bathroom apartment located on the first floor of a charming brownstone building. It features lofty ceilings with beautiful architecture and a newly remodeled kitchen. Conveniently located to the Palace Theater, Capitol Rep Theater, Times Union Center and the Empire State Plaza. This rental is in walking distance to many popular eateries, bars, and more to explore!
review: Absolutely lovely spot for our short stay! The apartment is cozy and the bath robes are a particularly nice perk! David was extremely communicative and although we did not need to urgently get anything taken care of, it was very clear that he was there if anything was needed. The location was great, a short walk to lots of good spots. It was a REALLY hot weekend but the apartment was surprisingly cool and we only needed the AC in the evening. Recommend & would stay again.

description: Escape to an ultra-modern blackjack lounge with this unique studio for two. Located in the heart of central downtown Albany, you're only minutes away from the Times Union Center and major tourist attractions.  Or, stay here while you visit your kids at nearby SUNY Albany, Saint Rose, and other colleges - then come back to your room in style.
