review: Friendly and helpful host but several issues with the space. Unusual smell covered up by headache-inducing air fresheners. Bed was uncomfortable due to a major sag. Neighborhood is not safe (nor is it near things to do) despite it being advertised as such. Serious issues with homeless population including half-naked people following you. Also, lots of undisclosed fees until after booking including if you have someone staying with you or if you get a towel dirty.

description: Urban Oasis!  2nd Floor master bedroom in residential home.  Queen sized bed. Private bath. Mini-refrigerator, microwave and sitting area in room. Shared entrance but access to full kitchen, bath, bedroom, laundry and parking. Walking distance to Albany Med, Albany Pharmacy, Albany Law School, College of St. Rose and Sage College.  On Main bus line.  10 minute drive from downtown
review: We arrived after 10:00 pm due to circumstances. Anne greeted us and made us comfortable. It is an older home but the bed was comfortable and the room was clean. Suggestion would be a hair dryer and a lighter blanket option  for those who might find the room warm.

description: This beautifully renovated and brightly decorated brownstone in historic Albany is your perfect getaway. Located just minutes from charming downtown, guests can enjoy all Albany has to offer.   Very spacious bedroom and living area with an abundance of natural light creates a very comfortable environment! It features a fully stocked kitchen, in unit washer/dryer, free resident lot parking, and a fenced shared backyard with bbq for guests to enjoy.  Long term stays available.
review: Arrived on Thanksgiving day, so just checked in and left. Came home exhausted from family and traveling and saw, unlike the pictures posted, that the bed only had two small flat pillows, one regular one and one in a decorative sham. For two adults.  It was late, so we just had a bad nights sleep and would talk about it tomorrow.  I message them to let them know, very responsive and said they’d come in an hour, and they did. With sealed throw pillow inserts. Not real pillows. But at this point, we’ve already spoken up, what can we do? We open them up to put the pillow cases on and they REEK like smoke. It was so bad we couldn’t use them. Ended up borrowing pillows from my family just so we could get some real sleep.

description: Relax in a newly renovated one bedroom/one bathroom apartment located on the first floor of a charming brownstone building. It features lofty ceilings with beautiful architecture and a newly remodeled kitchen. Conveniently located to the Palace Theater, Capitol Rep Theater, Times Union Center and the Empire State Plaza. This rental is in walking distance to many popular eateries, bars, and more to explore!
review: Fully restored 1 bedroom apartment. 10 min walking from center Albany. Free parking Neighborhood is ok, city sounds you’ll notice. Wooden structure of building so neighbors above and doors slamming will be heard

description: Come relax at a Hidden Gem in the heart of Albany, NY. It is centrally located between Albany Med hospitals and Saint Peters Hospital and in close proximity to the downtown college campuses of UAlbany, Saint Rose, Albany Pharmaceutical, Albany Law school and medical school, and the New York State capital.  Some of the best restaurants and pubs are just minutes from this central location.   It is only a 15-minute ride to the Albany International Airport.
review: Did not have basic condiments like salt, sugar, and teas, and not enough utensils, had to do my own shopping for that. Porch could have been little cleaner. Other than that it was a good stay for me and friends. Host was very responsive to messages.

description: Indulge in modern luxury and sophistication in this tastefully updated 2-bedroom townhouse-style apartment. With chic designer furnishings and modern amenities, your private porch entrance welcomes you home to elegance. Located on one of Center Square's most picturesque streets, enjoy easy access to fabulous dining, iconic landmarks, and vibrant nightlife. Experience the convenience of city living, just a mile from Albany Medical Center and St. Peter’s Hospital.
review: Elizabeth's place was basic but had virtually all of what I needed, and the few odds and ends I requested Elizabeth provided very quickly. Despite being a pretty quiet spot, the location was right in the heart of Albany's Center Square, a short walk from everything - Lark Street with its many shops, eateries and happenings, the state Capitol, and bus stops where virtually every Capital District mass transit route stopps. Elizabeth also provided off-street parking across the street from the unit, key in a neighborhood where street parking is hard to come by and a residential permit is required (though you can get a temporary permit if you want it). The place was clean and clutter-free.

description: Forget your worries in this spacious and serene space. Open floor plan with updated kitchen & bath. Great space to call home for a night or several months. Walking distance to several great restaurants in area. Close to universities, hospital and major malls. Off street parking is located directly behind building.
review: This adorable place has everything you need for a quick getaway to Albany. Diana is a thoughtful host who makes herself available to answer your questions and insure your stay with her is everything you hoped for. The apt is well appointed with everything you might need and most importantly it is super clean. We enjoyed our stay and plan to be back!!

description: Cute single family home in a convenient location with the lots of restaurants, bars and shops right around the corner. It features a driveway with covered parking, a nice outdoor area and central air. My place is close to University of Albany, shopping malls and plazas, bars, restaurants, the airport, the city center, parks, art and culture. Parties and events are not allowed.
review: 200% recommended!! The house is wonderful. It's newly decorated , quite and clean. The location is great also with some restaurants and shops nearby.  The host is very warmhearted. He responded in time. I got everything I need. Definitely come back here next time. Thx. Piotr.

description: This property offers a peaceful and centrally-located atmosphere. McDonald's, Walgreens, great pizza spot and Albany Medical Center are just a 4-minute drive away. There’s also a laundromat just 1 minute away, along with a variety of restaurants and bars nearby. Street parking is free, except on Tuesdays or Wednesdays between 12-3pm, depending on which side of the street you park on.  Exterior camera would be present beginning 02/1/2025 .
review: I had the best birthday in Gloria’s apartment this weekend! Me and my fiancé felt right at home and I would highly suggest! Definitely worth the price.

description: Charming 5 bedroom /3.5  Bathrooms , 3 kitchens,huge family home. Hardwood floors through out. Living room, kitchen and master bedroom with 1/2 bath on entry floor. Basement Laundry. 4 car private parking spaces . Full bathroom,living room and kitchenette in finished basement. 3 BR & 1 full bath on the 2nd floor.  A full bathroom,kitchen & living room top floor. Minutes to Lincoln park, Albany Med, law school, downtown Albany,MVP arena.
review: Timothy and his family went above and beyond for us. We stayed at his home for a month while receiving medical care and this home was the most peaceful place to come back to and rest. Any time we needed anything Timothy was quick to take care of it. His son even gave a little dinosaur toy to my toddler before we left because he heard he loved dinos. The home is huge! We didn’t use the top floor much but the kids loved to go up and run around. Bedroom floor was comfortable and spacious. My toddler is already sad to leave his “fishy bed.” The first floor is very spacious, living room large and comfortable. Roku TV with lots of options. Bathrooms on all floors. Laundry available in basement was so nice to have. A beautiful old house that was a solace to us during a very difficult time. We are grateful for Timothy, his family, and our time at “Albany house.”

description: Charming 1 Bedroom + Workstation apartment in Downtown Albany. Centrally located and easy walking! Free Fast and Furious Arcade Game. Pets allowed! 2nd FL apartment with an elevator on site!   Enjoy hardwood floors, a custom kitchen, soaking bathtub, and central AC. Features a Queen bed, pull-out couch, workstation with monitor, and free WiFi. Includes access to a shared washer/dryer.   For long term stays over 1 month, a monthly parking space will be included. Parking garage close by.
review: This listing worked out perfectly for my weekend stay in Albany! Everything was clean and ready for my arrival. Dillon communicated well which made check in and check out very easy.

description: Enjoy a stylish experience at this centrally-located place. Upper duplex recently renovated to make room for a lovely trip to Albany. Well appointed 1st floor offers kitchen/livingroom full bath. 2nd floor has 2 bedrooms and an additional full bathroom. Tons of natural light provides a peaceful space. Walk out front door to explore neighborhood. Lark street, capital, convention center are all within 15 minutes of walking
review: Great location for a concert at MVP Arena. Walkable to the show and plenty of bars and restaurants. The place is spacious and clean.

description: Cute single family home in a convenient location with the lots of restaurants, bars and shops right around the corner.    It features  a driveway with covered parking, a nice outdoor area with seating, lounging and a weber 3 burner propane grill.   The home has central air and a 5 person Clearlight Premier IS-5 infrared cedar sauna by Jacuzzi.   My place is close to University of Albany, tennis, shopping malls and plazas, bars, restaurants, the airport, the city center, parks, art and culture.
review: Proactive and super responsive! I couldn’t have asked for a more welcoming host. The place was exactly what we needed - spacious, tidy and close to where we needed to be.

description: Once a retreat, then a convent—now it’s your cozy home away from home. Enjoy a well-lit room with a Purple Hybrid 4 queen bed, desk, and 75" TV. Relax in two family rooms, cook in the spacious kitchen, or sip coffee on one of four enclosed porches. Walk to groceries, restaurants, and the movies, or hop on the bus right outside. Whether for a short trip or long stay, comfort and community await you here.
review: Thomas’ place is a reliable and awesome place to stay.  I stay here often.  It is very evident that this place is one of the best Airbnb’s I’ve stayed at.

description: ✔ 4 Bedrooms with 5 Beds, plus a sofa bed!   ✔ Dedicated workspaces ✔ Washer & dryer and much more  ✔ Ideal for corporate housing, travel nurses, or friends/family vacations! ✔ Clean.  WiFi.  Quick host responses. ✔ Universities, Hospitals and more; all close by!
review: The unit was uninhabitable. There was a bug on the bed, the bedroom window shades were broken, the rooms were extremely small, and the smell of mold was coming from the entire house. We decided to leave the house as soon as we entered and contacted Michael. Both Michael and Catherine were very cooperative and responsive and issued full refund. But I'm still fighting with the insurance because they're denying my claim as of yet. . It will be a financial loss for me if they won’t reimburse.

description: Welcome to this rustic second-floor apartment in Albany, New York! This newly remodeled three-bedroom, one-bath gem is perfect for a comfortable stay for up to six guests. Step into a piece of history with original hardwood floors dating back to 1890. The spacious dining area is ideal for gathering, and the apartment features a 65-inch smart TV for your entertainment needs. Need to catch up on work? We've got you covered with a dedicated work desk. Book now for an unforgettable experience!
review: Awesome unit near most everything you'll need. The upgrades make this apartment more than worth it. Would definitely stay here again.

description: Come relax at a Hidden Gem in the heart of Albany, NY. It is centrally located between Albany Med hospitals and Saint Peters Hospital and in close proximity to the downtown college campuses of UAlbany, Saint Rose, Albany Pharmaceutical, Albany Law school and medical school, and the New York State capital.  Some of the best restaurants and pubs are just minutes from this central location.   It is only a 15-minute ride to the Albany International Airport.
review: The home was well maintained, very clean and lots of space for us to be comfortable while working remotely. Nori was very responsive to any of our needs. The house is located in an urban neighborhood and had easy access to all the places we needed to travel to for our work trip.

description: This 2nd floor one bedroom in a Historic Brownstone 1800's across the street from Washington park. Beautiful woodwork throughout with all the comforts of home. Great area where you can walk or jog in the park or just enjoy a cup of coffee outside. Choice of restaurants, stores & shops on Lark street. Movie theater, hospitals and malls all in close proximity. We are located on State street in Albany in a desirable residential area with easy Uber or Lyft service available.  ((NO PARTIES!!))
review: This is a wonderful apartment that I'd recommend to anyone. The brownstones surrounding Washington Park are beautiful, and being able to stay in one is a truly special experience. The park is lovely and restaurants are a couple of blocks away. I've stayed in several of Lloyd's properties and hope to continue to do so during future visits with family in the area. The woodwork and architecture in this building is exceptional and I so enjoyed the bay window for morning tea. Many thanks!

description: Just moments from Albany Medical Center, this renovated 1-bedroom apartment exudes brightness and is tastefully furnished with high-end designer furniture and decor, ensuring a delightful living experience. Situated on one of the area’s finest blocks of classic Victorian mansions, this building stands as a beacon of elegance. With proximity to Albany Medical Center, universities, and more, the location is truly unbeatable.
review: Apartment was actually more spacious than the photos suggested, so there was plenty of space of a week-long stay (the spare reading room was a definite bonus). Bathroom is large and there's ample closet space for whatever you bring.  The cooking supplies were a little spare (apartment has plates, cups, silverware, and complete set of new pots and pans, but lacked a couple useful items such as a can opener). However, great value overall and would use this option again if I have company visiting me Albany.

description: Visiting Albany for work, vacation, or to visit family? The Twitchell Estate is a spacious 4BR home that will be perfect for your stay. This elegantly designed Boho Chic rental comes with amenities such as self-check-in, Netflix, Disney+, Apple TV, and many other streaming options if you're looking to relax indoors, and a private laptop-friendly office with Wi-Fi if you need to get work done. Enjoy free coffee and tea in the stocked kitchen, with everything you need to feel like you are at home.
review: Lovely place! Exactly as advertised. We had 6 adults and did not feel crowded in the slightest. Safe neighborhood that is central to everything.  There is even a Dunkin I block away…I consider that a big bonus.

description: Welcome to our studio which located at hearth of Albany. Close to Bus Station, Train Station, Business and finance district, MVP Arena, SUNY Albany headquarters, night life and historic places. All kind of restaurant and bars in walking distance. 1 bedroom with queen bed , bathroom and kitchen. Kitchen has all utensils.
review: Etem’s place was perfect for our needs, a very short walk to the Greyhound and Trailways stations. The checkin instructions were perfectly clear. Comfy and cute to boot!

description: Welcome to our newly renovated, one bedroom apartment in the heart of the charming Melrose neighborhood in Albany, NY, conveniently nestled between UAlbany and downtown. ☺️ Please note, this apartment is apart of a four family apartment complex.   This pet friendly space includes an outdoor sitting area and small patio.
review: Thaddeus property was beautiful. He was very responsive and communicative throughout the duration of my stay and even offered local recommendations. Such a quaint and quiet environment, I’ll definitely be back!  Ps: the kitchen and bathroom are 2DIE4

description: Discover Lark Street - A Hip Albany Neighborhood. With countless restaurants, cafes, art galleries, special events, and more, this funky arts and entertainment district is a major Albany hotspot. The Iconic Downtown Apartment is a beautifully renovated 1850s era 4 - story brick building, in the heart of Lark Street, and a perfect oasis to relax and explore. We have taken ample time to carefully craft this space with tasteful décor, to maximize its potential and ensure your enjoyment
review: We really enjoyed our stay at Brian’s place! The apartment was cozy, clean, and had everything we needed. The location made it super easy to get around, and Brian was very responsive and thoughtful throughout our stay. It felt like a home away from home, and we’d definitely come back if we’re in Albany again.

description: Experience the comfort of staying in a second room of our centrally located home. Conveniently situated on the main bus line, this residence offers ease of access to the city’s top destinations. Make yourself at home in our shared spaces, which include three serene enclosed porches and two Lovesac bean bags. Whether you’re traveling for work or leisure, our home promises a restful and enjoyable stay. Join us and immerse yourself in a welcoming atmosphere, complete with all the comforts of home.
review: Thomas and Justin were just the perfect hosts.  I reserved last minute, and they were super reactive and helpful.  We had a nice conversation about the actual house as it has a lot of interesting history.  You can tell that the place is important to them.  Highly recommend staying here!

description: BOOK this 2-bed fl 2 apt. in a renovated historic two-century-old building in a quiet neighborhood of Albany's Pastures. Great location near Albany Medical Center, MVP Arena, Empire State Plaza, Library, Lark Street, State Offices, courts; easy access to local & regional bus routes and highways (I-787, I-90 & I-87).  Private balcony w/ seating Up to 4 NON-SMOKING guests Toiletries included  Message me anytime. Hope to welcome you soon!
review: Thank you Angela for your stay!  We enjoyed the place. There was a parking spot in the back, and it was close to the main streets in Albany. It was a bit far from downtown and we had to drive everywhere but the apartment was just like the description. It was close to the highway so we heard and felt the trucks all night, I didn’t mind too much as I’m from a city where those noises are typical, but something good to note as my friend had a harder time getting used to it.  Angela was very responsive and always responded very timely. She checked in on us after our first night to make sure everything was ok.  The apartment itself was bigger than the pictures make it seem. I liked the exposed brick and wood accents around the house. It was a cozy place to stay on a fall weekend away.

description: BEAUTIFUL + LUXURIOUS renovated apartment with CHARACTER in a historic building.   This spacious 2 bedroom feature a bright reading nook in the master bedroom, an office space, a soaker tub, 4K Smart TV with Netflix, and high speed internet ready for you to use! It comes with a fully stocked kitchen, in unit washer/dryer, free resident parking, and a fenced shared backyard with bbq for guests to enjoy.
review: Thank you Linda for providing your place for our shopping trip to Albany! Close enough to any location we wanted to go to. Also thank you for your quick responses to any inquiries you had. Thanks again!

description: This is Albany’s best! Enjoy a cozy stay in one of Albany’s oldest and most unique homes. This historic farmhouse was built in 1821 and completely restored and renovated in 2010. Your room is the master suite complete with a deep soaking tub, remote controlled gas fireplace, king size bed, single pull out American Leather couch, and double sinks. The pool is open from May until October. Hot tub is open year round. Enjoy a perfect romantic getaway!
review: Had a great stay! Everything was even better then described. Swimming in a 90 degree outdoor pool in late October was bliss. Thank you Thomas!  If ever back in Albany we will see you again... Mike & Laurie

description: This Suite has been refurbished completely. A beautiful and comfortable Suite that has everything a guest needs! Nice decor with a queen bed, desk, cable TV, WiFi, ironing board, blow dryer and your own private bath. Private entrance close to front of house.  The Inn at South Lake is a large Victorian with multiple dorm style suites. Each suite has it's own private lock. A very quiet, professional atmosphere .
review: The hosts were kind and very helpful when I needed something. I worked nights while staying here, and it was quiet enough to sleep during the day before work, which was great. I enjoyed my stay here and would stay here again.

description: Relax in our cozy home on a quiet one-way street. Plenty of free street parking available. With a large dining and living room, fully stocked kitchen, and furnished private room, our home is the perfect affordable stay for working professionals, students, and people in-between housing.   Newly furnished and renovated in 2017. Minutes from major universities and hospitals. Entire home is 3 bed 1 bath (you have a private bedroom with door lock). CDTA Bus stop 1 block away.
review: Chad was very responsive and welcoming to his home. Everything I needed was available at his home. Knowledgeable of the surrounding area. Home was kept clean and great location.

description: Our home is a sanctuary of space and elegance. It boasts high ceilings, polished wooden floors, and open lounging areas where you can mingle or find a quiet corner. 	Enjoy our kitchen for a cup of coffee or savor a movie night in the living room. 	Our sun-drenched patio is perfect for a morning stretch or an evening wind-down with a glass of wine. Step outside, and you’re in the heart of the city’s most walkable district. A short stroll takes you to eateries catering to all taste buds.
review: Right after I booked this place, I messaged the host and specifically asked if there were dogs/cats due to allergy. My message was marked “read” but no response. When I arrived, two dogs were in the house (one barking loudly at me). I had lots of work planned for the trip and it was too late to make other lodging arrangements, so I ended up spending my three days out on the street (30 degrees and snow), in public libraries, just to prevent allergy and anxiety. I always try to see things from others’ perspectives, sometimes to my own detriment. I thought hosting an airbnb was not easy and maybe the host just couldn’t afford to tell me the truth for financial reasons. But I feel very disrespected. Anyone who’s been ghosted knows how I feel. Not disclosing information in the listing is one thing; not disclosing information upon request (with health concerns) and not responding at all are another level of ethical issue. Also, light sleepers should avoid the third floor.

description: Enjoy this park view stylish experience at this centrally-located apartment. You’ll find yourself in the heart of Albany, New York. Only steps away from restaurants and bars. Washington Park right at your doorstep, and Albany Medical Center around the corner.
review: Loved this spot, so clean and in such a convenient location. JShing was a terrific host. Quickly responsive, always helpful.

description: Our home is a sanctuary of space and elegance. It boasts high ceilings, polished wooden floors, and open lounging areas where you can mingle or find a quiet corner. review: Out of all the air bnbs I’ve stayed at this is by far the best. The hosts were super helpful and accommodating  It was clean and cozy  The bed was incredibly comfortable. It was a very welcoming environment I would travel back to Albany just to stay there another night

description: A cozy private apartment. The Blair Suite, named after the original owner of this beautiful 1890's Victorian, is located on the basement floor. It has it's own private entrance on the side of the home. Located in historic Albany, close to everything, hospitals, schools, museums, restaurants and Washington Park.
review: Honestly don’t have any complaints, this is my favorite place to stay when ever I’m visiting in Albany. It’s always a pleasure staying and I 100% recommend anyone considering. The place is clean and comforting with the aura it brings out.

description: Welcome to our studio which located at hearth of Albany. Close to Bus Station, Train Station, Business and finance district, MVP Arena, SUNY Albany headquarters, night life and historic places. All kind of restaurant and bars in walking distance. 1 bedroom with queen bed , bathroom and kitchen. Kitchen has all utensils.
review: From the very beginning, during booking Etem was quick to respond and absolutely clear with instructions.  I was pleased to find the apartment plenty of spacious for one person even enough for two. The place is clean and comfortable with plethora of cooking supplies, utensils, cutlery, paper towels, napkins and even some spices. The bed was most comfortable to sleep in and I appreciated a number of towels provided in different sizes. Came in handy after a long trip.  As an added convenience I was happy to find a long hose in the bath tub for showering.  I especially appreciate still life picture in the kitchen area with most appetizing images on it ;)  Snacks were delicious and complementary and the selection of teas and coffee were impressive as well. Living quarters were well conditioned with an option to control the AC which I utilized for my convenience.  In a word - super comfortable and lovely apartment close to downtown and only steps away to the bus transit to travel to NYC.

description: 2-bed 1st floor apt. in a renovated historic two-century-old building in a quiet neighborhood of Albany's Pastures. Great location near Albany Medical Center, MVP Arena, Empire State Plaza, Library, Lark Street, State Offices, courts; easy access to local & regional bus routes and highways (I-787, I-90 & I-87).  1 Queen + 1 Full bed Up to 5 NON-SMOKING guests Toiletries included  Save & BOOK this unit today! Message me anytime. Hope to welcome you soon!  -Earl
review: I highly recommend this property especially if you are visiting Albany for work / business.  It's about a ten-twelve minute walk from the property to the convention centre.  This apartment is not located in the best of neighbourhoods but the fact that the owner owns most of the properties in the block and has his wonderful team on site most of the time, it truly feels like home.  As I was by myself, I had tons of questions but Earl & his team were constantly there to ensure that I am comfortable.  It was a smooth  check-in and was squeaky clean.  The bedrooms had fresh sets of bedsheets and the bathroom was well maintained.  Even though it's an old construction, the team has put in every effort to stock it up with the essentials and there was nothing which made me feel less that home and I adjusted well. There are local grocery stores around but regular delivery services came to my rescue. Huge shoutout to Earl, Evan and Jasmine for truly being the kindest and most wonderful hosts! :D

description: Visiting Albany for work, vacation, or to visit family? The Twitchell Estate is a spacious 4BR home that will be perfect for your stay. This elegantly designed Boho Chic rental comes with amenities such as self-check-in, Netflix, Disney+, Apple TV, and many other streaming options if you're looking to relax indoors, and a private laptop-friendly office with Wi-Fi if you need to get work done. Enjoy free coffee and tea in the stocked kitchen, with everything you need to feel like you are at home.
review: Brian was an excellent host. I needed to book in a short time frame and he was accommodating and responsive. Beautiful, clean space made for a relaxing stay.

description: Enjoy a stylish experience at this centrally-located place. Upper duplex recently renovated to make room for a lovely trip to Albany. Well appointed 1st floor offers kitchen/livingroom full bath. 2nd floor has 2 bedrooms and an additional full bathroom. Tons of natural light provides a peaceful space. Walk out front door to explore neighborhood. Lark street, capital, convention center are all within 15 minutes of walking
review: If you are looking for a place to stay in downtown Albany, look no further. This townhouse is perfectly located and even more beautiful than the photos. We travel frequently to Albany to visit our Mom and have stayed in many hotels and Airbnbs. We will stay here from now on. The beds were very  comfortable and the house was extremely clean. We walked to local pubs and restaurants and had a peaceful place to come back to.

description: Beautiful 2nd Floor apartment in the heart of Albany. We are located just steps away from Washington Park, Albany Med, local restaurants and bars. This space features refinished original hardwood floors, exposed brick and a built in fireplace with 50" Smart TV. Magnificent large kitchen. Second floor balcony. Free street parking only.
review: A nice and cozy place to call home. Better than I expected. From the rooms to the comfortable couch, everything was fantastic.

description: Enjoy a spacious yet cozy home in a quiet neighborhood with off-street parking. Minutes from restaurants, shopping, universities (UAlbany, Sage, St. Rose), parks, museums, hospitals(Albany Med, St.Peters) and State Capital Offices for those traveling for business.  We’re right off the main highway leading to the World Famous Saratoga Race Track (30 min) and Adirondack Mountains/Lake George (50 min)!   From this Air Force Family to yours, welcome to our home.
review: The house suited our family’s needs. All the beds were very comfortable. There were plenty of towels and blankets. The kitchen was extremely well equipped, which was important for our family that likes to cook. And having a room for exercise was a nice extra. No complaints. We would come back again.

All the local attractions including The Egg, Empire State Plaza, Times Union Center are less than 5 minutes away. 4K Smart TV with Netflix, fully stocked kitchen & bathroom with all travel essentials, high speed internet ready for you to use! Free street parking. Available for long term stays!
review: This is a great spot for anyone coming to Albany for an event downtown especially MVP Arena. Hill Street Cafe is also a great bar with excellent pub fare. Check in was super easy. Place was just as described.

The living area features a queen size futon and views of the sunset most evenings, and the bedroom features a luxurious queen-sized memory foam bed and access to our quiet garden where the sun rises.
review: Host was great and helpful when needed. Place was as described and super clean. Stayed during the beginning of January and the heat was good, didn’t get cold. The Nest system installed was super nice and user friendly. Good coffee and tea as well. Overall a great stay and highly recommend!

review: Great experience in downtown Albany. Perfect for my dog and I. Stephanie was very helpful and quick to respond to any questions! Would recommend!

review: Had some trouble with the door lock, but Phil was very helpful. We notice a gas smell on the first day it got fixed within a day. The beds were a little uncomfortable and i had trouble sleeping. Phil was very friendly and helpful and over all it was a nice stay.

review: Great place and wonderful host. Very responsive. Would recommend to my family and friends.

It was an older property but they both manage it very well. I loved staying here and hope I can stay here again during my contract in Albany. Highly recommend!

My partner worked from home so the dedicated work space and reliable Wifi were greatly appreciated. All the appliances were in good condition, the smart TV had everything, and there were plenty of extras. The in unit washer/dryer were such a lifesaver for the extended stay. It was also very private making it that much more enjoyable.  I couldn’t be more grateful to have found this place with such amazing hosts. We kept needing to extend and there were no delays in the response time or lack of accommodations. We were met with care and understanding from the start, really easing the stress of relocating to the area. Highly recommend you book a stay!

The house is full of funky, fun decor around every corner. Loved the gorgeous backyard/pool/hot tub and really enjoyed chatting with Thomas and hope to come back for a longer stay!

review: Chris is a very accommodating host. There are clear instructions everywhere making it very easy to know how to operate the house. There were no hidden surprise issues, the house was just as photographed. There is ample space for the amount of people the bedrooms hold so we were all able to gather together in both the living room and dining room. That was much appreciated by all. The toddler room was a bonus.

description: Urban Oasis!  2nd Floor guest bedroom in residential home.  Shared entrance.  Shared bath with one other guest room.  Use of kitchen and washer/dryer. Street parking.  Use of driveway, if necessary.  Walking distance to Albany Med, Albany Pharmacy, Albany Law School, College of St. Rose and Sage College.  On Main bus line.  10 minute drive from downtown.
review: Ed was a welcoming and friendly host! He lived in a very nice area with a park across the street. He was very responsive and gave great suggestions for the area!

description: This is Albany’s best! Enjoy a cozy stay in one of Albany’s oldest and most unique homes. This historic farmhouse was built in 1821 and completely restored and renovated in 2010. Your room is the master suite complete with a deep soaking tub, remote controlled gas fireplace, king size bed, single pull out American Leather couch, and double sinks. The pool is open from May until October. Hot tub is open year round. Enjoy a perfect romantic getaway!
review: This was a great stay. The house and back yard are beautiful . Tom is very friendly. It felt much like home, that home you wish you had.

description: Larson Gold sits in Albany's vibrant Center Square district, offering easy access to dining, shopping, and entertainment. With excellent public transportation and nearby highways, convenience is at your doorstep. Experience the city's rich cultural scene, diverse dining options, and lively nightlife, all within walking distance. Don't miss out on this perfect blend of historic charm and modern amenities.
review: Etem is a great host and I have stayed at his places twice Will stay again if im ever back in the area. Great price, plenty of things  to do within a 5 minute walk in any direction. Highly recommend

description: Welcome to the Whisky House! Featuring 3 floors with plenty of space to host a corporate event or celebrate with loved ones. Walking distance from downtown and Center Square nightlife, the Whiskey House is the perfect location for a bachelor or bachelorette party, birthday celebration getaway, anniversary, you name it! Whatever the occasion, the Whiskey House is your home away from home.  *We DO NOT have a full size stove/oven - pocket kitchen with smaller amenities (microwave/fridge) available*
review: Came to town for a show at the MVP arena and we couldn’t have picked a better place!! Very walkable and conveniently located. Tyler was extremely responsive and a great host. The place itself is very unique. Would definitely recommend!

description: Our home is a sanctuary of space and elegance. It boasts high ceilings, polished wooden floors, and open lounging areas where you can mingle or find a quiet corner. 	Enjoy our kitchen for a cup of coffee or savor a movie night in the living room. 	Our sun-drenched patio is perfect for a morning stretch or an evening wind-down with a glass of wine. Step outside, and you’re in the heart of the city’s most walkable district. A short stroll takes you to eateries catering to all taste buds.
review: This was my second stay at Abba house, again such  a pleasant relaxing place to stay. It’s a vintage grand building, lovingly maintained. Hosts are very attentive, the house is super clean and well managed. All the other guests  I’ve occasionally met are kind and seem to enjoy plus respect the place too. I look forward to visiting Abba house again

description: My place is close to University of Albany, shopping malls and plazas, bars, restaurants, the airport, the city center, parks, art and culture. You’ll love my place because of the location, the ambiance, the outdoors space, fully renovated, newly furnished, nice yard, awesome double rear deck,  open floor plan and central air.   My place is good for couples, solo adventurers, business travelers, families (with kids), big groups, and furry friends ($50 pet fee w/ booties included).
review: We recently stayed at Peter's place and would highly recommend it to others. It was very clean and well-appointed, and Peter was very helpful. We had a relatively large group (6 adults, 1 child, and 1 dog) and everyone enjoyed spending time in the backyard on the covered deck. Great place, great host!

description: Urban Oasis!  2nd Floor guest bedroom in residential home.  Shared entrance.  Access to full kitchen, shared bath, bedroom, laundry and parking. Walking distance to Albany Med, Albany Pharmacy, Albany Law School, College of St. Rose and Sage College.  On Main bus line.  10 minute drive from downtown
review: Great stay! Super easy to get in and out. The house was really gorgeous.

description: Welcome to our Newly Renovated, three bedroom two bathroom apartment. ☺️ Please note, this apartment is located in a Four Family Apartment Complex.   We are located in a walkable neighborhood within the charming Melrose area, located less than ten minutes from the University of Albany, downtown Albany, as well as many restaurants and attractions! We are pet friendly.   *Please note, this unit is on the second and third floor of a four family unit. Two flights of stairs upon entrance. No parties*
review: Very responsive host. Extremely clear instructions for check-in and check out. We stayed here over our graduation weekend for a college in the area. It happened to be a very warm week leading up to our stay, and the apartment had air conditioning units installed in the windows. We were VERY happy about that! Apartment was very close to everything we needed. Would highly recommend doing business with this host.

description: Settle into Albany at the Allen House. This newly renovated apartment will be perfect for your time in the capital of NY. The house is in an unbeatable location with restaurants and stores just around the corner; a few of our favorites are Juniors & Madison Cafe. Many shops and stores are within walking distance. Free street parking only. Book today to ensure your dates!  10 minute drive to the heart of downtown 16 minute drive to Albany International Airport
review: Scott's place is beautiful, clean and spacious. My family was in town for a wedding so it was a short but sweet stay but we'd stay here again if we find ourselves back in Albany. Scott and Kim were super helpful and responsive to any questions we had.

description: Welcome to our garden apartment, nestled in a walkable neighborhood filled with diverse restaurants, cozy pubs, and the picturesque Washington Park. The apartment features a sound-dampened bedroom, ensuring a serene and peaceful retreat. Just steps away, you'll find the New York State Capitol, Empire State Plaza, The Egg, and the New York State Museum, making this location ideal for both relaxation and exploration.
review: Very clean...the bed was a little squeaky and it needs wall art throughout. Excellent location.  it was great walking g around the Capitol and going up to the observation platform in the capital building (can't remember the name).

description: My home is within walking distance of the Capital, the Empire State Plaza, Albany Medical Center, and many restaurants and museums. It's directly across from beautiful Washington Park, and it's an ideal location for medical students,  nurses,  people taking the bar exam, or here on business. I'm fully vaccinated as of May.  Please note resident cats and acknowledge that you're aware. Thanks!!
review: This is such a lovely place right next to Washington Park with lots of restaurants, coffee shops, and th public library. This place is walkable from the heart of the city and is only 5 minutes from the bus stop. Small, cozy apartment room with clean and private space. Alice is a great host and a lovely person. She is very flexible and respectful and makes the guest feel at home. I am so happy I found this place and to have met her.  I highly recommend this cute little stay for anyone who is visiting Albany. I've had a pleasant stay and would definitely return.

description: Charming private 1 bed, 1 bath garden suite just steps away from historic Washington Park.    Walking distance from Albany Med. and downtown SUNY.  A stylish brownstone with culturally diverse art & experiences & full amenities.    Near iconic places like the NYS Capital, Empire State Plaza, Egg Performing Arts Ctr., restaurants, and more.   The unit is perfect for mature business & medical travelers, and couples looking for a home away from home to unwind and relax while visiting the Capital.
review: This we a truly amazing gem in the Albany area.  I felt like I was staying in a suite at a high end boutique hotel.  This stay really added to my Christmas experience.  Thank you for the professional, safe and enjoyable experience.

description: This completely modernized garden-level space provides a charming and unique atmosphere while also being centrally located in the Capital Region of New York.   My partner and I have taken ample time to carefully craft this space to maximize its potential and ensure your enjoyment. Featuring a fully loaded kitchen with stainless steal appliances, marble countertops, exposed brick throughout, tasteful decor, and your own private patio. We truly hope you enjoy this space as much as we do!
review: Todd’s place was great! Great location, very clean & comfortable, and wonderful space overall. Todd was always great with communicating and was very accommodating with everything. Highly recommend staying here and will definitely stay here in any future trips to Albany.

description: Cute single family home in a convenient location with the lots of restaurants, bars and shops right around the corner.    It features  a driveway with covered parking, a nice outdoor area with seating, lounging and a weber 3 burner propane grill.   The home has central air and a 5 person Clearlight Premier IS-5 infrared cedar sauna by Jacuzzi.   My place is close to University of Albany, tennis, shopping malls and plazas, bars, restaurants, the airport, the city center, parks, art and culture.
review: Such a beautiful home! Extremely modern, had everything you could need & super clean! We loved the sauna, it was such a nice bonus. The host is great, very responsive & thankfully let us stay last minute! We’d love to stay again when we’re back in the area!

description: Charming 1 Bedroom + Workstation apartment in Downtown Albany. Centrally located and easy walking! Free Fast and Furious Arcade Game. Pets allowed! 2nd FL apartment with an elevator on site!   Enjoy hardwood floors, a custom kitchen, soaking bathtub, and central AC. Features a Queen bed, pull-out couch, workstation with monitor, and free WiFi. Includes access to a shared washer/dryer.   For long term stays over 1 month, a monthly parking space will be included. Parking garage close by.
review: Almost all was great at this apartment. The host is responsive and helpful, the place is cosy, well furnished, and clean. The only reason why I didn't put five stars everywhere is due to the thin walls. At first, I thought the upstairs neighbor were jumping, because I heard lot of noise. But actually I could hear them walking any time they went across the room. Their pace seemed normal, but the noise was as if they were stepping heavily on the floor. Similarly, the neighbors sharing one of the walls with me were simply talking, but could hear them distinctly.  So just something to consider when choosing this accommodation. Again, everything else was spot on!

description: The Rose Haven space  Welcome to The Rose Haven Apartment! This unique oasis is nestled in the heart of the City of Albany, New York, offering a perfect location near Historic Washington Park. It promises a secluded romantic getaway immersed in the dreamy natural ambiance of Washington Park.   Once you are ready to rest and relax, retreat to the lovely bedroom, where you can recharge after an exciting day of adventuring throughout the City of Albany.
review: If you are traveling alone, I recommend Miguelino’s place! I stayed for only a few days but honestly wished I could’ve stayed longer. It was very comfortable and spacious enough for one person. Beautiful furniture and amenities as well. Each part of the space was paid attention to detail, so it truly exceeded my expectations. Check in was pretty simple and clear and the listing itself is close by to transportation and stores. Would definitely stay here again :)

description: Spacious, comfortable unit less than 10 minutes from downtown Albany, 5 minutes from AlbanyMed, and walking distance to St. Peter's Hospital, Maria College, Buckingham Lake, CVS, and restaurants. Features a dining area with air fryer and microwave (no stove), an office, and basic workout equipment. Ideal for short getaways or extended stays, perfect for traveling nurses, doctors, remote workers, and anyone seeking a peaceful neighborhood.
review: Very cute and private basement apartment. I was very comfortable! Walked to restaurants and CVS. Heard some walking upstairs but never during quiet hours. Great deal!

description: This home is a gorgeous 100 year old Victorian This suite is located on the 2nd floor. All the comforts of home! A very clean and quiet setting makes for a comfortable stay here at the Inn. Perfect for the business traveler or Traveling nurses that have contracts with one of the local hospitals located minutes away.
review: My best stay using Airbnb! It was affordable, clean, organized, quiet, and safe. Thank you!

description: Welcome to this charming room in Albany completely remodeled to the studs in '21! Centrally located in the peaceful Pine Hill neighborhood. It's walking distance to restaurants, bars, grocery store & historic Washington Park. 2 mi to SUNY and 1 mi to Albany Medical. Great for couples, traveling nurse, business professionals. Street parking available in front of the house. Your room is smart TV equipped with live cable for watching all your guilty pleasures, so feel free to bring your own login !
review: room was freezing!  A/C needed to be turned down.  Didn't realize it was a room with shared areas.  Didn't really matter, as I was only there about 8-10 hours, but I expected different.

description: Relax in this conveniently located apartment. Close to Albany, Medical Center, state capital, parks, perfect for legislative worker, traveling, nurses or medical professionals. lots to see and do. You’re blocks from the state capital, and governors mansion. located in the historic mansion District of Albany. Long-term stays are welcome.
review: Thank you Jeffrey! He was very helpful with parking and restaurant recommendations. Note this is on the second floor. I could hear the third floor neighbors above me. Urban area and buildings are run down. Fairly clean. Nothing in the bathroom - not even hand soap so be prepared to bring your own toiletries. I stayed 2 nights. All things considered, amazing place for the price and conveniently located to the city and walkable to where I needed. Would stay again!

description: BEAUTIFULLY renovated and stylish apartment with CHARACTER in a brownstone building. PRIME location in the heart of downtown Albany, minutes from highway and walking distance to popular restaurants, and pubs.   Local attractions including The Egg, Empire State Plaza and Palace Theatre are less than 5 minutes away. 4K Smart TV with Netflix, stocked kitchen & bathroom, high speed internet ready for you to use!   Tenant permit street parking available. Available for long term stays!
review: Everything about this stay was perfect, from the expediency of the booking right down to the stay itself. Very good location. And perfect for the pets!

description: MODERN beautifully furnished apartment with UNIQUE spiral staircase. Newly renovated, cozy and trendy! PRIME location in the heart of downtown Albany and walking distance to popular restaurants, and cafes on Lark Street. Local attractions including The Egg, Empire State Plaza, Times Union Center are less than 5 minutes away. 4K Smart TV with Netflix, stocked kitchen & bathroom, high speed internet ready for you to use! Free street parking. Available for long term stays!
review: A lovely apartment perfect for 1 or 2 people. Looks exactly like the pictures and was very clean. Would definitely stay here again! Thank you Linda.

description: Dog friendly, comfortable home with 3 bedrooms equipped with Chromecast equipped  TVs, comfortable beds, powerful ceiling fans, and vintage wood dressers in each room. Large, private back yard with two decks, grill, and a fire pit. Less than 2 miles from St Peter’s, Albany Medical Center. Off The historic Delaware ave- minutes from  winning restaurants, neat bars, world renowned  Ice Cream parlors, Normanskill Farm/ dog park, and walkable distance to St Rose Sports Park. Right off 787/ 87.
review: Such a beautiful historic home. The backyard was wonderful and more than enough space for my large dog to run back and forth. I would live in the hammock on the front porch. We had such a wonderful time.

description: Perfect place to relax with your family or stopover on a work trip. A quiet, suburban neighborhood that is close enough to everything. 5 min drive to UAlbany and St Peter's Hospital. 15 min drive to downtown Albany. 18 min drive to Albany Int'l Airport. 5-10 min drive to plenty of restaurants and pubs.
review: This home was spotless. Super clean and the beds and linens were SO comfy! Even the towels provided were notable - super soft and fluffy. We were also very thankful for the central air since Albany in mid-August can be very hot and humid. Really like this home, very cute and comfortable. Thanks for the great stay!

description: Welcome to our studio which located at hearth of Albany. Close to Bus Station, Train Station, Business and finance district, MVP Arena, SUNY Albany headquarters, night life and historic places. All kind of restaurant and bars in walking distance. 1 bedroom with queen bed , bathroom and kitchen. Kitchen has all utensils.
review: I had a good time here. I had a slight schedule change, and Edem was super helpful and flexible. Also, the apartment itself was nice and tidy!

description: Place is within 2-3 miles of AMC, St. Peter's,  UAlbany, SUNY, College of St. Rose, Washington park, Empire State Plaza, and many other establishments.  Only 15 minute ride to the airport !
review: Thank you for everything! It was a pleasure staying with you. I will be back soon!

description: Bright, peaceful 2BR unit set just outside Albany’s vibrant Center Square within walking distance to Washington Park, local cafés, restaurants, and downtown attractions. Whether you’re a solo traveler, couple, or family, you’ll find everything you need for a relaxing stay. Sip your morning coffee on the private deck with birdsong in the background, rest in a cozy queen or full bed, and enjoy self check-in, fast Wi-Fi, climate control with A/C and heat, and private garage parking right next door.
review: We had a nice stay. We had an issue with the lock one evening.  Andres answered the phone and let us in promptly.   Host was nice and nice home.

description: Freshly renovated 1 bedroom apartment, directly across the street from Greyhound station.  Fully equipped kichen with all the utensils and instruments you can imagine.   Massive living room, with work space, plenty of room to sit and TV.
review: The apartment was sort of okay. it was clean, small, pretty spartan. But it definitely had a couple of issues. 1 - the bed was completely broken, and was only sturdy on one side. if you shifted your weight too much the bed fell in, sending you crashing to the floor.  I was incredibly uncomfortable the entire stay. 2 - whoever prepared the apartment put the exact same green soap into the soap dispenser by the sink, and both the body wash and shampoo dispenser in the shower.  3 - the booking listed that there was coffee, as well as basic cooking spices and oil. there weren't any, however when I emailed the host, somebody dropped off coffee and some spices a few hours later at the door. 4 - the neighborhood surrounding the apartment is very run down and they were homeless people who asked me for money every time I went out. 5 - the character of the surrounding community wouldn't be so bad if it wasn't for the fact that the the hinges on the back door are broken, and it would be incredibly easy for anyone to break in. 6 - the listed backyard is 100% overgrown, dilapidated, and terrifying.  perhaps this is just what it's like renting in downtown Albany, but the experience felt very underwhelming and basic compared to other airbnbs that I've stayed at. as long as the bed is fixed, and you're just looking for a clean quiet place to rest your head, this Airbnb is fine. but don't expect anything more than that.

description: Experience the comfort of staying in a second room of our centrally located home. Conveniently situated on the main bus line, this residence offers ease of access to the city’s top destinations. Make yourself at home in our shared spaces, which include three serene enclosed porches and two Lovesac bean bags. Whether you’re traveling for work or leisure, our home promises a restful and enjoyable stay. Join us and immerse yourself in a welcoming atmosphere, complete with all the comforts of home.
review: My dad had a great stay. Everything was as described. Thank you!

description: Welcome to your cozy Albany retreat! Enjoy a comfortable stay in this well-appointed space, perfect for travelers looking for convenience and relaxation. Your booking includes free parking and a complimentary breakfast to start your day right. Located near shops, restaurants, and downtown Albany, this home offers easy access to local attractions. Whether you’re here for business or leisure, you’ll love the comfort and convenience of this stay. Book now for a relaxing experience!
review: Overall good experience. Front desk staff are helpful. A little pricy for what we paid for. No microwave and the breakfast could be a little better. The lady who serves doesn’t look very happy. She didn’t allow me to have more than one cup of milk and she said the milk was only for coffee and cereal. What kind of rule is that?

description: "The Red House," an inspiring 4-bedroom, 2nd-floor apartment nestled in the heart of Albany. This charming space features beautifully refinished 130-year-old hardwood floors, creating a warm and inviting atmosphere. A custom stone fireplace, complete with a 50-inch Samsung Smart TV, serves as the focal point of the living area. The kitchen is fully equipped for whipping up a meal. The dishwasher and laundry are conveniently located in the unit. Front and back balconies! Free street parking.
review: Brigid was very responsive! The place looked like the photos. Small but what we needed as a place to stay this trip.

description: 1 bedroom with high ceiling and natural light. Fully stocked kitchen with complimentary Netflix. Centrally located in South End of Albany in converted school. Great value with off street parking included
review: Really loved the apartment itself, and had a great time.  It was spotless and spacious.  I recomend reading all of the reviews.

description: Welcome to this rustic second-floor apartment in Albany, New York! This newly remodeled three-bedroom, one-bath gem is perfect for a comfortable stay for up to six guests. Step into a piece of history with original hardwood floors dating back to 1890. The spacious dining area is ideal for gathering, and the apartment features a 65-inch smart TV for your entertainment needs. Need to catch up on work? We've got you covered with a dedicated work desk. Book now for an unforgettable experience!
review: On short notice we needed a place to stay in Albany after my sister's flight arrival went from 4 pm to 11 pm. Scott responded promptly and everything worked like clockwork. The place was as described, roomy, clean and comfortable. Thank you Scott! I would highly recommend his place to others.

description: One beautiful one bedroom garden level apartment in close proximity to all the best that downtown Albany has to offer. Next to Lark Street, Washington Park, Rockefeller Plaza, Historic State Street, museums, cafes, bars, shopping, and grocery stores. Its a 5 min walk to Albany Med, the VA Hospital, the Albany Law School, Pharmacy School, and Nursing School. 1 mile to Sage College and New Scotland Restaurants.
review: I would stay here again! The sheets were luxurious-so very soft. The washer and dryer are so helpful to have handy. There are places to store luggage/packages in the entryway, the desk and chairs closet gives you a nice place to unpack if you aren’t needing computer space, and if you are using it for business, there are two large tables that can handle suitcases in the bedroom. The laundry room is spacious if you need more room to spread out. The windows open and caught a lovely breeze. I love the keyless entry-nothing to lose 😆. The bed is HUGE, but no nightstand. There is an outlet against the far wall that I used and left my electronics in the bedroom to charge. Very enjoyable stay. ✅

description: This home is a gorgeous 100 year old Victorian   This suite is located on the 2nd floor. All the comforts of home! Tv and mini fridge in room.  We supply towels, linens and starter toiletries.  A very clean and quiet setting makes  for a comfortable stay here at the Inn.
review: Wonderful stay! A short way to Albany Med and Washington park. I felt very safe. There were other people in the house, but I rarely saw and heard them.

description: This home is a gorgeous 100 year old Victorian   This suite is located on the 2nd floor. All the comforts of home! Tv and mini fridge in room.  We supply towels, linens and starter toiletries.  A very clean and quiet setting makes  for a comfortable stay here at the Inn.
review: Bela was incredible with communication. The room was quiet and having the private bathroom was great. My daughter and I enjoyed our stay in Albany.

description: Welcome to our newly renovated 4BR/2BA Dutch-inspired cottage on 1.5 private acres in a forest setting. Perfect for family/friend gatherings. Enjoy an open floor plan with a fully equipped kitchen, cozy living, and all the modern amenities you need for a relaxing visit.  Located only a few minutes from downtown Albany, SUNY Albany, AMC & Albany College of Pharmacy.
review: We thoroughly enjoyed our stay at the cottage! The space was perfect for our family gathering. There was plenty of room inside and outside to enjoy time together, and great restaurants (and ice cream!) nearby. The home was exactly as described, and as in the photos. It was clean and comfortable, with a thermastat on each level of the house. The kitchen was perfectly stocked and had lots of spices for cooking. There was also coffee and snacks when we arrived. We would book it again!

description: Urban Oasis!  2nd Floor master bedroom in residential home.  Queen sized bed. Private bath. Mini-refrigerator, microwave and sitting area in room. Shared entrance but access to full kitchen, bath, bedroom, laundry and parking. Walking distance to Albany Med, Albany Pharmacy, Albany Law School, College of St. Rose and Sage College.  On Main bus line.  10 minute drive from downtown
review: I stayed a night at Ed's place and it was a very pleasant experience. Easy to get in and out of the house. Very close to Albani Med. Ed was very accomodating to all my requests and answered my questions instantly.

description: This is Albany’s best! Enjoy a cozy stay in one of Albany’s oldest and most unique homes. This historic farmhouse was built in 1821 and completely restored and renovated in 2010. Your room is the master suite complete with a deep soaking tub, remote controlled gas fireplace, king size bed, single pull out American Leather couch, and double sinks. The pool is open from May until October. Hot tub is open year round. Enjoy a perfect romantic getaway!
review: It was my first time staying in a airbnb and Thomas made the experience better than could have imagined! Thomas was quick and friendly when answering any questions I had! I will definitely be coming back!

description: Bright, peaceful 2BR unit set just outside Albany’s vibrant Center Square—within walking distance to Washington Park, local cafés, restaurants, and downtown attractions. Whether you’re a solo traveler, couple, or family, you’ll find everything you need for a relaxing stay. Sip your morning coffee on the private deck, rest in cozy beds, and enjoy self check-in, fast Wi-Fi, and climate control for year-round comfort. A reserved garage spot is included for your convenience.
review: We loved our stay here! It was clean and had everything we needed for our short stay in Albany. The beds were very comfortable and the outside porch was a plus. It is also only a 10 minute walk from the Albany capital center which was great. Perfect for what we needed and if I ever return to Albany I will book again.

description: BOOK this 1st floor apt in a renovated historic 200 year-old building in a quiet neighborhood of Albany's Pastures. Great location near Albany Medical Center, Times Union Center, Empire State Plaza, Library, Lark Street, State Offices, courts; easy access to local & regional bus routes and highways (I-787, I-90 & I-87). Great for traveling nurses!  1 Queen sized bed, and 1 Queen sized air mattress.  Save & BOOK this unit today! Message me anytime. Hope to welcome you soon!  -Earl
review: Great tidy place. Sheet and linens were clean and the check in was great. Earl communicated early and often. Would recommend.

We are pet friendly.   *Please note, this unit is on the second and third floor of a four family unit. Two flights of stairs upon entrance. No parties*
review: Amazing place to stay for a trip. The host was very responsive and great to talk to. Super easy instructions to get inside. In the middle of downtown Albany so you had access to so much stuff, but till tuckeck away in a nice neighborhood that it was quiet at night. Beautiful interior and would visit again next time im visiting family!

description: Guests will enjoy this fully renovated smart home one bed/bath ground level appt with elegant touches. The living space features a sleeper sofa, rotating 65 inch smart LED TV and window AC unit. This space is also open to a 4 seat Dining table, movable 3 seat bench and an updated kitchen. Kitchen is fully equipped with the cooking necessities.  The bedroom includes a 55 inch smart LED TV and desktop workspace and window AC unit. Stackable washer/dryer appliances are available as well.
review: Great, clean place! Everything as advertised. Definitely worth it

description: This fully furnished 2-bedroom bungalow is ideal for monthly stays (30+ nights) and includes utilities, high-speed Wi-Fi, and in-unit laundry. Located just 10 minutes from Albany Medical Center and St. Peter’s Health Partners, it's perfect for travel nurses, digital nomads, corporate professionals, relocating families, or those visiting for medical care. A comfortable and convenient home base for work, family, or exploring New York’s capital region.
review: 10/10 everything was superb and perfect. The house itself is so cute and cozy and well equipped! I felt right at home. The backyard is a nice touch and location is excellent! I LOVED the sun room. I will miss this house very much- I highly recommend this house if you’re staying in Albany. Truly can’t imagine renting a better space!

description: Welcome to our garden apartment, nestled in a walkable neighborhood filled with diverse restaurants, cozy pubs, and the picturesque Washington Park. The apartment features a sound-dampened bedroom, ensuring a serene and peaceful retreat. Just steps away, you'll find the New York State Capitol, Empire State Plaza, The Egg, and the New York State Museum, making this location ideal for both relaxation and exploration.
review: Great place to stay, no matter what your purpose of stay is! Very well built unit with all amenities provided. Ben was very responsive and helpful with check-in times! Worth a stay if you’re in Albany!

description: Dog friendly, comfortable home with 3 bedrooms equipped with Chromecast equipped  TVs, comfortable beds, powerful ceiling fans, and vintage wood dressers in each room. Large, private back yard with two decks, grill, and a fire pit. Less than 2 miles from St Peter’s, Albany Medical Center. Off The historic Delaware ave- minutes from  winning restaurants, neat bars, world renowned  Ice Cream parlors, Normanskill Farm/ dog park, and walkable distance to St Rose Sports Park. Right off 787/ 87.
review: Anthony's place is ideally located if you want to explore the surrounding area - it is so close to it all.  It is best suited for those with dogs as the place is super accomodating for them (we have never seen a better setup for those traveling with their lovely pets!).   Please know, the only reason our rating is not higher is due is because we would have appreciated a heads-up about the ongoing construction in front of the house.  Otherwise, the place is great for exploring the area, bringing pets, and unwind with the lovely backyard, full kitchen, and laundry on site.

A very clean and quiet setting makes for a comfortable stay here at the Inn. Perfect for the business traveler or Traveling nurses that have contracts with one of the local hospitals located minutes away.
review: Great host(s). very easy to contact if needed,  place as described,  super close to AMC which is great for medical travel nurses/ etc.  always clean and quiet.

description: This Suite has been refurbished completely. A beautiful and comfortable Suite that has everything a guest needs! Nice decor with a queen bed, desk, cable TV, WiFi, ironing board, blow dryer and your own private bath. Private entrance close to front of house.  The Inn at South Lake is a large Victorian with multiple dorm style suites. Each suite has it's own private lock. A very quiet, professional atmosphere .
review: Great space and location. Easy to check in and the host was excellent. Highly recommended.

description: Newly renovated, modern and bright! Live in style in the heart of downtown Albany. Located at a PRIME location and walking distance to popular restaurants, and cafes on Lark Street. description: Our recently remodeled one-bedroom apartment boasts a park view, easy parking and is close to downtown Albany. We have an easy walk to groceries, Government Buildings, Albany Law School, College of Pharmacy, VA and Albany Medical Center Hospitals, and Lark Street restaurants and nightlife. The living area features a queen size futon and views of the sunset most evenings, and the bedroom features a luxurious queen-sized memory foam bed and access to our quiet garden where the sun rises.
review: We stayed at James’ place for 5 months and overall had a great experience with this host. He was very responsive, quick to address any issues we were facing with the property, and even provided clean linens and towels every other week. Internet was fast and reliable which made it a great choice for digital nomads like us. We also travelled with our two cats who loved having the extra wide window sill to lounge in. We did have some trouble with water intrusion into the space due to foundation and grading problems but James was set to resolve these issues after our stay. We hope they were addressed and will not continue to affect future guests. While the space lacks a washer/dryer there are laundromats nearby and not having to wash our own linens was a big plus and very considerate of the landlord. The bed was extremely comfortable and there are plenty of places to set up a laptop for remote work. A full size fridge and oven are a luxury not found at most stays. Highly recommended!

Features Queen bed, pull-out couch, full kitchen, Wi-Fi, and in-unit laundry.  Quick access to I-787, I-90, and Amtrak. More space, comfort, and convenience than a hotel—book now!

review: I will try to be as objective as possible. The area is so-so. There are def some homeless people around and parking can be a little annoying, I wouldn’t necessarily want to walk alone at night here.  To be fair, Erion was very responsive and kind in communication.  My girlfriend and I had issues with the cleanliness and condition of the apartment. My gf checked in and didn’t feel great about the condition. There were spots all over the kitchen counter, coffee table, and floors. No cleaning supplies were really available, so she actually had to go to Target to buy supplies (including bath towels), and then wipe down and sweep the place herself.  We were given one roll of toilet paper and no tp holder. Also, there were no towel holders, not to mention the bath towels smelled pretty bad. The shower needs a deep cleaning and a new curtain. Overall, the place isn’t the worst, but not as clean or updated as can be. At least, please provide some cleaning supplies.

review: Good apartment. Terrible customer service. “Diana” doesn't exist. The apt. is owned by a large property management co. They use chat bots for their airbnb inbox that can't actually answer any questions and just send generic replies. It's difficult to get through to a human. They didn't provide basic info ahead of time like the door code, wifi login, parking info, laundry room access, etc. When a human did finally respond, they were rude. Apparently I'm an idiot for thinking that the parking lot labeled Schuyler Apartments was the right lot. When I asked about laundry, they told me there's no laundry on the 2nd floor where the apt. is, only the 1st & 3rd. But there is laundry on the 2nd fl, and it is in working order. They lied to me for no reason.  The apt. itself is very nice. It was clean & they supplied everything like extra trash bags. Main gripe is that it was VERY dark in the apartment.
