Everything you've been looking forward right at your finger tips.   >Nearby ○ 3 Min to Saint Rose  ○ 4 min to St Peters ○ 7 min to Albany MED ○ 5 Min to Lark Street ○ 7 Min to Downtown ○ 7 Min to SUNY Albany ○ 8 Min to Palace Theater
review: I have been staying at Diana’s place whenever I visit family in Albany. I like everything about it!  Comfortable, convenient, and clean. Its location works best for me!  Close to restaurants, shopping, grocery stores, and most important- family!

description: Step into the comfort of this beautiful light-filled, cozy 1 bedroom apartment minutes from hospitals, parks, and great restaurants. Very walkable location next to Albany medical center.  ~fast wi-fi ~fully equipped kitchen ~55” smart tv ~free off street parking ~ contactless self check-in
review: Super close to the hospital. I walked there everyday. As a med student looking for a temporary living, this place was perfect for me. You can basically walk everywhere. Super nice host too:)

description: Cute single family home in a convenient location with the lots of restaurants, bars and shops right around the corner.    It features  a driveway with covered parking, a nice outdoor area with seating, lounging and a weber 3 burner propane grill.   The home has central air and a 5 person Clearlight Premier IS-5 infrared cedar sauna by Jacuzzi.   My place is close to University of Albany, tennis, shopping malls and plazas, bars, restaurants, the airport, the city center, parks, art and culture.
review: Peter’s place was spotless. Very clean and very comfortable. The car port is especially great when it rains or snows. Could not fault the property. Highly recommended. Look forward to coming back next time when we are in Albany. Within walking distance to UAlbany and City Line bar and grill so very convenient.

description: Our recently remodeled one-bedroom apartment boasts a park view, easy parking and is close to downtown Albany. We have an easy walk to groceries, Government Buildings, Albany Law School, College of Pharmacy, VA and Albany Medical Center Hospitals, and Lark Street restaurants and nightlife. The living area features a queen size futon and views of the sunset most evenings, and the bedroom features a luxurious queen-sized memory foam bed and access to our quiet garden where the sun rises.
review: Comfortable, well laid out space, convenient to lots of amenities. Street parking with some rules you need to be aware of. Not a huge space, but perfect for a single or couple. Kitchen and bathroom had everything I needed. James was very responsive to the questions I had. Would definitely stay here again when the need arises.

description: Welcome to our lovely 1-bedroom apartment nestled in a quiet residential area of Albany. Just a short stroll from Market 32 and local restaurants, this location is ideal. With St. Rose College nearby, Downtown Albany a 7-minute drive away, 10 minute walk to MVP area, Albany Med just 4 minutes walk, and Saint Peters only 5 minutes driving, convenience is at your fingertips. The apartment is part of a 4-unit house, offering privacy and thick walls for a noise-free environment.
review: Super convenient, loved the lay out and location. Place was also super clean. Will stay again 🥰‼️

description: Urban Oasis!  2nd Floor guest bedroom in residential home.  Shared entrance.  Access to full kitchen, shared bath, bedroom, laundry and parking. Walking distance to Albany Med, Albany Pharmacy, Albany Law School, College of St. Rose and Sage College.  On Main bus line.  10 minute drive from downtown
review: Ed was very friendly and welcoming! Room was also very clean. Great stay overall!

description: Newly renovated one bedroom, loft style apartment. Centrally located in the Mansion neighborhood in albany. Huge spacious open layout with walk in closet. Big screen tvs, with super fast internet (400 mps). On-site laundry, with locked off street parking. Spectacular views of downtown Albany. Walking distance to empire state plaza, the egg, times union, and excellent bars, restaurants, and delis. Great value for anyone staying in albany long or short term.
review: Micheal is a great host. The place is awesome and is really a gem for Albany. I was not fond of the area it is in being a young and solo female traveller, but would be fine for most people especially couples. However,  Michael has done everything possible including the private parking to mitigate as much as possible. Always felt very safe within the building with his security measures as well.  The place itself is lovely. Private parking, washer dryer, ac, a nice kitchen, spacious bathroom. I enjoyed my stay at Micheal’s

description: Spacious, comfortable unit less than 10 minutes from downtown Albany, 5 minutes from AlbanyMed, and walking distance to St. Peter's Hospital, Maria College, Buckingham Lake, CVS, and restaurants. Features a dining area with air fryer and microwave (no stove), an office, and basic workout equipment. Ideal for short getaways or extended stays, perfect for traveling nurses, doctors, remote workers, and anyone seeking a peaceful neighborhood.
review: I stayed here for a month for work and Hasan was a great host. He would check in now and then and was always responsive. The apartment was clean and quiet. The neighborhood was very nice.  Would definitely recommend.

description: Welcome to our Newly Renovated, three bedroom two bathroom apartment. ☺️ Please note, this apartment is located in a Four Family Apartment Complex.   We are located in a walkable neighborhood within the charming Melrose area, located less than ten minutes from the University of Albany, downtown Albany, as well as many restaurants and attractions! We are pet friendly.   *Please note, this unit is on the second and third floor of a four family unit. Two flights of stairs upon entrance. No parties*
review: Excellent host!  Although we didn't meet our host, he was very communicative, provided any information we needed and the check-in/checkout system was flawless.  The space is spacious, immaculate, well stocked and comfortable. The beds are comfortable as well and seemed new, The pictures so not do the space justice, as the apartment was better than expected!  We have no complaints, and the three bedrooms are very private from each other.  With three couples, there is plenty pf room for "separation."  The neighborhood was nice and seemed very safe and was great for walking our dog. One of the best Airbnb's we have stayed at, and we plan on returning.

description: This full apartment is located on the 3rd floor in this beautiful Victorian. All the comforts of home. Nothing shared,has a full bathtub,full kitchen,one bedroom with a queen bed. Living room and an office,located next to Albany Medical Center and close to law schools and universities.
review: I stayed with Bela/Laurie for a month for my away rotation at Albany Medical Center. The 3rd floor apartment was spotless, quiet, and just a short walk from the hospital. Bela/Laurie was very accommodating and always quick to respond to messages. I had such a stress-free, lovely stay at the house. I would highly recommend their place and would stay with them again.

description: Our recently remodeled one-bedroom apartment boasts a park view, easy parking and is close to downtown Albany. We have an easy walk to groceries, Government Buildings, Albany Law School, College of Pharmacy, VA and Albany Medical Center Hospitals, and Lark Street restaurants and nightlife. The living area features a queen size futon and views of the sunset most evenings, and the bedroom features a luxurious queen-sized memory foam bed and access to our quiet garden where the sun rises.
review: Great value for a very stylish garden apt. Clean, fully equipped kitchen, stocked with breakfast favorites. Can’t go wrong at James’s place !

description: Urban Oasis!  2nd Floor guest bedroom in residential home.  Shared entrance.  Shared bath with one other guest room.  Use of kitchen and washer/dryer. Street parking.  Use of driveway, if necessary.  Walking distance to Albany Med, Albany Pharmacy, Albany Law School, College of St. Rose and Sage College.  On Main bus line.  10 minute drive from downtown.
review: Here for a quick sleep and was great. Room was clean, bed was comfy, temperature was regulated within room. I would stay here again if I ever come back to Albany.

description: Newly renovated single family home in the heart of Albany. The house is equipped with everything you need including the all important Nespresso coffee machine. You will find it warm and homey, but also simple and free of clutter that prevent you from making the space feel like your own. I want you to enjoy the freedom that comes with staying in an Air BnB and the comfort you would expect from a boutique hotel. Enjoy the fenced in backyard equipped with grill, firpit and hammock. Hello summer
review: Diana was a fantastic host and the house on Fullerton St in Albany had everything we needed.  Our family was relocating from California and temporarily staying in Albany for a month while we looked for a more permanent place to call home downstate.  Our little tribe, including a baby and two cats, were comfortable in this spacious home with a nice open back yard that our 18 month-old loved playing in every day.  The kitchen was another favorite hang-out spot, as was the attic bedroom. The home was great for a long stay.  Plenty of amenities - towels, sheets, bedding, etc. as well as cooking supplies - pots, pans, etc.  I highly recommend Diana's home for your short or long-term stay.

description: Welcome to our Newly Renovated, three bedroom two bathroom apartment. ☺️ Please note, this apartment is located in a Four Family Apartment Complex.   We are located in a walkable neighborhood within the charming Melrose area, located less than ten minutes from the University of Albany, downtown Albany, as well as many restaurants and attractions! We are pet friendly.   *Please note, this unit is on the second and third floor of a four family unit. Two flights of stairs upon entrance. No parties*
review: What a great stay!  From the moment we walked through the door we felt right at home. The neighbhood is very quiet, and centrally located near lots of restaurants, shopping. Our hosts were extremely helpful throughout our stay and were very responsive! Although it was a very hot weekend in Albany, it was nice and cool in the apartment with plenty of air conditioners and fans available. We loved the area, the apartment, and we cannot wait to come back!

description: This home is a gorgeous 100 year old Victorian   This suite is located on the 2nd floor. All the comforts of home! Tv and mini fridge in room.  We supply towels, linens and starter toiletries.  A very clean and quiet setting makes  for a comfortable stay here at the Inn.
review: Have no doubt in booking this stay! This was by far the most amazing AirBnB stay I’ve had. The hosts are hospitable and make sure you have everything you need for a comfortable stay. The location is quiet, and there’s off-street parking (which is a big plus in NY).

description: This unique place has a style all its own. Three levels of space all to yourself. Central located in Downtown Albany. Fully stocked kitchen to make meals at home or plenty of near by restaurants to explore. Spacious bedroom with attached bathroom. Work area to get some work done before hanging out to catch up on some Netflix shows. Your home away from home for a night or more of you choose.
review: I love this place. I’ve been getting it for like past 5 years. It’s great for when I just want to get away and have some peace and quietness.

description: My place is close to University of Albany, shopping malls and plazas, bars, restaurants, the airport, the city center, parks, art and culture. You’ll love my place because of the location, the ambiance, the outdoors space, fully renovated, newly furnished, nice yard, awesome double rear deck,  open floor plan and central air.   My place is good for couples, solo adventurers, business travelers, families (with kids), big groups, and furry friends ($50 pet fee w/ booties included).
review: I travel - a lot - at the time of the stay, I had over 150 nights in hotels & AirBnB for the year, this was the first time I truly felt like it was a home away from home. My wife, dogs, and I could have stayed there indefinitely and will choose Peter's home if we come to Albany with the dogs again. Very satisfied.

description: Enjoy a stylish experience at this centrally-located place. Upper duplex recently renovated to make room for a lovely trip to Albany. Well appointed 1st floor offers kitchen/livingroom full bath. 2nd floor has 2 bedrooms and an additional full bathroom. Tons of natural light provides a peaceful space. Walk out front door to explore neighborhood. Lark street, capital, convention center are all within 15 minutes of walking
review: Diana’s place was perfect for our overnight stay.  Comfortable space downstairs and beds were super comfortable! Centrally located with many restaurants and bars close by.  Safe quiet street and was able to find street parking without any issues.  Would definitely stay again if in this area.

description: Come relax in this one bedrm garden apt. The living room has a sofa that can be used as a 2nd queen bed. Fully stocked kitchen for those who love to cook,  rainfall shower head, and private on site laundry. There is a gym in the garage (which is a shared space).  Private patio. Located in a home that has cultivated an ecosystem for years. Enjoy songbirds  and crickets. Walking distance to public transit & restaurants 10 minute car to downtown for dance/music.
review: This quiet apartment is on in a tree lined residential area. Comfortable and private, I found it a great place to relax, do a little meal prep. and walk around some green spaces in the U Albany campus . David is a very responsive host who provides a clear information/instructions manual, with local recommendations. It was a pleasure to stay here and I would love to visit again in the future.  Thanks David.

description: This cozy first-floor apartment is perfect for a comfortable stay in a prime location. It's within walking distance to local hospitals, colleges, and just steps away from Madison Ave and Lark St, known for their vibrant restaurants, bars, and shops. Ideal for those visiting for work, school, or leisure, the apartment offers a charming and convenient base to explore the best of the area. Whether you're here for a short trip or longer stay, you'll feel right at home!
review: Very sweet and accommodating. The apartment was perfect for my partner and I to stay during visiting the area for an event. Off street parking made it less stressful about worrying about getting parking. Close to other hotels and in town and even the hospital if needed. Highly recommend 😊

description: IF YOUR PRIORITY IS GOOD NEIGHBORHOOD AND FANCY CLEAN HOUSE”DO NOT PRFER US” IF YOUR PRIORITY IS “””SAFETY PLACE,GREEN LIFE AND ORGANIC NUTRITION””” YOU PREFER US Important notice We updated our cleaning protocol duo to COVID-19 pandemic.  This room is not 5 stars hotel room.  Before booking,read carefully about room description. Breakfast free,Wi Fi high speed internet We don't use chemical cleaning stuff.We use Vinegar,baking powder,biological pesticides .
review: This was definitely a unique experience! Adam made me a very delicious breakfast both mornings. I think this would be a great place to rent with a friend or relative in the other bedroom. The bed was warm and I slept like a rock! :)

description: IF YOUR PRIORITY IS GOOD NEIGHBORHOOD AND FANCY CLEAN HOUSE”DO NOT PRFER US” IF YOUR PRIORITY IS “””SAFETY PLACE,GREEN LIFE AND ORGANIC NUTRITION””” YOU PREFER US Important notice We updated our cleaning protocol duo to COVID-19 pandemic.  This room is not 5 stars hotel room.  Before booking,read carefully about room description. Breakfast free,Wi Fi high speed internet We don't use chemical cleaning stuff.We use Vinegar,baking powder,biological pesticides .
review: Adam's place is probably the best Airbnb I've stayed at. He is incredibly welcoming and generous. Not only did he pick me up from the bus station, he also gave me a ride across town for an interview. He makes individual meals for each of his guests (depending on their gluten, fat, vegan, ect. preferences). His building has a cafe on the first floor where he prepares the meals. The place has a bohemian/international feel of a hostel. Even when I said that it was unnecessary for him to make me lunch because I wasn't staying for very long, he made me a brown bag lunch to go. I would have loved to stay another night but unfortunately, the place was booked, and now you know why. Thanks Adam, you are an amazing host.

description: Our spacious 2048 sq. ft. 5 bedroom. 2 bath, house is the perfect place for serious minded groups.   We welcome business travelers and family travelers looking for a quiet, sanitized gorgeous home for extended stays in the city. Our reviews emphasize that we offer the comfortable accommodations to meet all of your needed expectations. Welcome to Albany
review: Everything was perfect and the home was bigger than we though. I was even allowed to bring my own small grill and grill a proper steak. I’m 6’6 and that rain shower was a blessing!! Great time!!

description: Our recently remodeled one-bedroom apartment boasts a park view, easy parking and is close to downtown Albany. We have an easy walk to groceries, Government Buildings, Albany Law School, College of Pharmacy, VA and Albany Medical Center Hospitals, and Lark Street restaurants and nightlife. The living area features a queen size futon and views of the sunset most evenings, and the bedroom features a luxurious queen-sized memory foam bed and access to our quiet garden where the sun rises.
review: This apartment was perfect for our family's weekend visit in Albany! Both kids were comfy staying in the open living space. James provided an extra air mattress upon request so each kid could have their own bed. James was very responsive and gave us leads for finding a convenient barber shop. The apartment is newly renovated,very clean, quiet and comfortable. The location is central, within blocks of Lark Street. We hope to stay here again on future visits to Albany.

description: Enjoy a comfortable stay in a truly one of a kind home in Albany. This former retreat has  loads of amenities to enjoy; two dining room, two living rooms, three porches, a full kitchen, huge yard, gazebo, coffee bar and more! The room has a desk and TV. Walk to eateries, grocery, and cinema.
review: Stay at this place .    It is a FABULOUS manor house that has been styled with class and creative flair.   Old wood has been preserved.   Modern updates.   Gorgeous art.  Room was so clean and comfy.   Only problem for me was that my stay was super short.   I’m finding an excuse to go back to Albany.   Thank you!

description: Our spacious 2048 sq. ft. 5 bedroom. 2 bath, house is the perfect place for serious minded groups.   We welcome business travelers and family travelers looking for a quiet, sanitized gorgeous home for extended stays in the city. Our reviews emphasize that we offer the comfortable accommodations to meet all of your needed expectations. Welcome to Albany
review: My family of 7 enjoyed our stay and found the house, clean and comfortable.  Location is in st Peter’s hospital area and worked perfectly for us as we were in town for a funeral.  Place worked well for us and we would stay again.

description: - No pets - No smoking or vaping - No parties or events - Directly across from Albany Academy - 1 mile from Albany Medical Center - 5.3 miles from UAlbany - Under 2 miles from Washington Park & Empire State Plaza - Just over 2 miles from The Egg & MVP Arena - Take a day trip to Lake George or Saratoga Springs! - King sized bed - Two spacious living rooms - Fully equipped kitchen - High-speed WiFi - Private parking
review: We enjoyed our one night stay at Stephanie’s place.  Had a good night’s rest and then coffee in the morning. We had everything we needed for the six of us. Stephanie kept in touch and offered herself if we needed anything. 😀

description: Once a retreat, then a convent—now it’s your cozy home away from home. Enjoy a well-lit room with a Purple Hybrid 4 queen bed, desk, and 75" TV. Relax in two family rooms, cook in the spacious kitchen, or sip coffee on one of four enclosed porches. Walk to groceries, restaurants, and the movies, or hop on the bus right outside. Whether for a short trip or long stay, comfort and community await you here.
review: It was awesome! Very clear communication, clean room and such. No issues!

description: Dog friendly, comfortable home with 3 bedrooms equipped with Chromecast equipped  TVs, comfortable beds, powerful ceiling fans, and vintage wood dressers in each room. Large, private back yard with two decks, grill, and a fire pit. Less than 2 miles from St Peter’s, Albany Medical Center. Off The historic Delaware ave- minutes from  winning restaurants, neat bars, world renowned  Ice Cream parlors, Normanskill Farm/ dog park, and walkable distance to St Rose Sports Park. Right off 787/ 87.
review: Perfect spot for anyone taking the NY State Bar Exam or just looking for a comfortable place to stay. The house is very clean, the rooms are spacious, and there’s a nice backyard that’s great for relaxing. It’s also pet-friendly, so you can have friends, family, or pets join you. A great place to hang out and feel at home.

description: Charming 1 Bedroom + Workstation apartment in Downtown Albany. Centrally located and easy walking! Free Fast and Furious Arcade Game. Pets allowed! 2nd FL apartment with an elevator on site!   Enjoy hardwood floors, a custom kitchen, soaking bathtub, and central AC. Features a Queen bed, pull-out couch, workstation with monitor, and free WiFi. Includes access to a shared washer/dryer.   For long term stays over 1 month, a monthly parking space will be included. Parking garage close by.
review: The space was perfect for a short weekend in Albany and had all the amenities we needed.  Close to downtown bars and restaurants and near the Riverfront Park.  We would definitely stay again when in Albany.

description: Step into the charming and comfy 1BR/1BA apartment in the heart of Albany, NY. It promises a relaxing retreat bordering picturesque Washington Park and funky Lark Street while being within walking distance to the vibrant downtown, which offers easy access to restaurants, shops, and exciting attractions.  The lovely design and the prime location will leave you in awe.  ✔ Comfy Queen Bedroom ✔ Open Design Living ✔ Fully Equipped Kitchen ✔ Smart TV ✔ High-Speed Wi-Fi ✔ Free Parking  See more below!
review: Great location, easy to get into the building and apartment. However this place was extremely dirty. From the kitchen to the living room to the bathroom, the place also smelled really bad due to a big hole in the living room floor. Pictures are as described BUT it is unclean. They were not lying when they said FUNKY.

description: This tastefully decorated room has more than enough space for you to get cozy by the fire. A queen size bed, couch, sitting chair, and oversize beanbag all welcome you to this very comfortable space. The bathroom is shared with one other guest room. There is a half bath on the first floor shared with the entire house as well as an outdoor shower.
review: Comfy bed and very friendly and accommodating hosts. I originally planned to come by myself and was so fortunate to be able to add my elderly mom at the last minute. The only thing I had difficulty with was figuring out how the door code worked. We arrived for check-in close to 10 pm and there was no light on at the front door, so it was difficult to see the keypad. Other than that very minor issue, everything was wonderful!

description: Welcome to Capital City Escape, a stylish  3-bedroom, 1.5-bathroom home in the heart of Albany, NY.   This newly renovated space offers all the comforts of home, including a fully equipped kitchen, washer and dryer, and a sleek, contemporary design. Whether you're planning a family getaway or a fun trip with friends, this cozy yet sophisticated retreat is the perfect place to relax and explore Albany!
review: The house was extremely nice — my family really enjoyed how clean and well-kept it was. We also loved the modern finishes throughout the home. It felt very cozy and welcoming, with plenty of space for our group (4 adults and 2 children). We especially appreciated having two bathrooms — a huge plus! The only minor issue was that the central A/C took a bit longer to cool down the second floor, but thankfully the host provided a portable A/C unit that helped speed things up. Overall, we had a great stay and would definitely stay here again!

description: Place is within 2-3 miles of AMC, St. Peter's,  UAlbany, SUNY, College of St. Rose, Washington park, Empire State Plaza, and many other establishments.  Only 15 minute ride to the airport !
review: No complaints! Cozy room for a couple days. Quiet neighborhood

description: This tastefully decorated room has more than enough space for you to get cozy by the fire. A queen size bed, couch, sitting chair, and oversize beanbag all welcome you to this very comfortable space. The bathroom is shared with one other guest room. There is a half bath on the first floor shared with the entire house as well as an outdoor shower.
review: Thomas is an experienced host, and he takes the work seriously. He was engaged and responsive and a pleasure to talk with. The room in which I stayed was spacious and comfortable. The house is beautiful and full of fun artwork. I hadn't realized there were resident dogs, but it worked out fine. The pups were easy going and friendly after the initial excitement of having a stranger at the door, and they were quiet through the evening.

description: This beautifully renovated and brightly decorated brownstone in historic Albany is your perfect getaway. Located just minutes from charming downtown, guests can enjoy all Albany has to offer.   This spacious bedroom and living area has an abundance of natural light creates a very comfortable environment! This property comes with a fully stocked kitchen, in unit washer/dryer, free resident lot parking, and a fenced shared backyard with bbq for guests to enjoy.  Long term stays available.
review: Aft are a daunting two flights of stair we entered this beautiful apartment with all the amenities we needed. My wife loves to cook so we made full use of the kitchen.  Everything was impeccably clean. Great experience

description: Welcome to this charming room in Albany completely remodeled to the studs in '21! Centrally located in the peaceful Pine Hill neighborhood. It's walking distance to restaurants, bars, grocery store & historic Washington Park. 2 mi to SUNY and 1 mi to Albany Medical. Great for couples, traveling nurse, business professionals. Street parking available in front of the house. Your room is smart TV equipped with live cable for watching all your guilty pleasures, so feel free to bring your own login !
review: Great place to stay! Quiet, relaxing and close to everything. Can’t wait to go back again!

description: This fully furnished 2-bedroom bungalow is ideal for monthly stays (30+ nights) and includes utilities, high-speed Wi-Fi, and in-unit laundry. Located just 10 minutes from Albany Medical Center and St. Peter’s Health Partners, it's perfect for travel nurses, digital nomads, corporate professionals, relocating families, or those visiting for medical care. A comfortable and convenient home base for work, family, or exploring New York’s capital region.
review: Great stay exactly as described. Cozy, super comfy beds, and great heat. I loved my stay and couldn’t have asked for more

description: Enjoy a spacious yet cozy home in a quiet neighborhood with off-street parking. Minutes from restaurants, shopping, universities (UAlbany, Sage, St. Rose), parks, museums, hospitals(Albany Med, St.Peters) and State Capital Offices for those traveling for business.  We’re right off the main highway leading to the World Famous Saratoga Race Track (30 min) and Adirondack Mountains/Lake George (50 min)!   From this Air Force Family to yours, welcome to our home.
review: Our work crew stayed here while in the area. It is a great house! Lots of space, well appointed kitchen, great neighborhood. Everything was super clean and the beds were comfortable. Plenty of space for a larger group. Hosts were both proactive and responsive when we had a question.  We would highly recommend staying here and would again in the future if we are back in the area.

Right off 787/ 87.
review: House as described. Our puppy and kids enjoyed the fenced-in yard. Anthony is a responsive host.

Hello summer
review: Lovely place, clean and nicely decorated, as advertised. Very easy to communicate with Diana and we appreciated her flexibility in checking in a little early. I had family in town and they stayed here and were quite happy.

description: 4800ft of living space and an epic backyard make this historic home a true gem. The blueprints for the Jesse Buel House reside in the Library of Congress…for real. The pool is enormous and OPEN TIL early NOV! Hot tub open all year. There is enough furniture for everyone to get cozy. Two kitchens, a billiard room, OLED TVs, luxurious mattresses and eclectic décor make this home truly one of a kind. 35 minutes to Saratoga Race Track with loads of other fantastic attractions within an hour drive.
review: Amazing home! Thomas was there to meet us and even provide a quick tour. Photos in the listing are outdated as tons of renovations have been done. He definitely over delivered! We were able to host a Christmas eve dinner for 13 people, and the space provided was more than enough. We'll definitely want to stay here again!

description: Our spacious 2048 sq. ft. 5 bedroom. 2 bath, house is the perfect place for serious minded groups.   We welcome business travelers and family travelers looking for a quiet, sanitized gorgeous home for extended stays in the city. Our reviews emphasize that we offer the comfortable accommodations to meet all of your needed expectations. Welcome to Albany
review: The house is conveniently located in Albany NY. It has 5 bed rooms. Each of them has its own air conditioner, which handful meets everyone’s needs. Michael is a great owner. He worked an extra mile to ensure our stay as comfortable as we needs. He especially brought brand new soft/light weight comforters for our stay. We greatly appreciate Michael hosting us in each caring way! He made our trip in Albany memorable.

description: Pack lightly. 4th floor 1BR walkup in a safe area downtown Albany.Street parking only.There is public transit.Ideal for quiet: working professionals 1 day visits, Bar Exam takers, interns, job interviewees. Across the street fromNYS Capitol,NYS Education office, Cathedral, SUNY Albany Downtown,State Exams, I787, Route 9,Washington square park, and all fine dining/Lark Street, LGBTQIA+ friendly. 5 min  Greyhound bus. Seeking friends. I am a parent and student who is at the library often.
review: The big positive was that the space was large and it was located next to some awesome historic buildings in the heart of town. The big negative was that it was disgustingly dirty and the host was a bit flaky. Asked me not to talk to the neighbors. asked me about my wedding ring and didn’t do a good job telling me about the space.

description: Charming 5 room bed and breakfast located across from Washington Park in Albany, NY. Each room has a private bathroom and workstation. Guests have access to a shared kitchen, dining area, living space and small office nook with printer.
review: nice historic house  beds and pillows comfortable.  had what we needed.   kitchen was lacking in some items to cook

description: My home is within walking distance of the Capital, the Empire State Plaza, Albany Medical Center, and many restaurants and museums. It's directly across from beautiful Washington Park, and it's an ideal location for medical students,  nurses,  people taking the bar exam, or here on business. I'm fully vaccinated as of May.  Please note resident cats and acknowledge that you're aware. Thanks!!
review: Alice is a kind, welcoming, and generous host. She is a wonderful lady. Would recommend to anyone who just needs a casual and comfortable place to stay for a night or two, and doesn’t mind sharing a space.

description: BOOK this 3rd floor studio loft in a renovated historic two-century-old building in a quiet neighborhood of Albany's Pastures. Great location near Albany Medical Center, MVP Arena, Empire State Plaza, Library, Lark Street, State Offices, courts; easy access to local & regional bus routes and highways (I-787, I-90 & I-87).  Queen bed + twin bed + futon Up to 4 NON-SMOKING guests Toiletries included  Save & BOOK this unit today! Message me anytime. Hope to welcome you soon!  -Earl
review: Great location. Walkable going to the Capitol. The place is well maintained and clean.

description: BOOK this 1st floor apt in a renovated historic 200 year-old building in a quiet neighborhood of Albany's Pastures. The kitchen was very well equipped for cooking and spacious. Definitely choose this place if you want to watch some TV on a nice flatscreen (there are TVs in livingroom and bedroom). The electronic locks were easy to operate and handy (no keys=no worries). Very easy to get to with heavy luggage and right by the greyhound bus station. The hosts were very responsive, helpful and accomodating. Overall, big recommend. 🌞

description: This luxurious apartment is located on a quiet street in the heart of Albany. Ideal for professionals. It is a 10mn walk from CDTA Bus station, Saint Peter and Albany Med Hospital. Traveling nurses & Dr. are welcome for long term stays. It features a bedroom with a queen-size bed, a living room, a kitchen, a bathroom, TVs, Wi-Fi, Mini-Billiard table,  a washer/dryer, A/C & heat, a Gas fireplace, off-street parking space. The patio with a table and parasol offers a breathtaking view of landscape.
review: Joe is a very accommodating and an awesome host! The apartment was very spacious, very clean and comfortable. It has everything you would need. I had a great time!

description: This home is a gorgeous 100 year old Victorian This suite is located on the 2nd floor. All the comforts of home! A very clean and quiet setting makes for a comfortable stay here at the Inn. Perfect for the business traveler or Traveling nurses that have contracts with one of the local hospitals located minutes away.
review: Had a wonderful second stay here!  Again, the bed and towel linens were beautiful and looked brand new.  Extremely clean and comfortable room with thoughtful little extras like bottled water, a snack, and soap and shampoo samples.  Very quiet!  beautiful old home.  Access to and use of living room, kitchen, all bathrooms, and dining room.  Great, private, off-street, safe parking.  Extra blankets and sheets available, too.  I will definitely stay here again!

description: Enjoy the private and clean comfort of this centrally-located brownstone.  The building is over 100 years old and has been renovated to reflect a modern style.  We are near everything Albany has to offer.  Washington Park, an 81-acre estate that was designed in the late 1800s, is on the adjacent street.  The New York State Capitol, The MVP Stadium, Albany Medical Center, art museums, and restaurants are a brisk walk away, and it takes about a 5-minute drive to the SUNY Albany campus.
review: Rabia's place was just what we needed. It is a neat and modern apartment. There was a kitchen and living room we didn't need to use, the bedroom, bath and laundry were great. Our host was able to very quickly help us in the the apartment and get the wifi connection going for us. We found parking on the street within easy walking distance. The "medicinal" chocolate left for us was a sweet treat. Thanks Sabia for sharing your apartment with us. If needed, we would definitely return.

description: My home is within walking distance of the Capital, the Empire State Plaza, Albany Medical Center, and many restaurants and museums. It's directly across from beautiful Washington Park, and it's an ideal location for medical students,  nurses,  people taking the bar exam, or here on business. I'm fully vaccinated as of May.  Please note resident cats and acknowledge that you're aware. Thanks!!
review: Alice was a lovely host, felt like a cozy quiet roommate situation. She was super accommodating to my coming and going and made me feel very welcome in her home. Not to mention, her kitties are adorable!

description: Convenience and comfort is what you will find. Full kitchen available with comfortable living room and full bathroom. Hosted multiple medical professionals, students, state interns, and more!  House is a 4 bedroom 1 bath home.
review: I had a nice and comfortable stay with Nicholas and Liz. Communication and check-in was easy, house is centrally located. I recommend.

description: Enjoy a stylish experience at this centrally-located place. Upper duplex recently renovated to make room for a lovely trip to Albany. Well appointed 1st floor offers kitchen/livingroom full bath. 2nd floor has 2 bedrooms and an additional full bathroom. Tons of natural light provides a peaceful space. review: We stay here on every visit to Albany. The house is comfortable and exactly as pictured. We walk to dinner and drinks easily in the evenings. A great stay.  Diana is kind and accommodating.

description: This 2nd Floor 2BR apartment shines with beautiful hardwoods, an open flow, a newer bathroom, a newer King sized "Purple" gel flex mattress, and a new Queen "Kingsdown Prime" mattress. review: We were very pleased. Exceptionally clean and comfortable.  Located in a safe and convenient neighborhood. Definitely would rent again in the future.

What you’ll get: - Bedroom, Livingroom, and bathroom, - Comfortable bed and linens - Small sitting area - Washer and Dryer - Smart - TV - Wi-Fi - Mini fridge, microwave, and coffee/tea setup - Full Private bathroom  - Shared entrance and available parking  Come enjoy a simple, calm stay at The Dove’s Nest.
review: This Airbnb was a delight! I stayed here for a couple of days while apartment hunting, it was very comfortable. Not many places have two seperate A/C units and a bidet. The host, Roland, quite helpful and welcoming.

review: We had a great stay at Erion’s apartment. It is a beautiful place, immaculately clean and a brilliant location. I would book again. Erion was great at communicating with us and checked that we were OK during our stay. Highly recommended!

However, I didn’t mind because it meant the apartment was always cool (in summer) and quiet. The furniture was comfortable,  the kitchen was stocked with lots of dishes, and the bathroom stocked with mini shampoos and toothpaste and brushes (in case you forgot yours). It’s very walkable to any downtown destination such as the Capitol building, the mvp arena, and more. Dillon was also proactive in messaging suggestions and check in/out instructions. Thanks for the great place to stay!

review: Highly recommend Diana's place.  Perfect for a few days in the Albany area.  She's very quick with communication & great recommendations.  If I'm back in the area, I would book this airbnb again.  I felt right at home during my stay, would highly recommend!

review: We had a wonderful time at Lori’s place! Gorgeous and Lori was so communicative and friendly! Highly recommend!

It is a garden level unit so expect a mild smell that goes away with Spray. The bathroom and the kitchen could be cleaner. The kitchen had pinkish stains around showing a deeper cleaning was needed.  Justin is a superb host, he’ll take good care of your stay

review: Read the description well, make sure you're house-trained, and you'll have a fantastic stay. Share accepted my reservation at 2am! She is responsive and her description of her home is accurate (with the added bonus of water in the fridge and snacks). Alternate side parking during the week. During the weekends it doesn't matter. My stay was on the weekend which worked out great. Thank you very much Share! I hope you'll have me back if I'm ever in the area again.

review: 3 great venues on the block -  https://thebullandbee.com/ https://www.cafecapriccio.com/ And you are right next door to the MVP arena! https://www.mvparena.com/ 10 minute drive to SUNY campus also.

review: Had a great stay! Walkable area, easy check in. The apartment was lovely. Unfortunately the halls in the apartment building smelled like cigarette smoke, but the apartment itself did not at all :)

There is also a huge TV in the spacious living room that isn't even mentioned in the description, and we were there for some great football games. We had some local family members over for a pre-Christmas get together, and everything was perfect for that. The neighborhood is quiet, and the house is incredibly easy to get to, as well as it being incredibly easy to unlock and access, with plenty of parking. I highly recommend Casa Bancroft!

This would be fine in the summer but it was Mid February and the weather was frigid. Despite getting instructions and trying different things recommended by the host, I gave up trying. No matter what I did each day and night the heat remained around 68. The floors were naturally cold and I intentionally left my house slippers home because I didnt think I would need them. So walking on the cold floor daily was a sad reminder. Even though the host was responsive, it was frustrating to have to call consistently about the same concern so I stopped reaching out. They were really nice and apologized for the inconvenience and invited me back. I would give it another try, as long as the heat is fixed 🥶.

This TRENDY apt has top quality appliances, modern finishes and is located at a PRIME downtown Albany location.   4K Smart TV with Netflix, fully stocked kitchen & bathroom with all travel essentials, high speed internet! Free street parking. Available for long term stays!  **Important To prevent underage parties, weekend bookings are only available for 25+. When reserving, please share a photo of your ID that matches your name on Airbnb or your LinkedIn profile.
review: Linda’s place was beautiful and very close to downtown. Unfortunately, the apartment did smell like smoke (probably from neighbors), which was noted in previous reviews. Also, I had a question for the host during our stay, but my message was never responded to.

description: WELCOME! Our listing is designed with the business or casual traveler in mind This beautiful suite will give you all the comforts of home! Quiet residential area for nice walks and great restaurants. Close to all the highways as well. All bedding & pillow cases have PREMIUM protective covers on them at all times so feel completely safe and protected. All remotes and light switches are wiped down with Clorox wipes after each guest.  ((IMPORTANT)) NO PARTIES or SMOKING in or around the home
review: One Of Nicest Place I Ever Stayed. Everything Was Perfect. Anytime I’m In The Area This Is Where I Would Stay.

description: Single family home with driveway close to Albany Med, St. Peter’s, St. Rose, U Albany, CDTA public transport, restaurants, downtown, and nightlife.   Recently renovated room packed with basic amenities.
review: The hosts were so awesome and welcoming! Upon arrival, they gave us the perfect amount of information about the room, the neighborhood, and local attractions. They made us feel welcome around the whole house and even let us play with their dog!

description: Enjoy a cozy, well-clean room just a 5-minute walk from fantastic restaurants and downtown shopping. This peaceful space is ideal for anyone.   No smoking or alcohol allowed. Must be clean and nice.
review: Friendly host, easy walk to downtown attractions, including museum and Capitol building. Small-ish room but totally fine for one person. Can recommend.

description: This full apartment is located on the 3rd floor in this beautiful Victorian. All the comforts of home. Nothing shared,has a full bathtub,full kitchen,one bedroom with a queen bed. Living room and an office,located next to Albany Medical Center and close to law schools and universities.
review: Truly exceeds expectations. The suite is in a gorgeous house, with a private entrance. Everything was clean and neat. Extra towels, coffee, perfect kitchen, office, and living room. 10/10 would stay here onn my next trip to Albany.  Don't twice about booking this space.

description: Our recently remodeled one-bedroom apartment boasts a park view, easy parking and is close to downtown Albany. We have an easy walk to groceries, Government Buildings, Albany Law School, College of Pharmacy, VA and Albany Medical Center Hospitals, and Lark Street restaurants and nightlife. The living area features a queen size futon and views of the sunset most evenings, and the bedroom features a luxurious queen-sized memory foam bed and access to our quiet garden where the sun rises.
review: This is a ground-floor apartment that feels spacious, with a well-stocked kitchen and comfortable bathroom. James is a gracious, attentive host: he responded quickly to any and all issues, then fixed it asap. The place is centrally located and easy walking distance to the Lark St. strip of restaurants, bars, and coffeehouses. We enjoyed our stay.

description: Welcome to our newly renovated two-bedroom apartment located on the second floor, just minutes away from Albany Med, and across from Washington Park. Easy access to state offices and MVP arena all within walking distance. The neighborhood is brimming with restaurants, bars, and beautiful architecture, making it one of the most desired areas in Albany. Perfect for both short-term and long term visits. Our apartment offers comfort and convenience in an ideal location.
review: Erion is a great host. Erion replied quickly to my messages and helped answer any questions I had as a first time guest at an Airbnb. I rented for 11 days in October of 2025 and drove a prius 450 miles. The pictures and location details in the description were accurate. The rooms felt clean, much cleaner than a hotel. Also has dedicated off street parking, so no worries about parking space for any drivers. A pickup truck or large family SUV might be a bit tight though. I recommend bringing an electric heater (i used a brand named Lasko that worked great), the heating did not function when i booked, but accurate to what the description mentioned as written. There were no signs of bugs or mice. There are two brooms to sweep with, reliable electricity, air conditioning, reliable wifi, working stove, and clean hot working water. The window blinds are pretty old and brittle, be diligent when touching them or they may break, you can still open and close them / move them up and down though.

description: Welcome to Capital City Escape, a stylish  3-bedroom, 1.5-bathroom home in the heart of Albany, NY.   This newly renovated space offers all the comforts of home, including a fully equipped kitchen, washer and dryer, and a sleek, contemporary design. Whether you're planning a family getaway or a fun trip with friends, this cozy yet sophisticated retreat is the perfect place to relax and explore Albany!
review: This home is absolutely beautiful and you can tell a lot of thought and effort went into it. My friends and I stayed here and had such a wonderful experience. All the necessary amenities are included. Mr. Noriyuki is very responsive. We look forward to staying here again.

description: This newly renovated 2BR/1BA apartment, situated on the first floor of a two-family house, offers sophistication and space. Enjoy a separate entrance and convenient location in downtown Albany, with grocery stores, restaurants, bars, nightlife, hospitals, and parks just steps away. With public transportation and ample street parking nearby, this is the perfect place to call home.
review: It was comfortable. The LR was very nice. The beds were very comfortable.

description: Newly renovated, modern and bright! Live in style in the heart of downtown Albany. Located at a PRIME location and walking distance to popular restaurants, and cafes on Lark Street. All the local attractions including The Egg, Empire State Plaza, Times Union Center are less than 5 minutes away. 4K Smart TV with Netflix, fully stocked kitchen & bathroom with all travel essentials, high speed internet ready for you to use! Free street parking. Available for long term stays!
review: The apartment is located only 10 minutes walk from the city center. It has parking spaces very close by. The apartment is very modern and has everything you need. Restaurants are within walking distance. If we come back to Albany we would stay here again.

description: Larson Gold sits in Albany's vibrant Center Square district, offering easy access to dining, shopping, and entertainment. With excellent public transportation and nearby highways, convenience is at your doorstep. Experience the city's rich cultural scene, diverse dining options, and lively nightlife, all within walking distance. Don't miss out on this perfect blend of historic charm and modern amenities.
review: I had a great stay at this Airbnb. The apartment was clean and cozy, with a nice open-concept kitchen and plenty of natural light throughout the space. The location is super convenient—within walking distance to great bars and restaurants. Parking is on the street, but I was usually able to find a spot close by without too much trouble. The only downside was the noise—being in a lively area, I did hear sirens fairly often. Overall, a comfortable and well-located place to stay!

description: BEAUTIFULLY renovated and stylish apartment with CHARACTER in a historic building. 4K Smart TV with Netflix, and high speed internet ready for you to use! This property comes with a fully stocked kitchen, in unit washer/dryer, free resident lot parking, and a fenced shared backyard with bbq for guests to enjoy.   This unit is located on floor 1 and is available for long term stays.
review: I would not stay here again.  The place was dirty.  Dirty floors, dirty walls, dirty light switches, dirty doors, linty and dog hair couch, everything was dingy and half broken- ex, kitchen cabinets, coffee table.  The bed sheets were pilled, no mattress cover.  The bathroom was gross, globs of caulk between tiles, old beat up bath mat, no hook for face towel or space for it.  The drawers in the bathroom were dirty with others hair, and gunk and random q-tips.  I did not feel comfortable getting into the bed considering everything else seemed unclean.  There was food stuck on the walls in the kitchen.  Then the outside.  The backyard was nothing like the pic.  The furniture cushions were piled up and gross and worn - not ready to use or clean.  The grass yard wasn’t mowed or kept and there was a lot of mud and dirt.  Directly outside the front door was a dumpster that reaked of rotten garbage and was infested with rats all day long.  You had to walk by this everytime to get your car.

description: One beautiful one bedroom garden level apartment in close proximity to all the best that downtown Albany has to offer. Next to Lark Street, Washington Park, Rockefeller Plaza, Historic State Street, museums, cafes, bars, shopping, and grocery stores. Its a 5 min walk to Albany Med, the VA Hospital, the Albany Law School, Pharmacy School, and Nursing School. 1 mile to Sage College and New Scotland Restaurants.
review: This was a great place to stay while working at the New York State Library for a week. I needed a place that was inexpensive and walkable but also somewhere where I could also work and write. It was clean and hassle-free. Aleks gave very thorough instructions but was otherwise hands-off unless I had a question and then he responded quickly. The apartment is  in an urban environment but seemed perfectly safe. There is a Dunkin Donuts and great pizza place less than a block away as well as some popular bars, which made the whole area active but safe at night. It's a about 10 minute walk (down-hill) to the capital plaza. The parking place is a little inconvenient and frankly a little sketchy looking (behind the nearby Sunoco gas station and around the corner from the apartment), but it worked out great and saved me a lot of money on parking. I would definitely stay here again if I need to work in Albany again.

description: MODERN beautifully furnished apartment with UNIQUE spiral staircase. Newly renovated, cozy and trendy! PRIME location in the heart of downtown Albany and walking distance to popular restaurants, and cafes on Lark Street. Local attractions including The Egg, Empire State Plaza, Times Union Center are less than 5 minutes away. 4K Smart TV with Netflix, stocked kitchen & bathroom, high speed internet ready for you to use! Free street parking. Available for long term stays!
review: Linda was a wonderful host and was very quick to answer when we had a question. The apartment was great and very neat. The bathroom and shower was nice and the bedroom was nice too. The kitchen and seating area was nice and roomy. Would definitely stay here again if we are ever in Albany!

description: Enjoy the private and clean comfort of this centrally-located brownstone.  The building is over 100 years old and has been renovated to reflect a modern style.  We are near everything Albany has to offer.  Washington Park, an 81-acre estate that was designed in the late 1800s, is on the adjacent street.  The New York State Capitol, The MVP Stadium, Albany Medical Center, art museums, and restaurants are a brisk walk away, and it takes about a 5-minute drive to the SUNY Albany campus.
review: The apartment is located in the basement of the building (side door entrance). The apartment itself is cute and very homey; felt right at home. It was very spacious except for the bathroom. The area itself is not the safest neighborhood.  My only complaint about the apartment is hot water! The water was never hot, no matter how long you keep it running. The most the water ever got was lukewarm, in the entire apartment.

description: Hudson 4 is a first floor queen room with private bathroom. Each room is equipped with a SmartTV and Apple TV as well as a desk.  This room is pet friendly.  Complimentary Services: Continental Breakfast Onsite Parking Electric Parking Wi-Fi & Apple TV Keyless Entry Ensuite Guest Rooms ​ Paid Services: Cocktails Meeting Space Rentals Pets (If applicable) Early Checkin (1PM) Late Checkout (12PM)
review: Stayed in Albany for 1 night with our dog. Chose this boutique hotel near Washington Park. It's inside a small mansion built during Albany's heyday. Easy to find and easy parking. The owners Matt & Terra and Jess welcomed us, made us a cocktail in the beautiful lounge, gave us some local recommendations, and told some stories (apparently it's a popular place when the legislature is in session). Bedroom was clean and simple, we got a larger bathroom. There's a well stocked shared kitchen with helpings of coffee, tea, and continental breakfast fare. We spent an hour walking around Washington Park, and got to see some of Oklahoma performed at the bandshell. We'd love to stay again in the future, as opposed to msot of the hotels in downtown (no parks and trees nearby).

description: My place is close to University of Albany, shopping malls and plazas, bars, restaurants, the airport, the city center, parks, art and culture. You’ll love my place because of the location, the ambiance, the outdoors space, fully renovated, newly furnished, nice yard, awesome double rear deck,  open floor plan and central air.   My place is good for couples, solo adventurers, business travelers, families (with kids), big groups, and furry friends ($50 pet fee w/ booties included).
review: We were looking for a quiet place to stay with our baby and grandma while attending a wedding in Troy. This house was perfect! The back deck and front porch are both really nice. Comfy couch and cozy bedding too!

description: Listing is designed with the business or casual traveler in mind PLEASE NO SMOKERS in the building *Newly renovated *Modern 1 bedroom w/Smart TVs that feels like home *Street parking *Equipped with coffee maker *Fridge *Wireless charger *Private bath *Across the street from the Capitol Building *Close to Highway I-87, I-90, I-787 & public transportation. Long term stays available. Please inquire with dates needed for more info. Traveling nurses, doctors, lobbyists, students are welcome.
review: The condo is located in a wonderful part of downtown, close to restaurants and walking distance to 2 parks. The host is superior, always available and extremely responsive. This is a wonderful place to stay.

description: A lovely 3 bedroom is apt in Center Square that is perfect for families and traveling professionals.  A 2 min. walk to Washington Park, Lark Street shops and restaurants, and a  5 mins to  Empire Plaza, State Capital and Legislative Office Building or Albany Medical Center, Albany Law School or Albany Medical School. It's the ideal getaway spot for a group of friends, families, or working professionals visiting New York's Capital.
review: Lori was an outstanding host! Her communication was superb, the house was immaculately clean and had everything we needed for our work trip. She was a great support helping us navigate the alternate side street parking Thursday morning. Highly recommend!!!

description: Spacious, comfortable unit less than 10 minutes from downtown Albany, 5 minutes from AlbanyMed, and walking distance to St. Peter's Hospital, Maria College, Buckingham Lake, CVS, and restaurants. Features a dining area with air fryer and microwave (no stove), an office, and basic workout equipment. Ideal for short getaways or extended stays, perfect for traveling nurses, doctors, remote workers, and anyone seeking a peaceful neighborhood.
review: I really enjoyed my stay at Hassan’s place. The air bnb is very cozy. I agree with everyone’s reviews that the bed is super comfortable. Hasan was great at communicating with me. He was always available for questions. The air bnb is super close to bus line 13 which was convenient to get to downtown Albany. Overall, it was a great stay and experience.

description: Kick back and relax in this calm, stylish space. Garden level studio just recently updated. Open floor plan offering everything you need to come home after a long day. Great location minutes off of Lark Street. Close to Capital Center, downtown, medical center and more.
review: This is a great location.  It has a nice established residential feel, close to Washington Park, yet an easy and pleasant walk to downtown. Lots of restaurants; we especially enjoyed Rosanna’s for creative Italian dinners.

description: Once a retreat, then a convent—now it’s your cozy home away from home. Enjoy a well-lit room with a Purple Hybrid 4 queen bed, desk, and 75" TV. Relax in two family rooms, cook in the spacious kitchen, or sip coffee on one of four enclosed porches. Walk to groceries, restaurants, and the movies, or hop on the bus right outside. Whether for a short trip or long stay, comfort and community await you here.
review: I spent one night at the house. There was a slight mix up initially when I arrived and it was resolved literally within minutes. The ONLY reason I bought it up was to show that Thomas and Justin are extremely responsive. The house is immaculate, spotless and beautiful.  The everyone in the house were very pleasant and answered any questions I had.  I am always concerned about safety as a female traveling solo, I felt comfortable the entire time and slept great. The 4 legged residents were a nice addition and were very welcoming. Thank you for safe, clean and welcoming visit to Albany.

description: Welcome to our newly renovated, one bedroom apartment in the heart of the charming Melrose neighborhood in Albany, NY, conveniently nestled between UAlbany and downtown. ☺️ Please note, this apartment is apart of a four family apartment complex.   This pet friendly space includes an outdoor sitting area and small patio.
review: 11/10 stay — spotless, beautifully remodeled bathroom, fully stocked kitchen, and a cozy back porch to relax. Safe, quiet neighborhood. Only wish: better lighting up the driveway to the units door at night and a manual deadbolt. Would definitely stay again!! Thank you for the wonderful stay!

description: Cute single family home in a convenient location with the lots of restaurants, bars and shops right around the corner. It features a driveway with covered parking, a nice outdoor area and central air. My place is close to University of Albany, shopping malls and plazas, bars, restaurants, the airport, the city center, parks, art and culture. Parties and events are not allowed.
review: The hosts went 100% above and beyond for us. The place was beautiful and it’s pretty big which is a plus. The hosts are quick to reply, extremely nice and accommodating, and overall this is honestly the best air bnb that I’ve ever stayed in, including out of several stays in the Albany area. If it were possible, we’d always choose this one. It was very clean, well taken care of, warm cozy and inviting. Towels, toilet paper, etc was stocked in the closet which seems to be an issue at a lot of air bnbs, as well as paper plates, plastic ware, and cups if you wanted, in addition to regular plates and cups. All around just an amazing stay!!

description: Perfect place to relax with your family or stopover on a work trip. A quiet, suburban neighborhood that is close enough to everything. 5 min drive to UAlbany and St Peter's Hospital. 15 min drive to downtown Albany. 18 min drive to Albany Int'l Airport. 5-10 min drive to plenty of restaurants and pubs.
review: Had a nice stay at Nori's.  House was clean, comfortable and easy to find. Nori was pro-active and very communicative. Thanks, Nori!

description: Single family home with driveway close to Albany Med, St. Peter’s, St. Rose, U Albany, CDTA public transport, restaurants, downtown, and nightlife.   Recently renovated room packed with basic amenities.
review: I was thrilled with the location and value and would definitely come back.  The house dog Bella is super friendly and really made it for me!  The wifi was super fast (their 30 MB vastly outperformed Verizon Fios 100 MB at my other house) and I really enjoyed the speed of Netflix and other options available on all the TV's.

description: BEAUTIFULLY renovated and stylish apartment with CHARACTER in a brownstone building. This spacious unit features high 10 ft ceilings , a 4K Smart TV with Netflix, stocked kitchen & bathroom, high speed internet ready for you to use! Tenant permit street parking available.
review: Linda and her cohost were extremely responsive and helpful. The apartment was clean and comfortable and check in was a breeze. They made the parking situation very easy to navigate

description: Welcome to our newly renovated, one bedroom apartment in the heart of the charming Melrose neighborhood in Albany, NY, conveniently nestled between UAlbany and downtown. ☺️ Please note, this apartment is apart of a four family apartment complex.   This pet friendly space includes an outdoor sitting area and small patio.
review: as any beginner in business,  the place has been improved as it grows. a better beds will make a huge difference everymorning.  Parking it is not so good for elderly people or any other visitors with heavy belongings. laundry services would make a better staying for those who need to rent longer than 3 nights.

description: This beautifully renovated and brightly decorated brownstone in historic Albany is your perfect getaway. Located just minutes from charming downtown, guests can enjoy all Albany has to offer.   This spacious bedroom and living area has an abundance of natural light creates a very comfortable environment! This property comes with a fully stocked kitchen, in unit washer/dryer, free resident lot parking, and a fenced shared backyard with bbq for guests to enjoy.  Long term stays available.
review: Such a beautiful apartment! Everything was so clean and updated and the lighting is so nice! The shower is insane. So spacious and such a great shower head. Definitely will be staying again if we are ever in the area! :)

description: Enjoy a stylish experience at this centrally-located place. The spacious unit is newly renovated with a 4K Smart TV, in unit washer/dryer, updated kitchen and bathroom, high speed internet.   You will also have access to the building gym.
review: It was great stay and Linda was super cooperative! The apartment was clean and quite comfortable with modern furniture. The building was quiet and clean as well. I will definitely recommend anyone to stay here and I’m definitely booking again in the future!

description: Cute single family home in a convenient location with the lots of restaurants, bars and shops right around the corner. It features a driveway with covered parking, a nice outdoor area and central air. My place is close to University of Albany, shopping malls and plazas, bars, restaurants, the airport, the city center, parks, art and culture. Parties and events are not allowed.
review: I had a great time. Peter was. So nice and genuine. The place was beautiful and he also used my favorite color red. I stayed 2 nights. No complaints

description: Spacious, comfortable unit less than 10 minutes from downtown Albany, 5 minutes from AlbanyMed, and walking distance to St. Peter's Hospital, Maria College, Buckingham Lake, CVS, and restaurants. Features a dining area with air fryer and microwave (no stove), an office, and basic workout equipment. Ideal for short getaways or extended stays, perfect for traveling nurses, doctors, remote workers, and anyone seeking a peaceful neighborhood.
review: I had a wonderful stay at Hasan’s. Great amenities, plenty of closet space. Nice office room for getting work done. The surrounding neighborhood was beautiful. Buckingham Pond was a peaceful walk nearby. Would definitely recommend to fellow travelers!

description: 3-bed fl 2 apt. in a renovated historic two-century-old building in a quiet neighborhood of Albany's Pastures. Great location near Albany Medical Center, MVP Arena, Empire State Plaza, Library, Lark Street, State Offices, courts; easy access to local & regional bus routes and highways (I-787, I-90 & I-87)  3 Queen beds Cozy gas fireplace in living room Up to 10 NON-SMOKING guests Toiletries included  Save & BOOK this unit today! Message me anytime. Hope to welcome you soon!  -Earl
review: Earl is a nice host. The place is extremely clean and has everything we needed for the week. The only issue we had is poor WiFi connection. Even the TV from the Airbnb lost connections several times a day. Our devices always show full signal, but was rarely able to run. We try to communicate with Earl, but unfortunately he wasn’t able fix it during our stay

description: Perfect place to relax with your family or stopover on a work trip. A quiet, suburban neighborhood that is close enough to everything. 5 min drive to UAlbany and St Peter's Hospital. 15 min drive to downtown Albany. 18 min drive to Albany Int'l Airport. 5-10 min drive to plenty of restaurants and pubs.
review: We really enjoyed our stay, the location was perfect. Very convenient to all shops and stores. Just a few minutes to downtown. The home was vey cozy and comfortable. The neighbors will really nice as well. I would definitely recommend this town home. Not to mention very quite.

description: My place is close to University of Albany, shopping malls and plazas, bars, restaurants, the airport, the city center, parks, art and culture. You’ll love my place because of the location, the ambiance, the outdoors space, fully renovated, newly furnished, nice yard, awesome double rear deck,  open floor plan and central air.   My place is good for couples, solo adventurers, business travelers, families (with kids), big groups, and furry friends ($50 pet fee w/ booties included).
review: Super nice, clean and great space. Peter was very responsive and easy to work with. Definitely recommend

description: Relax in our cozy home on a quiet one-way street. Plenty of free street parking available. With a large dining and living room, fully stocked kitchen, and furnished private room, our home is the perfect affordable stay for working professionals, students, and people in-between housing.   Newly furnished and renovated in 2017. Minutes from major universities and hospitals. Entire home is 3 bed 1 bath (you have a private bedroom with door lock). CDTA Bus stop 1 block away.
review: We had a very comfortable stay at Chad's place. The kitchen was well stocked and the common spaces were nice. The bedroom was a good size with decent sized closets. The neighborhood was quiet and felt safe. Chad and Kelly were very friendly and quick to respond to any issue that come up.

description: Relax in a newly renovated one bedroom/one bathroom apartment located on the 2nd floor of a charming brownstone building. It features lofty ceilings with beautiful architecture and a newly updated kitchen. Conveniently located to the Palace Theater, Capitol Rep Theater, Times Union Center and the Empire State Plaza. This rental is in walking distance to many popular eateries, bars, and more to explore! Laundry on Site for Long-Term Stays
review: I stayed for one month in the appartment. I had a great time there! The appartment is large and cosey. It is close to the city center. David was very responsive.

description: Kick back and relax in this calm, stylish space. Garden level studio just recently updated. Open floor plan offering everything you need to come home after a long day. Great location minutes off of Lark Street. Close to Capital Center, downtown, medical center and more.
review: Cozy, quiet garden suite near the NY Capitol! It’s perfect for folks attending events at the Capitol or in downtown Albany. It was 90 degrees when I stayed here, but the mini split AC kept the studio cool and comfortable.

description: Newly renovated one bedroom, loft style apartment. Centrally located in the Mansion neighborhood in albany. Huge spacious open layout with walk in closet. Big screen tvs, with super fast internet (400 mps). On-site laundry, with locked off street parking. Spectacular views of downtown Albany. Walking distance to empire state plaza, the egg, times union, and excellent bars, restaurants, and delis. Great value for anyone staying in albany long or short term.
review: 4/5 Stars for me This is a great place for the price honestly. It's in a prime location (despite the neighborhood not being great, but that feels like most of Albany) and the inside is very cozy and spacious. It feels like a steal with how nice the apartment is. That being said, it's not perfect. Like I said, the neighborhood isn't great. It doesn't feel safe, but I've run into no problems with people there.  Every night, at around 11pm, someone is yelling out in the street or blasting music for a bit.  The private lot is also not great. It's in a pothole riddled alleyway and closed off with a gate that can easily bend and break. You also need to manually open and close the gate using an old fashioned padlock (not great during winter or rain). The apartment is cold during winter and the giant windows near the kitchen make it unusable during winter due to how cold it is. The A/C units are great, but can't overcome physics of hot air not staying at ground level. Still highly recommend!

description: Room available near major hospitals and universities/colleges in Albany, NY.   Close to restaurants, grocery stores, bus lines and coffee shops.   We are friendly to travelers of all kinds, folks around for a short-period and welcome all persons.  *Please be advised: This is a 3 bedroom house and the homeowner lives in the house. All rooms are private; all common rooms shared. You will have access to all amenities in home.   We do have pets in the home, please advise of allergies.
review: So nice I had to stay twice.Definitely a go to spot if you need a cozy place to stay in Albany. Melissa is such a great host. She really goes above and beyond for her guests. It really felt like visiting a friend. Her home is beautiful, the lighting is especially stunning. The bed is super comfortable to sleep in. I could’ve laid in it all day. I truly appreciate Melissa and her hospitality. 🙏🏽🙏🏽🙏🏽Anyone would be lucky to meet her and her sweet yorkie.

description: BEAUTIFUL + LUXURIOUS renovated apartment with CHARACTER in a historic building.   This spacious 2 bedroom feature a bright reading nook in the master bedroom, an office space, a soaker tub, 4K Smart TV with Netflix, and high speed internet ready for you to use! It comes with a fully stocked kitchen, in unit washer/dryer, free resident parking, and a fenced shared backyard with bbq for guests to enjoy.
review: perfect apartment for a mid-week get away. we already planing our next trip to Albany and renting here again. Having two bathroom was a plus.

description: Newly renovated single family home in the heart of Albany. The house is equipped with everything you need including the all important Nespresso coffee machine. You will find it warm and homey, but also simple and free of clutter that prevent you from making the space feel like your own. I want you to enjoy the freedom that comes with staying in an Air BnB and the comfort you would expect from a boutique hotel. Enjoy the fenced in backyard equipped with grill, firpit and hammock. Hello summer
review: Great location, quiet street. Very close to any and all dining. Clean and smelled amazing! Will definitely be back

description: Welcome to The Urban Nest! Your stylish retreat in Albany’s Center Square! Spotless, beautifully designed 1BR garden apartment in a historic brownstone, short walk to Washington Park, MVP Arena, the Capitol, Empire State Plaza, and top restaurants. Enjoy a king bed, in-unit laundry, workspace, a fully equipped kitchen guests rave about, Smart TV, and fast WiFi. Immaculate, cozy, and perfectly located. Relax and feel at home. Perfect for couples, professionals, or weekend getaways.
review: I loved staying here. It was a such a comfortable place, on a beautiful street. Great location downtown, and yet so peaceful to walk around. There is easy parking too.

description: This 2nd Floor 2BR apartment shines with beautiful hardwoods, an open flow, a newer bathroom, a newer King sized "Purple" gel flex mattress, and a new Queen "Kingsdown Prime" mattress. Reclining couch in living room; full but small kitchen, Keurig; laundry; parking, ceiling fans, window ACs. Prime location close to airport, highways, eateries; less than 10 minutes to downtown Albany/MVP Center/Hospitals; 20min to Rivers Casino; 40 min to SPAC/Saratoga Racetrack; 1hr to Lake George/Great Escape!
review: Fab stay at John and Missy’s place in Albany! The house was beautifully decorated, spotless, and so comfortable - just like the photos. The kitchen had everything we needed, plus a washer and dryer which was a big bonus. Beds were super comfy, and the rain shower was great. John and Missy were lovely hosts—friendly, responsive, and left a handwritten welcome note, which was a really thoughtful touch. They also provided a great folder with local tips for food and places to visit. There’s parking on the drive, if you hire a car, and a handy little shop right across the road for essentials like milk, bread, or even a cold beer. We walked to a nearby retail park in about 20 minutes for lunch, and there’s a larger one around 45 minutes away with shops, entertainment, and food options. The University at Albany is just a 10-minute walk—ideal if you’re visiting or dropping someone off. We had everything we needed and felt right at home. Highly recommend!

description: Prime Real Estate On the Bus Route - Free bus every 20 minutes.  This place is in the Heart of Albany, lots of things in walking distance. Bar and Restaurant Mania!  Minutes from: Suny Albany Downtown Albany Medical College Albany Law School St Peters Hospital Albany VA Medical Center Samaritan Hospital Albany Memorial Hospital Massry Family Children's Emerg Center
review: Rodney's apartment is in a great location if you want to see the best of Albany. You're steps away from Lark St., the Armory, Washington Park, and the Empire Plaza. Check-in was easy and Rodney is very communicative.

description: A beautiful newly renovated 2 Bedroom apartment. 1 bedroom is set up as office with a desk and chair and also a yoga mat and workout bands. The apartment is located 3 minutes walking from Albany Med, a few steps away from Washington Park, several minutes from State offices. The area is full of great restaurants, walking distance grocery store and boutique shops.
review: Erion was a pleasure to communicate with and very responsive. Gave us local recommendations that were appreciated and spot on! We hope to visit the Albany area again soon and will stay with Erion again if given the opportunity!

description: A cozy private apartment. The Blair Suite, named after the original owner of this beautiful 1890's Victorian, is located on the basement floor. It has it's own private entrance on the side of the home. Located in historic Albany, close to everything, hospitals, schools, museums, restaurants and Washington Park.
review: Bela is a wonderful host, and the suite is fantastic - clean, private, close to town and amenities.  Moreover, he is thoughtfully responsive.  I highly recommend.

description: Welcome to this rustic second-floor apartment in Albany, New York! This newly remodeled three-bedroom, one-bath gem is perfect for a comfortable stay for up to six guests. Step into a piece of history with original hardwood floors dating back to 1890. The spacious dining area is ideal for gathering, and the apartment features a 65-inch smart TV for your entertainment needs. Need to catch up on work? We've got you covered with a dedicated work desk. Book now for an unforgettable experience!
review: A nice, clean place. Convenient location for our evening's activities! Thanks, Scott.

description: Welcome to your home away from home in the heart of Albany! Nestled on a quiet street, this beautifully renovated 3-bedroom, 2.5-bathroom luxury residence offers a rare blend of comfort, style, and convenience—perfect for families, friends, business travelers, and weekend explorers alike.
review: My family and I had such a great experience staying here! The interior was absolutely beautiful, clean, and comfortable. The beds and linens were comfy, showers were great, everything was clean and well stocked, and we felt right at home. There were clear instructions for everything and our host was super easy to communicate with. Absolutely love it, would highly recommend, and I hope to get the chance to stay here again!

description: Welcome to this charming room in Albany completely remodeled to the studs in '21! Centrally located in the peaceful Pine Hill neighborhood. It's walking distance to restaurants, bars, grocery store & historic Washington Park. 2 mi to SUNY and 1 mi to Albany Medical. Great for couples, traveling nurse, business professionals.
