Street parking available in front of the house. Your room is smart TV equipped with live cable for watching all your guilty pleasures, so feel free to bring your own login !
review: An ideal room for a quick stop over! Elhadj was responsive and a great host. Comfortable bed and an area to cook food if you wish - note, you may need cutlery.  TV in the bedroom is a nice touch, adding to the homely feel.

description: This stylish place to stay is perfect to stop for a night or stay longer. Open living/kitchen area is perfect to hang out with family and friends. One bedroom with plenty of closet space. Bonus tv in bedroom with updated bathroom. Centrally located close to U-Albany, St. Rose, St. Peter’s & Albany Med to name a few. Quiet residential neighborhood walkable to great restaurants on Madison Avenue. Come and relax at your home away from home.
review: Diana’s place was extremely clean and very comfortable.  I felt right at home.  It’s in a great neighborhood for walking.  I would definitely return.

description: Welcome to our newly renovated, spacious studio. Work efficiently at your dedicated desk, and savor the convenience of a fully divided kitchen. Only 5 minutes' walk from Albany Med, moments from Washington Park and Lark Street, and a short stroll to downtown Albany and state offices. Surrounded by a large variety of restaurants and local bars. Modern amenities including a full bathroom with efficient  washer and dryer.
review: We loved our stay at this Airbnb! It was very comfy and clean. Located close to everything in downtown Albany. Would definitely stay there again.

description: Larson Blue sits in Albany's vibrant Center Square district, offering easy access to dining, shopping, and entertainment. With excellent public transportation and nearby highways, convenience is at your doorstep. Experience the city's rich cultural scene, diverse dining options, and lively nightlife, all within walking distance. Don't miss out on this perfect blend of historic charm and modern amenities.
review: Great location,  host was very helpful,  plenty of restaurants and bars within walking distance.  Very clean, lots of steps to climb if on 3rd. floor,  great value, plenty of natural sunlight. Would highly recommend,  will book again when in the area.

description: Welcome to The Urban Nest! Your stylish retreat in Albany’s Center Square! Spotless, beautifully designed 1BR garden apartment in a historic brownstone, short walk to Washington Park, MVP Arena, the Capitol, Empire State Plaza, and top restaurants. Enjoy a king bed, in-unit laundry, workspace, a fully equipped kitchen guests rave about, Smart TV, and fast WiFi. Immaculate, cozy, and perfectly located. Relax and feel at home. Perfect for couples, professionals, or weekend getaways.
review: Everything was great except for some sort of banging/tapping noise all night long. It almost sounded like someone tapping on the window all night long. I think it was the heater upstairs kicking on and off all night, not sure though. Outside of the noises all night, the place is perfect for a quick get away. Would definitely stay again. Thank you.

description: Welcome to your cozy Albany retreat! Enjoy a comfortable stay in this well-appointed space, perfect for travelers looking for convenience and relaxation. Your booking includes free parking and a complimentary breakfast to start your day right. Located near shops, restaurants, and downtown Albany, this home offers easy access to local attractions. Whether you’re here for business or leisure, you’ll love the comfort and convenience of this stay. Book now for a relaxing experience.
review: We were amazed to find a kitchen in a separate room attached to our hotel room! The kitchen has a door which makes the sleeping room dark and quiet. There was even free continental breakfast! Check in was easy, just like at any hotel. Looked exactly like the photos. It was clean and quiet and we got a good night's sleep. This Ramada Hotel room even utilized triple sheeting: a top sheet above and below the comforter for cleanliness.  Zohar was a responsive host.

description: Welcome to our newly renovated, spacious studio. Work efficiently at your dedicated desk, and savor the convenience of a fully divided kitchen. Only 5 minutes' walk from Albany Med, moments from Washington Park and Lark Street, and a short stroll to downtown Albany and state offices. Surrounded by a large variety of restaurants and local bars. Modern amenities including a full bathroom with efficient  washer and dryer.
review: Justin's Airbnb offers a delightful stay with its excellent location, ensuring easy access for guests. The space is praised for its cleanliness and organization, providing a comfortable and hassle-free experience. Additionally, the abundance of amenities further enhances the convenience and appeal of this accommodation, making it a top choice for travelers seeking a well-equipped and welcoming place to stay.

description: Relax in a newly renovated one bedroom/one bathroom apartment located on the first floor of a charming brownstone building. It features lofty ceilings with beautiful architecture and a newly remodeled kitchen. Conveniently located to the Palace Theater, Capitol Rep Theater, Times Union Center and the Empire State Plaza. This rental is in walking distance to many popular eateries, bars, and more to explore!
review: David was super responsive throughout our whole stay.  He allowed us to check in a couple hours early. He even came and helped us get the amazon fire-stick to work with the TV at like 8 p.m.  Definitely priced extremely well for what you get… it’s a steal really. Will stay here again if I need to go back to Albany.

description: Entire garden apartment in Albany, New York. Walking distance to restaurants, shops and Washington Park. Situated in the heart of Historic Center Square neighborhood. 15 minute walk or short ride to MVP Arena. Perfect for couples and short getaways, but we welcome longer stays too!
review: Awesome stay! I would come back for sure. It had a super nice outdoor space off the bedroom - I loved it! My only tidbit is that the shower is very tiny and I am 5’7 (slim) and I had trouble navigating because the actual shower head is high quality but also takes extra space so it felt smaller than described by the host. That said, the host is very open about the size of the shower on the listing. But it is a small price to pay when you’re a few minute walk away from everything.

description: This home is a gorgeous 100 year old Victorian   This suite is located on the 2nd floor. All the comforts of home! Tv and mini fridge in room.  We supply towels, linens and starter toiletries.  A very clean and quiet setting makes  for a comfortable stay here at the Inn.
review: I enjoyed my stay at Bela's place. It was very clean and exactly what I expected! The host was very friendly and answered any question in a timely manner.

description: Live in style! This TRENDY apt has top quality appliances, modern finishes and is located at a PRIME downtown Albany location.   4K Smart TV with Netflix, fully stocked kitchen & bathroom with all travel essentials, high speed internet! Free street parking. Available for long term stays!  **Important To prevent underage parties, weekend bookings are only available for 25+. When reserving, please share a photo of your ID that matches your name on Airbnb or your LinkedIn profile.
review: Great place.  This would be totally perfect for 1 or 2 people (we had 3, and it felt just a bit snug).  Everything was great - very clean and fun location.  Would definitely recommend!

description: Meticulously and lovingly maintained home. Living and dining rooms feature gleaming hardwood floors.   Private fenced in yard. Excellent Albany location off of Western Ave- close to highways, restaurants, shopping etc.  New sauna space sauna with 8 bulbs built, next to a full bath with heated floor and small weight set, bench and treadmill.
review: Peter’s house is convenient and absolutely clean, like all his properties. This property has exquisitely comfy beds/bedding. If you’re tall the bathroom is a little tight but overall this property is well managed and maintained. Totally recommend.

description: Newly renovated, modern and bright! Live in style in the heart of downtown Albany. Located at a PRIME location and walking distance to popular restaurants, and cafes on Lark Street. All the local attractions including The Egg, Empire State Plaza, Times Union Center are less than 5 minutes away. 4K Smart TV with Netflix, fully stocked kitchen & bathroom with all travel essentials, high speed internet ready for you to use! Free street parking. Available for long term stays!
review: Great location, beautiful and clean apartment, fully stocked with basics. Within walking distance to many attractions and food/drink options. I would definitely recommend staying here on your next trip to Albany!

description: A lovely 3 bedroom is apt in Center Square that is perfect for families and traveling professionals.  A 2 min. walk to Washington Park, Lark Street shops and restaurants, and a  5 mins to  Empire Plaza, State Capital and Legislative Office Building or Albany Medical Center, Albany Law School or Albany Medical School. It's the ideal getaway spot for a group of friends, families, or working professionals visiting New York's Capital.
review: Lori is a fantastic host. Her space is just as advertised. It is stylish and clean and HUGE. It is around the corner from bars and restaurants. We walked to a nearby Mexican restaurant for dinner! Lori even turned on the AC before we arrived because it was 95 that day and the apartment was cool when we walked in. There were fresh flowers and a fun turntable with excellent record choices. We were a 7 minute drive to the MVP Arena. Thank you Lori for the great place for us to spend the night.

description: Newly renovated, modern and bright! Live in style in the heart of downtown Albany. Located at a PRIME location and walking distance to popular restaurants, and cafes on Lark Street. All the local attractions including The Egg, Empire State Plaza, Times Union Center are less than 5 minutes away. 4K Smart TV with Netflix, fully stocked kitchen & bathroom with all travel essentials, high speed internet ready for you to use! Free street parking. Available for long term stays!
review: I enjoyed my time exploring Albany.  The electric bike share was perfect for getting around to parks and down to the waterfront for a river cruise.  My event at the convention center was easily walkable.

description: Relax in our cozy home on a quiet one-way street. Plenty of free street parking available. With a large dining and living room, fully stocked kitchen, and furnished private room, our home is the perfect affordable stay for working professionals, students, and people in-between housing.   Newly furnished and renovated in 2017. Minutes from major universities and hospitals. Entire home is 3 bed 1 bath (you have a private bedroom with door lock). CDTA Bus stop 1 block away.
review: I had an excellent time at this place. The neighborhood was safe and quiet. Their was always good parking (just make sure to move your car during the times when street sweepers come by --I got a parking ticket on my first week because I was unaware of this). The house was well-maintained, with all of the accommodations that were listed online. The communal living room area was well-furnished, and the kitchen had all of the materials necessary for cooking. The private bedroom was very comfortable. Chad was very responsive to my messages, and addressed any issue I brought to his attention immediately (e.g. a broken ceiling tile I noticed). I would highly recommend this as an inexpensive place for an individual to stay while in the Albany area. :)

description: Room available near major hospitals and universities/colleges in Albany, NY.   Close to restaurants, grocery stores, bus lines and coffee shops.   We are friendly to travelers of all kinds, folks around for a short-period and welcome all persons.  *Please be advised: This is a 3 bedroom house and the homeowner lives in the house. All rooms are private; all common rooms shared. You will have access to all amenities in home.   We do have pets in the home, please advise of allergies.
review: This was HANDS DOWN the most tranquil, calming and serene space that I've experienced in an AirBnB ever. I walked in to aromatherapy scents, calming lights, and cozy couches in the shared space. My room was way too cute, but that mattress.. oh, that mattress man.. pure cloud. It made me sleep 10 hours straight. Honestly, MAGICAL. Don't even get me started on the bathroom!! She had affirmation cards in the shower, with eucalyptus and tea candles, with yes, you guessed it, calming light too. After work on my feet all day, I had so much gratitude and thankfulness to Melissa's welcoming energy, space and personality. I almost wanted to stay another night just to hang out with her! Ha! Def. Coming for another visit. Oh and did I mention the cozy fireplace? I think I should... along with her adorable little pup. NOT TO MENTION the amazing restoration Melissa has done to the old home's bones. She's bringing the soul back with a splash of her own divine. Thank you for this experience Melissa!

description: Newly renovated one bedroom, loft style apartment. Centrally located in the Mansion neighborhood in albany. Huge spacious open layout with walk in closet. Big screen tvs, with super fast internet (400 mps). On-site laundry, with locked off street parking. Spectacular views of downtown Albany. Walking distance to empire state plaza, the egg, times union, and excellent bars, restaurants, and delis. Great value for anyone staying in albany long or short term.
review: I ended up needing to book a place last minute for a two-ish week stay, and Michael’s place was perfect! It was very clean and quiet. Michael is very responsive and made sure I had everything I needed. Definitely would recommend this stay while in Albany!

description: Welcome to our exceptional apartment in Albany! Discover a blend of style, comfort, and a prime location. Just steps from the State Capitol, Empire State Plaza, museums, and the Hudson River, our home offers unparalleled access to Albany's top attractions. Immerse yourself in local culture with nearby cafes, boutiques, and historic landmarks. Experience Albany like never before. Book your stay for a memorable adventure!
review: The location to downtown Albany/capital area was great. The apartment itself was perfectly sized for one person for a short stay. Clean and organized. Host communicated well. Property was safe. Check City of Albany parking rules and regulations beforehand if you drive. There was plenty of parking spaces but you might need a non-resident parking permit if you plan to leave your car during weekday hours up to 6pm. The apartment was a great value.

description: Meticulously and lovingly maintained home. Living and dining rooms feature gleaming hardwood floors.   Private fenced in yard. Excellent Albany location off of Western Ave- close to highways, restaurants, shopping etc.  New sauna space sauna with 8 bulbs built, next to a full bath with heated floor and small weight set, bench and treadmill.
review: Peter is an exceptional host! We spent ten comfortable weeks in this home. It is super clean; the beds are so comfy, this kitchen has a big fridge/freezer, really nice stove, big microwave and nice dishwasher. The washer and dryer are really nice too. We enjoyed many friendly neighbors! . Backyard was a treat for us and our little dog! This neighborhood is any easy walk to SUNY Albany campus where we enjoyed walking our dog around their little lake. It is also a five minute drive to Buckingham Lake (park) with a beautiful playground, fishing and walking path around the lake. A three minute walk from the house takes you to three great pizzeria/sub shops (one with really good baked goods), Ted’s Fish Fry and a Chinese takeout. Across the street is a small plaza with wonderful bagel/coffee/breakfast and lunch restaurant, and another popular sub shop. You will also be within eight minute drive of three big shopping malls and So. Much. More. We will be back!

description: Fall in love with Upstate New York when you stay in this 1-bed apt, located in the Historic Center Square neighborhood with washer/dryer and off-street parking. The home is within walking distance to Washington Park, Empire Plaza, and the Institute of History and Art with easy access to the downtown, and countless restaurants, bars, entertainment.   The apt is equipped with a comfortable leather sofa, flat-screen/smart TV, a turntable with a mix of records, and Bluetooth speakers.
review: We were very happy with our stay. Lori is an excellent host. She has an unbelievable location in downtown Albany.

description: Immerse yourself in this meticulously updated 2-bedroom unit, where modern amenities and chic designer furnishings ensure a delightful stay. This elegant abode is mere steps from renowned restaurants, iconic landmarks, and vibrant nightlife. Enjoy the convenience of being centrally located in the capital region, with local hospitals just a stone's throw away. With its bright, clean, and professionally furnished interiors, this unit promises a welcoming retreat in the heart of the city
review: It is what it is. Not a diamond in the rough, but a place to stay. The stay doesn’t match the pictures online. The upstairs neighbors were noisemakers especially during the night. The house ventilation could be improved with another window unit during the summer. No clear checkout instructions. Could not ride share at night. Location was in good walking distance from the MVP Arena, and is close to many good places to eat.

description: Charming 5 bedroom /3.5  Bathrooms , 3 kitchens,huge family home. Hardwood floors through out. Living room, kitchen and master bedroom with 1/2 bath on entry floor. Basement Laundry. 4 car private parking spaces . Full bathroom,living room and kitchenette in finished basement. 3 BR & 1 full bath on the 2nd floor.  A full bathroom,kitchen & living room top floor. Minutes to Lincoln park, Albany Med, law school, downtown Albany,MVP arena.
review: The airbnb was nice, spacious and accommodated our family to celebrate my daughters Graduation from University at Albany. The beds were comfy. We were able to cook dinner when we arrived  however there were no large mixing bowls which was a unexpecxted surprise. The backyard was useful which we had a small cookout which Timothy provide a table and lawn chairs for us to use which came in handy. One bit of advice be cautious of the neighbor next door he don't like the idea of the house as a airbnb and he may voice his opinion to you agressively (yelling) but remain calm  and he eventually will leave you alone.

description: BOOK this 1st floor apt in a renovated historic 200 year-old building in a quiet neighborhood of Albany's Pastures. Great location near Albany Medical Center, Times Union Center, Empire State Plaza, Library, Lark Street, State Offices, courts; easy access to local & regional bus routes and highways (I-787, I-90 & I-87). Great for traveling nurses!  1 Queen sized bed, and 1 Queen sized air mattress.  Save & BOOK this unit today! Message me anytime. Hope to welcome you soon!  -Earl
review: Great location for a short walk to MVP arena! The place was clean, didn’t hear anyone else in the building, Host was excellent, and apt looked exactly like photos. I would definitely stay here again!

description: The whole group will enjoy easy access to everything from this centrally located place. The Red Brick House is a newly renovated, 4 stories/3000sq ft space with 4be/3.5ba and walking distance to Downtown Albany's top attractions.  Amenities included: ✔ Game Room ✔ Hot Tub ✔ Private Yard w/ BBQ and Outdoor Games ✔ Fully Equipped Kitchen ✔ High-Speed Wifi ✔ Free Parking (up too 3 vehicles) ✔ eV Lvl 2 Charging ✔ Office & Exercise Equipment ✔ Washer/Dryer & AC ✔ Mini-crib & Baby Accessories
review: This was our first trip to Albany, NY.  We were in town to watch a field hockey game at U Abany.  We loved Yasiel's house, it was perfect for our group.  The games in the basement were a huge hit, and the backyard was nicely designed.  Yasiel was always there to answer any of our questions - responsive, helpful and friendly. I would say this area is an up-and-coming neighborhood.  There were several great restaurants within walking distance, and also the Albany Distillery directly across the street was great.  We would definitely recommend this house and would stay here again.

description: Enjoy your stay in a safe 5 star neighborhood close to everything in Albany. Beautiful first floor apartment. Free parking on site in parking lot in rear of home. Also free parking on street if you prefer. This beautiful home is in a great neighborhood and its centralized location makes it easy for you to get around. Get a great breakfast/lunch at Cafe Madison just a few blocks away.  A few minutes walk to St. Peter's Hospital and local shops. Book now for your luxury stay.
review: The host was incredibly responsive throughout our stay, from before we checked in to after we left. He thoughtfully provided us with some amenities to enhance our experience. The apartment’s location is convenient, making it easy to access all the attractions. If we find ourselves back in this area, we would definitely stay here again.

description: Relax in a newly renovated one bedroom/one bathroom apartment located on the 2nd floor of a charming brownstone building. It features lofty ceilings with beautiful architecture and a newly updated kitchen. Conveniently located to the Palace Theater, Capitol Rep Theater, Times Union Center and the Empire State Plaza. This rental is in walking distance to many popular eateries, bars, and more to explore! Laundry on Site for Long-Term Stays
review: I felt immediately at home in this lovely apt. in the historic part of Albany,NY. High ceilings, two fireplaces, and a beautiful ceiling medallion in the living room. Most importantly, it has a very comfortable bed. There wasn't a lot of hot water in the kitchen, but fortunately there was plenty  of hot water in the bathroom. The place was quite clean, except for the bathtub (I cleaned that myself before using it). The building is quiet. There is occasional street noise, but that goes along with city living. The apt. is on the second floor; the hallway needs better lighting (for safety and practical reasons). I couldn't see the smart lock; I had to use the flashlight on my phone. David, the host, is very nice. I broke a glass while washing the dishes. His only concern was if I had injured myself ( I was okay). My only regret is that I didn't get to spend more time inside the apt. I'm in the process of moving and busy, but looked forward each day to returning  to this charming apt.

description: BOOK this 1st floor apt in a renovated historic 200 year-old building in a quiet neighborhood of Albany's Pastures. Great location near Albany Medical Center, Times Union Center, Empire State Plaza, Library, Lark Street, State Offices, courts; easy access to local & regional bus routes and highways (I-787, I-90 & I-87). Great for traveling nurses!  1 Queen sized bed, and 1 Queen sized air mattress.  Save & BOOK this unit today! Message me anytime. Hope to welcome you soon!  -Earl
review: Thank you so much for a great stay! The home was clean and peaceful and parking was a breeze. I would definitely stay again.

description: A peaceful 1-bedroom apartment nestled in a quiet residential area of Albany. minutes away fromMarket 32 and local restaurants andSt. Rose College, Downtown Albany is7-minute drive away, Albany Med just 5 minutes, and Saint Peters only 3 minutes, convenience is at your fingertips. The apartment is part of a 4-unit house, offering privacy and thick walls for a noise-free environment.Free street parking is never a problem to park.
review: This place was disgusting. We found hair and fake eyelashes in the shower, a clogged toilet and acrylic nails on the floor. These are just some of the things we walked into after traveling for 4.5 hours. Host told us the cleaning crew “must’ve forgotten” this apartment as he has at least eight airbnb rentals in the Capitol Region. Surprised he didn’t think to check the unit, before he allowed new guests to stay. Wish I could include pictures to show you how truly nasty this was.

description: A beautiful newly renovated 2 Bedroom apartment. 1 bedroom is set up as office with a desk and chair and also a yoga mat and workout bands. The apartment is located 3 minutes walking from Albany Med, a few steps away from Washington Park, several minutes from State offices. The area is full of great restaurants, walking distance grocery store and boutique shops.
review: Great communication and all around nice guy! Couldn’t have asked for a better weekend with a better host and amazing place to stay. Would come again :)

description: Enjoy a stylish experience at this centrally-located place. The spacious unit is newly renovated with a 4K Smart TV, in unit washer/dryer, updated kitchen and bathroom, high speed internet.   You will also have access to the building gym.
review: Linda's super spacious place is very comfy! Warm and smelled great the second we walked in.  What stood out for me, was we had some minor issues that I could tell was an innocent oversight.  I called Linda and she was very pleasant and proactive.  Her team swooped by the space, super fast, and made every thing excellent! This loft will be labeled a Guest Favorite, and she's definitely a Superhost.  Thanks Linda!

description: Enjoy a stylish experience at this centrally-located place. Upper duplex recently renovated to make room for a lovely trip to Albany. Well appointed 1st floor offers kitchen/livingroom full bath. 2nd floor has 2 bedrooms and an additional full bathroom. Tons of natural light provides a peaceful space. Walk out front door to explore neighborhood. Lark street, capital, convention center are all within 15 minutes of walking
review: Diana's place was super clean and beautiful. My friends and I were very happy with the whole experience. We didn't have any issues at all and we were able to fully relax and enjoy our weekend. Her place and neighborhood was comfortable and safe. We highly recommend booking her unit and would definitely love to come back again.

description: Listing is designed with the business or casual traveler in mind PLEASE NO SMOKERS in the building *Newly renovated *Modern 1 bedroom w/Smart TVs that feels like home *Street parking *Equipped with coffee maker *Fridge *Wireless charger *Private bath *Across the street from the Capitol Building *Close to Highway I-87, I-90, I-787 & public transportation. Long term stays available. Please inquire with dates needed for more info. Traveling nurses, doctors, lobbyists, students are welcome.
review: We very much enjoyed our stay at the condo, which is centrally located and allowed us to walk to many touristy destinations as well as to local bars and restaurants. Two great parks are also within walking distance. Street parking is free after 5 for overnight, but be mindful that you'd need to move your car in the morning, or just pay for all-day parking nearby. During our stay the elevator had some issues and was out of commission, so we needed to walk up and down the six floors, but that wasn't too big a pain at all. We incidentally met Del (one of the owners) in the lobby and had a nice exchange. He seemed like a great guy. I recommend staying here and would again next time in Albany.

description: This home is a gorgeous 100 year old Victorian This suite is located on the 2nd floor. All the comforts of home! A very clean and quiet setting makes for a comfortable stay here at the Inn. Perfect for the business traveler or Traveling nurses that have contracts with one of the local hospitals located minutes away.
review: I stayed for a weekend visiting a friend who was graduating from one of the nearby colleges. The place is very conveniently located, only about a 5 minute walk from the colleges and medical center. Also walkable to the nearby Washington Park and the Downtown Albany area. The house is very clean and matched the listing. The bathroom for this room is shared, but some of the other rooms in the house have their own bathrooms, so not many people use it. The hosts were responsive and clear with their instructions. I would definitely consider staying here again if I return to Albany!

description: The whole group will enjoy easy access to everything from this centrally located place. Convenient 1st floor unit with ample bedrooms, livingroom, dining room and spacious kitchen. Off street parking spot included.
review: Diana was an amazing responsive and helpful host!!! Her home was comfortable and everything she said it was! We will stay again when we are in the area! Thank you!

description: Enjoy a comfortable stay in a truly one of a kind home in Albany. This former retreat has  loads of amenities to enjoy; two dining room, two living rooms, three porches, a full kitchen, huge yard, gazebo, coffee bar and more! The room has a desk and TV. Walk to eateries, grocery, and cinema.
review: came to NY on a trip to pickup my daughter, last minute as it may have been it was WELL worth it. the pictures could never do it any real justice! the hosts were very accommodating and although the listing was a room for rent and I felt welcomed, at home, and felt free to go to any space I wanted. would most definitely stay again :)

description: Indulge in modern luxury and sophistication in this tastefully updated 2-bedroom townhouse-style apartment. With chic designer furnishings and modern amenities, your private porch entrance welcomes you home to elegance. Located on one of Center Square's most picturesque streets, enjoy easy access to fabulous dining, iconic landmarks, and vibrant nightlife. Experience the convenience of city living, just a mile from Albany Medical Center and St. Peter’s Hospital.
review: Elizabeth is a very amazing host! Quick response and friendly. Her Aprtment is close to downtown and restaurant. I really enjoy my stay there!

description: Room available near major hospitals and universities/colleges in Albany, NY.   Close to restaurants, grocery stores, bus lines and coffee shops.   We are friendly to travelers of all kinds, folks around for a short-period and welcome all persons.  *Please be advised: This is a 3 bedroom house and the homeowner lives in the house. All rooms are private; all common rooms shared. You will have access to all amenities in home.   We do have pets in the home, please advise of allergies.
review: Melissa was a wonderful host! I felt right at home immediately. We are looking to move to the area and Melissa's insight was invaluable.  The bed in the room was the best bed I've ever slept in in an Airbnb. I appreciate the touches like a basket for toiletries and a bathmat for my personal use.  I will definitely stay there again if I'm in the area.

description: Stay in a clean, quiet home with 2 friendly housemates. Renovated in 2023, this co-living space offers: 	•	Private bedroom (furnished) 	•	Shared bathroom 	•	Fully furnished common areas 	•	Fast Wi-Fi 	•	In-home laundry 	•	Free driveway parking 	•	Shared entry  Perfect for short or long stays. Convenient, comfortable, and move-in ready!
review: Alain was such an amazing host! Super helpful, friendly, always quick to respond, and just really easy to communicate with. The place was exactly like the photos, clean, cozy, and had everything I needed, just like being in my own home. Every amenity you’d expect was there, which made the stay really comfortable. I had a great experience and without a doubt would book with Alain again. If you’re heading to Albany, this is the place to stay.

description: Step into the charming and comfy 1BR/1BA apartment in the heart of Albany, NY. It promises a relaxing retreat bordering picturesque Washington Park and funky Lark Street while being within walking distance to the vibrant downtown, which offers easy access to restaurants, shops, and exciting attractions.  The lovely design and the prime location will leave you in awe.  ✔ Comfy Queen Bedroom ✔ Open Design Living ✔ Fully Equipped Kitchen ✔ Smart TV ✔ Wi-Fi ✔ Free Parking  See more below!
review: We had a great stay! The apartment is large and bright, centrally located just off of Lark St in a historical building. Lots to do on Lark St and you can easily walk to the Capitol area. Grocery store is close by. The code we were given to access the apartment did not work and we ran into another AirBnb person with this host who was having the same issue in a different apartment in the building. That being said, after messaging I received a call very quickly with a new code that worked. Host was very responsive and we appreciated the guide we were sent. The welcome basket was very nice and beyond what we expected. The apartment itself was near spotless (though the building is not very clean).   Overall, I would absolutely stay again and would recommend to anyone coming to Albany.

description: Spend your visit in Albany in our amazingly beautiful place! The house has just been renovated. Every room has its own separate bathroom. The house is conveniently located near the downtown as well as Saint Rose College. The parking lot is also provided. There are many restaurants, pubs and local attractions within reach.
review: The house is beautiful and our group of 4 had lots of space as well as bathrooms for each of us. I would recommend this house to anyone! Peter was super friendly and attentive.

description: Cozy 1BR in Center Square—steps from Lark St, Dove & Deer, the Capitol, and MVP Arena. This fully furnished unit features a modern kitchen, comfy living space, private laundry access (in basement), and full bath. Ideal for traveling nurses, legislators, or solo professionals. Walkable, convenient, and close to Albany Med, St Peter's Hospital, Irongate, and great dining. Traditional key entry. Clean, convenient, and perfectly located. Back unit, entrance in back of building.
review: Lovely place! Enjoyed my time. Highly recommend the stay. Super awesome place.

description: Spacious, comfortable unit less than 10 minutes from downtown Albany, 5 minutes from AlbanyMed, and walking distance to St. Peter's Hospital, Maria College, Buckingham Lake, CVS, and restaurants. Features a dining area with air fryer and microwave (no stove), an office, and basic workout equipment. Ideal for short getaways or extended stays, perfect for traveling nurses, doctors, remote workers, and anyone seeking a peaceful neighborhood.
review: Nice little place basement apt. Had microwave and good sized fridge. Nice area by the hospital and walkable to bus stops, amenities, stores. Was a little chilly temperature wise as I’m always cold. Had large workout room/office, room, living area and full bath. Parking can be tight and street parking can be used after 4pm M-F. Otherwise pleasant stay.

description: This newly renovated 2BR/1BA apartment, situated on the first floor of a two-family house, offers sophistication and space. Enjoy a separate entrance and convenient location in downtown Albany, with grocery stores, restaurants, bars, nightlife, hospitals, and parks just steps away. With public transportation and ample street parking nearby, this is the perfect place to call home.
review: 100 out of 100 stars. Elizabeth’s place is perfect...no complaints here. Extremely clean, great location, and super cute. Elizabeth was a fantastic host! She responded quickly to messages, was very accommodating, and super sweet. You will not be disappointed in the stay! One of the best Air BnB experiences me and my friends have ever had :)

description: IF YOUR PRIORITY IS GOOD NEIGHBORHOOD AND FANCY CLEAN HOUSE”DO NOT PRFER US” IF YOUR PRIORITY IS “””SAFETY PLACE,GREEN LIFE AND ORGANIC NUTRITION””” YOU PREFER US Important notice We updated our cleaning protocol duo to COVID-19 pandemic.  This room is not 5 stars hotel room.  Before booking,read carefully about room description. Breakfast free,Wi Fi high speed internet We don't use chemical cleaning stuff.We use Vinegar,baking powder,biological pesticides .
review: Adam was very welcoming and generous. The food was delicious and he went out of his way to take me to the airport for a very early flight. I'd stay there again!

description: This amazing historical apartment is located in Downtown Albany, near the Palace Theater, MVP Arena, Capital Repertory Theatre, NYS Museums, restaurants, and cafes. 1 free parking permit space and small pet friendly. Amenities includes Keyless entry, Free wifi, Free Laundry on site, a kids Multi-game table, 1 Queen LED lite bed, with a blowup bed and a pull out couch. Please be cautious about parking. Albany City has street cleaning nights that prohibits certain side parking on Sundays & Mondays
review: This was a great place to stay for an event at the MVP arena. The price was right for what it was and Stephanie was a very accommodating and responsive host. Parking was fairly easy right outside the unit and the neighborhood was nice and quiet.

description: Once a retreat, then a convent—now it’s your cozy home away from home. Enjoy a well-lit room with a Purple Hybrid 4 queen bed, desk, and 75" TV. Relax in two family rooms, cook in the spacious kitchen, or sip coffee on one of four enclosed porches. Walk to groceries, restaurants, and the movies, or hop on the bus right outside. Whether for a short trip or long stay, comfort and community await you here.
review: Nice place.  Very clean.  Comfy bed. Responsive host.  I will stay again.

description: Welcome to our newly renovated, one bedroom apartment in the heart of the charming Melrose neighborhood in Albany, NY, conveniently nestled between UAlbany and downtown. ☺️ Please note, this apartment is apart of a four family apartment complex.   This pet friendly space includes an outdoor sitting area and small patio.
review: Awesome stay in a good neighborhood. It was perfect for my needs. I would definitely stay again.

description: Welcome to The Urban Nest! Your stylish retreat in Albany’s Center Square! Spotless, beautifully designed 1BR garden apartment in a historic brownstone, short walk to Washington Park, MVP Arena, the Capitol, Empire State Plaza, and top restaurants. Enjoy a king bed, in-unit laundry, workspace, a fully equipped kitchen guests rave about, Smart TV, and fast WiFi. Immaculate, cozy, and perfectly located. Relax and feel at home. Perfect for couples, professionals, or weekend getaways.
review: What a gem! This Airbnb was even better than described. Great decor! Squeaky clean! Great towels & sheets! All the amenities you could need on your stay. Right off Lark Street which has lots of restaurants and bars. Bustling area close to the capitol.  Nice and quiet by 11pm. Absolutely would stay there again and recommend to anyone.

description: Cute single family home in a convenient location with the lots of restaurants, bars and shops right around the corner. It features a driveway with covered parking, a nice outdoor area and central air. My place is close to University of Albany, shopping malls and plazas, bars, restaurants, the airport, the city center, parks, art and culture. Parties and events are not allowed.
review: Very clean and comfortable. Interesting theme. Highly recommend.

description: Room available near major hospitals and universities/colleges in Albany, NY.   Close to restaurants, grocery stores, bus lines and coffee shops.   We are friendly to travelers of all kinds, folks around for a short-period and welcome all persons.  *Please be advised: This is a 3 bedroom house and the homeowner lives in the house. All rooms are private; all common rooms shared. You will have access to all amenities in home.   We do have pets in the home, please advise of allergies.
review: Melissa was great!! It was a really last minute stay and I'm so grateful she accepted. I felt very at home and comfortable staying here. Such a lovely home and her dog is so sweet :)

description: BEAUTIFUL + LUXURIOUS renovated apartment with CHARACTER in a historic building.   This spacious 2 bedroom feature a bright reading nook in the master bedroom, an office space, a soaker tub, 4K Smart TV with Netflix, and high speed internet ready for you to use! It comes with a fully stocked kitchen, in unit washer/dryer, free resident parking, and a fenced shared backyard with bbq for guests to enjoy.
review: I traveled with a group to attend a concert at Empire Live on Pearl Street. We felt comfortable walking together to the event and had a good time. The accommodations were excellent. Clean rooms, comfy beds, plenty of towels, nicely decorated.  Everyone in the party was happy with the choice made.

description: BEAUTIFULLY renovated and stylish apartment with CHARACTER in a brownstone building. PRIME location in the heart of downtown Albany, minutes from highway and walking distance to popular restaurants, and pubs.   Local attractions including The Egg, Empire State Plaza and Palace Theatre are less than 5 minutes away. 4K Smart TV with Netflix, stocked kitchen & bathroom, high speed internet ready for you to use!   Tenant permit street parking available. Available for long term stays!
review: Honestly, this was the most beautiful place I’ve ever stayed in! It was VERY clean, and organized! Linda was also very communicative! Loved everything about it! Definitely would stay again!

description: Convenience and comfort is what you will find. Private bedroom offered in single family home with driveway close to Albany Med, St. Peter’s, St. Rose, U Albany, CDTA public transport, restaurants, downtown, and nightlife. Full kitchen available with comfortable living room and full bathroom. Hosted multiple medical professionals, students, state interns, and more!  House is a 4 bedroom 1 bath home.
review: Everything you need including respectful, mature professionals staying here is what to expect. A welcoming cozy place you feel right ar home with right away. Theu think of all the tiny details that surely add up here! I like it so much I'm staying again for another 2 weeks (even in a city I'm not terribly fond of for work).

description: Please note this is a NO FRILLS stay.  I don't offer amenities outside of fresh towels and soap.  I keep expenses low so I can keep low cost for stay.  Enjoy key pad private bedroom and your own full bath in my home.   My dog is not socialized so he stay in my closed door office when I have guests.  You can park your car in my driveway.  Minutes to St. Peter's,  Albany Med,  SUNY Albany, NanoTech, stores and restaurants.
review: The location was easy to find, clean and no frills, which is what I was after. I was just there to sleep while touring the area.  Donna was friendly and great with communication.

description: Urban Oasis!  2nd Floor master bedroom in residential home.  Queen sized bed. Private bath. Mini-refrigerator, microwave and sitting area in room. Shared entrance but access to full kitchen, bath, bedroom, laundry and parking. Walking distance to Albany Med, Albany Pharmacy, Albany Law School, College of St. Rose and Sage College.  On Main bus line.  10 minute drive from downtown
review: I stayed with Ed and Ann for two months during a summer internship and their place was a great find - it's very clean, safe, cozy and conveniently located. I could use the kitchen and they added a mini fridge to the room not long after I arrived, which was super helpful. Plus their two dogs are so cute!

description: Perfect place to relax with your family or stopover on a work trip. A quiet, suburban neighborhood that is close enough to everything. 5 min drive to UAlbany and St Peter's Hospital. 15 min drive to downtown Albany. 18 min drive to Albany Int'l Airport. 5-10 min drive to plenty of restaurants and pubs.
review: Comfortable stay. More than we expected for one quick stay. It was equipped with everything to make you feel like home

description: This unique place has a style all its own. Three levels of space all to yourself. Central located in Downtown Albany. Fully stocked kitchen to make meals at home or plenty of near by restaurants to explore. Spacious bedroom with attached bathroom. Work area to get some work done before hanging out to catch up on some Netflix shows. Your home away from home for a night or more of you choose.
review: This was a great place to stay right near the center of Albany. I was motivated by the presence of a ChargePoint charging station about 3 blocks away (parking lot at 175 Green St.) which was convenient... though walking by a homeless shelter made it not the nicest part of town. Once inside, the apartment was pretty nice and worked well as a crash pad. Recommend!

description: BEAUTIFULLY renovated apartment with CHARACTER in a historic building. This is a ground floor unit with direct fenced backyard access and a private patio! Ideal for pet owners! 4K Smart TV with Netflix, and high speed internet ready for you to use! This property comes with a fully stocked kitchen, in unit washer/dryer, free resident lot parking, and a fenced shared backyard with bbq for guests to enjoy.
review: This was our first time to Albany, New York and we thoroughly enjoyed it! Linda’s Airbnb was just what we needed. I liked the fact that she had a full refrigerator and stove/oven for us to use in addition to a large shower and a comfortable bed. If you’re in Albany, New York this is the place to stay!

description: Spectacular Modern two bedroom apartment in Downtown Albany's Historic Mansion District across the Governors mansion. Perfect for traveling professionals and/or families. 3 minute walk to The NYS Museum, Empire State Plaza, many local restaurants, The Capital , the MVP Arena, The legislative Office building, The Cathedral & Lark Street. A 3 minute drive to Albany Medical Center, Albany Law School & The VA Hospital.Exceptionally quiet street. If traveling with family, lots of nearby Playgrounds.
review: My son and I were in town for the weekend for an event at the empire center which is walking distance. When my son and I walked into the place we were shocked at how big it was! And how beautiful. The pictures on Airbnb do not do it justice. There were two bedrooms with comfortable beds, a nice big kitchen. And there is a porch in back with a backyard! I can't vouch for what it's like during the week, because we were there for a weekend, but parking was amazing. Every time we found parking right in front of the house. My son and I felt safe in the neighborhood, even at night when we walked home from the empire center. We could not believe what a good deal we got. I'm also very happy that we got to meet Johnny. He was a very nice guy and helpful. My son who is nine, and a very good judge of character, said "Johnny has a great vibe!" I agree, anyone can tell that he is a good soul. If I ever have occasion to stay in Albany again, this is where I will try to stay.

description: This Suite has been refurbished completely. A beautiful and comfortable Suite that has everything a guest needs! Nice decor with a queen bed, desk, cable TV, WiFi, ironing board, blow dryer and your own private bath. Private entrance close to front of house.  The Inn at South Lake is a large Victorian with multiple dorm style suites. Each suite has it's own private lock. A very quiet, professional atmosphere .
review: Great space! Perfect for healthcare workers and students. Check in was easy and it is a very quiet space. I would definitely reccommend.

description: This amazing historical apartment is located in Downtown Albany, near the Palace Theater, MVP Arena, Capital Repertory Theatre, NYS Museums, restaurants, and cafes. 1 free parking permit space and small pet friendly. Amenities includes Keyless entry, Free wifi, Free Laundry on site, a kids Multi-game table, 1 Queen LED lite bed, with a blowup bed and a pull out couch. Please be cautious about parking. Albany City has street cleaning nights that prohibits certain side parking on Sundays & Mondays
review: The problems started upon arrival. When I got to the house it was 2 am. I placed the code in the lock and it said "Battery low need to replace" then proceeded to say "unlocking", but never unlocked. I tried this at least 3/4 times and got the same result. I immediately started to panic because I didn't think I would be able to hear from my host. Stephanie herself was amazing because she was still up at 2am and able to get me in the unit. Once inside I was greeted with cold air. The house was FREEZING. I turned EVERY SINGLE DIAL imaginable to get the place to warm up and it never got better. All the remotes in the house had dust on it which meant cleaning had not occurred in I don't know how long. Woke up the next morning still cold and nose freezing. Then found toe nail clipping in the bed with me.  After that I packed up all my belongings turned off everything and left to go to a hotel down the street. It was nonrefundable so it wasn't much more I could do which made me want to cry.

description: Spend your visit in Albany in our amazingly beautiful place! The house has just been renovated. Every room has its own separate bathroom. The house is conveniently located near the downtown as well as Saint Rose College. The parking lot is also provided. There are many restaurants, pubs and local attractions within reach.
review: This is our second time staying at this house. It is a great spot: very walkable to many things, an easy drive to everything to which we couldn’t walk. Lots of parking. Rooms are spacious and four of us can each have our own bedroom and bathroom. Reliable wifi. Love eating outside on the patio. Particularly liked burrowing in the giant poof in the living room. Will stay here again!

description: This Suite has been refurbished completely. A beautiful and comfortable Suite that has everything a guest needs! Nice decor with a queen bed, desk, cable TV, WiFi, ironing board, blow dryer and your own private bath. Private entrance close to front of house.  The Inn at South Lake is a large Victorian with multiple dorm style suites. Each suite has it's own private lock. A very quiet, professional atmosphere .
review: Highly recommended with 5 glowing stars. Bela and Laurie are amazing hosts: responsive, caring, welcoming and very easy to communicate with. Their house is beautiful and they always respond to messages from guests immediately. They let me check in early upon request which was very accommodating of them - that was my first interaction with them and since then all other communication has been equally seamless. Bela and Laurie always respond immediately to guests and they consistently go out of their way to make sure all guests have a good experience at their AirBNB. The home is beautiful and historic - and also spotless, modern and clean with newly-renovated kitchen that has everything you need. There is air conditioning. Definitely worth the bargain price in a big beautiful spacious house that is historic yet modern at such a bargain price. Highly recommended.

description: Welcome to our charming Airbnb located in the heart of Albany, NY, perfectly situated on the central bus line for easy access to all the city's major attractions. Our accommodation has spacious common areas that invite you to relax and unwind. Discover our expansive yard, an oasis in the city the highlight of which is undoubtedly the massive hot tub. The property is outfitted with an abundance of furniture indoors and out. ABBA House is designed to make your stay as comfortable as possible.
review: The host is very accommodating and friendly. I always feel at home when I come to this place. Highly recommend it.

description: Spacious, comfortable unit less than 10 minutes from downtown Albany, 5 minutes from AlbanyMed, and walking distance to St. Peter's Hospital, Maria College, Buckingham Lake, CVS, and restaurants. Features a dining area with air fryer and microwave (no stove), an office, and basic workout equipment. Ideal for short getaways or extended stays, perfect for traveling nurses, doctors, remote workers, and anyone seeking a peaceful neighborhood.
review: One of the best Airbnb I ever stayed in, Quiet place and neighborhood. Matched the photos, place was clean and cozy. Comfortable bed and couch. Hassan is very friendly and responsive. I highly recommend this place and would definitely book again

description: Settle into Albany at the Allen House. This newly renovated apartment will be perfect for your time in the capital of NY. The house is in an unbeatable location with restaurants and stores just around the corner; a few of our favorites are Juniors & Madison Cafe. Many shops and stores are within walking distance. Free street parking only. Book today to ensure your dates!  10 minute drive to the heart of downtown 16 minute drive to Albany International Airport
review: We were in Albany for family weekend at The College of Saint Rose. Scott’s place was right down the street from the college which was very convenient. The apartment was exactly as pictured and very clean and comfortable. It was perfect and I would definitely stay there again.

description: Relax in our cozy home on a quiet one-way street. Plenty of free street parking available. With a large dining and living room, fully stocked kitchen, and furnished private room, our home is the perfect affordable stay for working professionals, students, and people in-between housing.   Newly furnished and renovated in 2017. Minutes from major universities and hospitals. Entire home is 3 bed 1 bath (you have a private bedroom with door lock). CDTA Bus stop 1 block away.
review: The hosts are responsive and helpful. The place is located not far from the local supermarket. Highly recommended for short or longer sojourns.

description: BEAUTIFULLY renovated and stylish apartment with CHARACTER in a brownstone building. This spacious unit features high 10 ft ceilings , a 4K Smart TV with Netflix, stocked kitchen & bathroom, high speed internet ready for you to use! Tenant permit street parking available.
review: This location is exactly as described. Now initially when we arrived the heat was not on and there were some issues with getting the heat going, but the host was responsive and helpful and before you know it the heat was on and the place couldn’t have been more cozy. The neighborhood is nice and quiet. The home was clean and as advertised. Only issue I had was I wish there was some bottled water in the refrigerator as I arrived at like 1 am and I was thirsty. Otherwise great host. Any concerns I had were addressed in immediately even at 1 in the morning. The host even made sure I had a parking permit while I was there. Overall great host and nice clean place.

description: Please note this is a NO FRILLS stay.  I don't offer amenities outside of fresh towels and soap.  I keep expenses low so I can keep low cost for stay.  Enjoy key pad private bedroom and your own full bath in my home.   My dog is not socialized so he stay in my closed door office when I have guests.  You can park your car in my driveway.  Minutes to St. Peter's,  Albany Med,  SUNY Albany, NanoTech, stores and restaurants.
review: Extremely comfortable place to stay. Donna was a wonderful host, and the location was perfect. It’s a quiet neighborhood that’s convenient to Delmar and Albany.

description: Nestled in the vibrant heart of the historic Center Square downtown area, this tranquil one-bedroom garden apartment offers a serene escape from the bustling city life. Housed within a charming brownstone building, it boasts a fully furnished living room that invites relaxation, a spacious bathroom for your comfort, and a convenient laundry room. This gem combines the allure of history with modern living. Near Hospitals, Schools and Government buildings.
review: Stephanie is a great host. Always in communication and very attentive. She made sure all our needs during our stay were covered. The place is quite spacious and with all the amenities needed. It is also in a great location (Lark Street, the Empire Plaza, supermarkets). Totally recommended!

description: Welcome to the Whisky House! Featuring 3 floors with plenty of space to host a corporate event or celebrate with loved ones. Walking distance from downtown and Center Square nightlife, the Whiskey House is the perfect location for a bachelor or bachelorette party, birthday celebration getaway, anniversary, you name it! Whatever the occasion, the Whiskey House is your home away from home.  *We DO NOT have a full size stove/oven - pocket kitchen with smaller amenities (microwave/fridge) available*
review: It is a fun and interesting place to stay. I would love to know more about the history of the building. The communication was great. Checkin-out was easy. I would definitely stay there again.

description: A cozy private apartment. The Blair Suite, named after the original owner of this beautiful 1890's Victorian, is located on the basement floor. It has it's own private entrance on the side of the home. Located in historic Albany, close to everything, hospitals, schools, museums, restaurants and Washington Park.
review: The Blair Suite is a cozy, warm, and relaxing place to stay. Exactly like the pictures shown. I loved the fact that I could cook and do my own thing with privacy. Everything I needed was right there! Will definitely come back if I need to.

description: This stylish light-filled space is perfect for traveling professionals, cozy 2 bedroom apartment minutes from hospitals, parks, and great restaurants. Very walkable location right next to Albany Medical Center.  ~ fast wi-fi ~fully equipped kitchen  ~55” smart tv ~free off street parking  ~contactless self check-in
review: A very nice place to stay in. Plenty of space, top quality mattresses, a large and comfy living room. Quiet and calm place. Fully equipped kitchen and easy access. Has it's own parking so that's a plus.

description: Discover Albany from the heart of downtown. This comfortable 2-bedroom apartment is just a 5-minute walk to the bus station and 7 minutes to MVP Arena, perfect for catching a concert, game, or event.  You’ll also be a short drive from the train station (5 minutes), Empire State Plaza (walkable), and Albany International Airport (15 minutes). Whether you're visiting for work or fun, this space is an ideal home base.  Iconic Saratoga Springs is just 30 minutes away!
review: ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ The host was extremely communicative and accommodating throughout my stay. Every question or request was met with quick, friendly responses. Truly one of the best hosting experiences I’ve had — highly recommend!

description: Newly renovated one bedroom, loft style apartment. Centrally located in the Mansion neighborhood in albany. Huge spacious open layout with walk in closet. Big screen tvs, with super fast internet (400 mps). On-site laundry, with locked off street parking. Spectacular views of downtown Albany. Walking distance to empire state plaza, the egg, times union, and excellent bars, restaurants, and delis. Great value for anyone staying in albany long or short term.
review: Michael is a great host. The unit is spotless and up to date. His food recommendations were excellent. He was very responsive when I communicated with him. I appreciated the secure, off street parking. Thanks Michael for an excellent stay in Albany!

description: Welcome to our exceptional apartment in Albany! Discover a blend of style, comfort, and a prime location. Just steps from the State Capitol, Empire State Plaza, museums, and the Hudson River, our home offers unparalleled access to Albany's top attractions. Immerse yourself in local culture with nearby cafes, boutiques, and historic landmarks. Experience Albany like never before. Book your stay for a memorable adventure!
review: My stay at this Airbnb was wonderful! The place was comfortable, and the host was responsive and helpful. Had a good time and would definitely recommend it to anyone visiting the area.

description: Entire garden apartment in Albany, New York. Walking distance to restaurants, shops and Washington Park. Situated in the heart of Historic Center Square neighborhood. 15 minute walk or short ride to MVP Arena. Perfect for couples and short getaways, but we welcome longer stays too!
review: I booked last minute with Matt for my trip to Albany after my first booking fell through. The hosts were nothing but kind and responsive from my first message. The apparent was very nice bigger than the pictures make it seem clean and definitely gave you a New York vibe! This place was very walkable to anything you would want to do in the area parking was also easy! All around a great experience!! Thank you!!

description: Situated on historic Madison Avenue, our property is surrounded by the charm of Albany's rich history and modern amenities. Just steps away from local cafes, restaurants, and boutique shops, you'll experience the true essence of city living. Explore nearby attractions such as the New York State Capitol, MVP Arena, Albany Medical Center , Lark Street and Washington Park, all within easy reach from our doorstep.
review: I really enjoyed my stay.  The apartment is very clean and well laid out.  The sound machine by the bed was a great touch as it is a busy area.  However it was super enjoyable to be there with great restaurants all around.  The instructions for entry to the building and apartment were clear and concise.  Thank you Etem for the stay in your beautiful space.🙏

description: This stylish place to stay is perfect to stop for a night or stay longer. Open living/kitchen area is perfect to hang out with family and friends. One bedroom with plenty of closet space. Bonus tv in bedroom with updated bathroom. Centrally located close to U-Albany, St. Rose, St. Peter’s & Albany Med to name a few. Quiet residential neighborhood walkable to great restaurants on Madison Avenue. Come and relax at your home away from home.
review: Feels like a home, very spacious with lots of facilities, good for long stay although we stayed only over night.  We didn't like the neighbourhood so much, but overall ok for one night. The floors are old and make a lot of noise,  at night our sleep was disturbed by people walking on the floor above, I couldn't sleep well.  Some of lamps are not working well and need to be replaced, but there was enough lights to cover for the ones that were not working. Bed was ok, the place is clean and looks like the photos.

description: Welcome to our exceptional apartment in Albany! Discover a blend of style, comfort, and a prime location. Just steps from the State Capitol, Empire State Plaza, museums, and the Hudson River, our home offers unparalleled access to Albany's top attractions. Immerse yourself in local culture with nearby cafes, boutiques, and historic landmarks. Experience Albany like never before. Book your stay for a memorable adventure!
review: Great studio along one of the nice residential blocks off of Lark St. I come to Albany often for work and compared to the prices of the hotels, this is much more affordable and allowed me the comfort of staying in a comfortable space. Seemed like a relatively new apartment complex, and had a small gym.

description: Modern and recently renovated 1 BR apartment with a memory foam mattress King bed, dining table, desk with a comfortable chair, electric fireplace, and a large smart TV. It also has a Nespresso machine for amazing brews, a toaster oven, and a microwave. The apartment is located 2 minutes from State offices and NYS Capitol building, 3 blocks away from Lark St, and 5 blocks from Washington Park. The area is full of great restaurants and within walking distance of grocery stores and boutique shops.
review: Albany has a lot of fine institutions. Ahmad’s AirBNB is a very quiet place to stay. No disturbances. The area is Walkable. I went for walks frequently always taking different directions each time. There was always something new to discover. Didn’t eat out so not sure about restaurants. Ahmad is an amazing host. He responds  to and addresses issues or concerns right away. Respectful and kind. The apartment is very spacious, clean , has working large size washing machine and dryer and everything else to make stay comfortable and convenient. I thoroughly enjoyed my stay and being hosted by Ahmad. Kenni.

description: A peaceful 1-bedroom apartment nestled in a quiet residential area of Albany. minutes away fromMarket 32 and local restaurants andSt. Rose College, Downtown Albany is7-minute drive away, Albany Med just 5 minutes, and Saint Peters only 3 minutes, convenience is at your fingertips. The apartment is part of a 4-unit house, offering privacy and thick walls for a noise-free environment.Free street parking is never a problem to park.
review: Great neighborhood. Apartment was clean and comfortable. We would stay again!

description: Enjoy this sunny king master bedroom with private luxurious bath. Relax in the garden, swing in the hammock, walk to a nearby bar, or travel 8 minutes and  listen to some of the Capital Region's exceptional music. This centrally located space has it all!  Walking distance to local bars and restaurants, and a 15 minute drive to trails and state parks. Backyard fire pit, large garden with sitting areas, fruit trees, herbs, hammocks, and spaces to unwind, you won't even know you are in the city!
review: Awesome experience. David is a great host. Recommend!

description: Indulge in modern luxury and sophistication in this tastefully updated 2-bedroom townhouse-style apartment. With chic designer furnishings and modern amenities, your private porch entrance welcomes you home to elegance. Located on one of Center Square's most picturesque streets, enjoy easy access to fabulous dining, iconic landmarks, and vibrant nightlife. Experience the convenience of city living, just a mile from Albany Medical Center and St. Peter’s Hospital.
review: Elizabeth is an amazing host. She was so helpful in providing tips about where to visit, eat, and shop in the area, and her space was impeccably clean and well appointed. The location is perfect, and easily walkable to restaurants, but a quick ride out to the country. We are so thankful that our experience moving to Albany began here!

description: 2-bed 1st floor apt. in a renovated historic two-century-old building in a quiet neighborhood of Albany's Pastures. Great location near Albany Medical Center, MVP Arena, Empire State Plaza, Library, Lark Street, State Offices, courts; easy access to local & regional bus routes and highways (I-787, I-90 & I-87).  1 King bed 1 Queen bed Cozy gas fireplace in living room Up to 6 NON-SMOKING guests Toiletries included  Save & BOOK this unit today! Message me anytime. Hope to welcome you soon!  -Earl
review: Earl was very accommodating with the check in and check out timings with us. The space was clean and well taken care of. Earl did his best to make sure our stay was comfortable and easy! I recommend this place so much as it is also right next to the bus station which makes commute much easier. Very nice place and host!!!

description: Forget your worries in this spacious and serene space.this place is near hospitals, colleges, restaurants and many more. Peaceful, quiet area.  You will have a living and dining room, a spacious kitchen and bathroom. It’s a shared place.
review: I had a good stay at Adriana’s place. The neighbourhood is safe. Adriana was helpful and communicative throughout. There were some fixes needed in the house and she quickly got them done. Thank you for being great host Adriana.

description: Modern and recently renovated 1 BR apartment with a memory foam mattress King bed, dining table, desk with a comfortable chair, electric fireplace, and a large smart TV. It also has a Nespresso machine for amazing brews, a toaster oven, and a microwave. The apartment is located 2 minutes from State offices and NYS Capitol building, 3 blocks away from Lark St, and 5 blocks from Washington Park. The area is full of great restaurants and within walking distance of grocery stores and boutique shops.
review: Ahmad has been a lovely host. I stayed for 30days and no problems whatsoever. Apartment in great shape and Ahmad very friendly and thoughtful through out the stay. Without a doubt I recommend this airbnb.

description: This beautifully renovated and brightly decorated brownstone in historic Albany is your perfect getaway. Located just minutes from charming downtown, guests can enjoy all Albany has to offer.   Very spacious bedroom and living area with an abundance of natural light creates a very comfortable environment! It features a fully stocked kitchen, in unit washer/dryer, free resident lot parking, and a fenced shared backyard with bbq for guests to enjoy.  Long term stays available.
review: Linda was excellent to work with. Quick with responses and great communication. The apartment itself was cute, clean and had pretty much everything that someone would need! My only downside to my stay was the location (a bit sketchy) and the cleanliness outside (which is out of Linda's control). Due to this, I needed to get out of my stay and Linda was kind and amenable to my request. The apartment is close to downtown, and there is a liquor store and convenience store right across the street. There is also an excellent pizza place and distillery around the corner!  If you don't mind the area, I would highly recommend staying with Linda!

description: The whole group will enjoy easy access to everything from this centrally located place. Sun filled top floor unit with spacious bedrooms-well equipped kitchen and modern bath. Convenient location near highway and major hospitals/universities. Malls-restaurants and shopping all close by. Quiet residential neighborhood makes it lovely to walk to close by restaurants to grab a bite to eat outside. Come spend a night or two and be our guest
review: Beautiful place, well decorated, responsive host. We were just there to sleep and be on our way. It was perfect! Thanks Diana

description: For traveling professional, college students, or parents visiting your young adult, enjoy this stylish apartment centrally-located in Albany. review: Carla is a fantastic host. She did such a great job communicating about the rental. I reached out to her concerned that I had left my favorite earrings at the Airbnb and she was kind enough to check the Airbnb for me. Very kind host!

description: Prime Real Estate On the Bus Route - Free bus every 20 minutes.  This place is in the Heart of Albany, lots of things in walking distance. Bar and Restaurant Mania!  Minutes from: Suny Albany Downtown Albany Medical College Albany Law School St Peters Hospital Albany VA Medical Center Samaritan Hospital Albany Memorial Hospital Massry Family Children's Emerg Center
review: Exactly as advertised. Clean and comfortable. Great place in a great location. Rodney was terrific with communication.

description: This location in Albany’s cultural and business hub is ideal for travelling nurses,  professionals on assignment, and visitors alike.  Walk to Empire State Plaza, The Egg, and top dining.  Minutes from MVP Arena, NYS Library & Archives, Albany Med, Albany Universities/Colleges, and government offices.  Features Queen bed, pull-out couch, full kitchen, Wi-Fi, and in-unit laundry.  Quick access to I-787, I-90, and Amtrak. More space, comfort, and convenience than a hotel—book now!
review: Vander was thoughtful with a handwritten note to our family, a board in the home with local recommendations, games (which our kids loved!), and even a shelf of books. We stayed one night as we were passing through and Vander’s place met our needs. Thank you.

description: My home is within walking distance of the Capital, the Empire State Plaza, Albany Medical Center, and many restaurants and museums. It's directly across from beautiful Washington Park, and it's an ideal location for medical students,  nurses,  people taking the bar exam, or here on business. I'm fully vaccinated as of May.  Please note resident cats and acknowledge that you're aware. Thanks!!
review: Alice was an exceptional host. Her apartment is incredibly homely and sits opposite a beautiful park. She went above and beyond hosting and picked me up from the train station and dropped me off several days later after my stay. Would highly recommend.

description: Meticulously and lovingly maintained home. Living and dining rooms feature gleaming hardwood floors.   Private fenced in yard. Excellent Albany location off of Western Ave- close to highways, restaurants, shopping etc.  New sauna space sauna with 8 bulbs built, next to a full bath with heated floor and small weight set, bench and treadmill.
review: Enjoyed my stay! Felt very at home there, real comfy & I will definitely be back. Thank you guys for having us.

description: A large suite located in a huge Victorian that’s very quiet. Suites have separate locks and are very private. The house maintains a very professional environment. Walking distance to hospitals, law schools and restaurants.
review: Very convenient and great for the price. Everything  listed as described. Place is kept clean and tidy. Spacious bedroom and nice closet. My first time booking a place with shared common/areas but was a nice experience. May hear some noise on street depending on which room you book. House parking on first come first serve basis. Street parking available as well. Location very close to medical center and downtown Albany area. Very responsive communication with hosts.

description: Hudson 1 is a first floor queen room with a larger bathroom and tub. Each room is equipped with a SmartTV and Apple TV as well as a desk.   This room is not pet friendly.   Complimentary Services: Continental Breakfast Onsite Parking Electric Parking Wi-Fi & Apple TV Keyless Entry Ensuite Guest Rooms ​ Paid Services: Cocktails Meeting Space Rentals Pets (If applicable) Early Checkin (1PM) Late Checkout (12PM)
review: Beautiful location and building. Matt was very welcoming. The place was as described and very clean.

description: For traveling professional, college students, or parents visiting your young adult, enjoy this stylish apartment centrally-located in Albany.  NY State Capital - 2.4 mi Suny Albany - 3.5 mi Albany Medical Center - 3.5 mi Regeneron Pharma - 4.8 mi RPI University - 10 mi General Electric  - 15 mi   The home is 1st floor unit in two family house, which was recently renovated.
