review: Carla was very responsive. Great deal for a longer stay and I was grateful for that. However, many issues the neighborhood is one of the worst in Albany and noisy when the weather is nice. upstairs neighbors were very noisy at times until one of them started working from home and then I was told I wasn't allowed to make noise from 8-5p. Got accused of my kid jumping when no one in my apartment heard such jumping but her kids often jumped so loud the whole apartment shook.  there was a leak in the kitchen twice once in the bathroom and one ceiling leak. she claimed she didn't know the ceiling leak was that bad but I sent pictures.  kitchen sink definitely leaked b4 I got there so it was an ongoing issue. some of the flooring is popping up and many other issues. Wouldn't install ac and was 84 degrees with her ceiling fans including with 4 standing fans I purchased. microwave is really high up can barely reach it and handle is glued on. Door key pad freq didn't work.

description: Discover unmatched safety and comfort in Albany's historic "Center Square". Our meticulously sanitized brownstone, located near "Albany Medical" and walking distance to State Offices, is perfect for guests aged 21+ and non-smokers seeking a serene and secure retreat. Enjoy the convenience of a private parking spot just a short walk in back of the building and take advantage of our strategic location for easy access to Saratoga, Lake George, Palace Theatre, The EGG, and downtown Albany.
review: Communicative host. Great area. Beautiful brownstone with high ceilings. Will book again!

description: This stylish place to stay is perfect to stop for a night or stay longer. Open living/kitchen area is perfect to hang out with family and friends. One bedroom with plenty of closet space. Bonus tv in bedroom with updated bathroom. Centrally located close to U-Albany, St. Rose, St. Peter’s & Albany Med to name a few. Quiet residential neighborhood walkable to great restaurants on Madison Avenue. Come and relax at your home away from home.
review: Home was clean and close to University of Albany. The description was accurate other than a working tv in bedroom (at least I couldn’t get it working). Nice stay.

description: Welcome to this charming room in Albany completely remodeled to the studs in '21! Centrally located in the peaceful Pine Hill neighborhood. It's walking distance to restaurants, bars, grocery store & historic Washington Park. 2 mi to SUNY and 1 mi to Albany Medical. Great for couples, traveling nurse, business professionals. Street parking available in front of the house. Your room is smart TV equipped with live cable for watching all your guilty pleasures, so feel free to bring your own login !
review: Elhadj is a great host.  His listing was as advertised and he gives very clear instructions.  Highly recommend.

description: Experience modern comfort in Albany's "Center Square".  This first-floor sanctuary in an elegant stone building offers 24/7 surveillance and a hardwired fire alarm system. Enjoy a bright living space, modern kitchen, and sleek bathroom. Ideal for short or extended stays. Private parking included. Surrounded by shops, restaurants, and nightlife. Walk to Albany Med, State Offices, The Capitol, and Empire State Plaza. 30 mins to Saratoga Raceway, 50 mins to Lake George, 1/2 mile to Palace Theater.
review: I had an absolutely wonderful stay at this Airbnb! The space was spotless, beautifully maintained, and exactly as described in the listing. The location was perfect—quiet, safe and close to everything I needed. Flerida was a fantastic host: friendly, responsive, and thoughtful, with great attention to details that made me feel right at home. The check-in process was smooth and stress-free, and even added small touches that showed how much she cares about her guests’ comfort.  I would highly recommend this place to anyone visiting the area and I will definitely will be booking again.

description: BEAUTIFUL + LUXURIOUS renovated apartment with CHARACTER in a historic building.   This spacious 2 bedroom feature a bright reading nook in the master bedroom, an office space, a soaker tub, 4K Smart TV with Netflix, and high speed internet ready for you to use! It comes with a fully stocked kitchen, in unit washer/dryer, free resident parking, and a fenced shared backyard with bbq for guests to enjoy.
review: PROS: A great location - walkable to lots of places. Very comfortable mattresses. Nice to have two bedrooms and two bathrooms and free parking. Other residents in the building were friendly. Communication and instructions were clear. WAYS TO IMPROVE: This place could use some love and attention to updates. Updating or fixing furniture as some of what appear to be cheaper pieces are lose or falling apart.

description: - No pets - No smoking or vaping - No parties or events - Directly across from Albany Academy - 1 mile from Albany Medical Center - 5.3 miles from UAlbany - Under 2 miles from Washington Park & Empire State Plaza - Just over 2 miles from The Egg & MVP Arena - Take a day trip to Lake George or Saratoga Springs! - King sized bed - Two spacious living rooms - Fully equipped kitchen - High-speed WiFi - Private parking
review: Stephanie’s place was an absolute 10/10—one of the best Airbnb stays we’ve ever had! The home was spotless, spacious, and incredibly comfortable, with everything we needed for a longer stay and a larger group. The price was fantastic for the value, and the check-in and check-out process couldn’t have been easier. The location was perfect—conveniently close to many attractions yet tucked away in a quiet, safe, and peaceful neighborhood. If we’re ever back in the area, we’ll definitely be booking this place again. Highly recommend!

description: Newly renovated one bedroom, loft style apartment. Centrally located in the Mansion neighborhood in albany. Huge spacious open layout with walk in closet. Big screen tvs, with super fast internet (400 mps). On-site laundry, with locked off street parking. Spectacular views of downtown Albany. Walking distance to empire state plaza, the egg, times union, and excellent bars, restaurants, and delis. Great value for anyone staying in albany long or short term.
review: If  you’re looking to get in shape, the stairs at this place will help you get started! This place is absolutely fabulous. It looks kudu like the pictures. The closet is amazing, very clean and spacious! Michael is a great host, willing to answer your questions and get things fixed if need be. Great location if you’re looking to explore Albany.

description: Room available near major hospitals and universities/colleges in Albany, NY.   Close to restaurants, grocery stores, bus lines and coffee shops.   We are friendly to travelers of all kinds, folks around for a short-period and welcome all persons.  *Please be advised: This is a 3 bedroom house and the homeowner lives in the house. All rooms are private; all common rooms shared. You will have access to all amenities in home.   We do have pets in the home, please advise of allergies.
review: Melissa was great! She was super easy to communicate with, very sweet and accommodating, and the location was great and close to everything! And her dog is the absolute best!!

This property comes with a fully stocked kitchen, in unit washer/dryer, free resident lot parking, and a fenced shared backyard with bbq for guests to enjoy.
review: This place is soo cool! Being from the South it was such an awesome experience to stay at Linda’s place, so much cool historical buildings surrounding the place. Would definitely stay here again

description: BEAUTIFULLY renovated and stylish apartment with CHARACTER in a brownstone building. This spacious unit features high 10 ft ceilings , a 4K Smart TV with Netflix, stocked kitchen & bathroom, high speed internet ready for you to use! Tenant permit street parking available.
review: Linda’s place is exactly as described. It’s quiet, easy access, squeaky clean, street parking available. Super close/walking distance from all my favorite coffee shops downtown. Would love to stay again in the future. Thanks!

description: One beautiful one bedroom garden level apartment in close proximity to all the best that downtown Albany has to offer. review: Had a really nice stay at this ground-floor apartment in Albany. The place was super clean and cozy, and the bed was huge and super comfy. The host was great, quick to respond and really helpful. The parking spot is around the block, which was fine. Overall, a solid spot if you’re visiting the area. I’d definitely stay here again!

description: This is a pet-friendly 2 bedroom apartment with an in unit washer and dryer. It is fully furnished with utilities included. The apartment is about one mile away from Albany Medical Center and St. Peters Hospital. The unit received an extensive renovation in 2022: new bathroom and kitchen as well as hardwood floors.  Kick back and relax in this calm, stylish space.
review: Jessica was a response host. The space was exactly as described and the neighborhood is quiet with ample parking. Having cooking and cleaning supplies was a great plus.

description: Welcome to our charming Airbnb located in the heart of Albany, NY, perfectly situated on the central bus line for easy access to all the city's major attractions. Our accommodation has spacious common areas that invite you to relax and unwind. Discover our expansive yard, an oasis in the city the highlight of which is undoubtedly the massive hot tub. The property is outfitted with an abundance of furniture indoors and out. ABBA House is designed to make your stay as comfortable as possible.
review: Was a very comfortable stay! Tom is very accommodating and happy to talk about things. I was new to the area, and he was a great first person to meet. Very knowledgeable, very responsive.

description: Our recently remodeled one-bedroom apartment boasts a park view, easy parking and is close to downtown Albany. The living area features a queen size futon and views of the sunset most evenings, and the bedroom features a luxurious queen-sized memory foam bed and access to our quiet garden where the sun rises.
review: Loved staying here. James was great host. Place was spacious and clean, had everything I needed.

review: Close to hospital, which was the reason for our stay. Parking on the street may be hit or miss but there was plenty of parking across the street in the park. Erion was quick to respond when we had a question.

description: Step into the charming and comfy 1BR/1BA apartment in the heart of Albany, NY. review: Can't say enough good things about this place - great value for the money and prime location near tons of restaurants on Lark street. Would definitely stay again and plan to. Also - very well thought out aesthetics within the unit. Great for working away from home and socializing a bit.

description: Discover unmatched safety and comfort in Albany's historic "Center Square". The New York State Capitol, The MVP Stadium, Albany Medical Center, art museums, and restaurants are a brisk walk away, and it takes about a 5-minute drive to the SUNY Albany campus.
review: Rabia was a fantastic host. It was truly a pleasure spending a few days in her gorgeous brownstone. I felt right at home from the moment I arrived. The space was spotlessly clean and very organized. She also provided a great list of local restaurants to check out. Highly recommend this as a place to stay while in Albany!

description: BEAUTIFULLY renovated and stylish apartment with CHARACTER in a brownstone building. This spacious unit features high 10 ft ceilings , a 4K Smart TV with Netflix, stocked kitchen & bathroom, high speed internet ready for you to use! Tenant permit street parking available.
review: Linda’s place is absolutely beautiful. It was close to the plaza, and parking wasn’t nearly as tricky as we had initially thought. Close to everything, spacious, would absolutely stay again!

This cozy, modern space offers fast wifi, streaming services, plush bedding, full bath, in-unit washer and dryer, and is just steps from Café Capriccio. Please click on photos for more information.
review: It was a great stay. Marlene was so helpful with everything we asked of her. Very accommodating and a such a cozy place to stay.

review: Michael’s place was perfect for a longer stay. It is located near great restaurants and close to a dog park which was great for us! Michael was very helpful and responsive as well.

review: Communication was great, and the space was everything I needed to get ready for my early flight the next day (only 15 mins from the airport)! Erion even took the extra step to turn on the AC in anticipation, even though my booking was last minute. If ever back in the area, I would stay here again!

description: Newly renovated one bedroom, loft style apartment. Centrally located in the Mansion neighborhood in albany. Huge spacious open layout with walk in closet. review: Excellent rental. Michael always was there when I needed something. Beautiful interior. I do have to say even though it is a quiet location it is not the best in terms of quality of neighborhood. I had a package stolen once (Michael was also very helpful with the process of informing/attempting to recover the package). But that’s out of Michael’s control, him and his newly furnished apartment made the stay very pleasant.

description: Kick back and relax in this calm, stylish space. Garden level studio just recently updated. Open floor plan offering everything you need to come home after a long day. Great location minutes off of Lark Street. Close to Capital Center, downtown, medical center and more.
review: Great place. Business trip. Will book again!

review: Great place to stay near Albany med. Had everything I needed, including hairdryer and a private fridge in room. Perfect for travel nurses!

description: Larson Blue sits in Albany's vibrant Center Square district, offering easy access to dining, shopping, and entertainment. With excellent public transportation and nearby highways, convenience is at your doorstep. review: this place was great even for me and my three friends!!! the kitchen was nice there was a slot of space and we were all able to gather around the TV and chill! it's right next to great shops we took a little walk and got some breakfast and whatever we needed. and it's way more quiet than you think!!

description: Newly renovated, modern and bright! Live in style in the heart of downtown Albany. Located at a PRIME location and walking distance to popular restaurants, and cafes on Lark Street. review: It was a great Airbnb! Everything was wonderful. Thanks, Linda!

description: Enjoy a comfortable stay in a truly one of a kind home in Albany. Walk to eateries, grocery, and cinema.
review: Thomas’s historic mansion is a wonderfully warm welcome to Albany. The property is very well loved and very well maintained, and I felt at home even while sharing spaces with other guests. Thomas was also incredibly responsive and accommodating, and I would consider staying here again in the future!

description: Enjoy this park view stylish experience at this centrally-located apartment. You’ll find yourself in the heart of Albany, New York. Only steps away from restaurants and bars. Washington Park right at your doorstep, and Albany Medical Center around the corner.
review: This rental was perfect for my friend and me. The location by beautiful Washington Park and close to lots of great restaurants and shops made it easy to quickly get to know the area, as my friend is familiar with Albany but I was not. The host made check-in and access very easy, and was above and beyond helpful about some parking issues we encountered during the earlier part of the stay. The back patio, though not pictured, was a big plus for us, allowing us a quiet and private outdoor space. This place will definitely be on our list next time we are in the area!

description: Relax in a newly renovated one bedroom/one bathroom apartment located on the 2nd floor of a charming brownstone building. It features lofty ceilings with beautiful architecture and a newly updated kitchen. Conveniently located to the Palace Theater, Capitol Rep Theater, Times Union Center and the Empire State Plaza. This rental is in walking distance to many popular eateries, bars, and more to explore! Laundry on Site for Long-Term Stays
review: The stay and David were both great! I had to book the listing last minute as I was traveling for work, and he was super responsive. The unit is beautiful and comfortable, and is located close to lots of things to do. It was a perfect place for a working vacation.

description: 1 bedroom with high ceiling and natural light. Fully stocked kitchen with complimentary Netflix. Centrally located in South End of Albany in converted school. Great value with off street parking included
review: Very nice place. The apartment is clean and comfortable. The appliances and appointments are good. Nice places to eat nearby and very close to the complex. Parking is convenient too. I would stay again.

description: Located in The Historical Neighborhood!  Beautiful 12’ high ceilings, original fireplace and molding, with private all day long sunny deck.This stylish place is perfect for the distinguished business traveler or group trips. 3 minutes walk to MVP arena,Corning Tower, The Egg Performing Arts Center.   Parking incl   Guests  have access to free WiFi and a fully equipped kitchen, washer/dryer!  Towels and bed linens are provided in this 1840’s era mansion
review: We had a wonderful stay! We came to town for family reasons and Timothy’s place gave us a great home base. It was beautiful, clean, welcoming, and bright. Kitchen was well-equipped too. Communication was also great! Highly recommend.

description: Spectacular Modern two bedroom apartment in Downtown Albany's Historic Mansion District across the Governors mansion. Perfect for traveling professionals and/or families. 3 minute walk to The NYS Museum, Empire State Plaza, many local restaurants, The Capital , the MVP Arena, The legislative Office building, The Cathedral & Lark Street. A 3 minute drive to Albany Medical Center, Albany Law School & The VA Hospital.Exceptionally quiet street. If traveling with family, lots of nearby Playgrounds.
review: Perfect place to stay  for a get away. Very clean, cozy and newly updated. The host is quick to respond. Check in was a breeze. Walking distance to MVP arena plus many door dash options. Would def recommend to anyone staying in the area. Thanks Johnny. :)

description: In the heart of Albany, our expansive home offers you a quaint, private room. Experience the charm of staying in a spacious dwelling while enjoying the conveniences of a central location, ideal for those who explore on foot. Our home exudes elegance with its lofty ceilings, intricate detailing, and spacious common areas. Feel free to relax in the lounge, brew coffee in the kitchen, or take in some fresh air on our terrace. The shared bathrooms are modern, clean, and equipped with essentials.
review: Phenomenal place. I love the gazebo in the backyard. The place is chick Quiet Well put together

description: Spend your visit in Albany in our amazingly beautiful place! The house has just been renovated. Every room has its own separate bathroom. The house is conveniently located near the downtown as well as Saint Rose College. The parking lot is also provided. There are many restaurants, pubs and local attractions within reach.
review: We needed a place to gather in the Albany area for a multigenerational family reunion. This BnB met our needs for spaces to get together, a fully functional kitchen to prepare our own meals, nearby restaurants when we didn't want to cook, and spacious and comfortable bedrooms to accommodate eight of us. The nearby area was extremely convenient to grocery and drug stores, movie theater, parks/playgrounds and safe walking. We loved the family room with 85" TV; great for kids' video games. Guests should be aware that there are tenants in one portion of the home, but it did not impact our stay. Also important to know that stairs are steep to get to multiple levels; this was mainly difficult for the older members of our group and exciting for our youngest people. Inside eating area did not quite accommodate eight people either with space or chairs, but there was additional outside tables and chairs if the weather had been better. Lovely home for our stay!!

description: Urban Oasis!  2nd Floor master bedroom in residential home.  Queen sized bed. Private bath. Mini-refrigerator, microwave and sitting area in room. Shared entrance but access to full kitchen, bath, bedroom, laundry and parking. Walking distance to Albany Med, Albany Pharmacy, Albany Law School, College of St. Rose and Sage College.  On Main bus line.  10 minute drive from downtown
review: A well-priced room in a great location in Albany near many things such as the Albany Medical Center.  The room is oversized with a nice sitting area. The hosts were very personable, accommodating and available. Quiet area, easy on-street parking. We slept great, enjoyed our stay and would stay again if we were in the area.

description: The Rose Haven space  Welcome to The Rose Haven Apartment! This unique oasis is nestled in the heart of the City of Albany, New York, offering a perfect location near Historic Washington Park. It promises a secluded romantic getaway immersed in the dreamy natural ambiance of Washington Park.   Once you are ready to rest and relax, retreat to the lovely bedroom, where you can recharge after an exciting day of adventuring throughout the City of Albany.
review: My husband and I spent 4 nights here. We loved the location across the street from Washington Park where we went running in the morning. Location was an easy drive to shopping and restaurants. The kitchen and bathroom were modern and clean and well equipped. Lots of space for a couple!

description: Larson Gold sits in Albany's vibrant Center Square district, offering easy access to dining, shopping, and entertainment. With excellent public transportation and nearby highways, convenience is at your doorstep. Experience the city's rich cultural scene, diverse dining options, and lively nightlife, all within walking distance. Don't miss out on this perfect blend of historic charm and modern amenities.
review: My first AirBNB experience and Atem was great at helping me through the process. Check-in / out was simple, the room was very clean. The area has a lot of fun places to go to especially if you take the bus.  I drove in from Massachusetts and it was basically a straight shot in and out which was perfect for me. Anyone looking to book the room I have two small notes - One being that the host may suggest parking in the lot next to the building - it is behind the fence with the private property sign on it - if you have someone  staying with you it will be easier to get in and out of that spot. Two - the local bus takes only exact change (currently 1.50 for most rides) - so if you do not have a commuter pass I would suggest bringing a lot of quarters.

description: Exquisite retreat at Cozy Sunset, mere steps from Albany Medical Hospital and downtown’s vibrant allure. Tailored for discerning professionals, this sophisticated abode blends opulent comfort with unrivaled convenience. Savor proximity to premier dining, boutique shopping, and cultural delights. Secure your splendid sojourn now!
review: Wonderful stay! The location is perfect,  just a short walk to downtown. The space was clean and comfortable, and the bed was great for a good night’s sleep. The hosts were very responsive and made everything easy. Highly recommend.

description: This private apartment is meant to be a home away from home for our guests!  We've done our best to create a calming, yet whimsical space to encourage relaxation on your vacation, business trip or whatever brought you to our city. The flat is located in the heart of the historic Center Square neighborhood in Albany and is short walk from many great restaurants and bars on Lark St., and beautiful Washington Park.  We hope you enjoy the space as much as we've enjoyed preparing it for you!
review: We truly enjoyed our experience at Greenwood flat. As lovely as the photos are, they can’t fully capture the essence of its exquisite style and comfort. The entire apartment is quite roomy for a couple and each of us were working while on holiday, yet we still had enough space to not bother each other. The design is calming and the apartment is complete with every essential and then some. Every detail is accounted for and all the furniture, appliances, linens, etc. are in perfect condition. Despite being within short walking distance to lots of restaurants and nightlife, the place was quiet. Parking was easy and Mela made sure we had a digital permit for our car as soon as we arrived. (Make sure to pay attention to street parking rules.) Extra special is the backyard garden, which was a lovely touch. I highly recommend Greenwood flat and its wonderful hosts, Mela and Matthew.

description: Cozy first floor 2-Bedroom located in a Pre-war building. Unit offers hardwood floors, well equipped bedrooms, bathrooms and kitchen.  Only a 10 min walk to fabulous cafe and restaurants on Madison Avenue.  Everything you've been looking forward right at your finger tips.   >Nearby ○ 3 Min to Saint Rose  ○ 4 min to St Peters ○ 7 min to Albany MED ○ 5 Min to Lark Street ○ 7 Min to Downtown ○ 7 Min to SUNY Albany ○ 8 Min to Palace Theater
review: We were in transition selling our house and moving. Diana’s place was perfectly located. It’s very cute and the couch and beds were very comfortable!! Exactly what we needed. Diana sent information on what was happening around us and her place had everything we needed. Highly recommend.

description: Discover peace of mind in our professionally sanitized 2bdrm apt. in Center Square Albany. Perfectly designed for extended stays, this apartment features 24/7 security cameras and a hardwired fire alarm system for your safety. Whether you're working remotely or seeking a comfortable retreat, enjoy blackout curtains and a fully equipped kitchen. Free washer, dryer, and dedicated parking included. Ideal for traveling nurses, business travelers, and long-term guests. No smoking inside the apartment
review: We had a nice stay at this apartment! It's in a central location and clean! Thanks

description: Discover Albany from the heart of downtown. This comfortable 2-bedroom apartment is just a 5-minute walk to the bus station and 7 minutes to MVP Arena, perfect for catching a concert, game, or event.  You’ll also be a short drive from the train station (5 minutes), Empire State Plaza (walkable), and Albany International Airport (15 minutes). Whether you're visiting for work or fun, this space is an ideal home base.  Iconic Saratoga Springs is just 30 minutes away!
review: This Airbnb served its purpose for me traveling for work. Easy check-in, close parking, and all the essentials made this a 5star for me. Would stay again.

description: Welcome to your home away from home in Albany, NY! Garden-level apartment in the heart of the vibrant, historic Center Square. Enjoyable blend of comfort and convenience. Walkable to Washington Park, award-winning restaurants, local coffee shops, boutiques, and the NYS State Capitol. Ideal for couples, solo travelers, weekend getaway, work trip, a longer term stay, or a peaceful and centrally located retreat. You’ll love the character, walkability, and charm of this thoughtfully appointed space.
review: Beautiful place. Very clean and the host so attentive. Definitely I will rent again. 100% recommend.

description: Please note this is a NO FRILLS stay.  I don't offer amenities outside of fresh towels and soap.  I keep expenses low so I can keep low cost for stay.  Enjoy key pad private bedroom and your own full bath in my home.   My dog is not socialized so he stay in my closed door office when I have guests.  You can park your car in my driveway.  Minutes to St. Peter's,  Albany Med,  SUNY Albany, NanoTech, stores and restaurants.
review: Donna was a welcoming and communicative host. The room was clean, easily accessible, and exactly as described. The only minor note is that it receives a lot of natural light so I would recommend bringing an eye mask if you intend to sleep past dawn. Would (and probably will) stay again.

description: Step into the charming and comfy 1BR/1BA apartment in the heart of Albany, NY. It promises a relaxing retreat bordering picturesque Washington Park and funky Lark Street while being within walking distance to the vibrant downtown, which offers easy access to restaurants, shops, and exciting attractions.  The lovely design and the prime location will leave you in awe.  ✔ Comfy Queen Bedroom ✔ Open Design Living ✔ Fully Equipped Kitchen ✔ Smart TV ✔ High-Speed Wi-Fi ✔ Free Parking  See more below!
review: I stayed there for 40 days total. It was a very convenient location and was super nice to have parking on the premises. Was a great stay for 1-2 people. Would highly recommend

description: Place is within 2-3 miles of AMC, St. Peter's,  UAlbany, SUNY, College of St. Rose, Washington park, Empire State Plaza, and many other establishments.  Only 15 minute ride to the airport !
review: Fs was very communicative and did their best to be accommodating. Other guests were pretty laxed about locking the common doors, but he was quick to re-enforce this policy and I did notice it improved. To be honest, there was a decent amount of clutter because there are a lot of renovations/upgrades going on, but I will not let that impact the overall value. Worth it imo.

description: Spectacular Modern two bedroom apartment in Downtown Albany's Historic Mansion District across the Governors mansion. Perfect for traveling professionals and/or families. 3 minute walk to The NYS Museum, Empire State Plaza, many local restaurants, The Capital , the MVP Arena, The legislative Office building, The Cathedral & Lark Street. A 3 minute drive to Albany Medical Center, Albany Law School & The VA Hospital.Exceptionally quiet street. If traveling with family, lots of nearby Playgrounds.
review: The air BnB is nice inside, but there is only 1  window cooling unit for the entire place which leaves the other bedroom very hot. The neighborhood is also not very comforting. BUT the host was very communicative and gave us a full refund after we decided we didn’t want to stay.

description: Welcome to our beautiful 3-bedroom, 2-full bathroom home with laundry in the unit! With modern furnishings, comfortable beds, and all the amenities you need, this space is perfect for families, groups of friends, or business travelers. Located in the uptown Manning Boulevard neighborhood, you'll be just a short drive away from local attractions and delicious restaurants. Whether you're here for work or play, this home will provide you with a comfortable and convenient stay. Book your stay today!
review: Phil was a great host! Responded quickly to inquiries and check-in instructions were clear. Place was VERY clean. Bed linens and towels were soft and smelled freshly laundered. Location was perfect for our needs. Very centrally located for arrivals/departures by train or plane, restaurants and shopping. Phil’s place was perfect for our needs and our family felt comfortable staying here. We would definitely stay here again. Thanks, Phil!

review: The location and the place was amazing. The  The people in the community were so polite. I will come again. Thank you for my first experience.

description: Welcome to your cozy Albany retreat! Enjoy a comfortable home in this well-appointed space, perfect for travelers looking for convenience and relaxation. Your booking includes free parking and a complimentary breakfast to start your day right. Located near shops, restaurants, and downtown Albany, this home offers easy access to local attractions. Whether you’re here for business or leisure, you’ll love the comfort and convenience of this stay. Book now for a relaxing experience!
review: I had a safe, clean, quiet stay. Parking was free and plentiful. Great restaurants all within driving distance. I stayed for a weekend event in Saratoga Springs and was only a 30-35 minute drive away. I would stay here again for sure.

description: Relax in our cozy home on a quiet one-way street. Plenty of free street parking available. With a large dining and living room, fully stocked kitchen, and furnished private room, our home is the perfect affordable stay for working professionals, students, and people in-between housing.   Newly furnished and renovated in 2017. Minutes from major universities and hospitals. Entire home is 3 bed 1 bath (you have a private bedroom with door lock). CDTA Bus stop 1 block away.
review: Our stay at Chad’s home was exactly as we needed. It was very clean and comfortable, an inviting environment. Chad and Kellie are great with communicating.

description: Cute single family home in a convenient location with the lots of restaurants, bars and shops right around the corner. It features a driveway with covered parking, a nice outdoor area and central air. My place is close to University of Albany, shopping malls and plazas, bars, restaurants, the airport, the city center, parks, art and culture. Parties and events are not allowed.
review: The Red Warhol Ranch was warm, friendly and super convenient for our family to stay while we were in Albany for an extended visit. We loved the red accents and Warhol artwork. The kitchen has great equipment and a pleasure to cook in. The host was extremely responsive and even in a blizzard, the driveway and walk were shoveled right away. Highly recommended!

description: You’ll love the fast 600MB WiFi throughout—whether working or streaming. Inside, there’s a 75” smart TV, a fully stocked, updated kitchen and bathroom, and work desk with a printer. Outside, the backyard is a favorite w. a 120" projector for movie nights, a grill, and a heated firepit table to gather around.  It's also centrally located: close to just about everything you'll want. Just minutes from MVP Arena, UAlbany & other colleges, malls, restaurants, hospitals, parks, downtown Albany & more.
review: We had a fantastic stay at this lovely home in Albany! We were in town for a wedding and spent 2 nights here. The house was beautifully decorated and incredibly comfortable, especially the central air, and two cozy living rooms, which gave us plenty of space to relax. One of our favorite features was the private backyard where we watched a movie outdoors at night. It felt like our own little retreat. The house was perfect for traveling with kids. My 4-year-old loved the swing set and her top bunk and the hosts went above and beyond to make things easy for our family. They left a welcome kit, a sweet handwritten note, and a pamphlet with instructions and local recommendations. The location was convenient, close to shops, restaurants, and just a short drive to nearby towns we needed to visit over the weekend.  Above all, the kindness of the hosts truly made this stay special. I would absolutely recommend this Air BnB to anyone visiting the Albany area.

description: Get ready for a wonderful stay at our uniquely styled home in one of Albany’s most charming neighborhoods. This cozy retreat features two comfortable bedrooms, two large TVs, and a dedicated workspace perfect for working remotely. The kitchen is fully stocked with essentials to make meal preparation easy and enjoyable. Start your morning with a cup of coffee on the enclosed porch, or unwind in the fenced backyard for a bit of fresh air and relaxation.
review: A great place to stay! Right next to a school playground so you'll get some noise throughout the day. The kitchen was well stocked which really helped us prepare food for our friends in the hospital.

description: 3-bed fl 2 apt. in a renovated historic two-century-old building in a quiet neighborhood of Albany's Pastures. Great location near Albany Medical Center, MVP Arena, Empire State Plaza, Library, Lark Street, State Offices, courts; easy access to local & regional bus routes and highways (I-787, I-90 & I-87)  3 Queen beds Cozy gas fireplace in living room Up to 10 NON-SMOKING guests Toiletries included  Save & BOOK this unit today! Message me anytime. Hope to welcome you soon!  -Earl
review: Listing was just as described. Anything that we needed, host got back to us right away.  Would not go back only based on the neighborhood. It was me, my husband and 3 kids and on Sunday we got chased after by a gentleman of color… yelling obscenities and coming at my kids. Other than that the house was good.

review: A beautiful spot to be at. Very clean and put together. So much space inside I loved it. Johnny gave clear instructions on how to get inside. Was very responsive to any questions or concerns.

description: Welcome to our newly renovated one-bedroom apartment located on the second floor, just minutes away from Albany Med and Saint Peters, walking distance from neighborhood park. Easy access to state offices and MVP arena all within minutes distance. The neighborhood is brimming with restaurants and bars, making it one of the most desired areas in Albany. Perfect for both short-term and long term visits. Our apartment offers comfort and convenience in an ideal location.
review: 🌟Airbnb Review: A Homely Haven with Thoughtful Touches🌟 Staying at this Airbnb was like finding a serene escape with all the warmth and comfort of your own home. From the moment we walked in, the inviting aroma set a delightful tone for our stay. It smelled so homely—like a gentle embrace that promised a relaxing experience. The space itself was immaculately clean and matched the pictures perfectly, if not surpassing them. It boasted surprising spaciousness that allowed us to move freely and settle in perfectly. But what truly set this place apart were the thoughtful touches. Every detail was carefully curated to add a personal, heartfelt vibe that made our stay all the more special. The host excelled with their responsiveness, ensuring that our needs and questions were swiftly addressed, which added significant comfort to our trip. Accessing the apartment was seamless, making arrival and departure as stress-free as possible. Overall, this Airbnb was an absolute pleasure.

description: BEAUTIFULLY renovated and stylish apartment with CHARACTER in a brownstone building. PRIME location in the heart of downtown Albany, minutes from highway and walking distance to popular restaurants, and pubs.   Local attractions including The Egg, Empire State Plaza and Palace Theatre are less than 5 minutes away. 4K Smart TV with Netflix, stocked kitchen & bathroom, high speed internet ready for you to use!   Tenant permit street parking available. Available for long term stays!
review: The place was extremely clean, however the TV did not work. I had to buy a firestick, because for some reason it only let me sign into Netflix or prime (which I have) but no shows of mine are on right now and I rented the place with my fiance so we could have alone Time inside for the weekend watching movies and hanging out. Also, the fridge was extremely weird - the door is on the wrong side and it’s like connected to the table so it’s hard to open. The bed was also in a weird place, we had to move it over slightly or it would have been awkward for my boyfriend to sleep or get up in the middle of the night. Also, the dryer didn’t work well - my clothes took forever to dry and not be wrinkled and the washer was confusing to use - but these are small things in general. Overall, the place was clean and in a nice location which matters most but there was just some hiccups along the way.

description: Spend your visit in Albany in our amazingly beautiful place! The house has just been renovated. Every room has its own separate bathroom. The house is conveniently located near the downtown as well as Saint Rose College. The parking lot is also provided. There are many restaurants, pubs and local attractions within reach.
review: Peter's home had no issues inside or outside. I see no reason not to stay in this environment or place. You only need to get your own groceries, but other than that, the place felt like a mansion that you can bond with whoever you stay with. I think I enjoyed the balconys more than anything. 5 out of 5 personality as well.

description: This amazing home is at the first floor of a newly renovated historic duplex, and will give you all the comforts of home! Tastefully decorated with everything you need and then some!!  -> Grab-N-Go items (Coffee, Tea, Light Snacks) -> Smart LED Tvs in every room  -> NordicTrack bicycle -> Smart locks with keyless entry -> Fast wireless WiFi -> Queen beds with premium mattresses & pillow covers -> Fully equipped + utensil stocked kitchen + Keurig Coffee  -> Full size washer/dryer Enjoy your stay!
review: One of the best airbnb’s we've stayed at. Super clean, modern, and comfortable. Super comfortable bed and couch. We are grad students so snacks were such a plus. Host responded quickly and was very accommodating. Looking forward to being back!

description: Newly renovated one bedroom, loft style apartment. Centrally located in the Mansion neighborhood in albany. Huge spacious open layout with walk in closet. Big screen tvs, with super fast internet (400 mps). On-site laundry, with locked off street parking. Spectacular views of downtown Albany. Walking distance to empire state plaza, the egg, times union, and excellent bars, restaurants, and delis. Great value for anyone staying in albany long or short term.
review: I stayed at the apartment for about 6 weeks . It was very peaceful, which was exactly what I needed. The apartment is as described and looks exactly as the pictures. Michael was very responsive and went above and beyond for me. Thank you for everything Michael!

Queen bed + twin bed + futon Up to 4 NON-SMOKING guests Toiletries included  Save & BOOK this unit today! Message me anytime. Hope to welcome you soon!  -Earl
review: Bad neighborhood, worse host. Located in a sketchy part of town, the apartment is old and unclean. The shower water doesn’t get hot! And when I complained, Angela said she will come fix it the next day and never showed up or even reached out.  So I shortened my stay and asked them for a late checkout for 5pm because my work ends at 5pm. Earl said it’s fine as long as I pack all my stuff and leave it in a corner. So I did, and left my food packed and ready to go in the fridge. The next morning Angela messaged me very rudely saying that she didn’t authorize me to leave food in the fridge and I should’ve left my bag outside the unit… when I came to pick up my stuff at 5pm they had changed the front door code, I was stuck outside unable to get my stuff for 20mins. Had to call Airbnb. Horrible experience. Wish they would let me upload pictures.

description: - No pets - No smoking or vaping - No parties or events - Directly across from Albany Academy - 1 mile from Albany Medical Center - 5.3 miles from UAlbany - Under 2 miles from Washington Park & Empire State Plaza - Just over 2 miles from The Egg & MVP Arena - Take a day trip to Lake George or Saratoga Springs! - King sized bed - Two spacious living rooms - Fully equipped kitchen - High-speed WiFi - Private parking
review: Stephanie's place was perfect for our first time in Albany. It was in a quiet neighborhood, allowing us to relax after a day of exploring. The place had great privacy, it almost felt like we had no neighbors.  We checked in late at night without any issues. The self-check-in process was smooth, and Stephanie was very responsive. The home was spacious, extremely clean, and clutter-free. Everything seemed brand new. The kitchen had all the necessary utensils to cook but we decided to order from Uber Eats as there were so many food options available.  Honestly, it was a perfect getaway, and we couldn't have asked for a better stay. Definitely recommend this vacation home!

description: Welcome to this charming room in Albany completely remodeled to the studs in '21! Centrally located in the peaceful Pine Hill neighborhood. It's walking distance to restaurants, bars, grocery store & historic Washington Park. 2 mi to SUNY and 1 mi to Albany Medical. Great for couples, traveling nurse, business professionals. Street parking available in front of the house. Your room is smart TV equipped with live cable for watching all your guilty pleasures, so feel free to bring your own login !
review: The entire place was super clean and quiet neighborhood. Elhadj was always responsive! The internet connection was stable and a nice touch was the TV with live sports. I had a pleasant experience and will stay there again.

description: BEAUTIFULLY renovated apartment with CHARACTER in a historic building. This is a ground floor unit with direct fenced backyard access and a private patio! Ideal for pet owners! 4K Smart TV with Netflix, and high speed internet ready for you to use! This property comes with a fully stocked kitchen, in unit washer/dryer, free resident lot parking, and a fenced shared backyard with bbq for guests to enjoy.
review: Linda was fast to respond every time I reached out. I requested unscented cleaners be used and when we arrived the place was sparkling clean and unscented which I really appreciated. Great bed and washer/dryer!

description: 1 bedroom with high ceiling and natural light. Fully stocked kitchen with complimentary Netflix. Centrally located in South End of Albany in converted school. Great value with off street parking included
review: Diana's place was comfortable, clean and easy to get to. You get a private parking space just for you, which is a boon to me in such city dwellings (as opposed to street parking). Diana was also very communicative and made sure I was prepared for check in. I was attending a local concert at MVP Arena - was easily within walking distance. Bed was plenty comfortable! Thanks Diana for making my stay in Albany everything I wanted it to be!

review: We felt glad to find a nice base for our stay in Albany. We enjoyed walking out the front door and exploring the neighborhood. I liked that neighbors were sitting out, walking around, or gathering on their porches. The bed was very comfortable and we slept well. We also made good use of the nice shower. In the morning we buzzed over to the food coop and brought back fixing to make a breakfast feast. I will definitely reach out to stay here again next time I am in town.

description: Relax in our cozy home on a quiet one-way street. Plenty of free street parking available. With a large dining and living room, fully stocked kitchen, and furnished private room, our home is the perfect affordable stay for working professionals, students, and people in-between housing.   Newly furnished and renovated in 2017. Minutes from major universities and hospitals. Entire home is 3 bed 1 bath (you have a private bedroom with door lock). CDTA Bus stop 1 block away.
review: Close to bus stops, colleges and many dining options. No car needed if staying in the Albany area! Responsive hosts and provides guests with amenities and household supplies!

description: Cozy 1BR in Center Square—steps from Lark St, Dove & Deer, the Capitol, and MVP Arena. This fully furnished unit features a modern kitchen, comfy living space, private laundry access (in basement), and full bath. Ideal for traveling nurses, legislators, or solo professionals. Walkable, convenient, and close to Albany Med, St Peter's Hospital, Irongate, and great dining. Traditional key entry. Clean, convenient, and perfectly located. Back unit, entrance in back of building.
review: The location was convenient and the space was generally comfortable, but there were several issues worth noting. The upstairs window didn’t lock and had a fire escape walkway right outside, which felt unsafe. The back parking lot and building entrance weren’t shown in the photos, but host was very quick to help upon arrival. Inside, the shower handle was very loose (we managed to tighten it ourselves but had to buy a tool to do so), the only mirror was hidden in a closet (we bought one for ourselves before realizing days in), and the upstairs AC had a large crack underneath letting in cold air. I also noticed mouse poison traps left in various areas around the apartment on the floor, which was extremely concerning for a pet-friendly listing. The photos made the place look a bit more modern than it actually is, but the space is still cozy. With some attention to maintenance, safety, and cleanliness, this could easily tack on a star.

description: Perfect place to relax with your family or stopover on a work trip. A quiet, suburban neighborhood that is close enough to everything. 5 min drive to UAlbany and St Peter's Hospital. 15 min drive to downtown Albany. 18 min drive to Albany Int'l Airport. 5-10 min drive to plenty of restaurants and pubs.
review: Nori's place was excellent. The view from the back porch was phenomenal.  Highly recommend.

description: The Whalen King Suite is our largest suite. It features a large sitting area, work space, walk in closet, and oversized bathroom with soaking tub and shower. Each room is equipped with a SmartTV and Apple TV.  This room is not pet friendly.  Complimentary Services: Continental Breakfast Onsite Parking Electric Parking Wi-Fi & Apple TV Keyless Entry Ensuite Guest Rooms ​ Paid Services: Cocktails Meeting Space Rentals Pets (If applicable) Early Checkin (1PM) Late Checkout (12PM)
review: This hotel lied to me on the hotel room I booked. This was my wedding night hotel room. I was shown photos of the king size room with a soaking tub, but when I arrived, was told I was in a queen room, a completely different room. There was a bartender who just happened to be there and was able to get me a king room but it wasn’t what I paid for or what was advertised. Will never go here again. My wedding night was a bit disappointing.

description: This location in Albany’s cultural and business hub is ideal for travelling nurses,  professionals on assignment, and visitors alike.  Walk to Empire State Plaza, The Egg, and top dining.  Minutes from MVP Arena, NYS Library & Archives, Albany Med, Albany Universities/Colleges, and government offices.  Features Queen bed, pull-out couch, full kitchen, Wi-Fi, and in-unit laundry.  Quick access to I-787, I-90, and Amtrak. More space, comfort, and convenience than a hotel—book now!
review: Vander was a very responsive host and  was really helpful as we were checking in later. We had a lovely overnight stay on our way to Canada.  Great recommendations too !

description: Quiet suburban neighborhood minutes from downtown Albany. Guests have access to the kitchen, dinette and deck. Garage space is also available.  Private guest quarters include a large bedroom with a queen-size bed, desk and private bath. Guests also enjoy their own spacious living area with a large TV, massage chair, convertible couch, microwave, water cooler and exercise equipment.
review: Rachel was a great host! She welcomed us as soon as we reached, served us delicious tea and desserts, gave us great local recommendations and was gracious with her time. I would highly recommend.

review: It was a great place to stay in Albany, NY to get to a Wedding in Schenectady. Big rooms and 3 bathrooms. Perfect size for 8 people.

description: This cozy first-floor apartment is perfect for a comfortable stay in a prime location. It's within walking distance to local hospitals, colleges, and just steps away from Madison Ave and Lark St, known for their vibrant restaurants, bars, and shops. Ideal for those visiting for work, school, or leisure, the apartment offers a charming and convenient base to explore the best of the area. Whether you're here for a short trip or longer stay, you'll feel right at home!
review: Had a severe allergic reaction within 10 mins of checking in due to the apt being highly fragranced and could not ventilate because the windows do not open in this apt  (not mentioned in description).Left immediately and notified host of the situation. Explained I was there for 2 weeks for a medical treatment and could not stay there due to unexpected health risk. Host refused to offer a full refund or even 50% refund. Host had no qualms taking 2 weeks of my stay for which I didn’t even stay 10mins for.

description: 4800ft of living space and an epic backyard make this historic home a true gem. The blueprints for the Jesse Buel House reside in the Library of Congress…for real. The pool is enormous and OPEN TIL early NOV! Hot tub open all year. There is enough furniture for everyone to get cozy. Two kitchens, a billiard room, OLED TVs, luxurious mattresses and eclectic décor make this home truly one of a kind. 35 minutes to Saratoga Race Track with loads of other fantastic attractions within an hour drive.
review: Thomas’ house is stunning. We had a big group of people during our stay and there were plenty of beds with clean sheets and extra blankets. The outdoor space was beautiful with the pool, hot tub, grill, and plenty of seating for all of our group. Thomas was very easy to communicate with and answered all of our questions within minutes.

description: Discover Arbor Hill - “The House That Pat Built” is a beautifully renovated building, in the heart of the Arbor Hill community of Albany, NY. We have taken ample time to carefully craft this space with tasteful décor, to maximize its potential and ensure your enjoyment. The space has been completely renovated with all new flooring, furniture, and décor. The space is moderately large, private, comfortable and full of charm. This apartment is on the first floor of a two family house.
review: Check in process was extremely smooth. Tyrell ensured i had all the details for the airbnb. The apartment was extremely clean and very modern. Wifi was very strong and easily available to find to get connected. Very close by the high way and around surrounding shopping centers. As an additional amenities, i found bottles of waters located in the fridge which came in handy on a hot day. Definitely will book again with Tyrell. All my needs were met for comfort and felt like a home away from home. Thank you again Tyrell for the exceptional customer service.

description: Enjoy your stay in a safe 5 star neighborhood close to everything in Albany. Beautiful first floor apartment. Free parking on site in parking lot in rear of home. Also free parking on street if you prefer. This beautiful home is in a great neighborhood and its centralized location makes it easy for you to get around. Get a great breakfast/lunch at Cafe Madison just a few blocks away.  A few minutes walk to St. Peter's Hospital and local shops. Book now for your luxury stay.
review: Enjoyed staying here. Clean, and felt like a home. Chris is thoughtful and a great host. Would stay again. Area is also very safe.

description: Located in the heart of Albany, only 7 minutes from SUNY Albany and 4 minutes from St. Peter's Hospital, Casa Bancroft is a charming Mid-Century modern home that has everything you need for a comfortable stay. The first level of the home is exclusively yours with an inviting living area, sun-filled dining, a fully equipped kitchen, two refreshed bathrooms and three spacious bedrooms. Stay just 10 minutes from Downtown, Washington Park, MVP arena and of course “The Egg”!
review: What a lovely home and neighborhood! It was extremely inviting, cozy, and clean. The host was readily available, communicative, and friendly. If this home is available around the same time next year, we’ll plan on staying here again. Highly recommend!

description: BEAUTIFULLY renovated and stylish apartment with CHARACTER in a brownstone building. This spacious unit features high 10 ft ceilings , a 4K Smart TV with Netflix, stocked kitchen & bathroom, high speed internet ready for you to use! Tenant permit street parking available.
review: Linda’s place was amazing! Very clean, roomy, and cute. Everything was in walking distance so we were able to leave our car behind and not worry about parking. Would definitely stay again!

description: This elegant apartment on the ground floor of an historic 3-story brick row house in the heart of downtown Albany NY, opens to a beautifully appointed living/dining area, has a full kitchen, 2 spacious bedrooms, and a full bath. The fully-equipped kitchen opens to a comfortable living/dining area. This cozy, modern space offers fast wifi, streaming services, plush bedding, full bath, in-unit washer and dryer, and is just steps from Café Capriccio. Please click on photos for more information.
review: Such kind and lovely folks! An absolute gem of a space. Would recommend to anyone looking for a home away from home in Albany!

description: Enjoy a stylish experience at this centrally-located place. The spacious unit is newly renovated with a 4K Smart TV, in unit washer/dryer, updated kitchen and bathroom, high speed internet.   You will also have access to the building gym.
review: We enjoyed our stay. The place was extremely spacious for my one year old. We also felt safe which is extremely important.

description: Welcome to this charming room in Albany completely remodeled to the studs in '21! Centrally located in the peaceful Pine Hill neighborhood. It's walking distance to restaurants, bars, grocery store & historic Washington Park. 2 mi to SUNY and 1 mi to Albany Medical. Great for couples, traveling nurse, business professionals. Street parking available in front of the house. Your room is smart TV equipped with live cable for watching all your guilty pleasures, so feel free to bring your own login !
review: Will definitely add to my list of frequent places I like to stay. Elhadj was extremely helpful and responsive. Very nice host and also very hospitable.

description: Lovely private room for traveling nurses and professionals. This is a private room with shared bathroom and full kitchen, you are more than welcome to use any kitchen appliances. I'm a software engineer works from home and wanting to rent my 2 extra rooms to our lovely guests. This is a very friendly house and you will definitely enjoy your time while staying with us. Can't wait to meet ya!
review: I stayed here for a month as a visiting medical student rotating at Albany Medical Center. Musab was an awesome host who was always responsive, helpful, and friendly. He will go out of his way to make the stay comfortable. I had a great time and the location is great (10 minute walk to AMC). Highly recommend this location for any short or long stay. Will definitely be back here if I return to Albany one day.

description: Welcome to this charming room in Albany completely remodeled to the studs in '21! Centrally located in the peaceful Pine Hill neighborhood. It's walking distance to restaurants, bars, grocery store & historic Washington Park. 2 mi to SUNY and 1 mi to Albany Medical. Great for couples, traveling nurse, business professionals. Street parking available in front of the house. Your room is smart TV equipped with live cable for watching all your guilty pleasures, so feel free to bring your own login !
review: Appreciated very much the easy checking. Was concerned initially about sharing a bathroom, but other guests were respectful and on a different schedule apparently. It was not a problem at all.

description: Spectacular Modern two bedroom apartment in Downtown Albany's Historic Mansion District across the Governors mansion. Perfect for traveling professionals and/or families. 3 minute walk to The NYS Museum, Empire State Plaza, many local restaurants, The Capital , the MVP Arena, The legislative Office building, The Cathedral & Lark Street. A 3 minute drive to Albany Medical Center, Albany Law School & The VA Hospital.Exceptionally quiet street. If traveling with family, lots of nearby Playgrounds.
review: Right off the bat Johnny was very accommodating. My dad was in the hospital for heart surgery and we arrived during a snow storm. He was right there to help me on arrival to get in when I was struggling and was shoveling and salting. He even offered to carry some items for me. He was so helpful with parking and anything we asked him for or about. This was a stressful week for us and his beautiful apartment was so relaxing, very clean, quiet and cozy. The home is in a quiet neighborhood as well. The back patio and garden space was an added bonus even with the snow. My dads big truck was a bit tricky to park but totally doable. We even got door dash one night. The coffee pot was very fast brewing as well. Would definitely recommend this space to many. Amenities are there but not a lot of extras which I like. Less clutter. Everything we needed was there and what wasn’t he brought it to us and delivered quickly. Thank you again Johnny

description: Cute single family home in a convenient location with the lots of restaurants, bars and shops right around the corner.    It features  a driveway with covered parking, a nice outdoor area with seating, lounging and a weber 3 burner propane grill.   The home has central air and a 5 person Clearlight Premier IS-5 infrared cedar sauna by Jacuzzi.   My place is close to University of Albany, tennis, shopping malls and plazas, bars, restaurants, the airport, the city center, parks, art and culture.
review: Perfect little house on the corner. We used it as a getaway from NYC for the summer. Fast internet, great grill and quiet bedrooms. Better for a couple or 3 people max. It's cozy and comfortable with very competent and responsive host. Very good location; pretty much across the street from U. Albany Uptown. Nice deli and drugstore walkable.

description: This property offers a peaceful and centrally-located atmosphere. McDonald's, Walgreens, great pizza spot and Albany Medical Center are just a 4-minute drive away. There’s also a laundromat just 1 minute away, along with a variety of restaurants and bars nearby. Street parking is free, except on Tuesdays or Wednesdays between 12-3pm, depending on which side of the street you park on.  Exterior camera would be present beginning 02/1/2025 .
review: Gloria's place was nice and comfortable and described as in the description. She communicated effectively and immediately as well. Overall, good experience!

description: This private apartment is meant to be a home away from home for our guests!  We've done our best to create a calming, yet whimsical space to encourage relaxation on your vacation, business trip or whatever brought you to our city. The flat is located in the heart of the historic Center Square neighborhood in Albany and is short walk from many great restaurants and bars on Lark St., and beautiful Washington Park.  We hope you enjoy the space as much as we've enjoyed preparing it for you!
review: I enjoyed my stay at Mela and Matthews apartment. I was there for two weeks and it definitely felt like home. It's tastefully decorated, along with thoughtful touch's like bottled water in the fridge upon my arrival. Both Mela and Matthew were also very responsive to my questions as I initially settled in.  There was plenty of shampoo/conditioner/body wash in the shower and hand soap in the bathroom. Plus plenty of back up supplies for toilet paper and paper towels etc.  The location is great...just a five minute walk to Washington Park, and numerous restaurants near by. I recommend going to Cardona's Market on Delaware Ave (5 min drive/25 min walk) for some seriously legit Italian Subs and the best cannoli I've ever had anywhere. There is also a grocery store Market32 only one block away that has pretty much everything you'd need.  My only reason for not giving this place a 5 Star Rating is the street parking was a little challenging and the neighborhood is bit sketchy.

description: This private apartment is meant to be a home away from home for our guests!  We've done our best to create a calming, yet whimsical space to encourage relaxation on your vacation, business trip or whatever brought you to our city. The flat is located in the heart of the historic Center Square neighborhood in Albany and is short walk from many great restaurants and bars on Lark St., and beautiful Washington Park.  We hope you enjoy the space as much as we've enjoyed preparing it for you!
review: What a great find! I got lucky booking this place only two weeks before our trip. Pictures and description are accurate. The place was so clean! It felt very peaceful and was near a lot of resturants and convenience stores. Would 100% book this AirBNB again! Only issue we had was understanding the street signs for parking but otherwise no complaints!

description: Our recently remodeled one-bedroom apartment boasts a park view, easy parking and is close to downtown Albany. We have an easy walk to groceries, Government Buildings, Albany Law School, College of Pharmacy, VA and Albany Medical Center Hospitals, and Lark Street restaurants and nightlife. The living area features a queen size futon and views of the sunset most evenings, and the bedroom features a luxurious queen-sized memory foam bed and access to our quiet garden where the sun rises.
review: The apartment and location were perfect for my business stay. James is a great host. He is well organized and has thought out the details of a stay from check in to check out extremely well. The whole procedure was effortless and James' responsive communication just made the stay that much more enjoyable. I highly recommend his place for a stay in Albany whether it be for business or pleasure.

description: Lovely private room for traveling nurses and professionals. This is a private room with shared bathroom and full kitchen, you are more than welcome to use any kitchen appliances. I'm a software engineer works from home and wanting to rent my 2 extra rooms to our lovely guests. This is a very friendly house and you will definitely enjoy your time while staying with us. Can't wait to meet ya!
review: I appreciate  my stay at this location. Not only is it right downtown in Albany but you literally have many things in walking distance. A bus line is literally right outside and I appreciate the two door security for the entrance. The place was very cozy and the bed was comfortable. I will be back here again.

description: Listing is designed with the business or casual traveler in mind PLEASE NO SMOKERS in the building *Newly renovated *Modern 1 bedroom w/Smart TVs that feels like home *Street parking *Equipped with coffee maker *Fridge *Wireless charger *Private bath *Across the street from the Capitol Building *Close to Highway I-87, I-90, I-787 & public transportation. Long term stays available. Please inquire with dates needed for more info. Traveling nurses, doctors, lobbyists, students are welcome.
review: It was a fine place to stay. The building itself isn't the nicest, but the apartment was cozy. If you aren't used to city sounds you might find it troublesome to sleep here as noise seemed to travel easily. I failed to read the fine print and didn't realize that towels would not be provided. It also says no hot water which had me questioning if a shower was even possible had I attained a towel. The water got warm while doing dishes though so I assume it would be fine?  A hand towel in the bathroom would have been nice for drying my hands at the very least.  The location is nice.

description: MODERN beautifully furnished apartment with UNIQUE spiral staircase. Newly renovated, cozy and trendy! PRIME location in the heart of downtown Albany and walking distance to popular restaurants, and cafes on Lark Street. Local attractions including The Egg, Empire State Plaza, Times Union Center are less than 5 minutes away. 4K Smart TV with Netflix, stocked kitchen & bathroom, high speed internet ready for you to use! Free street parking. Available for long term stays!
review: This was an amazing apartment! Linda communicated with us on everything going on within the apartment building itself, which I greatly appreciated. My stay was very pleasant and did not run into any problems at all!

description: BEAUTIFULLY renovated and stylish apartment with CHARACTER in a brownstone building. This spacious unit features high 10 ft ceilings , a 4K Smart TV with Netflix, stocked kitchen & bathroom, high speed internet ready for you to use! Tenant permit street parking available.
review: The place was really and clean and peace. They just need to put cleaning supplies in the closet so we can have the ability to clean up. The shower kept leaking out water since their was no shower curtains so we had to clean up the water with paper towels on the floor. The drawers inside the bedroom kept opening up by itself and it was a little creepy. The closet doors in the bedroom was stuck.

description: Experience modern comfort in Albany's "Center Square".  This first-floor sanctuary in an elegant stone building offers 24/7 surveillance and a hardwired fire alarm system. Enjoy a bright living space, modern kitchen, and sleek bathroom. Ideal for short or extended stays. Private parking included. Surrounded by shops, restaurants, and nightlife. Walk to Albany Med, State Offices, The Capitol, and Empire State Plaza. 30 mins to Saratoga Raceway, 50 mins to Lake George, 1/2 mile to Palace Theater.
review: Lovely apartment, very clean, and well provisioned for a comfortable stay. Restaurants nearby and Capital building in walking distance. Very nice.

description: Welcome to your home away from home in the heart of Albany! Nestled on a quiet street, this beautifully renovated 3-bedroom, 2.5-bathroom luxury residence offers a rare blend of comfort, style, and convenience—perfect for families, friends, business travelers, and weekend explorers alike.
review: The house is really beautiful. Beautiful aesthetics and cozy atmosphere. The stay was too short, but hope to come back

description: Experience the comfort of staying in a second room of our centrally located home. Conveniently situated on the main bus line, this residence offers ease of access to the city’s top destinations. Make yourself at home in our shared spaces, which include three serene enclosed porches and two Lovesac bean bags. Whether you’re traveling for work or leisure, our home promises a restful and enjoyable stay. Join us and immerse yourself in a welcoming atmosphere, complete with all the comforts of home.
review: We had a very nice stay even if it was just for a night! The host and co-hosts were close by and very responsive if we needed anything! We would’ve liked to stay longer!

description: Welcome to our newly renovated, spacious studio. Work efficiently at your dedicated desk, and savor the convenience of a fully divided kitchen. Only 5 minutes' walk from Albany Med, moments from Washington Park and Lark Street, and a short stroll to downtown Albany and state offices. Surrounded by a large variety of restaurants and local bars. Modern amenities including a full bathroom with efficient  washer and dryer.
review: Excellent host.  I arrived and could not find the box. I called and my host took the time to walk me through the process.  It was super easy.  I wanted to stay for an extra day but the next day was already booked by someone else.  I really enjoyed this studio.  It was clean and near my event.  I highly recommend staying there.

description: Enjoy a stylish experience at this centrally-located place. The spacious unit is newly renovated with a 4K Smart TV, in unit washer/dryer, updated kitchen and bathroom, high speed internet.   You will also have access to the building gym.
review: The place was absolutely lovely! Super clean and Linda was a great host. If I had a question she always answered. Definitely recommend to everyone!

description: Brand new finished 900 sq ft Apartment at 199 Lark Street, Albany NY 12210. On-street parking, The most Vibrant Street in Albany.  Walking to Downtown Business District and Washington Park. Enjoy easy access to everything from this perfectly located home base.
review: We had to come to Albany to see one of our best friends who was at Albany, Medical Center. The reason behind the visit was not a pleasant one, but Ron made sure that everything within our stay was perfect. It’s a great location, easy to find, parking was not that difficult… Everything about the stay was great. Ron is a wonderful person to work with, and a very good host. Couldn’t be happier with our decision.

description: This amazing home is at the first floor of a newly renovated historic duplex, and will give you all the comforts of home! Tastefully decorated with everything you need and then some!!  -> Grab-N-Go items (Coffee, Tea, Light Snacks) -> Smart LED Tvs in every room  -> NordicTrack bicycle -> Smart locks with keyless entry -> Fast wireless WiFi -> Queen beds with premium mattresses & pillow covers -> Fully equipped + utensil stocked kitchen + Keurig Coffee  -> Full size washer/dryer Enjoy your stay!
review: Richard was extremely kind when we accidentally locked ourselves out. (This was completely our fault!) He came and addressed all of our needs- not that there were many since the house was equipped, clean, and very comfortable. We would gladly return!

description: Welcome to your home away from home in the heart of Albany! Nestled on a quiet street, this beautifully renovated 3-bedroom, 2.5-bathroom luxury residence offers a rare blend of comfort, style, and convenience—perfect for families, friends, business travelers, and weekend explorers alike.
review: We booked this property for 10 nights but left after 9. On day one, the kitchen sink was leaking, which meant we couldn’t use the dishwasher and had to hand wash dishes. The hosts fixed the sink the next day, but the washing machine never worked at all, so we had no way to do laundry except hand washing. They offered dry-cleaning, but that wasn’t practical for essentials like undergarments. While the hosts were responsive, what mattered was that key amenities actually worked. Instead of acknowledging the inconvenience, they implied the washer failed due to “overloading” and stressed everything worked before our arrival, which felt unfair. We also had safety concerns: there’s a basement with exterior access, and the locked doors left us unsure who else could enter.  but paying for 10 nights while staying 9 — with unresolved issues and security concerns — Rude host with a blame-game attitude. left the experience below expectations.

description: Enjoy the entire house and surrounding area being at the center of Albany. Near everything like children’s park and new basketball court and outdoor exercise bars, also close to one of the bast grocery stores in Albany (Honest Weight Food Co-op) within 5 minutes!  One street over from the bus stop and just the right distance to be close to the main highway without too much traffic. Impeccable cleaning to make sure you always feel comfortable
review: It was an okay stay. some of the drawers in the upstairs bedroom were broken. The home smelled like weed smoke. Also the stairs seem a bit unsafe, wouldn’t recommend if you’re staying there with children

description: Kick back and relax in this calm, stylish space. Garden level studio just recently updated. Open floor plan offering everything you need to come home after a long day. Great location minutes off of Lark Street. Close to Capital Center, downtown, medical center and more.
review: Second time I've stayed here. Very comfortable and check-in is a breeze. Walkable to great food and drink and fun activities in downtown Albany.

review: This space is as pictured. Very beautiful space and easy to access. Mela and Matthew are easy to reach hosts.

Just steps from the State Capitol, Empire State Plaza, museums, and the Hudson River, our home offers unparalleled access to Albany's top attractions. Immerse yourself in local culture with nearby cafes, boutiques, and historic landmarks. Experience Albany like never before. Book your stay for a memorable adventure!
review: ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ I had an amazing stay! The place was spotless, comfortable, and exactly as described. The host was friendly, responsive, and made sure everything went smoothly. The location was perfect — close to everything but still quiet and relaxing. I’d definitely stay here again and highly recommend it to anyone visiting the area.

description: Step into the charming and comfy 1BR/1BA apartment in the heart of Albany, NY. It promises a relaxing retreat bordering picturesque Washington Park and funky Lark Street while being within walking distance to the vibrant downtown, which offers easy access to restaurants, shops, and exciting attractions.  The lovely design and the prime location will leave you in awe.  ✔ Comfy Queen Bedroom ✔ Open Design Living ✔ Fully Equipped Kitchen ✔ Smart TV ✔ High-Speed Wi-Fi ✔ Free Parking  See more below!
review: Great location with lots to do around the area! With that in mind, it can get a little loud at night but overall an awesome stay! Thank you!

description: This amazing home is at the first floor of a newly renovated historic duplex, and will give you all the comforts of home!
