review: I had a wonderful stay at this Airbnb in Albany, New York. The space was immaculately clean, easy to find, and located in a quiet, peaceful neighborhood perfect for relaxing after busy days with family. It was also incredibly convenient to all the family members I was visiting, making the trip smooth and stress-free. The home had everything I needed and truly felt like a home away from home. I would absolutely stay here again and highly recommend it to anyone visiting the area!

description: Relax in a newly renovated one bedroom/one bathroom apartment located on the 2nd floor of a charming brownstone building. It features lofty ceilings with beautiful architecture and a newly updated kitchen. Conveniently located to the Palace Theater, Capitol Rep Theater, Times Union Center and the Empire State Plaza. This rental is in walking distance to many popular eateries, bars, and more to explore! Laundry on Site for Long-Term Stays
review: Highly recommend staying at David’s! Beautiful space and so peaceful. He was a wonderful host and I really enjoyed my time in Albany!

description: Place is within 2-3 miles of AMC, St. Peter's,  UAlbany, SUNY, College of St. Rose, Washington park, Empire State Plaza, and many other establishments.  Only 15 minute ride to the airport !
review: I extended - Twice! Enough said. Fs is very personable & helpful.

description: Stay above it all in this stylish studio perched above Dove + Deer, Albany’s favorite restaurant. Located in historic Center Square, you’re steps from the Capitol, The Egg, and Washington Park. Enjoy a welcome drink and exclusive dining discounts. The studio offers cozy charm with exposed brick, luxe linens, Wi-Fi, and a kitchenette. Perfect for solo travelers or couples wanting a walkable, vibrant neighborhood with unbeatable food and flair.
review: This studio is in a lovely part of Albany. Plenty of walkable coffee shops, restaurants, and shops. It’s also near a large and lovely park. A 10/10 for location, that said this Airbnb is clean, but certainly missing a few things: no hooks for hanging towels in the bathroom, no bathroom trash can (tough for ladies), no hand towel for drying clean hands, no dish towels and very few dishes, additionally there are no hangers. I was in town for a wedding so a hanger or two would have been lovely! Overall it’s a clean space to stay for a day or two but 5 days is a little long without certain amenities. That said, Thomas is very responsive and good communication goes a long way! Would stay again if a couple things are added to the space!

description: For traveling professional, college students, or parents visiting your young adult, enjoy this stylish apartment centrally-located in Albany.  NY State Capital - 2.4 mi Suny Albany - 3.5 mi Albany Medical Center - 3.5 mi Regeneron Pharma - 4.8 mi RPI University - 10 mi General Electric  - 15 mi   The home is 1st floor unit in two family house, which was recently renovated. It includes new appliances: washer, dryer and dishwasher. It's a restful stay, which is close main areas.
review: The place was pretty nice and clean. 2 of the 3 beds were soft, one was not comfortable at all. The back bedroom bed had plywood for box spring. Tv screen was broken, microwave handle broken and had been glued many times. Dishwasher didn’t work. Street parking is hard to find. A little expensive for what you get. Host is very nice

description: Settle into Albany at the Allen House. This newly renovated apartment will be perfect for your time in the capital of NY. The house is in an unbeatable location with restaurants and stores just around the corner; a few of our favorites are Juniors & Madison Cafe. Many shops and stores are within walking distance. Free street parking only. Book today to ensure your dates!  10 minute drive to the heart of downtown 16 minute drive to Albany International Airport
review: Thanks Scott and Kim. We had a pleasant stay. The house was very comfy and clean.

description: Stay in our 4-bedroom townhouse-style 2nd+3rd floor apartment nestled in a renovated, historic 200-year-old building located in Albany's serene Pastures neighborhood. Just a short walk from landmarks like the Albany Medical Center, Times Union Center, Empire State Plaza, and vibrant Lark Street. Easy access to I-787, I-90 & I-87. Four queen beds and a queen air mattress accommodate up to 10. Ideal for large families and groups. Dive into Albany's history with modern comforts.
review: My Stay was great, I love the set up. The decor is lovely and the house was very clean. The host was very thorough and responded quickly. Also left detailed instructions on everything that was needed. I will definitely book thus property again.

description: Spend your visit in Albany in our amazingly beautiful place! The house has just been renovated. Every room has its own separate bathroom. The house is conveniently located near the downtown as well as Saint Rose College. The parking lot is also provided. There are many restaurants, pubs and local attractions within reach.
review: Peter was very accommodating and responsive when we found ourselves in a situation with a severe lake effect snow storm and needed to exit where were staying in another Airbnb, family of three and two dogs. Peter's home is exceptionally clean and comfortable. Peter was there each time to help us with our plans. The home is beautifully renovated and extremely comfortable. We were a family of five (3 humans and 2 pups) but this home would be perfect for a larger party, so much room!  If in the area visit and hike the Pine Bush and the Dunes. Wonderful choices for dinner and drinks close by.

description: This comfortable one bedroom apartment comes furnished to entertain and with a welcome drink! Stay in the capital region’s most historic neighborhood full of beautiful architecture and cultural attractions. Walkable to some of Albany’s best restaurants including Dove and Deer, Albany’s most charming upscale bar. A full kitchen comes equipped with all your basic cooking needs, but if you don’t feel like cooking enjoy preferred access and discounts at Dove and Deer.
review: Thomas’s place was clean and was as described. There were some minor issues, but Thomas was very responsive. Great location as well!

description: Discover unmatched safety and comfort in Albany's historic "Center Square". Our meticulously sanitized brownstone, located near "Albany Medical" and walking distance to State Offices, is perfect for guests aged 21+ and non-smokers seeking a serene and secure retreat. Enjoy the convenience of a private parking spot just a short walk in back of the building and take advantage of our strategic location for easy access to Saratoga, Lake George, Palace Theatre, The EGG, and downtown Albany.
review: This was a great stay. We enjoyed every aspect of the home. I can say they were very attentive and accommodating to all of our needs. If you are looking for great spot stay with excellent service and attention; This is your spot!! I give them five stars in every area.

description: The whole group will enjoy easy access to everything from this centrally located place. Convenient 1st floor unit with ample bedrooms, livingroom, dining room and spacious kitchen. Off street parking spot included.
review: The photos on Air B&B were cleverly taken to hide flaws (rough trim work, 70s era paneling, etc.).  The apartment functioned for our one night stay.  It housed 5 of my family.    Supplying basic accommodations, nothing special.

description: Enjoy a stylish experience at this centrally-located place. The spacious unit is newly renovated with a 4K Smart TV, in unit washer/dryer, updated kitchen and bathroom, high speed internet.   You will also have access to the building gym.
review: Linda was a great host. Super easy to communicate with and answered the phone almost immediately. Great service super kind, loved my stay there. If I’m ever in Albany again I’ll be staying here

description: Welcome to Capital City Escape, a stylish  3-bedroom, 1.5-bathroom home in the heart of Albany, NY.   This newly renovated space offers all the comforts of home, including a fully equipped kitchen, washer and dryer, and a sleek, contemporary design. Whether you're planning a family getaway or a fun trip with friends, this cozy yet sophisticated retreat is the perfect place to relax and explore Albany!
review: The Airbnb was good, very central location close to the Albany university, and seems like a quiet neighborhood with food around the place. Hosts responded quickly. Overall the experience was nice, and prices were reasonable, facilities seemed new. We had a good time staying there Here are 3 minor things I wanted to point out: 1. The parking location was a bit confused, we’re not sure which side should we park at cause the house is broken down into 2 units 2. The AC/ the vent was a bit loud inside the rooms, luckily it was not hot for the days we have stayed.  3. Neighbors put a few signs next to the building toward the unit, we felt a bit awkward in and out of the building since it’s a smaller community

description: Relax in our cozy home on a quiet one-way street. Plenty of free street parking available. With a large dining and living room, fully stocked kitchen, and furnished private room, our home is the perfect affordable stay for working professionals, students, and people in-between housing.   Newly furnished and renovated in 2017. Minutes from major universities and hospitals. Entire home is 3 bed 1 bath (you have a private bedroom with door lock). CDTA Bus stop 1 block away.
review: Chad’s place is awesome! I stayed for a month and I had such a great experience. My roommates were so sweet and receptive. Thr house had absolutely everything you might need during your stay.

review: Justins place was exactly how it was described,  it was clean and cozy the bed was very comfortable,  walking distance to restaurants which was great. He had great respond time to messages. Would definitely stay here again.

review: We absolutely loved our stay at Cindy’s. It was exactly as described if not better. Cindy went above and beyond to make this space accommodating and comfy with so many little personal touches. We recommend this place to anyone travelling to Albany! Thanks Cindy for being an amazing host!

description: This Suite has been refurbished completely. A beautiful and comfortable Suite that has everything a guest needs! Nice decor with a queen bed, desk, cable TV, WiFi, ironing board, blow dryer and your own private bath. Private entrance close to front of house.  The Inn at South Lake is a large Victorian with multiple dorm style suites. Each suite has it's own private lock. A very quiet, professional atmosphere .
review: Great place to stay. The check in process is easy. The host is very friendly. Will surely come back again.

description: This Suite has been refurbished completely. A beautiful and comfortable Suite that has everything a guest needs! Nice decor with a queen bed, desk, cable TV, WiFi, ironing board, blow dryer and your own private bath. Private entrance close to front of house.  The Inn at South Lake is a large Victorian with multiple dorm style suites. Each suite has it's own private lock. A very quiet, professional atmosphere .
review: This was my second time staying at this AirBnB. I had a wonderful stay. Great location. Plenty of parking.

description: BEAUTIFULLY renovated and stylish apartment with CHARACTER in a brownstone building. Tenant permit street parking available. Available for long term stays!
review: A wonderful, clean place! Great location. Well furnished & stocked. It was quite spacious and comfortable for our week long stay. Check out Hill Street Cafe right around the corner for some good food & drinks. If you're traveling with pets, there's a park right around the corner to walk them. 10/10 would recommend Linda's place to anyone. Hope we have a chance to stay here again when we're in Albany this fall :)

description: The whole group will enjoy easy access to everything from this centrally located place. Convenient 1st floor unit with ample bedrooms, livingroom, dining room and spacious kitchen. Off street parking spot included.
review: Diana was great, accommodated a flexible check in time, responsive. Home is spacious and clean very quaint. Functional with outlets near bed, has nice shampoos and products for guests would highly recommend. Only in town for a wedding so didn’t explore the area but appeared to have plenty of near by restaurants and bars.

description: In the heart of Albany, our expansive home offers you a quaint, private room. Our home exudes elegance with its lofty ceilings, intricate detailing, and spacious common areas. Feel free to relax in the lounge, brew coffee in the kitchen, or take in some fresh air on our terrace. The shared bathrooms are modern, clean, and equipped with essentials.
review: Thomas’s place was very neat and clean. His place was also very close to various restaurants in the area. Overall, a great place to stay for the price.

description: The whole group will enjoy easy access to everything from this centrally located place. Convenient 1st floor unit with ample bedrooms, livingroom, dining room and spacious kitchen. Off street parking spot included.
review: Great place in a nice area. The place was even nicer than the photos! Diana was very accommodating as the host, worry free stay.

description: Kick back and relax in this calm, stylish space. Garden level studio just recently updated. Open floor plan offering everything you need to come home after a long day. Great location minutes off of Lark Street. Close to Capital Center, downtown, medical center and more.
review: i truly recommend if you are a single person needing for a place in Albany for a couple of days.  I love the space! The street is gorgeous. ♡

review: A M A Z I N G ! Place was also bigger then expected which made it 10x Better ! Would stay every time in albany !

PRIME location in the heart of downtown Albany and walking distance to popular restaurants, and cafes on Lark Street. Local attractions including The Egg, Empire State Plaza, Times Union Center are less than 5 minutes away. 4K Smart TV with Netflix, stocked kitchen & bathroom, high speed internet ready for you to use! Free street parking. Available for long term stays!
review: Linda is a fantastic host! This apartment is a great place for a weekend getaway. Everything was very clean and sanitary. My only complaint was the front door to the apartment… The front door is made entirely of glass panels, which made us feel somewhat unsafe knowing someone could easily break the glass and unlock the door. Overall, we enjoyed our stay at Linda’s Airbnb!  The apartment is right next to an awesome Meadery, the Bull and Bee. They have wonderful mead, cider, and wine. Be sure to check out Pearl street for great restaurants, such as The Bishop, and a wonderful donut and coffee shop, Cider Belly Donuts. This Airbnb is also within walking distance of the Empire State Plaza, which is another must to check out while you’re in Albany!

description: Welcome to our lovely 1-bedroom apartment nestled in a quiet residential area of Albany. Just a short stroll from Market 32 and local restaurants, this location is ideal. With St. Rose College nearby, Downtown Albany a 7-minute drive away, 10 minute walk to MVP area, Albany Med just 4 minutes walk, and Saint Peters only 5 minutes driving, convenience is at your fingertips. The apartment is part of a 4-unit house, offering privacy and thick walls for a noise-free environment.
review: The place is wonderful and cozy, with an excellent location. The great communication with the host is truly appreciated! 100% recommended!

description: 1-bedroom home featuring a cozy fireplace, in-unit laundry, air conditioning, and a private deck with a gas grill—perfect for relaxing evenings. Nestled in a quiet and safe neighborhood just minutes from Albany Med, St. Peter’s Hospital, local bars, restaurants, and a nearby food market. Ideal for traveling professionals, couples, or solo guests seeking comfort and convenience.
review: I usually don’t write reviews, but this stay truly deserved one. Everything was beyond expectations; from the attention to detail, the cleanliness, and the comfort, to the extra effort the host put in to make sure everything was perfect. It’s rare to find this level of care, and it made the experience stand out.  Highly recommended!

description: You’ll love the fast 600MB WiFi throughout—whether working or streaming. Inside, there’s a 75” smart TV, a fully stocked, updated kitchen and bathroom, and work desk with a printer. Outside, the backyard is a favorite w. a 120" projector for movie nights, a grill, and a heated firepit table to gather around.  It's also centrally located: close to just about everything you'll want. Just minutes from MVP Arena, UAlbany & other colleges, malls, restaurants, hospitals, parks, downtown Albany & more.
review: It was great! Lots of indoor and beautiful outdoor space. Everything you could need for one night or many nights.

description: Convenience and comfort is what you will find. Private bedroom offered in single family home with driveway close to Albany Med, St. Peter’s, St. Rose, U Albany, CDTA public transport, restaurants, downtown, and nightlife. Full kitchen available with comfortable living room and full bathroom. Hosted multiple medical professionals, students, state interns, and more!  House is a 4 bedroom 1 bath home.
review: This was a lovely place to stay. The living room and kitchen were clean and the kitchen was well equipped. Bathroom was very clean. we had a slight issue with the TV but the host responded really quickly which was great so it was sorted. Due to the air con unit, there is a slight draft and noise at night  in the room but I don't think that can be helped.  Other than that it was a fantastic place to stay and we would stay again!

description: Our recently remodeled one-bedroom apartment boasts a park view, easy parking and is close to downtown Albany. We have an easy walk to groceries, Government Buildings, Albany Law School, College of Pharmacy, VA and Albany Medical Center Hospitals, and Lark Street restaurants and nightlife. The living area features a queen size futon and views of the sunset most evenings, and the bedroom features a luxurious queen-sized memory foam bed and access to our quiet garden where the sun rises.
review: James was an awesome host, always responsive and helpful. The place was perfect for us, large enough to feel at home but small enough to keep clean. James always provided anything needed and went above and beyond. The bed was so  comfortable and the rocking chair was my go to for comfort and relaxation. He kept us with clean linens. The apartment is quiet and since I worked nights I appreciated being able to sleep peacefully during the day. The surrounding area is quite charming! Centrally located so very easy to get to anything we wanted to see or do.  I felt safe here and enjoyed my extended stay.

review: Great place to stay for our family. The neighborhood was quiet and safe. Everything was as described and had plenty of starter items. Would highly recommend and Noriyuki was very responsive with any questions I had. Thank you!

description: Spacious Pine Hills flat with many recent updates including refinished hardwood floors, all new windows and a completely remodeled kitchen, including brand new appliances. This unit also has a private laundry room as well as an entrance foyer. There is off street parking and the building is located within walking distance to 2 primary bus routes. This unit is also within walking distance of popular restaurants, Juniors, The Point, Cafe Madison and Kismet Mediterranean Grill.
review: We were fortunate to stay at David's Albany flat.  The place was very clean, had everything we needed and was HUGE!.  David was very responsive during all of our communication.  We had a great stay and highly recommend.

description: This amazing home is at the first floor of a newly renovated historic duplex, and will give you all the comforts of home! Tastefully decorated with everything you need and then some!!  -> Grab-N-Go items (Coffee, Tea, Light Snacks) -> Smart LED Tvs in every room  -> NordicTrack bicycle -> Smart locks with keyless entry -> Fast wireless WiFi -> Queen beds with premium mattresses & pillow covers -> Fully equipped + utensil stocked kitchen + Keurig Coffee  -> Full size washer/dryer Enjoy your stay!
review: I’ve stayed at dozens of Airbnb’s and Priscela’s place is in my top 3. Pristine, roomy, comfortable and safe. Stylish decorating, a renovated bathroom with a great shower. Comfy adjustable beds. I plan to stay here whenever I come to Albany. Cannot recommend enough!

description: Located just 15 minutes from Albany International Airport, our cozy and modern Airbnb is the perfect place for travelers, business professionals, and adventure seekers looking for a convenient and comfortable stay.  > Prime Location – Quick access to Albany Airport, major highways, and downtown attractions/major stores.   > Comfortable & Clean > Self Check-In > Fast Wi-Fi & Work-Friendly> Fully Equipped Kitchen > Free Off-street Parking
review: We booked with Cecilia very last minute as our plans had changed and it was so nice to arrive and have check in be so easy.  The location is super easy to find and is near a lot of amenities, we went to the grocery store and to a nice dinner and didn’t spend much time in the car.  The kitchen is ready to use and was clean when we arrived, she even provided eggs in the fridge for guest use.  It was a super hot day and the living room AC was on so the place was cooled down. The beds were comfy and soft and we had a wonderful nights rest.  We met Cecilia and were so happy to find her so hospitable and kind. We would definitely book with her again if we were coming through Albany. Perfect for those who are looking to cook!  Thank you Cecilia!! Robin and Michael

description: Enjoy a stylish experience at this centrally-located place. Upper duplex recently renovated to make room for a lovely trip to Albany. Well appointed 1st floor offers kitchen/livingroom full bath. 2nd floor has 2 bedrooms and an additional full bathroom. Tons of natural light provides a peaceful space. Walk out front door to explore neighborhood. Lark street, capital, convention center are all within 15 minutes of walking
review: Nice cozy apartment. Well priced and easy location to get to. The only con which to me was not an issue per say, was finding a parking spot. We parked 2 blocks away after coming back late from a basketball tournament which was held at the Hudson Valley Community College. We didn’t mind this but I thought it may be helpful to highlight this for others to consider when booking. I would stay here again and recommend to family and friends. Many things to do with family or friends some of which are walking distance. I recommend the museum and Cafe Madison!!!

description: Keep it simple in this peaceful and centrally-located room in the Buckingham Lake neighborhood. Less than 10 minutes from downtown and less than 2 miles from 2 major hospitals. The room has a private en suite bathroom, a comfy bed, and a skylight you can close.  You can make use of the kitchen and the laundry is located in the basement. A CVS, pizza place and Dunkin donuts are within a 7-minute walk. A great bagel shop is a 4 minutes drive or a 15-minute walk away.
review: I had the pleasure of staying at Cristian's Airbnb and it was an excellent experience. The location was incredibly convenient, and having a private bathroom was a bonus. The availability of a washer and dryer was a great convenience, especially for longer stays. The heaters worked perfectly, keeping me warm and cozy during the cold winter in New York. Cristian was an exceptional host, always attentive and caring about my needs and requests. His thoughtfulness made my stay even more enjoyable. I particularly enjoyed the cafes near his neighborhood, which added to the overall charm of the area. Furthermore, Cristian's house was impeccably clean, providing a comfortable and private environment. The quietness of the surroundings made for a peaceful and relaxing stay. Overall, I highly recommend Cristian's Airbnb for anyone looking for a convenient, cozy, and welcoming place to stay in New York.

description: 2-bed 2nd floor apt. in a renovated historic two-century-old building in a quiet neighborhood of Albany's Pastures. Great location near Albany Medical Center, MVP Arena, Empire State Plaza, Library, Lark Street, State Offices, courts; easy access to local & regional bus routes and highways (I-787, I-90 & I-87).  1 Queen bed 1 Full bed Up to 6 NON-SMOKING guests Toiletries included  Save & BOOK this unit today! Message me anytime. Hope to welcome you soon!  -Earl
review: The Airbnb was a good deal. The host was helpful, and the place was as described. They have a washer and dryer in the unit and a TV in every room. One room also has access to a balcony.

description: Settle into Albany at the Allen House. This newly renovated apartment will be perfect for your time in the capital of NY. The house is in an unbeatable location with restaurants and stores just around the corner; a few of our favorites are Juniors & Madison Cafe. Many shops and stores are within walking distance. Free street parking only. Book today to ensure your dates!  10 minute drive to the heart of downtown 16 minute drive to Albany International Airport
review: Clean. Comfortable. Charming. Enjoyed the balcony. Great host. Would definitely stay here again.

description: Welcome to our charming Airbnb located in the heart of Albany, NY, perfectly situated on the central bus line for easy access to all the city's major attractions. Our accommodation has spacious common areas that invite you to relax and unwind. Discover our expansive yard, an oasis in the city the highlight of which is undoubtedly the massive hot tub. The property is outfitted with an abundance of furniture indoors and out. ABBA House is designed to make your stay as comfortable as possible.
review: I would come back to Albany just to stay with him. I had everything I needed. It was nice and quiet for studying conditions. Thank you again!

review: Did the trick for our weeklong visit. Host was communicative and attentive. Great value. Cheers!

description: Step into the comfort of this beautiful light-filled, cozy 1 bedroom apartment minutes from hospitals, parks, and great restaurants. Very walkable location next to Albany medical center.  ~fast wi-fi ~fully equipped kitchen ~55” smart tv ~free off street parking ~ contactless self check-in
review: While the host was very responsive & overall the inside was ok, I departed the property one week early after seeing cockroaches and being unable to really settle in to do work.  The ‘office’ space was extremely hot & very poorly lit.  Overall, besides the kitchen & bathroom (mostly due to the windows in those two rooms) the lighting in the apartment is very poor.  The lightbulbs are ‘blue’ and really do not light the space.  The air conditioning units’ replace filter lights were on (probably why it was a challenge to cool the space) .  The auto lock on the entry door slowed during my visit- needs a new battery I think. While conveniently located, between the issues inside, the overall outside/downstairs appearance & the incessant marijuana every time I stepped outside, I wish I would have been more careful in choosing this air BnB.  Was greatly disappointed given the price.

description: Welcome to Capital City Escape, a stylish  3-bedroom, 1.5-bathroom home in the heart of Albany, NY. review: Overall we had a great stay at Nori's home and the hosts were very responsive when we had questions. The neighbors had some uncomfortable signs facing the home and did not seem pleased we were there so we tried to avoid them as we could. The home is beautiful, clean, and updated.

description: Cute single family home in a convenient location with the lots of restaurants, bars and shops right around the corner. It features a driveway with covered parking, a nice outdoor area and central air. My place is close to University of Albany, shopping malls and plazas, bars, restaurants, the airport, the city center, parks, art and culture. Parties and events are not allowed.
review: Great stay. Very convenient location.  Very responsive host.  Highly recommend.

description: Newly renovated one bedroom, loft style apartment. Centrally located in the Mansion neighborhood in albany. Huge spacious open layout with walk in closet. Big screen tvs, with super fast internet (400 mps). On-site laundry, with locked off street parking. Spectacular views of downtown Albany. Walking distance to empire state plaza, the egg, times union, and excellent bars, restaurants, and delis. Great value for anyone staying in albany long or short term.
review: This is my second time renting a separate property from Michael and it was the best accommodation I could hope for. His properties match the listing very accurately and are very spacious, clean, modern, and fully equipped with everything a person could need. Michael is very responsive and proactively addresses anything that may possibly be a concern before you'd even catch it yourself; I was very lucky to have had him as a host and to have caught a spot in two of his apartment while there was availability.

description: This newly renovated 2BR/1BA apartment, situated on the first floor of a two-family house, offers sophistication and space. With public transportation and ample street parking nearby, this is the perfect place to call home.
review: We loved Elizabeth’s place. For the past month it has been our home away from home. We had everything we needed and felt very at home. It is right in the center of everything. Short drive to malls, downtown, and Albany medical college. We were a little sad to leave as we felt so at home. Elizabeth is a great host and always responded when we had a question. Will definitely stay again. Thank you Elizabeth!

description: Stay above it all in this stylish studio perched above Dove + Deer, Albany’s favorite restaurant. Located in historic Center Square, you’re steps from the Capitol, The Egg, and Washington Park. Enjoy a welcome drink and exclusive dining discounts. The studio offers cozy charm with exposed brick, luxe linens, Wi-Fi, and a kitchenette. Perfect for solo travelers or couples wanting a walkable, vibrant neighborhood with unbeatable food and flair.
review: If I was using Uber to travel, I would definitely recommend this place. The stairwells (2) are high and narrow so anyone with a disability may have an issue climbing these stairs, but I liked the location if it hadn’t been for finding parking each night. I usually circled the block until something opened up. The kitchen staff from the restaurant are very friendly and helpful.

description: Hudson 4 is a first floor queen room with private bathroom. Each room is equipped with a SmartTV and Apple TV as well as a desk.  This room is pet friendly.  Complimentary Services: Continental Breakfast Onsite Parking Electric Parking Wi-Fi & Apple TV Keyless Entry Ensuite Guest Rooms ​ Paid Services: Cocktails Meeting Space Rentals Pets (If applicable) Early Checkin (1PM) Late Checkout (12PM)
review: Good location and parking. Right next to the park! Clean room with everything you need. The kitchen (with some breakfast items) is a huge plus if you are traveling with babies or kids as it is possible to clean all their stuff and find water when someone wants it. I appreciated the helpful staff.

description: Charming 5 room bed and breakfast located across from Washington Park in Albany, NY. Each room has a private bathroom and workstation. Guests have access to a shared kitchen, dining area, living space and small office nook with printer.
review: Terra was easy to work with,  flexible about check in time.  Great breakfast items. Very clean room.

description: Please note this is a NO FRILLS stay.  I don't offer amenities outside of fresh towels and soap.  I keep expenses low so I can keep low cost for stay.  Enjoy key pad private bedroom and your own full bath in my home.   My dog is not socialized so he stay in my closed door office when I have guests.  You can park your car in my driveway.  Minutes to St. Peter's,  Albany Med,  SUNY Albany, NanoTech, stores and restaurants.
review: During a recent 5-day stay, Donna, provided a welcoming arrival experience, with a tour of the room, bathroom, private entrance, and gate, along with the entry code to the electronic door lock that did not work. She said sometimes it doesn't work.  IMPROVEMENTS Privacy-- Donna entered the room when I was absent to adjust room settings. I was not happy.  Clear entry door needs curtain for privacy. Gate was found latched & difficult to open, missing a handle.  Stiff towels, no washcloth, or trash cans. Advertised TV with streaming services unavailable. AC was on, room's temperature close to 80 degrees. Fortunately, the ceiling fan helped. It would be helpful if the host clearly outlined her expectations-keeping doors closed, turning off lights/fans, and opening windows in the room description. These issues were not discussed directly with the host during my stay to avoid potential conflict. I cannot recommend this place without correcting the privacy issues in spite of the price.

description: Place is within 2-3 miles of AMC, St. Peter's,  UAlbany, SUNY, College of St. Rose, Washington park, Empire State Plaza, and many other establishments.  Only 15 minute ride to the airport !
review: Best host, Best room!  Spacious and clean room at a reasonable price! Stayed for a month, and Phill was an excellent host. He even taught me how to drive 🤩 Highly recommend to everyone!

review: Diana's place was perfect for an overnight with my two daughters. We stayed for the weekend to attend a baby shower, and this apartment had double the space plus all the amenities that a high end hotel would have. It perfect for what we needed.  Her home was squeaky clean and stocked with basics such as towels and a coffee bar. Thank you for the thoughtful setup!

Can't wait to meet ya!
review: Musab is fantastic. Super nice, very responsive, and incredibly helpful. Felt like he went above and beyond as a host. Comfortable space & safe area. 10/10 would recommend.

review: My daughter stayed here for 2 months for an internship. She said the house was clean and quiet. The back porch and Chuck the guard cat were both highlights of her stay. Would recommend it to anyone in the area.

review: My home away from home when I'm in Albany. Clean home located in a quiet central neighborhood. My first choice whenever I'm in town.

I am truly thankful to have found Adam's place.

description: Located in the heart of Albany, only 7 minutes from SUNY Albany and 4 minutes from St. Peter's Hospital, Casa Bancroft is a charming Mid-Century modern home that has everything you need for a comfortable stay. The first level of the home is exclusively yours with an inviting living area, sun-filled dining, a fully equipped kitchen, two refreshed bathrooms and three spacious bedrooms. Stay just 10 minutes from Downtown, Washington Park, MVP arena and of course “The Egg”!
review: The place was amazing! I would definitely stay here again. The place was well stocked, Cindy promptly responded, and the house was so clean! This has been one of my favorite air bnb’s I’ve stayed at. It felt so homey, the beds were comfortable. I loved all the additional things you left in case a guest forgot something.  I can’t say enough how great this place is!! The location was also great. It was close to shopping and food.  I give this a 10/10 rating.

description: This 3-bedroom, 1-bath Empire State apartment serves up not only all the comforts of home, but also an ideal location. Energize your days with a cup of coffee in the comfort of your own vacation rental, before heading out to explore the New York State Museum, Irish American Heritage Museum, and even the Albany Institute of History & Art. Later, head to Pizzeria Sapienza for a slice of true New York pie, or slurp down some oysters at Jack’s Oyster House!
review: At night it’s a little scary. Not a place to walk around. During the day normal. The foam on beds it’s very soft, if you have back problems.

description: Spend your visit in Albany in our amazingly beautiful place! The house has just been renovated. Every room has its own separate bathroom. The house is conveniently located near the downtown as well as Saint Rose College. The parking lot is also provided. There are many restaurants, pubs and local attractions within reach.
review: Peter's place is amazing. Even nicer than described, we didn't want to leave! Beautifully remodeled, clean, comfortable, well located and quiet. Ample parking and space.

description: Discover unmatched safety and comfort in Albany's historic "Center Square". Our meticulously sanitized brownstone, located near "Albany Medical" and walking distance to State Offices, is perfect for guests aged 21+ and non-smokers seeking a serene and secure retreat. review: Too many people to share one bathroom.  I didn’t expect that. I check out one day earlier! But it was last minute thing.

description: Enjoy the entire house and surrounding area being at the center of Albany. Near everything like children’s park and new basketball court and outdoor exercise bars, also close to one of the bast grocery stores in Albany (Honest Weight Food Co-op) within 5 minutes!  One street over from the bus stop and just the right distance to be close to the main highway without too much traffic. Impeccable cleaning to make sure you always feel comfortable
review: Overall the place was okay, I feel like the could've had newer or cleaner towels. I also feel that they should've given a better picture of the steps as they were steep and narrow. As far as the whole house itself the blinds were very old & raggedy. It also would've been nice if we knew the area we were coming into as it was a little rundown. Not to bring her down, I just feel that you should provide more to make a better stay.

description: Modern townhouse across from the Governors mansion. This unique property offers a perfect blend of historic charm and contemporary living in a building that whispers stories of the past.  A city retreat offering a blend of security, and accessibility to the city's key attractions.  1,900 sq ft of living space includes a modern living/dining area. A spacious 2nd floor bedroom and separate office and library. Large windows fill the spaces with light and access to a large outdoor yard.
review: Great place! Super spacious, outside deck area, cool art throughout, very comfortable.  I would stay here again when back in town.

description: Our apartment is in the perfect location steps from Lark street and a short walk to the State Capital and Empire State Plaza. Just minutes from Albany Law, Albany Medical College, and the train station. Our spacious apartment is welcoming to families, business travelers, students, traveling nurses/doctors, lobbyists and tourists. Our apartment has a private entrance and offers all of the amenities you need including all kitchen utensils and cookware, coffee maker and microwave.
review: I had an amazing time here. There were so many local stores with less than five minutes walking. Very private and quiet with a beautiful neighborhood! Our host was very responsive and even allowed me to delay my check out. I’ll definitely be booking here again soon!

description: Enjoy this park view stylish experience at this centrally-located apartment. You’ll find yourself in the heart of Albany, New York. Only steps away from restaurants and bars. Washington Park right at your doorstep, and Albany Medical Center around the corner.
review: Jshing's place is super comfortable and cozy and suprisingly quiet being that it is set up along a main street by the park.  It's got beautiful views and all the things you need to feel at home.  Restaurants and bars within walking distance.  Jshing quickly responded to any question that we had - through the App and also by phone.  We would definitly recommend this place to others visiting Albany.

description: This full apartment is located on the 3rd floor in this beautiful Victorian. All the comforts of home. Nothing shared,has a full bathtub,full kitchen,one bedroom with a queen bed. Living room and an office,located next to Albany Medical Center and close to law schools and universities.
review: Super clean. Easy check in. Nicely furnished. Comfortable.  It is a third floor apartment, so there are stairs to climb. Buti had no problems. Great stay.

description: This amazing historical apartment is located in Downtown Albany, near the Palace Theater, MVP Arena, Capital Repertory Theatre, NYS Museums, restaurants, and cafes. 1 free parking permit space and small pet friendly. Amenities includes Keyless entry, Free wifi, Free Laundry on site, a kids Multi-game table, 1 Queen LED lite bed, with a blowup bed and a pull out couch. Please be cautious about parking. Albany City has street cleaning nights that prohibits certain side parking on Sundays & Mondays
review: Stephanie’s apartment was very spacious, historical, comfortable, and in a great location. It was a perfect get away for my daughter and I. She slept comfortably on the “bed” couch and we both just LOVED the huge TV! The bed in the bedroom was very comfortable and the bathroom was very clean. Stephanie was very responsive and helpful! We just loved our stay and would love to come back!! The price was unbeatable!!

description: This elegant apartment on the ground floor of an historic 3-story brick row house in the heart of downtown Albany NY, opens to a beautifully appointed living/dining area, has a full kitchen, 2 spacious bedrooms, and a full bath. The fully-equipped kitchen opens to a comfortable living/dining area. This cozy, modern space offers fast wifi, streaming services, plush bedding, full bath, in-unit washer and dryer, and is just steps from Café Capriccio. Please click on photos for more information.
review: Couldn’t have asked for a better stay, great apartment with a lot of character. Marlene is a great host who went above and beyond her duty and even helped with retrieving an item that we had left behind. Would 100% stay again!

description: This location in Albany’s cultural and business hub is ideal for travelling nurses,  professionals on assignment, and visitors alike.  Walk to Empire State Plaza, The Egg, and top dining.  Minutes from MVP Arena, NYS Library & Archives, Albany Med, Albany Universities/Colleges, and government offices.  Features Queen bed, pull-out couch, full kitchen, Wi-Fi, and in-unit laundry.  Quick access to I-787, I-90, and Amtrak. More space, comfort, and convenience than a hotel—book now!
review: Cozy, clean garden apartment in the heart of the city. A clothes washer and drying rack provided a convenient mid-trip refresh of our clothes. We easily walked to dinner, Washington Park, and Ben and Jerry's for dessert.  I'd gladly hang out for a few days just to read Vander's varied book collection.

description: Welcome to our Newly Renovated, three bedroom two bathroom apartment. ☺️ Please note, this apartment is located in a Four Family Apartment Complex.   We are located in a walkable neighborhood within the charming Melrose area, located less than ten minutes from the University of Albany, downtown Albany, as well as many restaurants and attractions! We are pet friendly.   *Please note, this unit is on the second and third floor of a four family unit. Two flights of stairs upon entrance. No parties*
review: Perfect stay for one person or a small group! Also perfect location from Catskills or Adirondack mountains. I’m originally from this area so I knew a bit about places to go, but absolutely loved the space they provided! Also, super friendly and flexible if need be. I’m hoping to make this a yearly visit to the area and come back!

description: Newly renovated one bedroom, loft style apartment. Centrally located in the Mansion neighborhood in albany. Huge spacious open layout with walk in closet. Big screen tvs, with super fast internet (400 mps). On-site laundry, with locked off street parking. Spectacular views of downtown Albany. Walking distance to empire state plaza, the egg, times union, and excellent bars, restaurants, and delis. Great value for anyone staying in albany long or short term.
review: This is a great place for a temporary stay in the area. The apartment is comfortable and clean, with all the amenities on-site. The neighbourhood is not the greatest in Albany, but I did not feel unsafe at any time, and all the folks in the area are super friendly. Easy walking access to a lot of things, but it's probably safer to drive if it's at night. This is a third floor apartment, and coming in from the parking lot at the back the stairs are narrow - which is not a problem for me but might be difficult for some people. There is plenty of overnight parking on the street, just watch the signs and move your car before 10AM and you'll be fine. Very clean space, great kitchen and lots of light, comfortable living room and couch, huge closets.

description: Bright, peaceful 2BR unit set just outside Albany’s vibrant Center Square within walking distance to Washington Park, local cafés, restaurants, and downtown attractions. Whether you’re a solo traveler, couple, or family, you’ll find everything you need for a relaxing stay. Sip your morning coffee on the private deck with birdsong in the background, rest in a cozy queen or full bed, and enjoy self check-in, fast Wi-Fi, climate control with A/C and heat, and private garage parking right next door.
review: So the place is perfectly comfortable and has all the things you’d need, but there’s a reason why the photos don’t show the exterior and neighborhood.  We did a little walking from the house and it’s on the edge of a pretty shady neighborhood.  His own instructions state “for everyone’s safety, please be sure the lock all doors.”

description: Welcome to this charming room in Albany completely remodeled to the studs in '21! Centrally located in the peaceful Pine Hill neighborhood. It’s walking distance to restaurants, bars, grocery store & historic Washington Park. 2 mi to SUNY and 1 mi to Albany Medical. Great for couples, traveling nurse, business professionals. Street parking available in front of the house. Your room is smart TV equipped with live cable for watching all your guilty pleasures, so feel free to bring your own login !
review: Elhadj was very proactive in responding to my queries! I loved the location of the place so close to the restaurants nearby and will be coming back to this place again and again. Highly recommended!

description: This unique place has a style all its own. Three levels of space all to yourself. Central located in Downtown Albany. Fully stocked kitchen to make meals at home or plenty of near by restaurants to explore. Spacious bedroom with attached bathroom. Work area to get some work done before hanging out to catch up on some Netflix shows. Your home away from home for a night or more of you choose.
review: Diana’s places was just as described. She is also very responsive and flexible with request. I would definitely visit when I return to Albany.

description: BEAUTIFULLY renovated apartment with CHARACTER in a historic building. This is a ground floor unit with direct fenced backyard access and a private patio! Ideal for pet owners! 4K Smart TV with Netflix, and high speed internet ready for you to use! This property comes with a fully stocked kitchen, in unit washer/dryer, free resident lot parking, and a fenced shared backyard with bbq for guests to enjoy.
review: Lovely listing and Lovely stay! Linda & co-host were responsive to any questions that came up prior to;during the stay which was very much appreciated!  Beautiful/well-appointed self-contained apartment. Soft, super comfy bed. Central AC/heat thermostat to regulate indoor temp according to guest preference. Awesome rain shower head w/amazing water pressure. Direct access to cute patio w/seating; lush large backyard. The listing is exactly what you see in the photos-consistent with all amenities described. For ex., actual, accurately advertised parking on private property premises was super convenient! Linda provides a comprehensive easy to understand house manual with helpful info including local sights, eateries.  It is apparent a lot of consideration has gone into making this listing an excellent choice for anyone looking to be in the Albany area.

description: Discover unmatched safety and comfort in Albany's historic "Center Square". Our meticulously sanitized brownstone, located near "Albany Medical" and walking distance to State Offices, is perfect for guests aged 21+ and non-smokers seeking a serene and secure retreat. Enjoy the convenience of a private parking spot just a short walk in back of the building and take advantage of our strategic location for easy access to Saratoga, Lake George, Palace Theatre, The EGG, and downtown Albany.
review: Great host, amazing apartment & quick communication. Will definitely be back. Thanks!

description: Convenience and comfort is what you will find. Private bedroom offered in single family home with driveway close to Albany Med, St. Peter’s, St. Rose, U Albany, CDTA public transport, restaurants, downtown, and nightlife. Full kitchen available with comfortable living room and full bathroom. Hosted multiple medical professionals, students, state interns, and more!  House is a 4 bedroom 1 bath home.
review: Stayed at Chads for a month and was very comfortable. Chad was very quick to respond if needed and helpful. At first thought me and my cousin would run into space sharing issues since there are 3 other roommates but barely saw them and when we did they were all very friendly. Definitely recommend!

description: Forget your worries in this spacious and serene space.this place is near hospitals, colleges, restaurants and many more. Peaceful, quiet area.  You will have a living and dining room, a spacious kitchen and bathroom. It’s a shared place.
review: I really enjoyed staying here, the floor has 3 bedrooms, and the living room/dining room/kitchen areas are available for all guests. It is nicely decorated. There is plenty of light in the living room, especially in the afternoon. My bedroom had 3 large windows, with partial light, the bed with a memory foam mattress. There was enough room to walk around the bed, the only down side: no closet to store your clothes and other belongings. The place felt home-like and the host, Adriana, is very kind, attentive, and responsive. I loved the view of other houses across the street, and nice trees. Market32 was in a walking distance, and laundry room was available. Overall I felt less isolated here, loved interacting with other guests, and would recommend it to anyone who wants to do some cooking and share a meal or TV watching with other guests.

description: This stylish place to stay is perfect to stop for a night or stay longer. Open living/kitchen area is perfect to hang out with family and friends. One bedroom with plenty of closet space. Bonus tv in bedroom with updated bathroom. Centrally located close to U-Albany, St. Rose, St. Peter’s & Albany Med to name a few. Quiet residential neighborhood walkable to great restaurants on Madison Avenue. Come and relax at your home away from home.
review: Absolutely loved my stay in this cozy air bnb. Felt right at home. Everything was clean and it had everything we needed for our comfortable stay. Would definitely come back.

description: Convenience and comfort is what you will find. Private bedroom offered in single family home with driveway close to Albany Med, St. Peter’s, St. Rose, U Albany, CDTA public transport, restaurants, downtown, and nightlife. Full kitchen available with comfortable living room and full bathroom. Hosted multiple medical professionals, students, state interns, and more!  House is a 4 bedroom 1 bath home.
review: Nic's place is conveniently located for anyone working or studying at the medical school, law school, pharmacy school or U Albany. It is also within walking distance of many restaurants and other resources, like the public library and city parks. While the neighborhood could be infrequently noisy, I never felt unsafe. I lucked out with amazing housemates in the other rooms, and, of course, Nic was also available for any questions or needs.

description: Prime Real Estate On the Bus Route - Free bus every 20 minutes.  This place is in the Heart of Albany, lots of things in walking distance. Bar and Restaurant Mania!  Minutes from: Suny Albany Downtown Albany Medical College Albany Law School St Peters Hospital Albany VA Medical Center Samaritan Hospital Albany Memorial Hospital Massry Family Children's Emerg Center
review: This host is a scammer. Made us wait outside for over an hour in a dangerous neighborhood. Acted like he was trying to help us get in but was scamming us. Said there was no key after the code didn’t work. Then another guest walked right by us using a key to get inside. Then messaged us saying there is a $100 fee for the missing key. Ridiculous, guy should be picking up trash instead of trying to be an Airbnb host. I’ve dealt with many hosts and never had an issue until this bum host.

description: Private bedroom, shared living room, and shared bathroom on the 2nd floor in my personal home with 2-3 guests. 3 fans in each bedroom. 16 inch memory foam mattress. Mini fridge, microwave, coffee maker, and toaster in the room.  No ac and no kitchen use. Self-check-in Owner-occupied house. On bus lines. You’ll love my place because of its uniqueness, location, and vintage finds.  Direct bus line to Greyhound, Amtrak, Mall, Empire State Plaza, , and Suny Albany.  Free street parking only.
review: Very clean room with Snacks and water in the fridge. house is in a nice area close to a beautiful Park. Great starting point for journeys into areas nearby. Thanks again, Share!

description: Enjoy this park view stylish experience at this centrally-located apartment. You’ll find yourself in the heart of Albany, New York. Only steps away from restaurants and bars. Washington Park right at your doorstep, and Albany Medical Center around the corner.
review: This apartment is quirky and sweet. It's right on the park which is gorgeous and there are restaurants and bars very nearby (walk-able). The main bedroom faces the back and is quiet at night. The building is a bit rough around the edges and the neighborhood seems to be somewhat in transition.  All that said, it felt safe and we walked all around the park in the day looking at the spring blooms. The apartment itself was clean and we were happy there, like we were in our starter apartment where floors are a bit sloped and the corners aren't totally plumb. All sweet details and fine. We hope to be back and would definitely stay again!

description: Welcome to your cozy Albany retreat! Enjoy a comfortable stay in this well-appointed space, perfect for travelers looking for convenience and relaxation. Your booking includes free parking and a complimentary breakfast to start your day right. Located near shops, restaurants, and downtown Albany, this home offers easy access to local attractions. Whether you’re here for business or leisure, you’ll love the comfort and convenience of this stay. Book now for a relaxing experience!
review: I do not like to bash a property but I think this property is misrepresented.  It is not a quaint room but rather a worn out old hotel room in a worn out chain hotel that has been repurposed.  The exterior looked abandoned, the interior has off putting smells and the general repair and cleanliness was not acceptable.  The listing should be made accurate so potential renters would be provided enough information to make personal decisions if this property would be acceptable to their expectations.  On a positive note the host did reach out quickly with communication. The staff persons I interacted with were all pleasant.

description: Lots of natural light in this spacious queen bedroom. Located on a quiet street, there are two balconies with great sunlight, large private bedroom with queen bed, closet, dresser, mirror and nightstand for all your clothes and day to day needs. Convenient laundry in basement, stylish common areas, and a brand new kitchen with stainless appliances, gas range, and retro breakfast nook. Bed and linens are brand new and super comfy. Hybrid coil-foam mattress accommodates side/back sleepers.
review: I had a great stay at Emily’s! The location was ideal for me, an easy walk to work. The house and the rooms are well maintained and the kitchen is well equipped. Emily is very responsive and always available if you have any questions or need help with anything!

description: Cute single family home in a convenient location with the lots of restaurants, bars and shops right around the corner.    It features  a driveway with covered parking, a nice outdoor area with seating, lounging and a weber 3 burner propane grill.   The home has central air and a 5 person Clearlight Premier IS-5 infrared cedar sauna by Jacuzzi.   My place is close to University of Albany, tennis, shopping malls and plazas, bars, restaurants, the airport, the city center, parks, art and culture.
review: Peter is such a welcoming and gracious host. Upon entering the house I immediately felt at home. Everything was clean and decorated in an esthetically pleasing manner. He has so many unique gadgets in the home that truly make you want to replicate them in your own home. I really loved the spa room, Sonos speaker system, and automatic height adjusting computer desk. Peter was very attentive, and if I needed anything, it was taken care of immediately. I would highly recommend staying here, and if I could give more than a five star rating,  I would give him a 10!

description: This property offers a peaceful and centrally-located atmosphere. McDonald's, Walgreens, great pizza spot and Albany Medical Center are just a 4-minute drive away. There’s also a laundromat just 1 minute away, along with a variety of restaurants and bars nearby. Street parking is free, except on Tuesdays or Wednesdays between 12-3pm, depending on which side of the street you park on.  Exterior camera would be present beginning 02/1/2025 .
review: I've stayed in several places in Albany and this was by far my favorite! The bathroom was so nice and clean. The place overall was clean and perfect for 1-2 people. Gloria is very accommodating. Would stay again.

description: Situated on historic Madison Avenue, our property is surrounded by the charm of Albany's rich history and modern amenities. Just steps away from local cafes, restaurants, and boutique shops, you'll experience the true essence of city living. Explore nearby attractions such as the New York State Capitol, MVP Arena, Albany Medical Center , Lark Street and Washington Park, all within easy reach from our doorstep.
review: Had a fabulous stay at this apartment. However be aware that the location is very noisy. Obviously this is not the fault of the owner. It’s simply the location. However the cleanliness of the apartment was perfect. Very comfortable place to stay.

description: Welcome to the Whisky House! Featuring 3 floors with plenty of space to host a corporate event or celebrate with loved ones. Walking distance from downtown and Center Square nightlife, the Whiskey House is the perfect location for a bachelor or bachelorette party, birthday celebration getaway, anniversary, you name it! Whatever the occasion, the Whiskey House is your home away from home.  *We DO NOT have a full size stove/oven - pocket kitchen with smaller amenities (microwave/fridge) available*
review: Thanks for a great stay and being so flexible with adding a day during our travels. We loved the house, the kids were able to spread out and have some space to chill away from us, which they always appreciate. This is definitely going on our favorites list for when we come back to the area.

description: Enjoy this park view stylish experience at this centrally-located apartment. You’ll find yourself in the heart of Albany, New York. Only steps away from restaurants and bars. Washington Park right at your doorstep, and Albany Medical Center around the corner.
review: Very convenient. Host was very responsive and came to meet me at a late hour to let me in. Next to Washington Park and local shops which is nice. Easy walk to my destination in downtown Albany. Apartment looks like photos. Found parking across the street. Overall very good experience. Seamless.

description: Charming 5 bedroom /3.5  Bathrooms , 3 kitchens,huge family home. Hardwood floors through out. Living room, kitchen and master bedroom with 1/2 bath on entry floor. Basement Laundry. 4 car private parking spaces . Full bathroom,living room and kitchenette in finished basement. 3 BR & 1 full bath on the 2nd floor.  A full bathroom,kitchen & living room top floor. Minutes to Lincoln park, Albany Med, law school, downtown Albany,MVP arena.
review: we enjoyed our stay, Timothy is an excellent host who is always available when you reach out. The neighbor is a Horticulturist who loves children and dogs.  Great place to stay when visiting Albany.

description: Place is within 2-3 miles of AMC, St. Peter's,  UAlbany, SUNY, College of St. Rose, Washington park, Empire State Plaza, and many other establishments.  Only 15 minute ride to the airport !
review: Fs is a wonderful host. He’s very friendly, polite and responsive to any need you might have. He keeps a clean and tidy space. I enjoyed my stay and would highly recommend anyone needing a place to stay near Albany downtown.

description: Enjoy your stay in a safe 5 star neighborhood close to everything in Albany. Beautiful first floor apartment. Free parking on site in parking lot in rear of home. Also free parking on street if you prefer. This beautiful home is in a great neighborhood and its centralized location makes it easy for you to get around. Get a great breakfast/lunch at Cafe Madison just a few blocks away.  A few minutes walk to St. Peter's Hospital and local shops. Book now for your luxury stay.
review: I had a wonderful experience staying there. i will definitely book it again in the future. Chris is a great host, in my opinion one of the best in the business... 🙂

description: Single family home with driveway close to Albany Med, St. Peter’s, St. Rose, U Albany, CDTA public transport, restaurants, downtown, and nightlife.   Recently renovated room packed with basic amenities.
review: Walking distance to the hospital. Hosts available and very responsive. Great stay

review: This was a very nice apartment. It was in a great location and , Bela  met us a little early to check in . We were able to walk To a nearby street for dinner - all in all , a very pleasant stay.

description: Just moments from Albany Medical Center, this renovated 1-bedroom apartment exudes brightness and is tastefully furnished with high-end designer furniture and decor, ensuring a delightful living experience. With proximity to Albany Medical Center, universities, and more, the location is truly unbeatable.
review: I’m very happy with my stay. Elizabeth was so helpful and accommodating. I can see why she’s a super host. I travel regularly and was very impressed with Elizabeth’s place. The Apartment was gorgeously decorated and equipped with everything we could need for a relaxing stay. The bed was very comfortable and entire place was super clean.  I’d recommend Elizabeth’s place to others in a heartbeat.

description: Step into the charming and comfy 1BR/1BA apartment in the heart of Albany, NY. It promises a relaxing retreat bordering picturesque Washington Park and funky Lark Street while being within walking distance to the vibrant downtown, which offers easy access to restaurants, shops, and exciting attractions.  The lovely design and the prime location will leave you in awe.  ✔ Comfy Queen Bedroom ✔ Open Design Living ✔ Fully Equipped Kitchen ✔ Smart TV ✔ High-Speed Wi-Fi ✔ Free Parking  See more below!
review: The area is not nice at all. I had an incident where I was locked out from the back patio and several sketchy people came up to me and offered to break into the window and help me “get in” and I declined. There was screaming all through the day and night and fights. It is not a safe area at all.

description: Experience the comfort of staying in a second room of our centrally located home. Conveniently situated on the main bus line, this residence offers ease of access to the city’s top destinations. Make yourself at home in our shared spaces, which include three serene enclosed porches and two Lovesac bean bags. Whether you’re traveling for work or leisure, our home promises a restful and enjoyable stay. Join us and immerse yourself in a welcoming atmosphere, complete with all the comforts of home.
review: Loved staying at Thomas' place. Was very clean, very accessible, great communication from Thomas (would respond in minutes) and very accommodating. 5/5

description: Relax in our cozy home on a quiet one-way street. Plenty of free street parking available. With a large dining and living room, fully stocked kitchen, and furnished private room, our home is the perfect affordable stay for working professionals, students, and people in-between housing.   Newly furnished and renovated in 2017. Minutes from major universities and hospitals. Entire home is 3 bed 1 bath (you have a private bedroom with door lock). CDTA Bus stop 1 block away.
review: Chad and Kellie are nice hosts. I spent a great time at their house. This house has three guest rooms, and all my housemates were great. The bus stop is very close to the house.  The house is old, but it would be nice if the public spaces were managed periodically.

description: Entire garden apartment in Albany, New York. Walking distance to restaurants, shops and Washington Park. Situated in the heart of Historic Center Square neighborhood. 15 minute walk or short ride to MVP Arena. Perfect for couples and short getaways, but we welcome longer stays too!
review: Clean, thoughtfully furnished and plenty of space for 2. It’s located in a beautiful neighborhood that we found to be very walkable and parking was easy. Host responded quickly and helpfully. Would stay again!

review: The apartment was clean and easily accessible with clear instructions from the host. Lots of historical sites and restaurants nearby. The neighborhood was quiet and peaceful

A stylish brownstone with culturally diverse art & experiences & full amenities.    Near iconic places like the NYS Capital, Empire State Plaza, Egg Performing Arts Ctr., restaurants, and more.   The unit is perfect for mature business & medical travelers, and couples looking for a home away from home to unwind and relax while visiting the Capital.
review: We had to circle back to albany unexpectedly to see about an elderly family member.   Rosie had a day blocked off that we needed so we reached out and she was so helpful and accommodating.  The place was immaculate.  Rosie is quick to respond and went above and beyond to make sure we were okay.

description: The whole group will enjoy easy access to everything from this centrally located place. Sun filled top floor unit with spacious bedrooms-well equipped kitchen and modern bath. Convenient location near highway and major hospitals/universities. Malls-restaurants and shopping all close by. Quiet residential neighborhood makes it lovely to walk to close by restaurants to grab a bite to eat outside. Come spend a night or two and be our guest
review: Peaceful apartment in a good neighborhood! The kitchen & bathroom were very nice along with the bedrooms. Having AC in each of the rooms was great! We would stay again

description: Bright, peaceful 2BR unit set just outside Albany’s vibrant Center Square within walking distance to Washington Park, local cafés, restaurants, and downtown attractions.
