Sip your morning coffee on the private deck with birdsong in the background, rest in a cozy queen or full bed, and enjoy self check-in, fast Wi-Fi, climate control with A/C and heat, and private garage parking right next door.
review: Andres place was the perfect place to stay for an event downtown. Everything was spotless and the beds were very comfortable.  Having off-street parking for 2 vehicles was an incredible benefit!  Would definitely recommend if you are in Albany!

description: This luxurious apartment is located on a quiet street in the heart of Albany. Ideal for professionals. It is a 10mn walk from CDTA Bus station, Saint Peter and Albany Med Hospital. Traveling nurses & Dr. are welcome for long term stays. It features a bedroom with a queen-size bed, a living room, a kitchen, a bathroom, TVs, Wi-Fi, Mini-Billiard table,  a washer/dryer, A/C & heat, a Gas fireplace, off-street parking space. The patio with a table and parasol offers a breathtaking view of landscape.
review: Joseph was such a friendly and accommodating host! He was more than willing to help me out with transportation when he was available which I really appreciated. Great value and I would definitely stay again.

description: Welcome to our charming Airbnb located in the heart of Albany, NY, perfectly situated on the central bus line for easy access to all the city's major attractions. Our accommodation has spacious common areas that invite you to relax and unwind. Discover our expansive yard, an oasis in the city the highlight of which is undoubtedly the massive hot tub. The property is outfitted with an abundance of furniture indoors and out. ABBA House is designed to make your stay as comfortable as possible.
review: I’m usually one to be skeptical against staying in shared places but I would love to say that Thomas and Justin are amazing host two of the best. Upon arrival I had a little trouble but Justin was very sweet and attentive. I even lost my bracelet and Thomas was on it right away he was able to find it. It’s very quiet and peaceful. I had no issues whatsoever and slept like a baby🙂Nice area for a walk or jog. Oh and the house looks beautiful in person you can feel the good energy when you walk in. I will definitely rent again from them.

description: Charming 5 room bed and breakfast located across from Washington Park in Albany, NY. Each room has a private bathroom and workstation. Guests have access to a shared kitchen, dining area, living space and small office nook with printer.
review: Lovely B&B in an old victorian house. The house is easy to find, easy to access and the host is very cordial. I was in town for a concert at The Egg and I was able to walk from there to the venue along the park and nice streets. The kitchen area had everything I needed. I had good coffee, fruit and yogurt with granola for breakfast.  Everything provided is perfect and easily accessible. The room was beautiful, clean and comfortable. The only negative comment I have about this place is that the central heating was set too high. I was sweating in my room and I had a hard time sleeping because of it. I addressed the issue and got no response, but I'm guessing it was taken into consideration for future guests.  I would definitely book again in the future when I'm in town. Thank you, Terra !

description: Welcome to your cozy Albany retreat! Enjoy a comfortable stay in this well-appointed space, perfect for travelers looking for convenience and relaxation. Your booking includes free parking and a complimentary breakfast to start your day right. Located near shops, restaurants, and downtown Albany, this home offers easy access to local attractions. Whether you’re here for business or leisure, you’ll love the comfort and convenience of this stay. Book now for a relaxing experience!
review: Good, friendly, responsive host. Hotel room was as described. Only issue was that the google map takes you to a different location. Had to ask few folks at a gas station to get the correct location and direction.

description: Step into Fortune Suites, a recently revamped Two-bedroom apartment ideally situated within 8 to 10 minutes' drive of Albany Med, Times Union Center, and other local attractions. Street parking is hassle-free, accommodating up to 4 Non-smoking guests. Toiletries are provided, and we kindly request keeping noise levels down after 9:00 pm. Rest assured, high-speed internet is included for your convenience. Welcome and enjoy your stay!
review: Got locked out of the unit & had to find another place to stay because the host did not respond to calls/texts or give proper instruction til next day. If we were given 2nd passcode to access spare key upon booking we would have had no issue. We were given 1 passcode with no other instruction, there were actually two spare keys that the host did not tell us about; one inside the unit, and one in a lockbox inside the entry to the building. These were not mentioned at all in the info we got upon booking and no signs were posted  Doorknob has a lock mechanism that is not connected to the passcode we were given, that passcode only unlocks the deadbolt. So if someone locks the doorknob on their way out they will be locked out unless the host gives proper instruction. Illogical set up that needs to be explained to guests to avoid issues. Damage to door suggests others had same issue entering unit or someone tried to break in. I deserve a full refund, which the host has refused. Despicable

description: Welcome to your cozy Albany retreat! Enjoy a comfortable stay in this well-appointed space, perfect for travelers looking for convenience and relaxation. Your booking includes free parking and a complimentary breakfast to start your day right. Located near shops, restaurants, and downtown Albany, this home offers easy access to local attractions. Whether you’re here for business or leisure, you’ll love the comfort and convenience of this stay. Book now for a relaxing experience.
review: The listing stated a kitchen, cookware, wineglasses, patio/balcony. All it had was a microwave. Not even disposable bowls/cups.  The cohost could've admitted to not having kitchened units available and had some plates sent over; would've been fine. Instead he insisted I booked a unit without a kitchen, etc. Good value for money even without a kitchen. So a silly way to lose a good review.

description: Charming 5 room bed and breakfast located across from Washington Park in Albany, NY. Each room has a private bathroom and workstation. Guests have access to a shared kitchen, dining area, living space and small office nook with printer.
review: Great area, walking distance to many restaurants and a beautiful park! It was a clean and safe space. The Bed & Breakfast is not what we expected. They have a self serve kitchen area with unclear food out. We were unsure of freshness of food &  what was able to be used. The price was reasonable but the basic amenities fell short.

description: Welcome to your home away from home in Albany, NY! Garden-level apartment in the heart of the vibrant, historic Center Square. Enjoyable blend of comfort and convenience. Walkable to Washington Park, award-winning restaurants, local coffee shops, boutiques, and the NYS State Capitol. Ideal for couples, solo travelers, weekend getaway, work trip, a longer term stay, or a peaceful and centrally located retreat. You’ll love the character, walkability, and charm of this thoughtfully appointed space.
review: Have stayed at Matt’s place multiple times and will continue to return. Love the space, the private outdoor space, the amenities and the ease of access. Matt even provided me a discount for my repeated patronage. Highly recommend this listing to anybody. Thank you.

description: This full apartment is located on the 3rd floor in this beautiful Victorian. All the comforts of home. Nothing shared,has a full bathtub,full kitchen,one bedroom with a queen bed. Living room and an office,located next to Albany Medical Center and close to law schools and universities.
review: This location is wonderful. The apartment has every amenity you can need and was perfectly situated to close to some delicious food. Bela is super accommodating and very responsive if you message her. I love staying and will definitely look for the listing again! ❤️

description: Welcome to Capital City Escape, a stylish  3-bedroom, 1.5-bathroom home in the heart of Albany, NY.   This newly renovated space offers all the comforts of home, including a fully equipped kitchen, washer and dryer, and a sleek, contemporary design. Whether you're planning a family getaway or a fun trip with friends, this cozy yet sophisticated retreat is the perfect place to relax and explore Albany!
review: Noriyuki and Kate were beyond accommodating with early check in! Their home is beautiful, clean and a close to our 2 favorite places in Albany, City line and Uncommon grounds! Would highly recommend this Airbnb!

description: Cute single family home in a convenient location with the lots of restaurants, bars and shops right around the corner.    It features  a driveway with covered parking, a nice outdoor area with seating, lounging and a weber 3 burner propane grill.   The home has central air and a 5 person Clearlight Premier IS-5 infrared cedar sauna by Jacuzzi.   My place is close to University of Albany, tennis, shopping malls and plazas, bars, restaurants, the airport, the city center, parks, art and culture.
review: This little 2 bedroom house on Homestead/Edenburg ave is a gem.  Clean, comfortable, and modern appliances and amenities.  All of the soaps and basics and bonus items in the kitchen were great.  Peter was always very responsive to the few questions we had.  We will stay here again.

description: Enjoy a stylish experience at this centrally-located place in College Town. close to downtown and all it's restaurants and bars, Washington park and the Plaza. There’s albany medical and st Peter's  Hospital are about a mile away as well Saint Rose, Albany law and UAlbany.
review: Definitely the price and stay. One of the best spots I've been at. Everything's is very homey comfortable. Antonio himself is very friendly and helpful. When I go back I can't wait to stay there again. Thank you very much Antonio!

description: Our recently remodeled one-bedroom apartment boasts a park view, easy parking and is close to downtown Albany. We have an easy walk to groceries, Government Buildings, Albany Law School, College of Pharmacy, VA and Albany Medical Center Hospitals, and Lark Street restaurants and nightlife. The living area features a queen size futon and views of the sunset most evenings, and the bedroom features a luxurious queen-sized memory foam bed and access to our quiet garden where the sun rises.
review: once again, enjoyed our stay.  James was a very good.  seems to becoming a tradition to stay there when we are in Albany.  James was very honorable host. Would stay there again

description: Entire garden apartment in Albany, New York. Walking distance to restaurants, shops and Washington Park. Situated in the heart of Historic Center Square neighborhood. 15 minute walk or short ride to MVP Arena. Perfect for couples and short getaways, but we welcome longer stays too!
review: Really enjoyed staying here, so much so that I added on a second night. When I asked for a late checkout, Matt responded quickly and gave me more time than I asked for! Now that’s service. Will definitely stay here again.

description: Indulge in modern luxury and sophistication in this tastefully updated 2-bedroom townhouse-style apartment. With chic designer furnishings and modern amenities, your private porch entrance welcomes you home to elegance. Located on one of Center Square's most picturesque streets, enjoy easy access to fabulous dining, iconic landmarks, and vibrant nightlife. Experience the convenience of city living, just a mile from Albany Medical Center and St. Peter’s Hospital.
review: Elizabeth’s space was really nice and cozy. Unfortunately I had to leave after a couple of days due to a flood but Elizabeth was extremely helpful and responsive and provided me with a full refund. I would definitely stay in one of her spaces again!

description: The best location in Albany. This room is cozy with large windows. The closet is big and ideal for longer stays. You’ll live the living areas with ornate woodwork and natural light throughout. Walk to eateries, grocery, and cinema. The yard is massive with a screened in gazebo. Come relax!
review: The host was extremely responsive. This was a perfect location to go for parent’s weekend at RPI. The house was adorable and quite peaceful. I never encountered anyone else the whole time I was there.

description: In the heart of Albany, our expansive home offers you a quaint, private room. Experience the charm of staying in a spacious dwelling while enjoying the conveniences of a central location, ideal for those who explore on foot. Our home exudes elegance with its lofty ceilings, intricate detailing, and spacious common areas. Feel free to relax in the lounge, brew coffee in the kitchen, or take in some fresh air on our terrace. The shared bathrooms are modern, clean, and equipped with essentials.
review: I had a fantastic experience at Thomas and Justin’s Airbnb. This was my first time renting a room versus an entire place and it was a great experience. The home is cleaned daily, guests were friendly but also understanding of privacy, and the hosts were exceptionally responsive. The house is bright and beautiful (pictures don’t do it justice), and has very tranquil vibes, which makes sense as it was a former prayer house. I really enjoyed my peaceful mornings on the enclosed porch and evening strolls around the quiet neighborhood. Highly recommended!

description: Bright and airy newly renovated 2 Bedroom / 2 Bathroom apartment near downtown Albany.  Located on the ground floor of one of Albany’s oldest townhomes, the apartment is a blend of rich historical architecture with new, modern furnishings.     Featuring high ceilings, wide plank floors and rich details, the living spaces are ample in size and both bedrooms feature queen size beds with luxurious bedding.  The kitchen features all new appliances, cookware and utensils.
review: Great place. We extended our stay.  Everybody says it’s not a safe location but we had no issues.

description: "The Red House," an inspiring 4-bedroom, 2nd-floor apartment nestled in the heart of Albany. This charming space features beautifully refinished 130-year-old hardwood floors, creating a warm and inviting atmosphere. A custom stone fireplace, complete with a 50-inch Samsung Smart TV, serves as the focal point of the living area. The kitchen is fully equipped for whipping up a meal. The dishwasher and laundry are conveniently located in the unit. Front and back balconies! Free street parking.
review: The Red House was a great stay! The place was clean and cozy. The hosts were very responsive and helpful.

description: The Rose Haven space  Welcome to The Rose Haven Apartment! This unique oasis is nestled in the heart of the City of Albany, New York, offering a perfect location near Historic Washington Park. It promises a secluded romantic getaway immersed in the dreamy natural ambiance of Washington Park.   Once you are ready to rest and relax, retreat to the lovely bedroom, where you can recharge after an exciting day of adventuring throughout the City of Albany.
review: I truly enjoyed my stay at Miguelino's apartment for it being a newly listed post of only 9 months. This place was newly renovated and had such a at-home like feel from the decorations. I was provided with private parking for 1 vehicle that was in the back driveway, which was convenient to the backdoor entrance. The host was very friendly, attentive, responsive to all of my needs, which I appreciate. The heat was increased upon request, due to no thermostat in apartment. Overall, I would stay here again, my partner and I had no complaints otherwise.

description: Immerse yourself in this meticulously updated 2-bedroom unit, where modern amenities and chic designer furnishings ensure a delightful stay. This elegant abode is mere steps from renowned restaurants, iconic landmarks, and vibrant nightlife. Enjoy the convenience of being centrally located in the capital region, with local hospitals just a stone's throw away. With its bright, clean, and professionally furnished interiors, this unit promises a welcoming retreat in the heart of the city
review: Elizabeth was a great host. Always in constant communication. The place and its location were perfect. 100% recommended!

description: Prime Real Estate On the Bus Route - Free bus every 20 minutes.  This place is in the Heart of Albany, lots of things in walking distance. Bar and Restaurant Mania!  Minutes from: Suny Albany Downtown Albany Medical College Albany Law School St Peters Hospital Albany VA Medical Center Samaritan Hospital Albany Memorial Hospital Massry Family Children's Emerg Center
review: Rodney was a great host.  Had a minor snag at check-in but even at 11:30pm on a Friday night he was easy to contact and very responsive.  Got everything straightened out and enjoyed a nice long weekend at his property.  Easily a 5 star host in my book!  The next time I travel to Albany I'll likely book with him again.

description: Welcome to this charming room in Albany completely remodeled to the studs in '21! Centrally located in the peaceful Pine Hill neighborhood. It’s walking distance to restaurants, bars, grocery store & historic Washington Park. 2 mi to SUNY and 1 mi to Albany Medical. Great for couples, traveling nurse, business professionals. Street parking available in front of the house. Your room is smart TV equipped with live cable for watching all your guilty pleasures, so feel free to bring your own login !
review: It was great to stay in Elhadj's home. He was very responsive and helpful. Roommates are also very nice. I would stay here again if I'm in Albany.

description: For traveling professional, college students, or parents visiting your young adult, enjoy this stylish apartment centrally-located in Albany.  NY State Capital - 2.4 mi Suny Albany - 3.5 mi Albany Medical Center - 3.5 mi Regeneron Pharma - 4.8 mi RPI University - 10 mi General Electric  - 15 mi   The home is 1st floor unit in two family house, which was recently renovated. It includes new appliances: washer, dryer and dishwasher. It's a restful stay, which is close main areas.
review: Carla was very helpful and easy to communicate. She even extended our stay in a very short notice.  We had to buy some essentials like soap, shampoo, dish washer, laundry detergent, and etc. It was fine for us but I have seen other airbnb offers.  There were lot of pots and pans but mostly not cleaned. I am assuming previous guests left it in rush without cleaning properly.  There were heat operator in every room. I wish it was central instead switching on and off all the time.  Location is alright, everything is within few minutes drive. Some might the neighborhood not safe but we had no problem.  Overall, we really enjoyed our stay. All these things that I mentioned didn't bother us but I am writing for future guests.

description: A large suite located in a huge Victorian that’s very quiet. Suites have separate locks and are very private. The house maintains a very professional environment. Walking distance to hospitals, law schools and restaurants.
review: This is a fantastic place to stay! The location is perfect, the accommodations are comfortable and well-maintained. The staff is friendly and always ready to help. Whether you’re here for a short visit or a longer stay, this place has everything you need. Highly recommended!

description: Spectacular Modern two bedroom apartment in Downtown Albany's Historic Mansion District across the Governors mansion. Perfect for traveling professionals and/or families. 3 minute walk to The NYS Museum, Empire State Plaza, many local restaurants, The Capital , the MVP Arena, The legislative Office building, The Cathedral & Lark Street. A 3 minute drive to Albany Medical Center, Albany Law School & The VA Hospital.Exceptionally quiet street. If traveling with family, lots of nearby Playgrounds.
review: Johnny’s place was really nice. We were pleasantly surprised at how spacious the apartment was. The bedrooms and bathroom were clean. Johnny provided all the instructions for checkin and checkout which made it easy  I would definitely recommend this place and would visit again when I’m visiting the area

description: BEAUTIFULLY renovated apartment with CHARACTER in a historic building. This is a ground floor unit with direct fenced backyard access and a private patio! Ideal for pet owners! 4K Smart TV with Netflix, and high speed internet ready for you to use! This property comes with a fully stocked kitchen, in unit washer/dryer, free resident lot parking, and a fenced shared backyard with bbq for guests to enjoy.
review: My family and I enjoyed our stay. The place is clean and functional for a short stay but I wouldn’t want to stay there for more than a week. The place had basically everything we needed. we loved the gated backyard for my dog. The parking lot is ok. You can literally hear everything the people upstairs do which wasn’t ideal. They provided extra bedding for the couch which is where my brother slept. I wish the kitchen had a baking sheet and one of the cabinets was broken. The sponge they provided for the kitchen was used and smelled like mildew…the bed was super comfy but I wish there was a tv in the room. Only 2 towels were provided when there were 3 guests. I asked for an extra towel and was told one would be dropped off shortly but it never was. Good thing my brother was moving in to his dorm and brought towels with him. The private patio is a MESS. Nothing like the pictures. Super dirty, no furniture. The outside door doesn’t lock but the main door to the unit does.

description: This property offers a peaceful and centrally-located atmosphere. McDonald's, Walgreens, great pizza spot and Albany Medical Center are just a 4-minute drive away. There’s also a laundromat just 1 minute away, along with a variety of restaurants and bars nearby. Street parking is free, except on Tuesdays or Wednesdays between 12-3pm, depending on which side of the street you park on.  Exterior camera would be present beginning 02/1/2025 .
review: We felt safe in the area.  Street parking was easy.  It was snowing and Gloria's place was super warm and cozy.  Great nights sleep.  Reasonable price.  I would stay again for sure.

description: Welcome to this charming room in Albany completely remodeled to the studs in '21! Centrally located in the peaceful Pine Hill neighborhood. It’s walking distance to restaurants, bars, grocery store & historic Washington Park. 2 mi to SUNY and 1 mi to Albany Medical. Great for couples, traveling nurse, business professionals. Street parking available in front of the house. Your room is smart TV equipped with live cable for watching all your guilty pleasures, so feel free to bring your own login !
review: The room was spotlessly clean, with everything well-maintained and tidy. It was incredibly quiet, providing a peaceful environment perfect for rest. The cozy atmosphere, with its warm temperature and comfortable setup, made it feel very inviting and relaxing.

description: This amazing home is at the first floor of a newly renovated historic duplex, and will give you all the comforts of home! Tastefully decorated with everything you need and then some!!  -> Grab-N-Go items (Coffee, Tea, Light Snacks) -> Smart LED Tvs in every room  -> NordicTrack bicycle -> Smart locks with keyless entry -> Fast wireless WiFi -> Queen beds with premium mattresses & pillow covers -> Fully equipped + utensil stocked kitchen + Keurig Coffee  -> Full size washer/dryer Enjoy your stay!
review: Property was beautiful and clean.  Communication was easy.  Kitchen and bathroom modern and spotless.  Highly recommend and would return.

description: Welcome to our charming Airbnb located in the heart of Albany, NY, perfectly situated on the central bus line for easy access to all the city's major attractions. Our accommodation has spacious common areas that invite you to relax and unwind. Discover our expansive yard, an oasis in the city the highlight of which is undoubtedly the massive hot tub. The property is outfitted with an abundance of furniture indoors and out. ABBA House is designed to make your stay as comfortable as possible.
review: I can always count on having a peaceful experience whenever I stay at this Airbnb location.  It is very apparent that my viewpoint is shared by other guests because others tell me that the ABBA House is very reliable, safe, and affordable.  Great place to stay

description: Enjoy a stylish experience at this centrally-located place in College Town. close to downtown and all it's restaurants and bars, Washington park and the Plaza. There’s albany medical and st Peter's  Hospital are about a mile away as well Saint Rose, Albany law and UAlbany.
review: This Airbnb is a cute little spot in a convenient location. I had no issues with parking, everything was clean and the host was very helpful and accommodating. Will definitely stay again in the future if the opportunity arises. ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

description: This stylish light-filled space is perfect for traveling professionals, cozy 2 bedroom apartment minutes from hospitals, parks, and great restaurants. Very walkable location right next to Albany Medical Center.  ~ fast wi-fi ~fully equipped kitchen  ~55” smart tv ~free off street parking  ~contactless self check-in
review: Clean space, great location! Michaela is great to communicate with and is very responsive! Looking forward to my next stay!

description: Welcome to your Beacon apartment!  Step into the warm embrace of your Beacon Avenue apartment. Experience the charm of this spacious, large 2-bedroom home nestled in the heart of Albany.  Comforts of a complete home where space and luxury come together seamlessly.  Your new apartment can accommodate up to 4 guests, along with a dedicated work-from-home space with an adjustable standing desk & WiFi.  Enjoy nearby shopping & dining just minutes away, immersing yourself in Albany's vibrant tapestry
review: Thanks so much for your accommodations. My husband was very comfortable. He mentioned the apartment was clean, had nice amenities, the bed was comfortable, and you were very responsive.

description: Hello, thanks for checking out my listing! This is a vintage home with a private twin bedroom. Living room, dining room, kitchen, front porch with rocking chair and AM sun, and back deck with two seating areas in warmer weather. The back yard is quiet and serene with more wildlife to watch than you might expect in the city! Guest should expect lots of peace and privacy.  Expect a homey feel, and a safe and clean space.
review: I had a wonderful stay at Emily’s house.  I would recommend staying here to my family and friends.  The space is serene and well decorated.   Emily is kind and welcoming.

description: Hello, thanks for checking out my listing! This vintage, updated home has  multiple living areas inc. 2 living rooms, dining room, enclosed porch & outdoor patio with tree-lined back yard. large bedroom with closet, shared 1.5 baths. plenty of on street parking.  2 mi to Albany Medical, the VA, 1 mi to St Peter's. Approx. 1 mi (walkable!) from University at Albany main campus, Harriman State office campus, groceries & nightlife.
review: Emily was truly a lovely host! I felt at home pretty immediately. She is kind, funny and easy going. The house itself was very beautiful and clean. The neighbourhood is very pretty and very safe as well. I spent forty days here as I started a new job in the area and was able to comfortably transition into my work. I am going to miss the place! Highly recommended.

description: BEAUTIFULLY renovated and stylish apartment with CHARACTER in a brownstone building. PRIME location in the heart of downtown Albany, minutes from highway and walking distance to popular restaurants, and pubs.   Local attractions including The Egg, Empire State Plaza and Palace Theatre are less than 5 minutes away. 4K Smart TV with Netflix, stocked kitchen & bathroom, high speed internet ready for you to use!   Tenant permit street parking available. Available for long term stays!
review: The place is spotless. So much that the floors have this wax on them you can go pretend ice skating. The neighbors are great. We didn’t have pepper so I “borrowed” some from across the street. We had an issue with the a/c and she explained how to reset it asap. There weren’t washcloths and I messaged her and she instacarted me some right away. She provides parking passes to avoid tickets for the ridiculous parking rules in Albany. You live there but have to move your car every 2 hours unless you have this pass. Madness! The shower is great. Bed comfortable. Great gas stove to cook on. Private. I would definitely stay at Linda’s place again.

description: Brand new finished 900 sq ft Apartment at 199 Lark Street, Albany NY 12210. On-street parking, The most Vibrant Street in Albany.  Walking to Downtown Business District and Washington Park. Enjoy easy access to everything from this perfectly located home base.
review: Excellent location, and responsive host. Great value. I would stay again

description: One beautiful one bedroom garden level apartment in close proximity to all the best that downtown Albany has to offer. Next to Lark Street, Washington Park, Rockefeller Plaza, Historic State Street, museums, cafes, bars, shopping, and grocery stores. Its a 5 min walk to Albany Med, the VA Hospital, the Albany Law School, Pharmacy School, and Nursing School. 1 mile to Sage College and New Scotland Restaurants.
review: Nice first floor apartment with a huge comfortable bed and desk for working. The kitchen is well equipped, and there's also a big, new washer and dryer. Aleks is friendly and responded quickly when I had a small problem. The neighborhood is hit and miss, but the street itself is fine. Overall, it's a good value and a nice option if you need to be near Albany Med.

description: The best location in Albany. This room is cozy with large windows. The closet is big and ideal for longer stays. You’ll live the living areas with ornate woodwork and natural light throughout. Walk to eateries, grocery, and cinema. The yard is massive with a screened in gazebo. Come relax!
review: Tom and Justin were very friendly and welcoming. The house is gorgeous and impeccably clean! The bed was so comfortable. Highly recommend staying at this place

description: Welcome to your cozy Albany retreat! Enjoy a comfortable stay in this well-appointed space, perfect for travelers looking for convenience and relaxation. Your booking includes free parking and a complimentary breakfast to start your day right. Located near shops, restaurants, and downtown Albany, this home offers easy access to local attractions. Whether you’re here for business or leisure, you’ll love the comfort and convenience of this stay. Book now for a relaxing experience!
review: You get what you pay for.. The whole place(hotel) is starting to fall into pieces. Everything needs to be renovated. Weed smell into the escalator and hallway were absurb. Bed was fine, the bathroom was disgusting, old cloths from previous stayers, hair everywhere, bathtub hasnt been cleaned in ever.

description: Welcome to the Whisky House! Featuring 3 floors with plenty of space to host a corporate event or celebrate with loved ones. Walking distance from downtown and Center Square nightlife, the Whiskey House is the perfect location for a bachelor or bachelorette party, birthday celebration getaway, anniversary, you name it! Whatever the occasion, the Whiskey House is your home away from home.  *We DO NOT have a full size stove/oven - pocket kitchen with smaller amenities (microwave/fridge) available*
review: Tyler’s place was great!  Super fun space to stay in. He was very responsive when I had a question. We will stay there again when we are in town and highly recommend anyone coming to town to check it out.

description: Stay above it all in this stylish studio perched above Dove + Deer, Albany’s favorite restaurant. Located in historic Center Square, you’re steps from the Capitol, The Egg, and Washington Park. Enjoy a welcome drink and exclusive dining discounts. The studio offers cozy charm with exposed brick, luxe linens, Wi-Fi, and a kitchenette. Perfect for solo travelers or couples wanting a walkable, vibrant neighborhood with unbeatable food and flair.
review: Great location, right in Center Square. A beautiful spot within walking distance to everything from Lark Street, Washington Park, and Downtown Albany. The place was comfortable and cosy. The kitchen amenities were pretty bare bones - no coffee pot or mugs, 2 plates, glasses and one pot. I imagine this is a new rental and they're just getting things set up. Staying right above the bar restaurant was interesting - going in and out right by the entrance to the kitchen. But inside the unit was well-cared for and quiet. I was so glad to have central air in the unit, beautiful windows, and a comfortable bed. Host was responsive when my travel plans were up in the air. So I really appreciate the peace of mind. I would stay here again!

description: "The Red House," an inspiring 4-bedroom, 2nd-floor apartment nestled in the heart of Albany. This charming space features beautifully refinished 130-year-old hardwood floors, creating a warm and inviting atmosphere. A custom stone fireplace, complete with a 50-inch Samsung Smart TV, serves as the focal point of the living area. The kitchen is fully equipped for whipping up a meal. The dishwasher and laundry are conveniently located in the unit. Front and back balconies! Free street parking.
review: I was in town for a wedding in the area. The red house was the perfect place for us! It was clean and accommodated 6 of us very comfortably. Brigid was very helpful with any questions while in town and was very quick to respond. I would highly recommend!

description: Welcome to our beautiful 3-bedroom, 2-full bathroom home with laundry in the unit! With modern furnishings, comfortable beds, and all the amenities you need, this space is perfect for families, groups of friends, or business travelers. Located in the uptown Manning Boulevard neighborhood, you'll be just a short drive away from local attractions and delicious restaurants. Whether you're here for work or play, this home will provide you with a comfortable and convenient stay. Book your stay today!
review: Phil have been an amazing host, me and my roommate stayed here for two month and Phil was able to provide top tier services when we needed help. The location for the property was okay, it’s in a ghetto neighborhood. Overall, I would definitely recommend Phil as a host.

description: Welcome to our newly renovated two-bedroom apartment located on the second floor, just minutes away from Albany Med, and across from Washington Park. Easy access to state offices and MVP arena all within walking distance. The neighborhood is brimming with restaurants, bars, and beautiful architecture, making it one of the most desired areas in Albany. Perfect for both short-term and long term visits. Our apartment offers comfort and convenience in an ideal location.
review: Erion's place was perfect for what we needed for a work week.  Had a great dedicated work space, comfortable, private and felt right at home.  LOVED the location close to Washington park and great restaurants!  Erion was super responsive with anything we needed.  We would highly recommend!

description: Our apartment is in the perfect location steps from Lark street and a short walk to the State Capital and Empire State Plaza. Just minutes from Albany Law, Albany Medical College, and the train station. Our spacious apartment is welcoming to families, business travelers, students, traveling nurses/doctors, lobbyists and tourists. Our apartment has a private entrance and offers all of the amenities you need including all kitchen utensils and cookware, coffee maker and microwave.
review: Rachel is super responsive. The apartment is right off a busy street which was great! So many things are within walking distance. Bed is super comfy; the shower is amazing! We only had a couple of nights between the wedding we attended in Vermont and flying back out of Albany. Would definitely recommend & would love to stay here again. The only drawback is the lack of available parking. We had to park one street over which was not a problem, just something to be aware of.

description: 2-bed 1st floor apt. in a renovated historic two-century-old building in a quiet neighborhood of Albany's Pastures. Having just dropped our daughter off at Yale to begin her Masters in Acting, our one night stay in Albany couldn't have been more pleasing. I would highly recommend Argus. It's also the perfect place to leverage the Playhouse Stage Academy's summer performances during August. The combination will make for a memorable stay. Mike

The pictures definitely show a good side of the property and the rooms. The shower tub did not drain as well as we'd like, but that doesn't bother me too much. There seemed to be a smell, maybe from the previous airbnb renters that was distracting at first but dissipated over our one evening stay.  Can't wait to head back to Albany soon for more hiking and coffee shops and good eating!

review: When checking in the lobby was 100 degrees. Even the attendant was using a fan. We were put in a room on the 7th floor. The room had a kitchen, which was not cleaned. There were crumbs on the pan on the stove, and bugs all over the area. We had to close the kitchen door for our stay. Positive was that the front desk attendant was friendly. And provided dinner recommendation. The carper was not cleaner. And the hotel has not been updated for at least 20-30 years. The ad says there is a pool, but the pool is closed, and looks like it was closed for years. I deserve a refund or at least partial refund for this stay. They communicated great, but the hotel itself needs to be knocked down. I would only recommend it if it’s a last resort off the highway. I feel scammed. It ruined my vacation at the track. I’ve been going to the track 25 summers in a row, and never had an experience like this.

review: Older hotel that was, at one time, probably quite luxurious and part of the Ramada chain. Now in need of renovations and sprucing up. The room we had was clean and the AC worked well. It also had a small kitchen / Dining area which was a nice addition. Breakfast was good in the morning and included in the room rate. Front desk staff were very nice and answered any questions we had. Overall, it was worth what we paid.

description: Discover peace of mind in our professionally sanitized 2bdrm apt. in Center Square Albany. Perfectly designed for extended stays, this apartment features 24/7 security cameras and a hardwired fire alarm system for your safety. Whether you're working remotely or seeking a comfortable retreat, enjoy blackout curtains and a fully equipped kitchen. Free washer, dryer, and dedicated parking included. Ideal for traveling nurses, business travelers, and long-term guests. No smoking inside the apartment
review: I was hesitant to leave this review as I have never left a bad review on air bnb and I am all about supporting local entrepreneurs but I feel like I should be honest about my experience. First, we'll start with the good, and to be fair, there was some good. The property is a charming brownstone and the unit is spacious, airy, clean, and modern. The location is unbeatable - steps from Lark Street, Washington park, downtown Albany and Empire State Plaza - as well as plenty of public transportation and highways nearby. Having a designated off-street parking spot is also a huge plus if you have a car as parking in this neighborhood can be challenging. As someone who lived in Albany for 15 years I picked this neighborhood for our visit knowing it is the best place to be for restaurants, bars, convenience, and accessibility.  We picked this unit specifically because it was one of the very few in this area that had 2 bedrooms that wasn't a crazy amount of money. While we were traveling as a party of two (a married couple) we wanted a place with separate bedrooms as we've been struggling with a snoring issue lately that has been exhausting to live with. I didn't think I needed to disclose this to the hosts let alone a bunch of strangers on an air bnb review, but here we are.  First let me say that Dominick the host was responsive and friendly in our messages leading up to the trip and when we needed to contact him regarding someone else being in the parking spot. All other communications I refer to from hereon are with the woman Flerida he told us upon arrival to contact with any and all questions/concerns. She told us she was the owner/manager of the air bnb so I am not sure who Dominick is in all of this, but let's move on... Upon our arrival we discovered that only one of the two bedrooms had an air conditioner. This was not disclosed on the listing or by the hosts prior to our arrival. Keep in mind this was late July. The master bedroom and living room each have a window AC but to cool the second bedroom to a comfortable state you needed to crank both of them down to freezing, making the rest of the unit quite uncomfortable. We attempted this the first night of our stay and both had a very sleepless night, him sweating while I froze.  Being that we had a jam packed week planned (seeing our family and friends for the first time since the pandemic while also working) we wanted to make sure we got adequate sleep so we intentionally splurged for a 2br air bnb - so as you can imagine we were quite disappointed. We contacted the host the next morning regarding this issue. She said that she was aware the AC was broken and they were planning on putting in a new one, but didn't think we needed it since we are a couple.  She asked, and I quote, "Why are you two not sleeping together in the master bedroom?" which I found to be quite intrusive of her to ask, forcing us to explain a sensitive situation that was frankly none of her business - and shouldn't have to matter in a 2 bedroom air bnb we were paying full price for.   She then reminds us the living room has an AC, rather than taking responsibility for the situation. Again, we splurged for a spacious 2 bedroom as I was working remotely from the unit and needed a quiet space for video conference while my husband was having his (adult) children over in the evenings after they got out of work to spend time together, so taking turns sleeping on a living room futon wasn't exactly conducive to our plans - not to mention we both have back issues and again - we paid full price for a unit that listed two functional bedrooms.  She said there was no way we could get an AC until the next day so we asked if her husband - who she was sending over that day anyway to bring lightbulbs (when we arrived all of the lights on the 3rd floor an some of the 2nd floor hallway were out, so we had to scale up the steep stairs with our luggage in the dark, by flashlight) could bring a fan. We just wanted a floor fan in the meantime to help redirect some of the cold air from the other rooms to cool the 2nd bedroom. After a bunch of resistance and feeling like we had to grovel for a fan she finally agreed and this was brought as requested. The fan doesn't solve all of our problems (I can't close the door to get some quiet and go to sleep while my husband stays up late with his kids visiting) but it is a big help for now and we appreciate that this will improve things somewhat until an AC is put in the next day.  The next day she tells us that her husband (who, to clarify, is not Dominick. Who is Dominick the listed host and why can't be install an AC? We do not know.) can't come install a new window AC. When we express our disappointment she tells us he recently had a heart attack and cannot carry it up the stairs and move the bed to get it in. So, if we wanted an AC that day we'd need to make ourselves available to be home and wait for it and then carry it upstairs and install it ourselves. Again, working and seeing my stepkids for the first time in 2 years... so a bit busy, can't really waste a day for this - meanwhile my husband has a severe back injury and I likely wouldn't be able to get an AC up a 3rd

description: Welcome to this charming room in Albany completely remodeled to the studs in '21! Centrally located in the peaceful Pine Hill neighborhood. review: Elhadj is an excellent communicator: prompt, clear, friendly, courteous and ready to help. The neighbourhood isn't exactly 'charming' as described. The buildings are a bit run down, though okay, and there is litter in the street. It was quiet though. The staircase is quite steep as another guest had described. It was okay for me, but getting a heavy suitcase up the stairs could be a problem. The stairs weren't clean, with  gravel in the corners. The room was clean, larger than I had expected, not cozy (which I suspected and knew ahead of time.).  A floor or desk lamp would have helped. The bathroom was okay.   The kitchen cupboard doors were  dirty , there was a lack of dishcloths, cups, pots, bowls and utensils. 1 old pot, one old frying pan 2 cups, 2 glasses, some one-way forks. I was staying 4 days and had hoped to do some simple meal prep, but that wasn't feasible.  For someone staying only a night and going out for meals, this may be okay.   Not all needs are the same!
