review: All 4 bedrooms were nicely sized and cutely decorated. Kitchen, dining room and living room had a nice layout. Looked and smelled very clean. Only needed to reach out to Diane once, for a personal request, she responded quickly and was easy to work with. Neighborhood is a little sketchy at night and there’s a parking lot across the street that gets really busy after 9 (we stayed on a Friday night, weekdays are probably different) Overall great experience and use again

description: Keep it simple in this peaceful and centrally-located room in the Buckingham Lake neighborhood. Less than 10 minutes from downtown and less than 2 miles from 2 major hospitals. The room has a private en suite bathroom, a comfy bed, and a balcony you can use. You can make use of the kitchen and the laundry is located in the basement. A CVS, pizza place and Dunkin donuts are within a 7-minute walk. A great bagel shop is a 4 minutes drive or a 15-minute walk away.
review: Clean rooms, quiet nabe, friendly host. Couldn't ask for more. Will def be back!

description: Situated on historic Madison Avenue, our property is surrounded by the charm of Albany's rich history and modern amenities. Just steps away from local cafes, restaurants, and boutique shops, you'll experience the true essence of city living. Explore nearby attractions such as the New York State Capitol, MVP Arena, Albany Medical Center , Lark Street and Washington Park, all within easy reach from our doorstep.
review: Awesome place with lots of space. The beds were comfortable and the kitchen was great. Bathroom was spotless too, with a sit-down shower. Like the other reviews mention, it’s quite noisy but we were heavy sleepers so it was fine. Overall pretty good value for a 4 person stay!

description: Charming 5 room bed and breakfast located across from Washington Park in Albany, NY. Each room has a private bathroom and workstation. Guests have access to a shared kitchen, dining area, living space and small office nook with printer.
review: The Victorian house was lovely and on a beautiful block. The room was simple but clean and well appointed. There was kitchen downstairs with everything a guest might want available for breakfast or snacks, as well as beverages. Very hospitable!

description: The whole group will enjoy easy access to everything from this centrally located place. Large open floor plan with living room, dining room, work area, kitchen and full bath all on one floor. Front and back porch complete this level. Second floor has four good size bedrooms, all with closets and additional full bath. Great location near St. Peters, Albany medical, colleges, major highways 🛣️ and more. Offstreet parking and yard make this a great place to stop for some adventures
review: Diana's house is a great place to stay for a group of people.  It's a short walk a way from a few bars and restaurants, which was quite handy!  The neighborhood itself is very quiet and being the last house on the street made it feel very private.  Only thing to note is make sure you bring earplugs in case it's a windy night; the windows could howl a bit in the night, but otherwise it was pretty quiet.

description: Come relax in this one bedrm garden apt. The living room has a sofa that can be used as a 2nd queen bed. Fully stocked kitchen for those who love to cook,  rainfall shower head, and private on site laundry. There is a gym in the garage (which is a shared space).  Private patio. Located in a home that has cultivated an ecosystem for years. Enjoy songbirds  and crickets. Walking distance to public transit & restaurants 10 minute car to downtown for dance/music.
review: Davis was the perfect host! He was very commutative and responsive. This place is very peaceful and truly felt like a home away from home. The garden apartment has an outdoor patio area with beautiful gardening. It was so nice to wake up to the birds chirping outside. I highly recommend and would stay here again anytime!

description: Guests will enjoy this fully renovated smart home one bed/bath ground level appt with elegant touches. The living space features a sleeper sofa, rotating 65 inch smart LED TV and window AC unit. This space is also open to a 4 seat Dining table, movable 3 seat bench and an updated kitchen. Kitchen is fully equipped with the cooking necessities.  The bedroom includes a 55 inch smart LED TV and desktop workspace and window AC unit. Stackable washer/dryer appliances are available as well.
review: We spent a lot of time in the space while exploring Albany for a couple weeks. It’s really cute and comfortable! Tomar and Kash were kind and responsive hosts. We especially enjoyed the kitchen, the TVs, and the convenient storage racks/hooks near the door (a lot of hosts forget how much travelers need to hang and stash stuff)! Overall, it was a nice place to spend time.

description: Relax in our cozy home on a quiet one-way street. Plenty of free street parking available. With a large dining and living room, fully stocked kitchen, and furnished private room, our home is the perfect affordable stay for working professionals, students, and people in-between housing.   Newly furnished and renovated in 2017. Minutes from major universities and hospitals. Entire home is 3 bed 1 bath (you have a private bedroom with door lock). CDTA Bus stop 1 block away.
review: I had the best stay with Chad and Kellie. This was my first time staying at an Airbnb, I was doing an elective in Albany and needed a place to stay for about a month. The room was spacious and neat, had (plenty!) of closet space, and was air conditioned (lifesaver!). I had two great housemates who I became friends with, which made it even more comfortable. The shared spaces are clean and easy to navigate. I loved that everything was labelled and easy to understand. The laundry room has both washer and dryer, there is an iron, and a nice kitchen which is well stocked with table and cookware.  Lastly, the hosts- Chad was so helpful and responsive, he was an incredibly helpful and friendly host. I would totally reccomend this place!

description: Experience the best of Albany from 'Duckies Canopy,' a dog-friendly, 2-bedroom, 1-bath vacation rental perfectly suited for small groups. Ideally located within easy reach of local restaurants, sprawling green spaces, and lively entertainment options, this thoughtfully decorated townhome offers comfort and convenience for your stay. After a day of exploring, you can prepare dinner in the fully equipped kitchen and unwind in the living room with a movie on the Smart TV.
review: A beautiful townhome nicely situated downtown - very well stocked with amenities and the host was the best at communicating and accommodating my staying a couple extra days! The interior was beautifully decorated and I just cannot recommend this place enough :) I hope to be back! Thank you !

description: Place is within 2-3 miles of AMC, St. Peter's,  UAlbany, SUNY, College of St. Rose, Washington park, Empire State Plaza, and many other establishments.  Only 15 minute ride to the airport !
review: Great location. My bed was comfortable. FS is friendly.

description: Convenience and comfort is what you will find. Private bedroom offered in single family home with driveway close to Albany Med, St. Peter’s, St. Rose, U Albany, CDTA public transport, restaurants, downtown, and nightlife. Full kitchen available with comfortable living room and full bathroom. Hosted multiple medical professionals, students, state interns, and more!  House is a 4 bedroom 1 bath home.
review: Good location to the hospital, which is why I was staying there.  Also close to other good areas to hang out in.  Room was comfortable.  Great communication

description: - No pets - No smoking or vaping - No parties or events - Directly across from Albany Academy - 1 mile from Albany Medical Center - 5.3 miles from UAlbany - Under 2 miles from Washington Park & Empire State Plaza - Just over 2 miles from The Egg & MVP Arena - Take a day trip to Lake George or Saratoga Springs! - King sized bed - Two spacious living rooms - Fully equipped kitchen - High-speed WiFi - Private parking
review: This place was great, easy to find, clean and very organized. We didn't realize there was no washer dryer, I should have looked ahead of time, but would be a really nice addition to the Airbnb. Also, there were lots of heat settings that must have been set by other people, so the heat would go up and down throughout the day and night. Suggest to "reset" those for every guest and just pick a temperature. Overall great experience!

description: Welcome to your home away from home in Albany, NY! Garden-level apartment in the heart of the vibrant, historic Center Square. Enjoyable blend of comfort and convenience. Walkable to Washington Park, award-winning restaurants, local coffee shops, boutiques, and the NYS State Capitol. Ideal for couples, solo travelers, weekend getaway, work trip, a longer term stay, or a peaceful and centrally located retreat. You’ll love the character, walkability, and charm of this thoughtfully appointed space.
review: So difficult to find words for how great Matt and team made our stay! We were coming due to a family member's health issues and when I walked in there was an extremely kind handwritten note on the counter. The home was really cozy, was set up so well, but simple, which was really nice. The neighborhood was quiet, the house was super clean. But overall, it was the service, attentiveness, and the 20 extra miles that Matt went to to help us out while we were there that blew me away! Absolutely awesome, we are so grateful!

description: The whole group will enjoy easy access to everything from this centrally located place. Sun filled top floor unit with spacious bedrooms-well equipped kitchen and modern bath. Convenient location near highway and major hospitals/universities. Malls-restaurants and shopping all close by. Quiet residential neighborhood makes it lovely to walk to close by restaurants to grab a bite to eat outside. Come spend a night or two and be our guest
review: Nice place to stay near a concert venue. Easy to get into downtown Albany. The parking at the apartment was confusing and the other tenants were parking in front of the assigned spot. Also in the apartment there was a large spot of paint that was peeling/falling off from the ceiling. Diana was responsive to all questions.

description: Charming private 1 bed, 1 bath garden suite just steps away from historic Washington Park.    Walking distance from Albany Med. and downtown SUNY.  A stylish brownstone with culturally diverse art & experiences & full amenities.    Near iconic places like the NYS Capital, Empire State Plaza, Egg Performing Arts Ctr., restaurants, and more.   The unit is perfect for mature business & medical travelers, and couples looking for a home away from home to unwind and relax while visiting the Capital.
review: Stayed at Rosie's place while in Albany during a summer project. Place was clean and very close to Washington park, which was great for a run or walk. Rosie was very responsive and accommodating whenever I had questions or a small request. Thank you, Bogdan

description: Discover Albany from the heart of downtown. This comfortable 2-bedroom apartment is just a 5-minute walk to the bus station and 7 minutes to MVP Arena, perfect for catching a concert, game, or event.  You’ll also be a short drive from the train station (5 minutes), Empire State Plaza (walkable), and Albany International Airport (15 minutes). Whether you're visiting for work or fun, this space is an ideal home base.  Iconic Saratoga Springs is just 30 minutes away!
review: Good location, walkable to the Capitol Plaza. The house is a bit old so it can be a bit cranky, and the stairs up is a bit narrow and steep to navigate while carrying luggage. Olu did a great job in communicating and solving issues, very responsive and helpful.

description: Spectacular Modern two bedroom apartment in Downtown Albany's Historic Mansion District across the Governors mansion. Perfect for traveling professionals and/or families. 3 minute walk to The NYS Museum, Empire State Plaza, many local restaurants, The Capital , the MVP Arena, The legislative Office building, The Cathedral & Lark Street. A 3 minute drive to Albany Medical Center, Albany Law School & The VA Hospital.Exceptionally quiet street. If traveling with family, lots of nearby Playgrounds.
review: Great spot, not too far from downtown. Everything is within walking distance, and the unit was very spacious. Would definitely recommend this place if you're looking for an affordable and convenient getaway within an arms reach of DT Albany. Johnny was also very responsive!

description: Place is within 2-3 miles of AMC, St. Peter's,  UAlbany, SUNY, College of St. Rose, Washington park, Empire State Plaza, and many other establishments.  Only 15 minute ride to the airport !
review: FS was a great host. He was super communicative and responsive. I had to extend my stay, and he made the process very easy.

description: Relax in our cozy home on a quiet one-way street. Plenty of free street parking available. With a large dining and living room, fully stocked kitchen, and furnished private room, our home is the perfect affordable stay for working professionals, students, and people in-between housing.   Newly furnished and renovated in 2017. Minutes from major universities and hospitals. Entire home is 3 bed 1 bath (you have a private bedroom with door lock). CDTA Bus stop 1 block away.
review: Chad’s place was great. Loved the little touches his girlfriend added around the house. Just around the corner from a bus that runs frequently. 5 minutes from the biggest Walmart and mall around here. WiFi is super fast and it was nice to have cable because of the cold outside.

description: Private bedroom, shared living room, and shared bathroom on the 2nd floor in my personal home with 2-3 guests. 3 fans in each bedroom. 16 inch memory foam mattress. Mini fridge, microwave, coffee maker, and toaster in the room.  No ac and no kitchen use. Self-check-in Owner-occupied house. On bus lines. You’ll love my place because of its uniqueness, location, and vintage finds.  Direct bus line to Greyhound, Amtrak, Mall, Empire State Plaza, , and Suny Albany.  Free street parking only.
review: I stayed with Share for about 6 days. She was very clear with the instructions to get into the house and each room. My room felt like a studio apartment, with a tv, microwave and fridge. There was ample space for me in the room. I had no issues during my stay and I would highly recommend staying with Share.

description: Newly renovated one bedroom, loft style apartment. Centrally located in the Mansion neighborhood in albany. Huge spacious open layout with walk in closet. Big screen tvs, with super fast internet (400 mps). On-site laundry, with locked off street parking. Spectacular views of downtown Albany. Walking distance to empire state plaza, the egg, times union, and excellent bars, restaurants, and delis. Great value for anyone staying in albany long or short term.
review: We had a wonderful stay. Apartment is exactly as described and Michael is very responsive and made us feel right at home by picking us up from the station and showing us around. Neighborhood is a little sketchy but we felt safe enough and the parking lot at the back of the property was very convenient.

description: Exquisite retreat at Cozy Sunset, mere steps from Albany Medical Hospital and downtown’s vibrant allure. Tailored for discerning professionals, this sophisticated abode blends opulent comfort with unrivaled convenience. Savor proximity to premier dining, boutique shopping, and cultural delights. Secure your splendid sojourn now!
review: I enjoyed my time here. The instructions for finding the listing were clear, and I had no trouble getting in. You can tell they went the extra mile to make the space feel welcoming. Etem was also incredibly responsive and kind! Everything was clean and reasonable. Just keep in mind that the road leading to the parking area can get congested, and at times it was difficult to access the driveway or park in the road.

description: Enjoy a comfortable Stay in this cozy Albany hotel room with free breakfast and free parking included. Conveniently located, it’s perfect for travelers looking for a relaxing and affordable stay. The room is clean, well-maintained, and offers essential amenities for a pleasant experience. Whether you’re visiting for business or leisure, you’ll appreciate the easy access to local attractions, dining, and shopping. Book now for a hassle-free stay with great perks.
review: This place would have been a lot better if it was cleaned better. Dirty microwave, refrigerator, shower curtain and to top it off the toilet wouldn’t flush. The nob was limp so we look inside the tank and notice the chain was broken and someone had replaced it with a piece of yawn which wasn’t doing the job. Linen’s was clean but this place needs maintenance and better house cleaning.

description: Welcome to our lovely 1-bedroom apartment nestled in a quiet residential area of Albany. Just a short stroll from Market 32 and local restaurants, this location is ideal. With St. Rose College nearby, Downtown Albany a 7-minute drive away, 10 minute walk to MVP area, Albany Med just 4 minutes walk, and Saint Peters only 5 minutes driving, convenience is at your fingertips. The apartment is part of a 4-unit house, offering privacy and thick walls for a noise-free environment.
review: Erion, was a very responsive host. Bathroom not the most comfortable especially the shower due to the old school style and shape it’s hard to navigate as a bigger person. Would recommend more bedroom pillows. Great location, next to plenty of food hot spots. Entry into the building and apartment is very convenient being electronic based. Apartment cute with rustic vibe.

description: Welcome to our exceptional apartment in Albany! Discover a blend of style, comfort, and a prime location. Just steps from the State Capitol, Empire State Plaza, museums, and the Hudson River, our home offers unparalleled access to Albany's top attractions. Immerse yourself in local culture with nearby cafes, boutiques, and historic landmarks. Experience Albany like never before. Book your stay for a memorable adventure!
review: Great place to stay. Rodney was very quick to respond to any question. Very comfortable bed and clean unit. Will look to stay here again when I’m back in town.

description: Bright, peaceful 2BR unit set just outside Albany’s vibrant Center Square within walking distance to Washington Park, local cafés, restaurants, and downtown attractions. Whether you’re a solo traveler, couple, or family, you’ll find everything you need for a relaxing stay. Sip your morning coffee on the private deck with birdsong in the background, rest in a cozy queen or full bed, and enjoy self check-in, fast Wi-Fi, climate control with A/C and heat, and private garage parking right next door.
review: Andres was a great host. The condo was very clean, modern and had great amenities. The building was beautiful. The recommendations for the area was a classy touch.  We would stay here again! As far as the area in Albany, cool walkable area, park very close.

description: Step into Fortune Suites, a recently revamped Two-bedroom apartment ideally situated within 8 to 10 minutes' drive of Albany Med, Times Union Center, and other local attractions. Street parking is hassle-free, accommodating up to 4 Non-smoking guests. Toiletries are provided, and we kindly request keeping noise levels down after 9:00 pm. Rest assured, high-speed internet is included for your convenience. Welcome and enjoy your stay!
review: The place overall was bare, dark, cold and not very nice overall. It definitely does not seem frequently occupied. The alarm that sounded like a police siren kept going off every time you walked out the door and there was a large camera. Overall it got the job done in terms of providing beds but was not somewhere where I would want to hang out.  Osas was responsive which was a positive but overall not worth the cost.

description: Enjoy your stay in a safe 5 star neighborhood close to everything in Albany. Beautiful first floor apartment. Free parking on site in parking lot in rear of home. Also free parking on street if you prefer. This beautiful home is in a great neighborhood and its centralized location makes it easy for you to get around. Get a great breakfast/lunch at Cafe Madison just a few blocks away.  A few minutes walk to St. Peter's Hospital and local shops. Book now for your luxury stay.
review: So Clean!!! Loved it!!! Everything we needed!!!

description: You’ll love the fast 600MB WiFi throughout—whether working or streaming. Inside, there’s a 75” smart TV, a fully stocked, updated kitchen and bathroom, and work desk with a printer. Outside, the backyard is a favorite w. a 120" projector for movie nights, a grill, and a heated firepit table to gather around.  It's also centrally located: close to just about everything you'll want. Just minutes from MVP Arena, UAlbany & other colleges, malls, restaurants, hospitals, parks, downtown Albany & more.
review: Had fun staying there for 13 days. This Airbnb is equipped with the best appliances and amenities. We thoroughly enjoyed our time there!

description: A large suite located in a huge Victorian that’s very quiet. Suites have separate locks and are very private. The house maintains a very professional environment. Walking distance to hospitals, law schools and restaurants.
review: Where do I even start? It was a beautiful and wonderful experience to stay in this home, and home is exactly what it feels like when you step in the door. My room was cozy, sweet and perfect in every way. But there is so much more to be offered than just the bedroom. I enjoyed many morning coffees on the porch and many dinners at the dining room table. Everything you need, is here for you! 5 stars can’t encompass the admiration I have for this place. The neighborhood is quiet and walkable with a hometown feel, major bus lines and reasonable options for food/drinks, I recommend Recovery Sports Grill which is a 5 min walk. Also, take a trip to Crossgates Mall which is also not far from the house. The hosts are super responsive and communicative and I can’t thank them enough for an amazing two week stay. I recommend The Inn At South Lake to any traveler looking for a comforting and top of the line experience.

description: 3-bed fl 2 apt. in a renovated historic two-century-old building in a quiet neighborhood of Albany's Pastures. Great location near Albany Medical Center, MVP Arena, Empire State Plaza, Library, Lark Street, State Offices, courts; easy access to local & regional bus routes and highways (I-787, I-90 & I-87)  3 Queen beds Cozy gas fireplace in living room Up to 10 NON-SMOKING guests Toiletries included  Save & BOOK this unit today! Message me anytime. Hope to welcome you soon!  -Earl
review: We came to now about parking spots at last moment of trips. There should be clear indication at listing. We carried this headache from city to vacation. The living room sofa was smelly and almost sink when you seat on.  We usually spend more time at living room but situation confined us in bedrooms. The internet was intermittent. Last two days almost no wi-fi services. Every bedrooms and living room had TVs but no channels available to watch movies, dramas etc.  The bedrooms, bathroom, kitchen were very clean. Enough supplies in bathrooms and kitchens. Dryer/washer wasn't in place. ACs were good.

description: Experience the comfort of staying in a second room of our centrally located home. Conveniently situated on the main bus line, this residence offers ease of access to the city’s top destinations. Make yourself at home in our shared spaces, which include three serene enclosed porches and two Lovesac bean bags. Whether you’re traveling for work or leisure, our home promises a restful and enjoyable stay. Join us and immerse yourself in a welcoming atmosphere, complete with all the comforts of home.
review: It wasn’t bad overall, but the bed did seem a bit unsanitary. There were brown hairs on the sheets and an orange juice bottle on the bed when we arrived. The shower was also unclean, and there was no hand soap, which we didn’t mind purchasing ourselves. Overall, it was okay definitely not the best. The other rooms seemed pleasant, so I’m assuming someone may have just forgotten to check the room we stayed in. It was also very peaceful at night and a TV, towels, and a remote were provided.

description: Welcome to your home away from home in the heart of Albany! Nestled on a quiet street, this beautifully renovated 3-bedroom, 2.5-bathroom luxury residence offers a rare blend of comfort, style, and convenience—perfect for families, friends, business travelers, and weekend explorers alike.
review: I was a little nervous booking this place since it's new and I had never been to Albany before, but I am BEYOND happy that I went with Nori and their stunning property. I love a well-designed space and there is no other listing in the area that even comes close to this home.  There's so much room inside and out to roam and stretch out while traveling with our friends - we never felt on top of each other. Plus the outdoor patio was a great place for a home cooked meal where we could all gather together and connect back to nature (there's so much greenery in the backyard). Besides it being insta-worthy, Nori was super responsive and proactively sent me thoughtful messages to make my stay as pleasant as possible. I don't understand how anyone could have a bad stay here since you're in such good hands with Nori. I'll definitely be coming back and recommending this home to all my friends!

description: The whole group will enjoy easy access to everything from this centrally located place. The Red Brick House is a newly renovated, 4 stories/3000sq ft space with 4be/3.5ba and walking distance to Downtown Albany's top attractions.  Amenities included: ✔ Game Room ✔ Hot Tub ✔ Private Yard w/ BBQ and Outdoor Games ✔ Fully Equipped Kitchen ✔ High-Speed Wifi ✔ Free Parking (up too 3 vehicles) ✔ eV Lvl 2 Charging ✔ Office & Exercise Equipment ✔ Washer/Dryer & AC ✔ Mini-crib & Baby Accessories
review: Yasiel and Rachel's place was perfect for my family. My daughter, son-in-law, their two early teen girls, my other daughter and son loved the house. It was even better than described in the listing. It was clean and spacious. We all loved the game room downstairs. The back yard area was delightful with more games outside. The kitchen table expanded to accommodate us all plus friends who came for dinner. Parking was more than ample. There's a home construction site across the road (which wasn't active when we were there) so the immediate area is not scenic, but a few blocks away is the Albany Skywalk which leads to the walkways along the Hudson River. Yasiel and Rachel couldn't have been nicer and more communicative and accommodating. We'd stay at their place again in a heartbeat!

description: 3-bed fl 2 apt. in a renovated historic two-century-old building in a quiet neighborhood of Albany's Pastures. Great location near Albany Medical Center, MVP Arena, Empire State Plaza, Library, Lark Street, State Offices, courts; easy access to local & regional bus routes and highways (I-787, I-90 & I-87)  3 Queen beds Cozy gas fireplace in living room Up to 10 NON-SMOKING guests Toiletries included  Save & BOOK this unit today! Message me anytime. Hope to welcome you soon!  -Earl
review: This AirBnb was clean and check-in/check-out went smoothly, but there were a few issues. The listing says three beds and a pull-out couch, but the couch was not a pull-out bed, and there wasn't bedding for a fourth bed, leaving us without a place for one person in our group to sleep. The wifi was also spotty to the point of being nearly unusable, and the lock on the interior door came loose. We had to fix it ourselves to be able to lock the door. The area it is in is also not the nicest neighborhood, but we never felt unsafe. Overall reasonable for the price, but certainly not a luxurious stay.

description: Stylish 1BR + loft apartment in downtown Albany with private second-floor entry and secure building access. Walk to shops, restaurants, and historic sites. Features full kitchen, Smart TV, and cozy, modern design. Great for work trips or getaways in the city. Parking not included — but you’ll be right in the center of it all!
review: Video tutorial for entry - had to get help from neighbors to access building. Remember to let folks know how to check out. Didn’t find any nearby marts. If there were, please put a map or note on how to get to same. Had to buy bottles of water from the Dunkin Donuts opposite the building.  Other than that, very responsive host and great overall stay.

description: Stay in our 5-bedroom 3-story townhouse nestled in a renovated, historic 200-year-old building located in Albany's serene Pastures neighborhood. Just a short walk from landmarks like the Albany Medical Center, Times Union Center, Empire State Plaza, and vibrant Lark Street. Easy access to I-787, I-90 & I-87. Five queen beds and two queen air mattresses and couches accommodate up to 16. Ideal for large families and groups. Dive into Albany's history with modern comforts.
review: Earl is a great host, very responsive and helpful. The home was great, lots of rooms and bathroom, with a great big living room. Took us back in time. The rooms were clean bathrooms were clean. The only cons,is the AC, the AC unit in one room and the living room needed cleaning. Other than that everything was great.

description: Newly renovated one bedroom, loft style apartment. Centrally located in the Mansion neighborhood in albany. Huge spacious open layout with walk in closet. Big screen tvs, with super fast internet (400 mps). On-site laundry, with locked off street parking. Spectacular views of downtown Albany. Walking distance to empire state plaza, the egg, times union, and excellent bars, restaurants, and delis. Great value for anyone staying in albany long or short term.
review: Michael is a big hearted, passionate business professional  He’s very accommodating and helpful. The place was equivalent to a 7 star room. It’s the best stay I have had so far on Airbnb  The other gr8 thing is that the host will receive you and make sure you get all the information.  I would definitely recommend this place.

description: Enjoy a cozy, well-clean room just a 5-minute walk from fantastic restaurants and downtown shopping. This peaceful space is ideal for anyone.   No smoking or alcohol allowed. Must be clean and nice.
review: I had a great stay at Abdelrahman’s apartment in Albany. The place was clean, comfortable, and in a good location. Abdelrahman is a kind and welcoming host, and his lovely gray cat was very affectionate. Just a heads-up for future guests: the cat may want to cuddle, hug, and even sleep with you or play which I personally found sweet and fun!

description: 1-bedroom home featuring a cozy fireplace, in-unit laundry, air conditioning, and a private deck with a gas grill—perfect for relaxing evenings. Nestled in a quiet and safe neighborhood just minutes from Albany Med, St. Peter’s Hospital, local bars, restaurants, and a nearby food market. Ideal for traveling professionals, couples, or solo guests seeking comfort and convenience.
review: Erion was an amazing and very responsive host. The place felt right at home. My visitor really enjoyed his stay the only issues was the counters and the kitchen floors were a little dusty but nothing a little clean up won’t do! Other than that it was amazing! Definitely book it! You won’t regret it!

description: Meticulously and lovingly maintained home. Living and dining rooms feature gleaming hardwood floors.   Private fenced in yard. Excellent Albany location off of Western Ave- close to highways, restaurants, shopping etc.  New sauna space sauna with 8 bulbs built, next to a full bath with heated floor and small weight set, bench and treadmill.
review: Everything was great for our family of 4 (2 adult children). We were visiting our son at UAlbany and the location couldn't get any better. The kitchen was well stocked and even had a few extra items such as coffee, butter and eggs. This was much appreciated as we prefer to minimize eating out. Beds were comfy, including cozy comforters. Everything was very clean and tidy. We even used the backyard bbq, which was nice to have! Peter was quick to reply to any queries, including quickly solving no-wifi when we first arrived. Peter also graciously allowed us to check-out a bit later than usual, which was very helpful on our final day. Overall, it was perfect for us and we look forward to staying again when we're back visiting our son.

description: Stylish 1BR + loft apartment in downtown Albany with private second-floor entry and secure building access. Walk to shops, restaurants, and historic sites. Features full kitchen, Smart TV, and cozy, modern design. Great for work trips or getaways in the city. Parking not included — but you’ll be right in the center of it all!
review: In an unsecured bldg and had common key to a shared area and the same key opened the apartment. Felt unsafe Run by a management company so not very accommodating.  Would not recommend for a single female

description: Welcome to your Beacon apartment!  Step into the warm embrace of your Beacon Avenue apartment. Experience the charm of this spacious, large 2-bedroom home nestled in the heart of Albany.  Comforts of a complete home where space and luxury come together seamlessly.  Your new apartment can accommodate up to 4 guests, along with a dedicated work-from-home space with an adjustable standing desk & WiFi.  Enjoy nearby shopping & dining just minutes away, immersing yourself in Albany's vibrant tapestry
review: We loved the apartment! It is full of light and very much what was promised in the photos. The desk set up was excellent for remote work. We also appreciated the large screen tv for watching shows on our apps. Tanjin was very responsive to any questions. We highly recommend the apartment!

description: Enjoy the entire house and surrounding area being at the center of Albany. Near everything like children’s park and new basketball court and outdoor exercise bars, also close to one of the bast grocery stores in Albany (Honest Weight Food Co-op) within 5 minutes!  One street over from the bus stop and just the right distance to be close to the main highway without too much traffic. Impeccable cleaning to make sure you always feel comfortable
review: Beware of steep stairs, but it wasn't bad at all! Very clean and provided everything listed.  There was construction. I don't know if that will last forever, though Overall, it was a great place to stay with my family and near everything

With St. Rose College nearby, Downtown Albany a 7-minute drive away, 10 minute walk to MVP area, Albany Med just 4 minutes walk, and Saint Peters only 5 minutes driving, convenience is at your fingertips. The apartment is part of a 4-unit house, offering privacy and thick walls for a noise-free environment.
review: The place itself and location makes this Airbnb a good choice. Just as pictured. It was clean and comfortable.

description: This cozy first-floor apartment is perfect for a comfortable stay in a prime location. It's within walking distance to local hospitals, colleges, and just steps away from Madison Ave and Lark St, known for their vibrant restaurants, bars, and shops. Ideal for those visiting for work, school, or leisure, the apartment offers a charming and convenient base to explore the best of the area. Whether you're here for a short trip or longer stay, you'll feel right at home!
review: I stayed at the Airbnb at the end of 2024, the apartment was cozy and close to the city center. Overall I enjoyed my stay, but I was disappointed in the wifi. I was on a work trip and aside from the first night I was not able to use the internet. Streaming was down and I ended up having to use my hotspot. While I was able to do that and work on what I needed to, it was frustrating since the ad did say high speed internet. I did message the host and they were very responsive, but we're not able to fix the issue during my stay. Overall I enjoyed my stay, but would be mindful of that issue if you absolutely require wifi during your stay. The apartment was clean and accessible.

description: Relax in our cozy home on a quiet one-way street. Plenty of free street parking available. With a large dining and living room, fully stocked kitchen, and furnished private room, our home is the perfect affordable stay for working professionals, students, and people in-between housing.   Newly furnished and renovated in 2017. Minutes from major universities and hospitals. Entire home is 3 bed 1 bath (you have a private bedroom with door lock). CDTA Bus stop 1 block away.
review: Chad was very responsive, smooth check-in and great, peaceful stay. Everything I needed was available. If not, Chad wasn’t difficult to reach at all. Location was great, not too far from the airport or anything in downtown Albany, easily connected to major freeways.

description: ✔ 4 Bedrooms with 5 Beds, plus a sofa bed!   ✔ Dedicated workspaces ✔ Washer & dryer and much more  ✔ Ideal for corporate housing, travel nurses, or friends/family vacations! ✔ Clean.  WiFi.  Quick host responses. ✔ Universities, Hospitals and more; all close by!
review: We were there for my daughter‘s wedding, the place was very nice, very quiet and a very nice neighborhood. Very easy to get to everything.  Slept 10 of us comfortably. If you’re ever in the Albany area, it’s a nice place to stay, and the hosts were very communicative and great

description: Hello, thanks for checking out my listing! This vintage, updated home has  multiple living areas inc. 2 living rooms, dining room, enclosed porch & outdoor patio with tree-lined back yard. large bedroom with closet, shared 1.5 baths. plenty of on street parking.  2 mi to Albany Medical, the VA, 1 mi to St Peter's. Approx. 1 mi (walkable!) from University at Albany main campus, Harriman State office campus, groceries & nightlife.
review: Emily is a great host - relaxed, helpful, friendly.  The bedroom was very comfortable and a good size.  The patio and the seating behind the house were lovely - restful and a nice way to spend an afternoon.  Chuck the house cat is an added bonus!

description: Relax in a newly renovated one bedroom/one bathroom apartment located on the 2nd floor of a charming brownstone building. It features lofty ceilings with beautiful architecture and a newly updated kitchen. Conveniently located to the Palace Theater, Capitol Rep Theater, Times Union Center and the Empire State Plaza. This rental is in walking distance to many popular eateries, bars, and more to explore! Laundry on Site for Long-Term Stays
review: The place was gorgeous!  David was a great host and very responsive to any questions.  As a traveling healthcare professional, this was close to my place of work.  Albany can be a bit noisy in the city, but this place was pretty quiet for the most part.  I would definitely recommend to others traveling in this area.

description: Hudson 5 is a first floor queen room with a larger bathroom and shower Each room is equipped with a SmartTV and Apple TV as well as a desk.  This room is pet friendly.  Complimentary Services: Continental Breakfast Onsite Parking Electric Parking Wi-Fi & Apple TV Keyless Entry Ensuite Guest Rooms ​ Paid Services: Cocktails Meeting Space Rentals Pets (If applicable) Early Checkin (1PM) Late Checkout (12PM)
review: The room was lovely and the bed was very comfortable, just be aware the pillows are firm. The bathroom was well stocked with toiletries and had beautiful natural lighting. The room was conveniently located next to a park so we could take our dogs for a walk. On the downside of the things, you could not control the temperature of the AC. It was quite warm in the room which made sleeping very difficult. A fan would have been nice to have some air circulation. Also we were not  able to get our tv to work. The cocktail lounge ended up closing early before we arrived, but they did reach out to let us know they would be and asked if there were any drinks they could provide for us in our room. Very thoughtful and friendly host.

description: Keep it simple in this peaceful and centrally-located room in the Buckingham Lake neighborhood. Less than 10 minutes from downtown and less than 2 miles from 2 major hospitals. The room has a private en suite bathroom, a comfy bed, and a balcony you can use. You can make use of the kitchen and the laundry is located in the basement. A CVS, pizza place and Dunkin donuts are within a 7-minute walk. A great bagel shop is a 4 minutes drive or a 15-minute walk away.
review: Christian is an excellent host, very responsive, and accommodating! His place is very clean and the amenities are superb! I would definitely recommend staying here 10/10!

description: Stay in our 5-bedroom 3-story townhouse nestled in a renovated, historic 200-year-old building located in Albany's serene Pastures neighborhood. Just a short walk from landmarks like the Albany Medical Center, Times Union Center, Empire State Plaza, and vibrant Lark Street. Easy access to I-787, I-90 & I-87. Five queen beds and two queen air mattresses and couches accommodate up to 16. Ideal for large families and groups. Dive into Albany's history with modern comforts.
review: My family and I enjoyed the stay and it was close to our destination that what made a great stay. The two kitchens was amazing because of the large family we had was able to get the food ready reasonably timing. Thank you Earl for being a alright host.  Only one main problem was the steps I dislike them very much. My grandkids and nieces and nephews had a super great time. To them it was an exercise course.

description: Step into the comfort of this beautiful light-filled, cozy 1 bedroom apartment minutes from hospitals, parks, and great restaurants. Very walkable location next to Albany medical center.  ~fast wi-fi ~fully equipped kitchen ~55” smart tv ~free off street parking ~ contactless self check-in
review: Great place to stay and very responsible host. Would love to come back. Thank you

description: Keep it simple at this peaceful and centrally-located place. Very spacious apartment close to Albany Medical center, colleges, shopping and eateries. Come stay and relax after a long day of work or school. We have plenty off street parking available.
review: The place was new and clean.  Kody was very helpful,  and answered all my questions extremely fast. Very accommodating and flexible .

description: Enjoy the entire house and surrounding area being at the center of Albany. Near everything like children’s park and new basketball court and outdoor exercise bars, also close to one of the bast grocery stores in Albany (Honest Weight Food Co-op) within 5 minutes!  One street over from the bus stop and just the right distance to be close to the main highway without too much traffic. Impeccable cleaning to make sure you always feel comfortable
review: Pros: bathrooms were clean, the showers had great water pressure/temp, and all appliances (including thermostat) appeared to function well. About 10-15 minutes from everywhere we needed to be and street parking was readily available.  Cons: The stairs are incredibly steep - quite difficult to get up them with a suitcase in tow. Do not recommend this place if anyone in your group has mobility issues. In the second bedroom, the beds are mattresses on the floor. Could be pro/con if you’re traveling with children, they may love it! As an adult though, the sleeping on the floor wasn’t ideal.

description: Thoughtfully updated with modern amenities and chic designer furnishings this 2 bedroom 1 bathroom apartment with an office will make you look forward to coming home! This elegant unit is a set in a historic building on one of the most beautiful streets in Albany’s fabulous Center Square neighborhood. Footsteps  away from great restaurants, cafes, and upscale nightlife.  Check out “Dove and Deer” less than a block away the many other upscale offerings the neighborhood provides.
review: Elizabeth was very responsive to our needs when anything was missing. Instacarted us anything that was missing. Great location in a safe area close to lots of restaurants and parks. Walkable neighborhood.  The bathroom just needs an upgrade. It wasn’t in the listing pictures so I wasn’t aware.  I wasn’t sure if there was a heating system. Maybe I missed it.

description: The apartment is located in a quiet neighborhood . Fully furnished. Linens and towels are provided. It's two blocks away from downtown Albany, and the Palace theater.
review: The flat is not in a good area, while we were fine you do have to be careful (even our cab driver told us that) I wouldn't stay again. The flat also does not have air con- the large bedroom had an obnoxiously loud fan which kept the one room cool, the rest of the house is very hot. So if you are going to stay here bear these things in mind.

description: Welcome to our newly renovated two-bedroom apartment located on the second floor, just minutes away from Albany Med, and across from Washington Park. Easy access to state offices and MVP arena all within walking distance. The neighborhood is brimming with restaurants, bars, and beautiful architecture, making it one of the most desired areas in Albany. Perfect for both short-term and long term visits. Our apartment offers comfort and convenience in an ideal location.
review: The location was the best! There is a wonderful park with beautiful gardens very close. We were happy to have a parking space out back and a little deck. We appreciated the washer and dryer in the apartment and Erion was responsive when we asked for a fan, as well as more coffees. The apartment could use a little detailing and is a bit rough around the edges, but we were comfortable in every way. We look forward to coming back.

description: Welcome to the Whisky House! Featuring 3 floors with plenty of space to host a corporate event or celebrate with loved ones. Walking distance from downtown and Center Square nightlife, the Whiskey House is the perfect location for a bachelor or bachelorette party, birthday celebration getaway, anniversary, you name it! Whatever the occasion, the Whiskey House is your home away from home.  *We DO NOT have a full size stove/oven - pocket kitchen with smaller amenities (microwave/fridge) available*
review: This place was in the perfect location. We were in Albany for the weekend for an event at the Albany Capital Center and it was easily walkable. Tyler was super responsive to all our questions and accommodations and provided us with great recommendations for local places to eat. Would 100% recommend staying here.

description: You'll Love this Newly renovated Modern Charming Place to stay. Enjoy the spacious back yard for fresh air or relax inside enjoying the detailed wood accent Throughout the unit with a touch or Brick Detailing.   Short Drive or 10-15minute walk to local attractions and theatre. Less than a minute walk to convenience stores. 15 Minute drive to Albany international Airport/Amtrak and Greyhound station.  Early Check-In may be possible after 2pm  $250 indoor smoking violation fee $250 animal cleaning
review: Just like the pictures. Very Clean and Responsive Host. Close to everything in surrounding area. Great Value! Thank you for a great stay.

description: Welcome to our beautiful 3-bedroom, 2-full bathroom home with laundry in the unit! With modern furnishings, comfortable beds, and all the amenities you need, this space is perfect for families, groups of friends, or business travelers. Located in the uptown Manning Boulevard neighborhood, you'll be just a short drive away from local attractions and delicious restaurants. Whether you're here for work or play, this home will provide you with a comfortable and convenient stay. Book your stay today!
review: I can't think Phil enough for his hospitality. We were to stay at another property of his but he was very proactive in letting us know the HVAC needed to be prepared and he wasn't sure if it would be ready in time for check in. He offered us another property and it was just as beautiful and clean looking as the first one we were to stay at. The rooms were nice and spacious , the beds were comfortable, the living room was cozy and cute and the kitchen and bathrooms were in pristine condition. If we had any questions, Phil was very prompt in his response. ( literally within a 5 minute response time) When I come back to Albany, I know where we will stay. Book his airbnb, you will not be disappointed.

description: The whole group will enjoy easy access to everything from this centrally located place. The Red Brick House is a newly renovated, 4 stories/3000sq ft space with 4be/3.5ba and walking distance to Downtown Albany's top attractions.  Amenities included: ✔ Game Room ✔ Hot Tub ✔ Private Yard w/ BBQ and Outdoor Games ✔ Fully Equipped Kitchen ✔ High-Speed Wifi ✔ Free Parking (up too 3 vehicles) ✔ eV Lvl 2 Charging ✔ Office & Exercise Equipment ✔ Washer/Dryer & AC ✔ Mini-crib & Baby Accessories
review: Yasiel was a great host and very responsive. The place was clean, spacious and had a luxurious feel with high end appliances and kitchen necessities. The open concept living room/dining room/kitchen flowed to the backyard which made for a great place to gather with family and friends. The area might seem a bit rough but was relatively quiet and close to a few restaurants and bars with easy access to the highway. Would definitely recommend a stay at Yasiel’s place.

description: Step into Fortune Suites, a recently revamped Two-bedroom apartment ideally situated within 8 to 10 minutes' drive of Albany Med, Times Union Center, and other local attractions. Street parking is hassle-free, accommodating up to 4 Non-smoking guests. Toiletries are provided, and we kindly request keeping noise levels down after 9:00 pm. Rest assured, high-speed internet is included for your convenience. Welcome and enjoy your stay!
review: My stay with Osas was an amazing one. He was very responsive and provided all the information I needed for check in. I booked the stay due to its central location and proximity to all downtown Albany had to offer and I was not disappointed. Very peaceful and quiet stay and the home was beautiful and clean. Found a place to stay whenever I am in the capital district again

description: This comfortable one bedroom apartment comes furnished to entertain and with a welcome drink! Stay in the capital region’s most historic neighborhood full of beautiful architecture and cultural attractions. Walkable to some of Albany’s best restaurants including Dove and Deer, Albany’s most charming upscale bar. A full kitchen comes equipped with all your basic cooking needs, but if you don’t feel like cooking enjoy preferred access and discounts at Dove and Deer.
review: Wonderful property, peaceful nice neighborhood. Host very responsive and helpful! Heat worked perfectly, I was very toasty during this fall weather.

description: The whole group will enjoy easy access to everything from this centrally located place. Large open floor plan with living room, dining room, work area, kitchen and full bath all on one floor. Front and back porch complete this level. Second floor has four good size bedrooms, all with closets and additional full bath. Great location near St. Peters, Albany medical, colleges, major highways 🛣️ and more. Offstreet parking and yard make this a great place to stop for some adventures
review: Diana’s house was exactly as listed - it’s at the end of a dead end so it’s very quiet, and the rooms are clean and a good size. Diana was very communicative and proactive. I would recommend the house for anyone visiting the Albany or Troy area!

description: This location in Albany’s cultural and business hub is ideal for travelling nurses,  professionals on assignment, and visitors alike.  Walk to Empire State Plaza, The Egg, and top dining.  Minutes from MVP Arena, NYS Library & Archives, Albany Med, Albany Universities/Colleges, and government offices.  Features Queen bed, pull-out couch, full kitchen, Wi-Fi, and in-unit laundry.  Quick access to I-787, I-90, and Amtrak. More space, comfort, and convenience than a hotel—book now!
review: It is in the heart of downtown. We walked to the large paek where there was a free live stream lat performance and well worth the ahort walk to Empore square. Crazy architecture. Beautiful t of traffic noise and an argument in the alley- but the space was a perfect atopover on our way to Maine

description: Enjoy your stay in a safe 5 star neighborhood close to everything in Albany. Beautiful first floor apartment. Free parking on site in parking lot in rear of home. Also free parking on street if you prefer. This beautiful home is in a great neighborhood and its centralized location makes it easy for you to get around. Get a great breakfast/lunch at Cafe Madison just a few blocks away.  A few minutes walk to St. Peter's Hospital and local shops. Book now for your luxury stay.
review: Chris was a great host and was immediately available if anything came up. He made me feel welcome and comfortable during my trip. The house was also in great condition.

description: Private bedroom shared livingroom and shared bath on the 2nd fl  Mini fridge, microwave, coffee maker, toaster and fans in room. No kitchen access Owner occupied. 40 inch Tv with Firestick Security cameras exterior cameras and motion sensors in common areas, and shared halls.   NO extra visitors Keyless bedroom and main entry locks Walking distance to Albany Medical Center, colleges, and Washington Park. (2-3 blocks) Direct bus line to/from Suny Albany,   Amtrak, mall and DT Albany
review: Everything was great! Interesting home and good neighborhood. Would stay again!

description: Place is within 2-3 miles of AMC, St. Peter's,  UAlbany, SUNY, College of St. Rose, Washington park, Empire State Plaza, and many other establishments.  Only 15 minute ride to the airport !
review: Fs does everything you would expect from a host. Thank you Fs for the short notice check in and the comfortable bed. That mattress saved my life. lol

description: Enjoy your stay in a safe 5 star neighborhood close to everything in Albany. Beautiful first floor apartment. Free parking on site in parking lot in rear of home. Also free parking on street if you prefer. This beautiful home is in a great neighborhood and its centralized location makes it easy for you to get around. Get a great breakfast/lunch at Cafe Madison just a few blocks away.  A few minutes walk to St. Peter's Hospital and local shops. Book now for your luxury stay.
review: Chris was an AMAZING host and has a beautiful place to stay! The beds were extremely comfortable, the home was SPOTLESS. Definitely worth the price and will stay again should we come back to the area. Thank you Chris!

description: Enjoy your stay in a safe 5 star neighborhood close to everything in Albany. Beautiful first floor apartment. Free parking on site in parking lot in rear of home. Also free parking on street if you prefer. This beautiful home is in a great neighborhood and its centralized location makes it easy for you to get around. Get a great breakfast/lunch at Cafe Madison just a few blocks away.  A few minutes walk to St. Peter's Hospital and local shops. Book now for your luxury stay.
review: We made a trip to Albany for one night and this place was perfect! Plenty of room for 3 adults. The beds were comfortable and everything was nice and clean. The neighborhood is pretty and it was quiet at night. A few food options right down the road made it convenient and easy for us to find our way back. We will definitely be keeping this airbnb in mind for future stays in Albany! Thank you!

description: Enjoy this lovely neighborhood of Albany when you stay in this 2-bedroom, 2 bathroom home! Bring the whole family to this great place with lots of room for fun. This bright and cozy home includes a fully equipped kitchen, washer/dryer in the home, a huge backyard with a privacy fence and a swing set. A newly remodeled second floor provides a suite-like experience for anyone staying there.   A great place for a family, traveling professionals, or a single person looking for lots of space.
review: Easy to check in with clear instructions. Very clean and tidy. Nice back yard and would have been even better with a couple chairs or patio furniture to sit  and relax. Overall great place.

description: Welcome to your home away from home in the heart of Albany! Nestled on a quiet street, this beautifully renovated 3-bedroom, 2.5-bathroom luxury residence offers a rare blend of comfort, style, and convenience—perfect for families, friends, business travelers, and weekend explorers alike.
review: We booked this house last minute for a comedy show in Albany and it was absolutely perfect. The location couldn’t have been more convenient — everything was close by, and we even walked just two minutes to Alan’s Oyster, which was such a great spot for dinner. The house itself is so well thought out. The design is stylish and comfortable, with plenty of bedrooms for our group. The beds and pillows were soft and cozy, making it easy to get a great night’s sleep after the show. One of the things we loved most were the QR codes placed around the house. They made it so easy to figure out how everything worked without having to guess or search. It’s little touches like that that really stood out. The hosts, Nori and Daniella, were wonderful — very easy to communicate with, extremely friendly, and so accommodating. They made the whole process smooth and welcoming. Honestly, this was probably the best Airbnb we’ve stayed at in a very long time. Everything felt effortless.

description: The best location in Albany. This room is cozy with large windows. The closet is big and ideal for longer stays. You’ll live the living areas with ornate woodwork and natural light throughout. Walk to eateries, grocery, and cinema. The yard is massive with a screened in gazebo. Come relax!
review: Thomas’s place was just what we needed for our short stay in Albany. The house was very well maintained and he was always responsive. Restaurants and local neighbourhood shops were a short walk away. Thanks for a great stay.

description: Forget your worries in this spacious and serene space. Located close to all major highways, hospitals, shopping and historic downtown Albany. Boast 2 decks and large front porch for relaxation or entertaining. Has large park and large yard space on quiet dead-end street. Family friendly with great neighbors. Close to bus line. Very spacious with all new appliances and all amenities new as well. You will have a great stay in this upgraded beautiful home.
review: Patrice was great and the house was as advertised. Spent a lot of time relaxing on the screened back deck. Would definitely  recommend

description: Welcome to your private bedroom in this newly renovated 4-bedroom, 1-bathroom apartment in the heart of Albany! Enjoy the warmth of refinished 130-year-old hardwood floors and relax by the custom stone fireplace with a 50-inch Samsung Smart TV. The fully equipped kitchen includes a dishwasher, and laundry facilities are conveniently located in the basement. Blackout curtains in each room provide a peaceful night's sleep. Free street parking is available. Please note that guests are not allowed.
review: It was great. WiFi — amazing. Got to WFH with no issues. Bed was comfy. Room was big enough for me to exercise/do yoga. Shower was so good! Never wanted to get out. Perfect water pressure. Laundry, yes! So nice that it’s in the basement. Roommates were wonderful. We all respected each other’s space/routines and our schedules aligned perfectly.  College of St. Rose is a block away; it’s a beautiful campus, gorgeous pink and red roses, pink hibiscus, yellow and orange day lilies. Really calm, serene, sacred place. The grocery store, Market 32, is about a 10 min walk. But, Whole Foods deliveries were also really convenient/easy. It was all fantastic. Brigid is really helpful and generous. Always willing to help. She let me borrow her yoga mat! Highly recommend.

description: Just moments from Albany Medical Center, this renovated 1-bedroom apartment exudes brightness and is tastefully furnished with high-end designer furniture and decor, ensuring a delightful living experience. Situated on one of the area’s finest blocks of classic Victorian mansions, this building stands as a beacon of elegance. With proximity to Albany Medical Center, universities, and more, the location is truly unbeatable.
review: The stay with Elizabeth was wonderful. It’s a very warm and cozy apartment in the heart of downtown Albany, even as it’s downtown it’s very quiet and peaceful. It’s in walking distance to restaurants.

description: Experience updated comfort in a Hystorical Building at Capital Square, Albany! Overlooking the iconic Capitol Building, this fully-furnished apartment offers a prime location with easy access to vibrant Lark Street and top-notch amenities. Enjoy a centralized location with street parking, and high-speed Wi-Fi. Perfect for both leisure and business travelers, doctors, nurses, students etc.
review: I was in Albany for NYS high school wrestling championships at MVP. This place was a great location near downtown/arena. Bars/restaurants nearby. Easy to find and get in. Much better deal than the downtown hotels.

description: Welcome to your cozy Albany retreat! Enjoy a comfortable stay in this well-appointed space, perfect for travelers looking for convenience and relaxation. Your booking includes free parking and a complimentary breakfast to start your day right. Located near shops, restaurants, and downtown Albany, this home offers easy access to local attractions. Whether you’re here for business or leisure, you’ll love the comfort and convenience of this stay. Book now for a relaxing experience.
review: We had an amazing stay ! Thank you for everything! Wonderful place!

description: This comfortable one bedroom apartment comes furnished to entertain and with a welcome drink! Stay in the capital region’s most historic neighborhood full of beautiful architecture and cultural attractions. Walkable to some of Albany’s best restaurants including Dove and Deer, Albany’s most charming upscale bar. A full kitchen comes equipped with all your basic cooking needs, but if you don’t feel like cooking enjoy preferred access and discounts at Dove and Deer.
review: Had A Great Time At Thomas’s , Beautiful Decor And Surroundings. Perfect For My Self Care Night.  Didn’t Make It To The Restaurant , But Can’t Wait To Book Again To Have That Experience As Well..

description: Place is within 2-3 miles of AMC, St. Peter's,  UAlbany, SUNY, College of St. Rose, Washington park, Empire State Plaza, and many other establishments.  Only 15 minute ride to the airport !
review: Phil was so accommodating. I had to extend my stay and he was very hospitable about it. I highly recommend. It was in a great location and easy to get around town.

description: Welcome to your cozy Albany retreat! Enjoy a comfortable stay in this well-appointed space, perfect for travelers looking for convenience and relaxation. Your booking includes free parking and a complimentary breakfast to start your day right. Located near shops, restaurants, and downtown Albany, this home offers easy access to local attractions. Whether you’re here for business or leisure, you’ll love the comfort and convenience of this stay. Book now for a relaxing experience.
review: We were in need of a place to stay and this was available in our price range. The bed was clean and comfy, the tub, sink, and toilet were clean. The breakfast had more than other hotels we stayed at. They offered waffles, hot hard boiled eggs, sausage, breads, muffins, cooked diced potatoes, and juice etc.

description: Indulge in modern luxury and sophistication in this tastefully updated 2-bedroom townhouse-style apartment. With chic designer furnishings and modern amenities, your private porch entrance welcomes you home to elegance. Located on one of Center Square's most picturesque streets, enjoy easy access to fabulous dining, iconic landmarks, and vibrant nightlife. Experience the convenience of city living, just a mile from Albany Medical Center and St. Peter’s Hospital.
review: I stayed with Elizabeth for almost 4 months. Pros: First, let me say Elizabeth is WONDERFUL to work with. Quick communication and very accommodating. Really can’t beat the unit location and the apartment has just what you need for cooking etc. Neighborhood is safe and relatively quiet. Attractions are blocks away to 10min walk at most. Cons: Personally, I felt the monthly price was a little steep. But unfortunately that seems to be the norm among short term rentals in the area. I would absolutely recommend this place. And yes, I would stay again.

description: This beautifully renovated brownstone in historic Albany is your perfect getaway. Located just minutes from charming downtown, guests can enjoy all Albany has to offer.   This spacious bedroom and living area has an abundance of natural light creates a very comfortable environment! There is a fully stocked kitchen, in unit washer/dryer, free resident lot parking, and a fenced shared backyard with bbq for guests to enjoy.  Long term stays available. This unit is located on the 3rd floor.
review: We’ve stayed at two of Linda’s listings, and both times have been very convenient for us. She’s proactive, accommodating, and always willing to help. Unfortunately, on both occasions the cleaning team missed their scheduled visit before check-in, one instance happened right after a holiday, and Linda wasn’t aware of it, but she quickly did her best to make things right, which we really appreciated. We understand that miscommunications can happen when coordinating with others, and it didn’t affect our overall impression. Overall, her places were convenient, well-equipped, fairly priced, and worked out great for us.

description: Stay in our 5-bedroom 3-story townhouse nestled in a renovated, historic 200-year-old building located in Albany's serene Pastures neighborhood. Just a short walk from landmarks like the Albany Medical Center, Times Union Center, Empire State Plaza, and vibrant Lark Street. Easy access to I-787, I-90 & I-87. Five queen beds and two queen air mattresses and couches accommodate up to 16. Ideal for large families and groups. Dive into Albany's history with modern comforts.
review: Huge space with lots of room. Nice layout with two separate units. Easy check in and check out. Walking distance to downtown Albany locations.

description: You'll Love this Newly renovated Modern Charming Place to stay. Enjoy the spacious back yard for fresh air or relax inside enjoying the detailed wood accent Throughout the unit with a touch or Brick Detailing.   Short Drive or 10-15minute walk to local attractions and theatre. Less than a minute walk to convenience stores. 15 Minute drive to Albany international Airport/Amtrak and Greyhound station.  Early Check-In may be possible after 2pm  $250 indoor smoking violation fee $250 animal cleaning
review: The place is absolutely lovely! Host was very communicative and extremely helpful! The street was close to everything, could be loud from the living room but you weren’t able to hear much from the bedroom. Would go here again :)

description: Bright, peaceful 2BR unit set just outside Albany’s vibrant Center Square within walking distance to Washington Park, local cafés, restaurants, and downtown attractions. Whether you’re a solo traveler, couple, or family, you’ll find everything you need for a relaxing stay. Sip your morning coffee on the private deck with birdsong in the background, rest in a cozy queen or full bed, and enjoy self check-in, fast Wi-Fi, climate control with A/C and heat, and private garage parking right next door.
review: Stayed here while on a business trip. Loved being on the edge of downtown with a short walk to coffee shops and restaurants. Quiet neighborhood and lovely community gardens nearby!

description: Freshly renovated 1 bedroom apartment, directly across the street from Greyhound station.  Fully equipped kichen with all the utensils and instruments you can imagine.   Massive living room, with work space, plenty of room to sit and TV.
review: Apartment was VERY clean and was just like the description! It is VERY close to MVP Arena, and walkable to downtown near lots of restaurants, shopping, etc. Just the location I was looking for. The bed was broken and would fully lean one way if the weight was on the wrong side. However, the bed was also very comfy once you balanced the weight. Cute apartment, and perfect for a short stay.

description: Charming private 1 bed, 1 bath garden suite just steps away from historic Washington Park.    Walking distance from Albany Med. and downtown SUNY.  A stylish brownstone with culturally diverse art & experiences & full amenities.    Near iconic places like the NYS Capital, Empire State Plaza, Egg Performing Arts Ctr., restaurants, and more.   The unit is perfect for mature business & medical travelers, and couples looking for a home away from home to unwind and relax while visiting the Capital.
review: Rosie was very nice and helpful. The space was beautifully decorated. Parking on the street wasn’t too bad. The bed was comfortable. I would stay here again😊

description: Fall in love with Upstate New York when you stay in this 1-bed apt, located in the Historic Center Square neighborhood with washer/dryer and off-street parking. The home is within walking distance to Washington Park, Empire Plaza, and the Institute of History and Art with easy access to the downtown, and countless restaurants, bars, entertainment.   The apt is equipped with a comfortable leather sofa, flat-screen/smart TV, a turntable with a mix of records, and Bluetooth speakers.

description: Hudson 5 is a first floor queen room with a larger bathroom and shower Each room is equipped with a SmartTV and Apple TV as well as a desk.  This room is pet friendly. review: We arrived at about 3:50 (check in was 3pm). Upon arrival the man cleaning the room told us it wasn’t ready yet and asked us to sit in the lounge.  While walking to the lounge there were several cabinet doors wide open in the hallway and the lounge. There was also a lamp sitting in a chair. Our first impressions was it was not very presentable. The room wasn’t ready for us until about 4:15. Before leaving to get dinner we went to make sure our passcode worked for the doors.  It did not work, so we alerted the front desk/bartender. She then gave us a room key and said she would send a message through Airbnb with the updated passcode.  We never received the new passcode through Airbnb or email.  On a plus side, the bed was comfy.

Thank you for your kindness, and for your time and attention to the unusual circumstance, this will not deter me from renting here again. Thank you and take care.

review: The beds were amazing. Very comfortable!  The couch was also comfortable. Kitchen was beautiful.  The parking was a little tough as it was a busy street and wasn’t much parking. However as the night went on, spots opened up and we were able to move to be parked in front of it. Only negative really was the house seemed to be missing some supplies. The utensils had only 2 or 3 spoons, I believe there were only 3 bowls. There were only 2 bath towels. The fry pan is a small one, so you can’t cook a big meal in it. I did not reach out to the owner about this, so if I had, she may if brought us extra towels or something. But it wasn’t that big of a deal for us. I bought a big pot so we could use the other big pot as our fry pan :) it all worked and we were very happy.  But overall, I really enjoyed our stay there. Again, so comfy. review: Air BnB can be a beautiful place with the 3 floors, 5 bedrooms, 4 bathrooms and 2 kitchens! But.. it can use a lot of updating, plenty of maintenance and an entire new cleaning team because to start we pre-cleaned just because and in doing that found mice feces all on the counters in both kitchens (took pics), the ovens were dirty with old food not cleaned out. Underneath the beds had water bottles and even a baby bottle from previous guest as well as wrappers. We also found mice feces underneath the couch cushions and had to vacuum the entire couch. The hot water didn’t work in the kitchens for the first 2 days, the bedroom window lock on the 1st floor was broken so it couldn’t lock so it would fall down some so no one used the downstairs room. The dryer was broken and once they finally responded to me, they said they should’ve put a “out of order” sign on it. Bunch of packages in hallway when we arrived.  Poor response until I complained to Air BnB. And yes I reached out immediately

review: You couldn't pay me to stay in this hotel. Clearly used for drug activity. Not worth the price since you will have to pay for exterminators to get rid of the bed bugs when you get home. First room assigned had a broken AC. Second room also had broke AC. Host attempted to gaslight me about the AC saying I had it on fan. Asked what proof I had that it was broken. There was no other thermostat in the room besides the heating/AC unit which did not have an accurate temperature reading. Hotel not apartment. Smelled terrible throughout. Front desk was visibly annoyed with our concerns about the broken AC. Called the maintenance man who also was angry with us for giving an accurate description of the room temp. DO NOT RECOMMEND.

review: Rodney's place was a great spot for spending a week in Albany unexpectedly! Awesome location, I walked everywhere. Easy and clean. Well-equipped. It was easy to communicate with Rodney.

description: Newly renovated and spacious.  This sprawling 1 bedroom comes with triple exposures, in unit W/D,  prewar details and a backyard.  As you walk in, you are greeted with a decorative fireplace, built in shelves and a large living room.  Further back into the apartment, is the large bathroom, newly renovated kitchen and a queen sized bedroom, with a large closet.   Located in Center Square, this unit is within a short walk to many bars, restaurants, and parks.  Several Hospitals are with in 5 miles
review: Beautiful and very clean place. Pictures and descriptions are spot on. Walking distance from restaurants, market, bars. As a travel nurse the location is perfect very close to the hospital I work at. I would recommend this place to stay, especially for travel nurses that work at St. Peters or Albany Med.

description: Experience modern comfort in Albany's "Center Square".  This first-floor sanctuary in an elegant stone building offers 24/7 surveillance and a hardwired fire alarm system. Enjoy a bright living space, modern kitchen, and sleek bathroom. Ideal for short or extended stays. Private parking included. Surrounded by shops, restaurants, and nightlife. Walk to Albany Med, State Offices, The Capitol, and Empire State Plaza. 30 mins to Saratoga Raceway, 50 mins to Lake George, 1/2 mile to Palace Theater.
review: The stay at Flerida’s place was great! She was always available when I needed anything. The accommodation is really spacious, clean and in a great location. Thanks for a great stay!

description: Welcome to The Dove’s Nest, a cozy and quiet space perfect for solo travelers or couples. Located in a peaceful neighborhood in Albany, it's a great place to relax or get some work done.  What you’ll get: - Bedroom, Livingroom, and bathroom, - Comfortable bed and linens - Small sitting area - Washer and Dryer - Smart - TV - Wi-Fi - Mini fridge, microwave, and coffee/tea setup - Full Private bathroom  - Shared entrance and available parking  Come enjoy a simple, calm stay at The Dove’s Nest.
review: I really enjoyed staying at Roland's place, very neat and clean. It is also quiet and has necessary furniture to make you feel like home. I highly recommend his place

description: Hudson 3 is a first floor handicap accessible queen room with a large bathroom and ADA shower. Each room is equipped with a SmartTV and Apple TV as well as a desk.  This room is not pet friendly.  Complimentary Services: Continental Breakfast Onsite Parking Electric Parking Wi-Fi & Apple TV Keyless Entry Ensuite Guest Rooms ​ Paid Services: Cocktails Meeting Space Rentals Pets (If applicable) Early Checkin (1PM) Late Checkout (12PM)
review: Hidden Gem in Albany! Helpful staff, great recommendations, proactive and responsive. Nice comfy bed, great kitchen, delicious coffee and complimentary continental breakfast. Felt like home. We loved it!

description: Stylish 1BR + loft apartment in downtown Albany with private second-floor entry and secure building access. Walk to shops, restaurants, and historic sites. Features full kitchen, Smart TV, and cozy, modern design. Great for work trips or getaways in the city. Parking not included — but you’ll be right in the center of it all!
review: Great location! Roomy and warm during the winter. Highly recommended

Our home is an architectural marvel, featuring high ceilings, intricate woodwork, and an abundance of open spaces. 	•	Guests have access to multiple common areas: two living rooms with a fireplace, a formal dining room that seats 12, and a modern kitchen where you can whip up gourmet meals.
review: Checkin was easy. Some confusion around the door code but it worked out. Plenty of amenities and overall a very clean and orderly place!

description: Welcome to our grand Manse, where classic elegance meets contemporary comfort. Nestled in the heart of Albany, this sprawling property promises a serene escape from the daily hustle.
