review: Very accommodating host and co host, easy booking, great atmosphere, & plenty of space. Thank you for the time at your home. 💕❤️

description: The whole group will enjoy easy access to everything from this centrally located place. Large open floor plan with living room, dining room, work area, kitchen and full bath all on one floor. Front and back porch complete this level. Second floor has four good size bedrooms, all with closets and additional full bath. Great location near St. Peters, Albany medical, colleges, major highways 🛣️ and more. Offstreet parking and yard make this a great place to stop for some adventures
review: The listing was as expected, clean, and convenient. Very easy! On a very quiet street as well.

description: Charming 5 room bed and breakfast located across from Washington Park in Albany, NY. Each room has a private bathroom and workstation. Guests have access to a shared kitchen, dining area, living space and small office nook with printer.
review: Madison Avenue is the commercial side of Washington Park,and in redevelopment stage.Know Albany very well since attending UA in '75,politics and investments thereafter.Ignore the review that stated chopped up rooms and fearful of car parking.Legitimate Inn with old school touches that I favor.Great night's sleep deapite frequent sirens,sign ofthe times and certain stupid social policies.But be ready to check out@ 11 sharp or you"ll get locked out quickly,l did-twice.

description: Charming 5 room bed and breakfast located across from Washington Park in Albany, NY. Each room has a private bathroom and workstation. Guests have access to a shared kitchen, dining area, living space and small office nook with printer.
review: The room I stayed was on the first floor and it was freezing. The was no heater in the room. I was asking Tarra and Matt about it, neither of them never respond.  Until the next day I found the housekeeper, she gave me a portable heater to use.  Not recommend.

description: Bright, peaceful 2BR unit set just outside Albany’s vibrant Center Square within walking distance to Washington Park, local cafés, restaurants, and downtown attractions. Whether you’re a solo traveler, couple, or family, you’ll find everything you need for a relaxing stay. Sip your morning coffee on the private deck with birdsong in the background, rest in a cozy queen or full bed, and enjoy self check-in, fast Wi-Fi, climate control with A/C and heat, and private garage parking right next door.
review: We loved Andres's place!  The location is unbeatable and the parking lot was a great bonus, especially in a town where street parking can be hard to find. Inside, the place was extremely quiet. I didnt hear anyone round, and the living room was great for unwinding at the end of the day.

description: Cozy 1BR in Center Square—steps from Lark St, Dove & Deer, the Capitol, and MVP Arena. This fully furnished unit features a modern kitchen, comfy living space, private laundry access (in basement), and full bath. Ideal for traveling nurses, legislators, or solo professionals. Walkable, convenient, and close to Albany Med, St Peter's Hospital, Irongate, and great dining. Traditional key entry. Clean, convenient, and perfectly located. Back unit, entrance in back of building.
review: Had a great stay! The place was exactly as described and very comfortable. The host was easy to communicate with and super responsive, which made everything smooth. Definitely recommend!

description: Come relax in this one bedrm garden apt. The living room has a sofa that can be used as a 2nd queen bed. Fully stocked kitchen for those who love to cook,  rainfall shower head, and private on site laundry. There is a gym in the garage (which is a shared space).  Private patio. Located in a home that has cultivated an ecosystem for years. Enjoy songbirds  and crickets. Walking distance to public transit & restaurants 10 minute car to downtown for dance/music.
review: quiet, spacious, very kind and accommodating host; perfect location to easily get to downtown, airport or train station! great spot if you’re a travel nurse as it’s very close to the hospital. enjoyed my stay overall :)

description: Bright, peaceful 2BR unit set just outside Albany’s vibrant Center Square within walking distance to Washington Park, local cafés, restaurants, and downtown attractions. Sip your morning coffee on the private deck with birdsong in the background, rest in a cozy queen or full bed, and enjoy self check-in, fast Wi-Fi, climate control with A/C and heat, and private garage parking right next door.
review: Wonderful stay! The place was spotless, cozy, and exactly as described. Great location and an incredibly friendly, responsive host. Would definitely book again!

description: Come relax in this one bedrm garden apt. The living room has a sofa that can be used as a 2nd queen bed. Located in a home that has cultivated an ecosystem for years. Enjoy songbirds  and crickets. Walking distance to public transit & restaurants 10 minute car to downtown for dance/music.
review: David’s place is truly an “oasis”. The oversized private patio was a huge bonus.  Easy parking. Great location. Highly recommend.

description: The whole group will enjoy easy access to everything from this centrally located place. The Red Brick House is a newly renovated, 4 stories/3000sq ft space with 4be/3.5ba and walking distance to Downtown Albany's top attractions.  Amenities included: ✔ Game Room ✔ Hot Tub ✔ Private Yard w/ BBQ and Outdoor Games ✔ Fully Equipped Kitchen ✔ High-Speed Wifi ✔ Free Parking (up too 3 vehicles) ✔ eV Lvl 2 Charging ✔ Office & Exercise Equipment ✔ Washer/Dryer & AC ✔ Mini-crib & Baby Accessories
review: Me and my family took a lil trip to Albany to get some back to school shopping done and a lil getaway before the school year starts. The house was great! Super clean, had everything we needed and then some!  The location of the house is great. Everything we did was within 10-15 mins away. The pictures of the house really don’t do it justice. So much room but also gives such a comfy cozy vibe. Yasiel was very quick to respond whenever we needed anything. Highly recommend!!

description: Welcome to the Whisky House! Featuring 3 floors with plenty of space to host a corporate event or celebrate with loved ones. Walking distance from downtown and Center Square nightlife, the Whiskey House is the perfect location for a bachelor or bachelorette party, birthday celebration getaway, anniversary, you name it! Whatever the occasion, the Whiskey House is your home away from home.  *We DO NOT have a full size stove/oven - pocket kitchen with smaller amenities (microwave/fridge) available*
review: It was an absolute pleasure to stay at The Whiskey House. The space is gorgeous and feels so cozy. Quite unique in all the best ways. Easy to check in and check out! Very spacious. Would absolutely stay again!  No complaints about The Whiskey House itself, only complaint would be the traffic and people outside during all hours of the night. Lots of commotion.

description: Quiet suburban neighborhood minutes from downtown Albany. Guests have access to the kitchen, dinette and deck. Garage space is also available.  Private guest quarters include a large bedroom with a queen-size bed, desk and private bath. Guests also enjoy their own spacious living area with a large TV, massage chair, convertible couch, microwave, water cooler and exercise equipment.
review: Wonderful stay! Rachel is a great host and went above and beyond to make us feel welcomed and comfortable. Her house is absolutely perfectly put together, and her dog is just the cutest! You do have to go through the main house to get to the private, finished basement where you’ll be staying, but you feel separated once you’re down there. We will definitely be back to the area (short drive to everywhere) and hope to stay there again.

description: Newly renovated one bedroom, loft style apartment. Centrally located in the Mansion neighborhood in albany. Huge spacious open layout with walk in closet. Big screen tvs, with super fast internet (400 mps). On-site laundry, with locked off street parking. Spectacular views of downtown Albany. Walking distance to empire state plaza, the egg, times union, and excellent bars, restaurants, and delis. Great value for anyone staying in albany long or short term.
review: I occupied the apartment for 6 months and it was great.  Whenever I had a question, Michael responded within minutes and was extremely proactive. George who helps maintain the property was great too. Always friendly and willing to help.  Thank you for everything.

description: The apartment is located in a quiet neighborhood . Fully furnished. Linens and towels are provided. It's two blocks away from downtown Albany, and the Palace theater.
review: The apartment was centrally located near all the night life in Albany, ideally suited to the age profile of my 2 sons who stayed their. ... We had initial difficulty in contacting the host...until we used my son who lives in Albany to be the contact, as we were relying on internet connection where ever we found free wifi..as roaming charges for international tourists is prohibitive. He went to the apartment a few times on the day we were yo arrive into JFK bit could not gain access...he was trying to get key so that he could leave basic provisions for us there. He eventually got an answer to the door bell..late evening.  The apartment was adequate for them as they spent most of their time with their brother who lives in Albany. They did say that the apartment was way too warm, and they could not see where to set the heating. One of the windows was broken but had plastic/perspex over it. The furniture was of a good enough standard but the couch was a little shabby and their was a musty smell from it. Other than those  facts they said the place was ideal for them and the contact person was very obliging considering they locked themselves out once and needed access .

description: Welcome to your home away from home in the heart of Albany! Nestled on a quiet street, this beautifully renovated 3-bedroom, 2.5-bathroom luxury residence offers a rare blend of comfort, style, and convenience—perfect for families, friends, business travelers, and weekend explorers alike.
review: Beautiful and comfortable home. We enjoyed our stay and especially loved the game room. Clear instructions were given for appliances and the thermostat. We were in town for a U Albany football game and the school was just a short drive away. We hope to stay at this home again in the future.

description: Spacious Pine Hills flat with many recent updates including refinished hardwood floors, all new windows and a completely remodeled kitchen, including brand new appliances. This unit also has a private laundry room as well as an entrance foyer. There is off street parking and the building is located within walking distance to 2 primary bus routes. This unit is also within walking distance of popular restaurants, Juniors, The Point, Cafe Madison and Kismet Mediterranean Grill.
review: Great location, walkable to many area restaurants and businesses. Home was equipped with essentials. Good communication.

description: Step into the comfort of this beautiful light-filled, cozy 1 bedroom apartment minutes from hospitals, parks, and great restaurants. Very walkable location next to Albany medical center.  ~fast wi-fi ~fully equipped kitchen ~55” smart tv ~free off street parking ~ contactless self check-in
review: great place! just like photos. loved that there was a washer and dryer with soaps. make sure your at the right address upon checkin though, the street is north and south so depending on where you are there's the same address on the other side of the same street just further up. easy to get inside. beautiful decorations very clean. brand new memory foam mattresses in both bedrooms. this house only had one TV. and the coffee maker wasn't a kurig but full basket coffee was provided with creamers and sugars. the kitchen was well stocked.

description: Entire garden apartment in Albany, New York. Walking distance to restaurants, shops and Washington Park. Situated in the heart of Historic Center Square neighborhood. 15 minute walk or short ride to MVP Arena. Perfect for couples and short getaways, but we welcome longer stays too!
review: Good host, very responsive. I had a couple problems with the unit and Matt was quick to respond and try to make things right. As the description says, the shower is not ideal for tall people, but that was expected. The mattress is comfortable.

description: Stay in a clean, quiet home with 2 friendly housemates. Renovated in 2023, this co-living space offers: 	•	Private bedroom (furnished) 	•	Shared bathroom 	•	Fully furnished common areas 	•	Fast Wi-Fi 	•	In-home laundry 	•	Shared entry  Perfect for short or long stays. Convenient, comfortable, and move-in ready!
review: Alain was a very responsive and accommodating host. He was flexible with dates, provided detailed check-in information, and communicated quickly with any concerns. There are other tenets in the building overall but parking was accessible. Neighborhood feels safe. Very large washer/drier and was accessible when needed. Space was clean and as advertised. Only concern was a weak Internet connection, possibly a result of this particular bedroom location, but was stronger in other areas of the home. Alain did attempt to remedy the issue. Definitely recommend this location and Alain as a host!

description: Relax in this conveniently located apartment. Close to Albany, Medical Center, state capital, parks, perfect for legislative worker, traveling, nurses or medical professionals. lots to see and do. You’re blocks from the state capital, and governors mansion. located in the historic mansion District of Albany. Long-term stays are welcome.
review: It's an urban area, so there are typical city things like homeless people around and things are a little run down. That being said, I had no issues and Jeffrey's place is like an oasis. No noise, clean (even had little pre-packaged soaps like in a hotel), and I had the whole apartment to myself, so plenty of privacy! Jeffrey was also super nice. If you need to be downtown and/or close to the highways, this is a good option and I'd definitely stay there again.

description: 3-bed fl 2 apt. in a renovated historic two-century-old building in a quiet neighborhood of Albany's Pastures. Great location near Albany Medical Center, MVP Arena, Empire State Plaza, Library, Lark Street, State Offices, courts; easy access to local & regional bus routes and highways (I-787, I-90 & I-87)  3 Queen beds Cozy gas fireplace in living room Up to 10 NON-SMOKING guests Toiletries included  Save & BOOK this unit today! Message me anytime. Hope to welcome you soon!  -Earl
review: 10/10 stay! Earl is a great host! I’ve stayed with him before and it was just as enjoyable of a stay like last time! Will definitely stay with him again. Great communication, beautiful home layout, super clean and well maintained! Super accommodating, Thank you again!

description: Modern townhouse across from the Governors mansion. This unique property offers a perfect blend of historic charm and contemporary living in a building that whispers stories of the past.  A city retreat offering a blend of security, and accessibility to the city's key attractions.  1,900 sq ft of living space includes a modern living/dining area. A spacious 2nd floor bedroom and separate office and library. Large windows fill the spaces with light and access to a large outdoor yard.
review: The home is in a great location: both beautiful views and feels safe being so near the Governor’s Mansion, close to bus lines and downtown, and an easy drive to most of Albany. Aside from being very practically comfortable and functional (with a well-appointed kitchen and bathrooms and a very comfortable bedroom), the decor manages to be elegant, charming, and very homey all at once. For taking in downtown Albany or just needing a place to stay for a work visit, this apartment is an excellent stay.

description: This cozy first-floor apartment is perfect for a comfortable stay in a prime location. It's within walking distance to local hospitals, colleges, and just steps away from Madison Ave and Lark St, known for their vibrant restaurants, bars, and shops. Ideal for those visiting for work, school, or leisure, the apartment offers a charming and convenient base to explore the best of the area. Whether you're here for a short trip or longer stay, you'll feel right at home!
review: Blossom’s place in the pine hills neighborhood of Albany was perfect for my overnight. Clean and minimalist which I like. I’m a terrible sleeper and found the mattress perfectly comfortable. Super cute kitchen. Overall very clean. Thank you!

description: 2-bed 2nd floor apt. in a renovated historic two-century-old building in a quiet neighborhood of Albany's Pastures. Message me anytime. Hope to welcome you soon!  -Earl
review: Excellent experience, wonderful place with great charm, amenities and location and the who was incredibly proactive, considerate and responsive in his communications. Highly recommend it. We went to Albany for a concert and the apartment is 4 blocks from the arena. Great location with parking and very charming

description: 4800ft of living space and an epic backyard make this historic home a true gem. The blueprints for the Jesse Buel House reside in the Library of Congress…for real. The pool is enormous and OPEN TIL early NOV! Hot tub open all year. There is enough furniture for everyone to get cozy. Two kitchens, a billiard room, OLED TVs, luxurious mattresses and eclectic décor make this home truly one of a kind. 35 minutes to Saratoga Race Track with loads of other fantastic attractions within an hour drive.
review: We had a fantastic stay at the Jesse Bleu House! Thomas was a wonderful host, and the home exceeded our expectations in every way. The pool was a favorite for everyone—clean, inviting, and perfect for relaxing afternoons. We especially loved the covered rear patio, which made for a great spot to enjoy the outdoors while staying cool and shaded. The peaceful backyard offered a serene escape, allowing us to unwind as a family. There was plenty of space to either come together or spread out, which made it ideal for both bonding time and quiet moments. The third level was a major highlight—it felt like our own private suite, complete with a bedroom, bathroom, living area, and a convenient kitchenette with a microwave and fridge. It gave us that extra layer of comfort and privacy we didn’t even know we needed. Being only about 10 minutes from the airport was incredibly convenient for our arrival and departure. The Jesse Bleu House is truly a Must Stay!

description: Come relax in this one bedrm garden apt. The living room has a sofa that can be used as a 2nd queen bed. Fully stocked kitchen for those who love to cook,  rainfall shower head, and private on site laundry. There is a gym in the garage (which is a shared space).  Private patio. Located in a home that has cultivated an ecosystem for years. Enjoy songbirds  and crickets. Walking distance to public transit & restaurants 10 minute car to downtown for dance/music.
review: David's place was super convenient to U Albany and major highways. It was peaceful and relaxing. The patio is such a great place with rabbits, chipmunks, and birds frequently seen passing by. I would highly recommend this place for anyone looking for a super convenient and peaceful place to stay while visiting Albany. The place is quirky and has character. If you're looking for a hotel type stay, this isn't it. It's more. I look forward to my next visit when I am in the area.

description: Beautiful and spacious 2 bedroom, 1.5 bathroom in a downtown historic brownstone. Recently renovated with modern updates. 2 floors of living space. Outdoor space. Walking distance to many points of interests, restaurants, bars, and breweries.
review: I recently was visiting my hometown for a show and needed a place to stay. I absolutely loved staying in this old beautiful brownstone in the heart of downtown Albany. The location couldn’t have been better – it’s surrounded by some of my favorite restaurants and breweries. It is super walkable and is also conveniently close to highways, making it easy to get around. The house itself was spacious, clean, and well-stocked with everything I needed, from a fully equipped kitchen to comfy living spaces. The back deck looks like a great spot to relax and hang out when the weather’s nice. I would highly recommend! Thanks again for a great stay!

description: Discover peace of mind in our professionally sanitized 2bdrm apt. in Center Square Albany. Perfectly designed for extended stays, this apartment features 24/7 security cameras and a hardwired fire alarm system for your safety. Whether you're working remotely or seeking a comfortable retreat, enjoy blackout curtains and a fully equipped kitchen. Free washer, dryer, and dedicated parking included. Ideal for traveling nurses, business travelers, and long-term guests. No smoking inside the apartment
review: Dominick and Flerida were very welcoming. While I was staying in their space, I felt at home. I was able study for my training with no interruptions. I had a pleasant stay.

description: Experience modern comfort in Albany's "Center Square".  This first-floor sanctuary in an elegant stone building offers 24/7 surveillance and a hardwired fire alarm system. Enjoy a bright living space, modern kitchen, and sleek bathroom. Ideal for short or extended stays. Private parking included. Surrounded by shops, restaurants, and nightlife. Walk to Albany Med, State Offices, The Capitol, and Empire State Plaza. 30 mins to Saratoga Raceway, 50 mins to Lake George, 1/2 mile to Palace Theater.
review: Beautiful, large space that is very centrally located close to Lark St, Empire State Plaza, etc. The space was sparkling clean with renovated kitchen & bathroom. Being pet-friendly was a huge plus, and our dogs enjoyed how open the floorplan was. Included off-street parking was very convenient and easy to get in/out at any time. I would recommend this space to anyone visiting Albany!

description: Welcome to your cozy Albany retreat! Enjoy a comfortable stay in this well-appointed space, perfect for travelers looking for convenience and relaxation. Your booking includes free parking and a complimentary breakfast to start your day right. Located near shops, restaurants, and downtown Albany, this home offers easy access to local attractions. Whether you’re here for business or leisure, you’ll love the comfort and convenience of this stay. Book now for a relaxing experience!
review: Very clean .. quick response and very helpful ! Will always be my go to when in the area!!!

description: Welcome to our exceptional apartment in Albany! Discover a blend of style, comfort, and a prime location. Just steps from the State Capitol, Empire State Plaza, museums, and the Hudson River, our home offers unparalleled access to Albany's top attractions. Immerse yourself in local culture with nearby cafes, boutiques, and historic landmarks. Experience Albany like never before. Book your stay for a memorable adventure!
review: My stay was comfortable, clean and convenient. The location is a great starting point for the Albany experience. The host was awesome 10/10, super helpful. Would recommend and would return again.

description: Lovely Ranch home nestled on a quiet street near the SUNY campus. This home has a detached garage, porch and patio.  There's central air, new dishwasher, 55" 4k Smart TV, new furniture, lots of seating and expanding dining table for up to 8+.  Lots of Parking.  2 Queen bedrooms and 2 more beds can be added to one of the common rooms.
review: This place is great! We had a nice family gathering and BBQ. About the only thing, we could have wished for is a second full bath and a few more coffee cups. Outstanding host!

description: Thoughtfully updated with modern amenities and chic designer furnishings this 1 bedroom 1 bathroom apartment will make you look forward to coming home.  This elegant unit is a set in a historic building on one of the most beautiful streets in Albany’s fabulous Center Square neighborhood. Footsteps away from great restaurants, cafes, and upscale nightlife.  This location is convenient to all thing’s capital region and less than a mile from Albany Med and St. Peter’s hospital!
review: The location of this apartment to the Albany Capitol center cannot be beat.  Right up the street are lots of local restaurants and the neighborhood was quiet, safe and beautiful. Elizabeth was very accessible and responded in a timely fashion - the customer service was on point!

description: Located just 15 minutes from Albany International Airport, our cozy and modern Airbnb is the perfect place for travelers, business professionals, and adventure seekers looking for a convenient and comfortable stay.  > Prime Location – Quick access to Albany Airport, major highways, and downtown attractions/major stores.   > Comfortable & Clean > Self Check-In > Fast Wi-Fi & Work-Friendly> Fully Equipped Kitchen > Free Off-street Parking
review: Great place, had everything we needed for our stay. Cecilia was responsive and lovely to talk to. Would recommend for anyone wanting to stay near Albany :)

description: Private queen bedroom in 4 bedroom home on the second floor. Located on a quiet street, there are two balconies with great sunlight, large private bedroom with queen bed, closet, dresser, mirror and nightstand for all your clothes and day to day needs. Convenient laundry in basement, stylish common areas, and a brand new kitchen with stainless appliances, gas range, and retro breakfast nook. Bed and linens are brand new and super comfy. Hybrid coil-foam mattress accommodates side/back sleepers.
review: I had a wonderful stay at this Airbnb! The host was incredibly nice and welcoming. The house was spotless, beautifully maintained, and looked exactly like the photos. Everything was in perfect condition, and all the facilities were available — from a well-equipped kitchen to comfortable living spaces. The kitchen, in particular, was amazing and had everything I needed for cooking. Overall, it was a great experience and I would definitely stay here again!

description: Be our guest in Albany! Thoughtfully furnished 1BR/1BA APT . Centrally situated In Melrose neighborhood, one of the best neighborhoods Albany has to offer. Close proximity to major Hospitals, Medical centers and University. Take a short walk to restaurants or the beautiful Buckingham Pond walking paths. Unit sleeps two or have some guests visit and utilize the pull out couch in the Livingroom. Full Kitchen with breakfast bar that could double as a great location for remote working.
review: Big thanks to Riccardo! The place was quiet, clean and convenient to our friends and family nearby. We appreciated the coffee & snacks provided for our stay as well as all the other thoughtful amenities, including laundry- with provided detergent and change for the washer and dryer. Would come and stay again!

description: Step into Fortune Suites, a recently revamped Two-bedroom apartment ideally situated within 8 to 10 minutes' drive of Albany Med, Times Union Center, and other local attractions. Street parking is hassle-free, accommodating up to 4 Non-smoking guests. Toiletries are provided, and we kindly request keeping noise levels down after 9:00 pm. Rest assured, high-speed internet is included for your convenience. Welcome and enjoy your stay!
review: Osas was a great host. The unit was perfect in every sense of the word. Probably my favorite BnB so far. 10 out of 10.

description: Immerse yourself in this meticulously updated 2-bedroom unit, where modern amenities and chic designer furnishings ensure a delightful stay. This elegant abode is mere steps from renowned restaurants, iconic landmarks, and vibrant nightlife. Enjoy the convenience of being centrally located in the capital region, with local hospitals just a stone's throw away. With its bright, clean, and professionally furnished interiors, this unit promises a welcoming retreat in the heart of the city
review: My employees was told to park in one of the three spots. He did - right at 11am at check out his car was towed - the place only accepted cash - could not get in touch with them and costed over $500 for a tow.  I hate to say it be I felt like she is working with the tow company.  The timing was insane.  Air bnb refused us $250 but overall. Very disappointed in the parking situation and the miscommunication with the host.  Cash only - $125 tow is what they said it would be on the sign.  However it was the weekend - they only accepted cash and the air bnb bower said it was after 11. Yeah 11:10 - it was so times.   My employee ultimately is responsible for- however even though we had reservations - because it was 10 minutes  after - he was towed.  I feel it was a set up in my opinion. The host offered no help.   I wonder why air bnb offered a refund? Had this happened before.   Would never stay there again. Gave 5 stars because I get it’s a business. But disappointed.

description: This stunning property will amaze you from the moment you walk in the door. This charming character apartment provides you with all the modern conveniences you would hope for. Peace and tranquility are in abundance. This property takes advantage of natural light that interacts with the home's warm-toned palettes and floods certain parts of the dwelling works to great effect.  Local cafes and restaurants are a short walk away.  Property is within a 5 min drive to all major Albany area hospitals.
review: We thoroughly enjoyed our time in this spacious, comfortable apartment. Jessica was very responsive to any questions we sent her way, even late into the evening. The location is on a low-traffic residential street in a location convenient to getting around New York’s capital city.

description: The best location in Albany. This room is cozy with large windows. The closet is big and ideal for longer stays. You’ll live the living areas with ornate woodwork and natural light throughout. Walk to eateries, grocery, and cinema. The yard is massive with a screened in gazebo. Come relax!
review: I stayed in Thomas' place several times and always found the place beautiful,  host friendly and responsive. I always recommend this place for stay. Although always hesitant to do so because I am worried if this place would be available next time when I'm visiting Albany for myself 😉

description: For traveling professional, college students, or parents visiting your young adult, enjoy this stylish apartment centrally-located in Albany.  NY State Capital - 2.4 mi Suny Albany - 3.5 mi Albany Medical Center - 3.5 mi Regeneron Pharma - 4.8 mi RPI University - 10 mi General Electric  - 15 mi   The home is 1st floor unit in two family house, which was recently renovated. It includes new appliances: washer, dryer and dishwasher. It's a restful stay, which is close main areas.
review: Another great stay. Very accommodating per usual. Looking forward to next Carla lol.

description: 3-bed fl 2 apt. in a renovated historic two-century-old building in a quiet neighborhood of Albany's Pastures. Great location near Albany Medical Center, MVP Arena, Empire State Plaza, Library, Lark Street, State Offices, courts; easy access to local & regional bus routes and highways (I-787, I-90 & I-87)  3 Queen beds Cozy gas fireplace in living room Up to 10 NON-SMOKING guests Toiletries included  Save & BOOK this unit today! Message me anytime. Hope to welcome you soon!  -Earl
review: Close to MVP arena, easy access from highway, simple and convenient. Host was very reactive to reply to questions and emails. Very good for 3 couples but guests 7 and 8 must sleep in the living room - it is OK but less comfortable and private than other 3 rooms.

description: The Whalen King Suite is our largest suite. It features a large sitting area, work space, walk in closet, and oversized bathroom with soaking tub and shower. Each room is equipped with a SmartTV and Apple TV.  This room is not pet friendly.  Complimentary Services: Continental Breakfast Onsite Parking Electric Parking Wi-Fi & Apple TV Keyless Entry Ensuite Guest Rooms ​ Paid Services: Cocktails Meeting Space Rentals Pets (If applicable) Early Checkin (1PM) Late Checkout (12PM)
review: I stayed for six weeks this summer.  Beautiful place.  Friendly staff.  I will go back next time I am in Albany.  I have some mobility issues and the Argus was very accessible.  The downstairs bar was a nice option to have available.

description: This 3-bedroom, 1-bath Empire State apartment serves up not only all the comforts of home, but also an ideal location. Energize your days with a cup of coffee in the comfort of your own vacation rental, before heading out to explore the New York State Museum, Irish American Heritage Museum, and even the Albany Institute of History & Art. Later, head to Pizzeria Sapienza for a slice of true New York pie, or slurp down some oysters at Jack’s Oyster House!
review: DO NOT WORK WITH THIS HOST. Too many issues to list including a front door that is not functional, mice in the apartment seen running around and chewed into our bags, and an unstable internet connection among many other things. We had originally booked two apartments with this host in the same building, but she cancelled one of them on check in day "so her friends could stay in the apartment," forcing us to scramble and find another lodging option nearby for the rest of our group. This apartment needs major cleaning (including mice dropping removal from the kitchen and bedrooms) and renovations, and should not be allowed to be listed on Airbnb. Communication was terrible, and the host tried to defend themself when asked why the reservation was canceled after being confirmed for over a week.

description: Pack lightly. 4th floor 1BR walkup in a safe area downtown Albany.Street parking only.There is public transit.Ideal for quiet: working professionals 1 day visits, Bar Exam takers, interns, job interviewees. Across the street fromNYS Capitol,NYS Education office, Cathedral, SUNY Albany Downtown,State Exams, I787, Route 9,Washington square park, and all fine dining/Lark Street, LGBTQIA+ friendly. 5 min  Greyhound bus. Seeking friends. I am a parent and student who is at the library often.
review: The apartment was clean, with a spacious living room and comfortable bedroom. Vee was a wonderful host, providing yogurt, snacks, and even beer (which I forgot to drink!). Highly recommended!

description: Enjoy a stylish Sunshine. Cozy, one-of-a-kind Airbnb with eclectic decor and a welcoming vibe. Perfect for relaxing or hosting, featuring a spacious living area, fully equipped kitchen, and thoughtful touches like fresh linens and local art. Ideal for travelers seeking comfort and character, with a warm, homey feel that stands out. Charming Sunshine close to Albany Medical Hospital, Veteran Hospital located at walking distance radius. Perfect spot for health professionals.
review: Etem is a very attentive and always helpful landlord!  The apartment was super tidy and everything was provided!  The only thing that is sometimes loud are the upstairs tenants, but it was okay! Nevertheless, I would always recommend the apartment of Etem and always book again! Many thanks for the stay!

description: - No pets - No smoking or vaping - No parties or events - Directly across from Albany Academy - 1 mile from Albany Medical Center - 5.3 miles from UAlbany - Under 2 miles from Washington Park & Empire State Plaza - Just over 2 miles from The Egg & MVP Arena - Take a day trip to Lake George or Saratoga Springs! - King sized bed - Two spacious living rooms - Fully equipped kitchen - High-speed WiFi - Private parking
review: We were here for the CrossFit Games and the event was at the MVP arena so we had about a 10 minute commute and it was perfect! It was nice to have a place to come home to! We felt safe at the house, security was on point. Literally zero complaints. I hope to come back!!

description: Enjoy a stylish experience at this centrally-located place in College Town. close to downtown and all it's restaurants and bars, Washington park and the Plaza. There’s albany medical and st Peter's  Hospital are about a mile away as well Saint Rose, Albany law and UAlbany.
review: A nice, clean, 1br. Good for a couple or single person. One thing is that there are a lot of college kids in the neighborhood and it was one of the first perfect days of spring so there was a few large parties in the neighborhood.  The kids were respectful and they ended by about 8pm. The other thing was that the neighbors upstairs were pretty loud into the night. Mostly just walking and talking but the nois definitely traveled.  Anyway,  i liked the apartment and the noise didn't bother me much. The price was go9d and I would consider staying again.

description: 1-bedroom home featuring a cozy fireplace, in-unit laundry, air conditioning, and a private deck with a gas grill—perfect for relaxing evenings. Nestled in a quiet and safe neighborhood just minutes from Albany Med, St. Peter’s Hospital, local bars, restaurants, and a nearby food market. Ideal for traveling professionals, couples, or solo guests seeking comfort and convenience.
review: The interior of this apartment was fine. There is a basement that was hard to open the door because of paint. It also had a bunch of cobwebs in the stairwell that we did not want to enter. We arrived at night and we were not comfortable with the neighborhood and attached houses. This was our first time in Albany and probably our last.

description: Place is within 2-3 miles of AMC, St. Peter's,  UAlbany, SUNY, College of St. Rose, Washington park, Empire State Plaza, and many other establishments.  Only 15 minute ride to the airport !
review: Great location close to transportation and restaurants. FS communicates well. If you're a business traveler, this place is a real find.

description: The whole group will enjoy easy access to everything from this centrally located place. Large kitchen open to living room makes a great space for hanging out while making meals & memories together.  Located on 1st floor so no steps to navigate making it easy to access. First bedroom offers a spacious king size bed. Second bedroom has a queen with everything you need for a relaxing get away. Great value for area. Stay a night, two or more. Here to meet your needs.
review: My family came from out of the country for my graduation and it was great to have a homelike place to stay instead of a hotel. They were very comfortable. The place was clean and tidy. Have nothing bad to say honestly.

description: ✔ 4 Bedrooms with 5 Beds, plus a sofa bed!   ✔ Dedicated workspaces ✔ Washer & dryer and much more  ✔ Ideal for corporate housing, travel nurses, or friends/family vacations! ✔ Clean.  WiFi.  Quick host responses. ✔ Universities, Hospitals and more; all close by!
review: If my stay with Michael hadn’t have gone well, I was going to be done with Airbnb as I have had less than desirable experiences my last couple of stays. While I will say the cleanliness of the home was below my expectations and we ran into an issue with the heat, Michael was quick to respond and send people to resolve issues. Outside of Michael’s control, the thermostat was not working and took a few days to diagnose but Michael did everything in his power to make it right and I am truly thankful. And we were never left with no heat at all. He also had the foresight to include a space heater so I was able to use that to supplement the struggling heat due to broken thermostat. Overall, a good host makes up for some other things not going as well and for that I feel a 5 star review is more than fair.

description: Relax in our cozy home on a quiet one-way street. Plenty of free street parking available. With a large dining and living room, fully stocked kitchen, and furnished private room, our home is the perfect affordable stay for working professionals, students, and people in-between housing.   Newly furnished and renovated in 2017. Minutes from major universities and hospitals. Entire home is 3 bed 1 bath (you have a private bedroom with door lock). CDTA Bus stop 1 block away.
review: The hosts are very responsive and accommodating. When we had a problem with the dryer, they checked it and replaced it within 2 days. Common kitchen and cleaning supplies are well-stocked. The house is also just 1-2 minutes walk from the bus stop so it’s very convenient. This is a great place to temporarily stay if you’re new in Albany, especially if you’re a student :) Especially mentioning the housemates I got to share the space with during my stay, they’re both so nice ^^

description: Modern and recently renovated 1 BR apartment with a memory foam mattress King bed, dining table, desk with a comfortable chair, electric fireplace, and a large smart TV. It also has a Nespresso machine for amazing brews, a toaster oven, and a microwave. The apartment is located 2 minutes from State offices and NYS Capitol building, 3 blocks away from Lark St, and 5 blocks from Washington Park. The area is full of great restaurants and within walking distance of grocery stores and boutique shops.
review: I recently had the pleasure of staying at this fantastic apartment in Albany, and I couldn't have been happier with my experience. From start to finish, it was clear that the host had put a lot of thought into making this place comfortable and secure. First off, the security is top-notch. The entrance to the building is password protected, providing a reassuring level of safety. Once inside, the apartment itself is also password protected, adding an extra layer of security. As a solo traveler, this made me feel incredibly safe during my stay. Cleanliness is a top priority here. The apartment was spotless when I arrived, and it was clear that the host takes pride in maintaining a pristine space. There's a wide array of dining options nearby. Be sure to check out the Iron Gate Café for a lovely breakfast experience. Ahmad was incredibly helpful and responsive throughout my stay, promptly addressing any questions or concerns I had.

description: This luxurious apartment is located on a quiet street in the heart of Albany. Ideal for professionals. It is a 10mn walk from CDTA Bus station, Saint Peter and Albany Med Hospital. Traveling nurses & Dr. are welcome for long term stays. It features a bedroom with a queen-size bed, a living room, a kitchen, a bathroom, TVs, Wi-Fi, Mini-Billiard table,  a washer/dryer, A/C & heat, a Gas fireplace, off-street parking space. The patio with a table and parasol offers a breathtaking view of landscape.
review: Joe was very helpful, and offered suggestions on places to eat. For the price it can’t be beat. Will definitely book again !

description: Stay above it all in this stylish studio perched above Dove + Deer, Albany’s favorite restaurant. Located in historic Center Square, you’re steps from the Capitol, The Egg, and Washington Park. Enjoy a welcome drink and exclusive dining discounts. The studio offers cozy charm with exposed brick, luxe linens, Wi-Fi, and a kitchenette. Perfect for solo travelers or couples wanting a walkable, vibrant neighborhood with unbeatable food and flair.
review: We found it to be a charming hidden space, but it was challenging to carry our luggage and cooler up the two very narrow staircases. A nice surprise was the discount we received from the restaurant downstairs. Unfortunately, we didn't notice that dishes had been left in the dishwasher by the previous visitors until checkout time, so we didn't have much dinnerware available. The bed, however, was very comfortable!

description: Welcome to your cozy Albany retreat! Enjoy a comfortable stay in this well-appointed space, perfect for travelers looking for convenience and relaxation. Your booking includes free parking and a complimentary breakfast to start your day right. Located near shops, restaurants, and downtown Albany, this home offers easy access to local attractions. Whether you’re here for business or leisure, you’ll love the comfort and convenience of this stay. Book now for a relaxing experience!
review: DO NOT STAY HERE. The listing is very misleading. The room in Albany  is not their “home,” it’s a run down one star motel.  The motel is in complete disrepair all throughout the building. The carpets in the hallways are filled with stains, there’s an awful smell immediately when you walk inside. The neighborhood where the motel is located is extremely run down and sketchy with drug addicts and prostitutes walking in and out of the lobby and loitering outside.  In the room, there’a areas where the paint is peeling and the bathroom is disgusting; clear signs of water build up, mold, and mildew. The pillows on the bed are stained and the bed sheets have hair and other disgusting marks on them. The stove is covered in grease and dirt. The photos and the listing description are extremely misleading and inaccurate. I asked for a refund and provided extensive photo documentation, but the host refused and did not respond to my compltaints.  DO NOT STAY HERE!

description: Step into the charming and comfy 1BR/1BA apartment in the heart of Albany, NY. It promises a relaxing retreat bordering picturesque Washington Park and funky Lark Street while being within walking distance to the vibrant downtown, which offers easy access to restaurants, shops, and exciting attractions.  The lovely design and the prime location will leave you in awe.  ✔ Comfy Queen Bedroom ✔ Open Design Living ✔ Fully Equipped Kitchen ✔ Smart TV ✔ Wi-Fi ✔ Free Parking  See more below!
review: The place is very cute and has a neat industrial look to it (exposed pipes in the ceiling). Great supplies in the kitchen, great space in the bedroom, nice bathroom and overall cute design. We just had some difficulty with the heating system and the space was very cold. The other item to be aware of is the bar that is next door. There's rather lively music until midnight but then it quiets down. When Ming got my notice about these issues, he handled it immediately, the next morning. He also made sure to accommodate for the inconvenience, which was very considerate. Keep up the good hosting, Ming!

description: Discover peace of mind in our professionally sanitized 2bdrm apt. in Center Square Albany. Perfectly designed for extended stays, this apartment features 24/7 security cameras and a hardwired fire alarm system for your safety. Whether you're working remotely or seeking a comfortable retreat, enjoy blackout curtains and a fully equipped kitchen. Free washer, dryer, and dedicated parking included. Ideal for traveling nurses, business travelers, and long-term guests. No smoking inside the apartment
review: This airbnb was lovely! So clean, updated, beautiful and walkable to lark street, capitol buildings, and more! Only note would be if you’re not from up north, be prepared for A/C units rather than central air! A/C units combined with car traffic on Washington ave doesn’t make the bedrooms a noise-friendly space if that is of concern.

description: Just moments from Albany Medical Center, this renovated 1-bedroom apartment exudes brightness and is tastefully furnished with high-end designer furniture and decor, ensuring a delightful living experience. Situated on one of the area’s finest blocks of classic Victorian mansions, this building stands as a beacon of elegance. With proximity to Albany Medical Center, universities, and more, the location is truly unbeatable.
review: This was a great home-base for our two-week stay and was a good remote work location.  Parking was easy, the neighborhood feels quiet (for being in the middle of a city), and Elizabeth was very responsive to our questions.  Plenty of cozy bedding.  The unit is in a large older building divided into multiple apartments.

description: Step into the comfort of this beautiful light-filled, cozy 1 bedroom apartment minutes from hospitals, parks, and great restaurants. Very walkable location next to Albany medical center.  ~fast wi-fi ~fully equipped kitchen ~55” smart tv ~free off street parking ~ contactless self check-in
review: This host was really accommodating and easy to communicate with. The location was great. The apartment was nice and clean when we arrived, it was stocked with all amenities and there were plenty of bed linens and towels. We booked this location to be close to the hospital and it was a perfect space that allowed us to be close to our ill family member.

description: Hudson 1 is a first floor queen room with a larger bathroom and tub. Each room is equipped with a SmartTV and Apple TV as well as a desk.   This room is not pet friendly.   Complimentary Services: Continental Breakfast Onsite Parking Electric Parking Wi-Fi & Apple TV Keyless Entry Ensuite Guest Rooms ​ Paid Services: Cocktails Meeting Space Rentals Pets (If applicable) Early Checkin (1PM) Late Checkout (12PM)
review: Clean, bright, and comfortable room, beautiful building, very helpful and kind employees, and we were within walking distance to the park and MVP Arena.  Coffee and breakfast foods were a plus. It doesn’t seem like staff are around 24/7 like your typical hotel and I didn’t get a response from the host when texting them. When you can find someone to help or answer questions, the staff are very accommodating.

description: Newly renovated one bedroom, loft style apartment. Centrally located in the Mansion neighborhood in albany. Huge spacious open layout with walk in closet. Big screen tvs, with super fast internet (400 mps). On-site laundry, with locked off street parking. Spectacular views of downtown Albany. Walking distance to empire state plaza, the egg, times union, and excellent bars, restaurants, and delis. Great value for anyone staying in albany long or short term.
review: Exactly as described. Michael was very nice, responsive and respectful of my privacy. I felt at home at all times and enjoyed my stay. It is near downtown and that makes it a busy area, so you can hear what's going on outside. I loved having a place to park and having a place to wash my clothes. The coffee maker was a nice touch, too.

description: Charming 5 room bed and breakfast located across from Washington Park in Albany, NY. Each room has a private bathroom and workstation. Guests have access to a shared kitchen, dining area, living space and small office nook with printer.
review: This just isn’t exactly what it’s put on to be. The neighborhood was not necessarily great. I was worried about leaving my car in the parking lot because there seemed to be a lot of people just hanging around even at 10pm when I got in for the night. The room was also not as described. I was booked for a larger, nicer space, and on the day of check in the host changed my reservation and claimed it had always been this second room. I sent my confirmation email with the original booking and just never heard back. This isn’t a traditional bed and breakfast, it’s just a bunch of rooms with locks and a kitchen stocked with random things you’re unsure if you are allowed to use. Overall, I wouldn’t recommend and felt somewhat uncomfortable staying here, but I didn’t have much other choice after arriving.

description: Enjoy a cozy, well-clean room just a 5-minute walk from fantastic restaurants and downtown shopping. This peaceful space is ideal for anyone.   No smoking or alcohol allowed. Must be clean and nice.
review: Great host, great room, and easy access to Pearl Street w/ food, events, etc. Area was quiet and calm while still being in busy surrounding. Easy parking as well. Host was easy going and accommodating.

description: Experience updated comfort in a Hystorical Building at Capital Square, Albany! Overlooking the iconic Capitol Building, this fully-furnished apartment offers a prime location with easy access to vibrant Lark Street and top-notch amenities. Enjoy a centralized location with street parking, and high-speed Wi-Fi. Perfect for both leisure and business travelers, doctors, nurses, students etc.
review: The best thing about this place is the perfect location. It’s an easy walk to anything in the capital area. Beautiful views of the historic buildings too. The building is very old and in need of TLC, and the owners are busy working on that.  Del was super responsive and helpful with the issues that came up. He went out of his way to try to make things right.

description: Stay above it all in this stylish studio perched above Dove + Deer, Albany’s favorite restaurant. Located in historic Center Square, you’re steps from the Capitol, The Egg, and Washington Park. Enjoy a welcome drink and exclusive dining discounts. The studio offers cozy charm with exposed brick, luxe linens, Wi-Fi, and a kitchenette. Perfect for solo travelers or couples wanting a walkable, vibrant neighborhood with unbeatable food and flair.
review: Host communicated well with questions when I booked our stay months ago. When I had questions about checking in a little early the day of no response at all, still. Since it was just a keypad, and like 2 hours early, I thought that wasn’t too much to ask. Comfy bed, surprisingly quiet for being on top of a restaurant. Free weekend parking.  I would stay again definitely, but there was like no towels. Two very small body towels, and one tiny face towel for two people. No bathroom hand towel, no towel rack/hook in the bathroom to dry your wet body towels. No paper towels. Kinda odd.

description: Quiet suburban neighborhood minutes from downtown Albany. Guests have access to the kitchen, dinette and deck. Garage space is also available.  Private guest quarters include a large bedroom with a queen-size bed, desk and private bath. Guests also enjoy their own spacious living area with a large TV, massage chair, convertible couch, microwave, water cooler and exercise equipment.
review: I highly recommend Rachel's Airbnb Suite! Rachel is a very kind and pleasant host and even provided homemade treats, snacks, and a breakfast each day. All the comforts of home! The bed was very comfortable and had plenty of clean sheets and blankets. The location is very convenient and close to downtown Albany.

description: Welcome to your cozy Albany retreat! Enjoy a comfortable home in this well-appointed space, perfect for travelers looking for convenience and relaxation. Your booking includes free parking and a complimentary breakfast to start your day right. Located near shops, restaurants, and downtown Albany, this home offers easy access to local attractions. Whether you’re here for business or leisure, you’ll love the comfort and convenience of this stay. Book now for a relaxing experience!
review: This was a room in a very old Ramada Hotel. The area felt a bit sketchy at night when I arrived, though I had no problems. The room was clean, but old. They did provide a breakfast, but this was the standard powdered eggs, sausage, and chopped hash brown potatoes as well as other standard fare like small boxed cereal and small yogurts. You could not help yourself to any food item including coffee. There was a person that gave you every item behind the counter. The price was much better than any motel or other Airbnb nearby, but if I am in the area again I will probably stay elsewhere.

description: Newly renovated one bedroom, loft style apartment. Centrally located in the Mansion neighborhood in albany. Huge spacious open layout with walk in closet. Big screen tvs, with super fast internet (400 mps). On-site laundry, with locked off street parking. Spectacular views of downtown Albany. Walking distance to empire state plaza, the egg, times union, and excellent bars, restaurants, and delis. Great value for anyone staying in albany long or short term.
review: Modern and spacious. Very responsive landlord. Off-street parking a big plus. Great location for job in downtown Albany.

description: 52” Smart TV w/ Surround Sound | Dedicated Workspace | Fireplace | Coin Laundry  Put yourself in the heart of the city when you stay at this Albany vacation rental. This 2-bedroom, 1-bathroom apartment in Ten Broeck Triangle combines historic surroundings, modern comforts, and easy access to all the downtown hotspots. There’s even a desk if you need to get some work done before heading out to grab drinks, catch a show at the Palace Theatre, or explore the New York State Museum.
review: I stayed here for the New York State wrestling championships. The place was easy to find on a fairly private road. The place was clean, warm, and comfortable. Walking distance to plenty of places on and around Pearl St.

description: Hudson 3 is a first floor handicap accessible queen room with a large bathroom and ADA shower. Each room is equipped with a SmartTV and Apple TV as well as a desk.  This room is not pet friendly.  Complimentary Services: Continental Breakfast Onsite Parking Electric Parking Wi-Fi & Apple TV Keyless Entry Ensuite Guest Rooms ​ Paid Services: Cocktails Meeting Space Rentals Pets (If applicable) Early Checkin (1PM) Late Checkout (12PM)
review: Overall great stay. Check in was a short issue. My code worked to enter the building but not for my room. That was easily solved when I was handed actual keys. I appreciate the staff’s effort to immediately accommodate me as I soon realized the previous person had stopped the toilet. Staff responded swiftly and cleared the issue. Upon my return from dinner they had my code working as well. The access to parking as I came and went was a bonus for Albany. Will stay again whenever there is availability.

description: Stay and relax in this cozy beautiful space. With 1 bedroom 1 bath in historical Albany. Across from a community garden located within walking distance of  MVP arena and only 30 mins from Saratoga. This location offers easy highway access and is the perfect stop while staying in Albany!  If this unit is unavailable for your requested dates please reach out and inquire about the first floor unit and I will send you the link
review: I visited New York from out of state. Tylers place was the perfect Airbnb, centrally located to everything that I wanted to do. The Airbnb was the prefect size for my husband and I. Clean & had everything we needed. The ONLY negative thing was the street parking (I received my first parking ticket). Will definitely consider staying here again when we return. Thank you

description: Come relax in this one bedrm garden apt. The living room has a sofa that can be used as a 2nd queen bed. Fully stocked kitchen for those who love to cook,  rainfall shower head, and private on site laundry. There is a gym in the garage (which is a shared space).  Private patio. Located in a home that has cultivated an ecosystem for years. Enjoy songbirds  and crickets. Walking distance to public transit & restaurants 10 minute car to downtown for dance/music.
review: I stayed at David’s place as part of a research visit at UAlbany. Super convenient location for that. I had two separate bookings at David’s place due to some traveling while in Albany - both stays were equally great. 5-star Airbnb with everything you need and 5-star host who will do everything to help and make your stay as great as possible. Definitely recommend!

description: Enjoy a stylish experience at this centrally-located place. The unit is newly renovated with a 4K Smart TV, in unit washer/dryer, updated kitchen and bathroom, high speed internet.   You will also have access to the building gym.
review: The unit smelled like cigarettes smoke when I arrived. There was a glade scent plug in that was not helping the situation. The floor boards in one of the rooms had a hole in them and the planks would sink if you stepped on them. The unit is on the first floor of the building and the street is right outside. Worst of all, my window in the bedroom wouldn't actually stay locked when latched and in the locked position. I contacted the host about this immediately after I discovered the lack of security and they didn't respond for over 18 hours. I was able to get in touch with Airbnb support and explained that the unit wasn't secure. They helped get me a refund. After this process began I finally heard from Linda who said the prior guest had an unauthorized party and caused more damage than they realized. None of it was acceptable but at least I got a refund.

description: This luxurious apartment is located on a quiet street in the heart of Albany. Ideal for professionals. It is a 10mn walk from CDTA Bus station, Saint Peter and Albany Med Hospital. Traveling nurses & Dr. are welcome for long term stays. It features a bedroom with a queen-size bed, a living room, a kitchen, a bathroom, TVs, Wi-Fi, Mini-Billiard table,  a washer/dryer, A/C & heat, a Gas fireplace, off-street parking space. The patio with a table and parasol offers a breathtaking view of landscape.
review: Joseph was an great host and has a great place as well. He was kind, understanding and pretty flexible in working things around for you if needed. I would definitely come stay here again.

description: Located just 15 minutes from Albany International Airport, our cozy and modern Airbnb is the perfect place for travelers, business professionals, and adventure seekers looking for a convenient and comfortable stay.  > Prime Location – Quick access to Albany Airport, major highways, and downtown attractions/major stores.   > Comfortable & Clean > Self Check-In > Fast Wi-Fi & Work-Friendly> Fully Equipped Kitchen > Free Off-street Parking
review: Cecilia’s was a wonderful host, really accommodating! The place itself was wonderful and it was as described, was REALLY CLEAN! I would definitely book again for the price, I had no problems and this place seemed perfect as a parking space is included too! Don’t hesitate to book!

description: Enjoy a stylish experience at this centrally-located place in College Town. close to downtown and all it's restaurants and bars, Washington park and the Plaza. There’s albany medical and st Peter's  Hospital are about a mile away as well Saint Rose, Albany law and UAlbany.
review: I'vestayed at 2 of Antonios properties for a week each stay. great host,  always responsive. Clean properties. will definetly book with him again

description: ✔ 4 Bedrooms with 5 Beds, plus a sofa bed!   ✔ Dedicated workspaces ✔ Washer & dryer and much more  ✔ Ideal for corporate housing, travel nurses, or friends/family vacations! ✔ Clean.  WiFi.  Quick host responses. ✔ Universities, Hospitals and more; all close by!
review: Thanks for having us! Great and spacious just like the pictures. Would definitely stay again.

description: Welcome to our beautiful 3-bedroom, 2-full bathroom home with laundry in the unit! With modern furnishings, comfortable beds, and all the amenities you need, this space is perfect for families, groups of friends, or business travelers. Located in the uptown Manning Boulevard neighborhood, you'll be just a short drive away from local attractions and delicious restaurants. Whether you're here for work or play, this home will provide you with a comfortable and convenient stay. Book your stay today!
review: Phil was awesome!!! Super helpful and responsive. I will stay again

description: Enjoy a stylish experience at this centrally-located place. The unit is newly renovated with a 4K Smart TV, in unit washer/dryer, updated kitchen and bathroom, high speed internet.   You will also have access to the building gym.
review: Very convenient and walkable for visiting the city. Super spacious. Thanks for having us!

Across the street fromNYS Capitol,NYS Education office, Cathedral, SUNY Albany Downtown,State Exams, I787, Route 9,Washington square park, and all fine dining/Lark Street, LGBTQIA+ friendly. 5 min  Greyhound bus. Seeking friends. I am a parent and student who is at the library often.

review: While I appreciate an affordable place to stay, I was disappointed that this old Ramada hasn't been updated in several years. The smell from the AC/heat unit was terrible, but I used it to keep the room cool and dry while I was out. The bed was fairly comfortable with clean sheets and the bathroom was fairly clean, but the shower curtain really needs to be replaced. I can overlook small things when staying in a cheaper place, but it was difficult to overlook all the cosmetic, outdated, and stained areas of the room and overall hotel/lobby. The hostess was not very friendly either, but she was dealing with a complaining customer when I arrived, so I gave her the benefit of the doubt. The breakfast was underwhelming and I opted to eat downtown instead. Overall, I'd stay here again if I was saving money, but not when I can spend a little more for a much nicer, more updated space.

review: My stay was very comfortable and welcoming. It felt safe and like it was my own home. It's a smart home which is a great plus. I was able to change the temperature by voice with ease without having to leave the bedroom or going to the thermostat. Everything was clean and well kept. I enjoyed my stay and would recommend this space to anyone who wants a quality experience!

description: Exquisite retreat at Cozy Sunset, mere steps from Albany Medical Hospital and downtown’s vibrant allure. Tailored for discerning professionals, this sophisticated abode blends opulent comfort with unrivaled convenience. Savor proximity to premier dining, boutique shopping, and cultural delights. review: This was a perfect place to stay while I was waiting for my apartment to be available during a relocation for work. Delaware Avenue has a great vibe and some really good restaurants. Washington Park and Lark Avenue are just a short walking distance away. My only complaints are that one of the bedside lamps would not turn off and the vanity lights in the bathroom were all burned out (I solved both problems by taking the bulb from the bedside light and temporarily replacing one of the vanity bulbs). Also, parking, while convenient, was a little nerve wracking as up to four cars were frequently partied in an area intended for two cars. I do not blame this on the property’s host, but I would warn guests who need to be able to leave at a specific time, to watch the parking situation and maybe back in to their parking space to make it easier to shimmy around any extra cars that should not be there. Otherwise, a great stay!

description: The apartment is located in a quiet neighborhood . Fully furnished. Linens and towels are provided. It's two blocks away from downtown Albany, and the Palace theater.
review: We were pleased to see how 2nd Street and the Ten Broeck neighborhood in Albany have come along. Its great to see all of the gorgeous brownstones, including the one we stayed in, being renovated and cared for. In terms of quality, I was pleased by the courtesy of the host's friend who lived nearby. He was there to let us in and make sure I knew to call with any problems. With a full kitchen and two bedrooms, my daughter and I felt at home with plenty of space. As a native of Albany I'm used to thin windows and occasionally noisy neighbors. If you don't sleep well, don't take the master bedroom and be aware that loud music may be playing during the evening and weekend. But there is a fan/ac unit to drown out the din from the street. This space has been renovated and a vast improvement I'm sure from where it was, and I'm hoping progress will continue here as it seemed a few projects were incomplete. I would have loved to enjoy more sunlight in the house but there was a ton of tree debris in the back yard so there was no way to enjoy opening the windows. On my own, this place was fine, but if traveling with my child again I will probably pick a quieter location where I'd be able to open windows or put her down for a nap without worrying about excessive noise.

description: Keep it simple at this peaceful and centrally-located place!  Private room with shared baths and kitchen in a large home! 2 blocks from St. Peter’s, 1 mile from Albany  Medical Center! Let my 19 years as a travel nurse make it easy for you! Clean, convenient, and safe!
review: This was a great place to stay. I loved the privacy, cleanliness and everything about the house. Victoria was quick to respond and very comfortable to communicate with. Overall, this was an excellent stay.

review: Big communal space that was easy to access. Thomas was a great host. Would visit again.

review: Now I had to sit on my review first. I wanted to make sure I was fair in everything I was going to say and not give a review based on my emotions. Firstly I would like to express my gratitude to Mr. Tomar and his property manager Mr. Kenny.The apartment is beautiful and well put together to be in the location that it was in. Now Albany aint all that as a whole so no negative reviews to Mr. Tomar for that. The only issue I had was the noise from upstairs. I am taking into consideration there is a young child that comes and goes and the tenants are fairly young themselves. The girls tend to horseplay around a lot hence the reason for the stomping, running, or sounding like something or someone is falling. This did irritate me a lot! But it was dealt with by the property manager Kenny. If the tenants above would have consideration of ppl dwnstrs then the stay would’ve been way better

description: This spacious and serene apartment in a two-family home, boasts a tranquil ambiance that instantly puts you at ease.  The neutral color palette and ample natural light create a sense of airiness and tranquilly.  The Livingroom features plush loveseat and a cozy rug, perfect for unwinding after a long day outing.  The kitchen is equipped with modern appliances and sleek countertops.  With its spacious layout and serene atmosphere, this space is the perfect home away from home.
review: We had a nice two nights stray at Lavern's place. The unit was as described, we had no surprises.  The unit was spacious and easy to find - parking was plentiful in the driveway. There is a fully functioning kitchen available (no laundry or AC). We arrived on July 4th - and as such that evening there was a lot of firecracker noise in the evening/night around the street - but next night things quieted down.

Located in a home that has cultivated an ecosystem for years. Enjoy songbirds  and crickets. Walking distance to public transit & restaurants 10 minute car to downtown for dance/music.
review: David’s place is awesome. Super cozy and everything you need for a short or longer visit. I stayed due to a few months research stay at UAlbany which is right next to - perfect location for that and in general super nice and quiet neighborhood with easy access to bus as well. The communication with David was great - fast and very friendly. He did everything to make my stay as pleasant as possible and was super flexible in terms of check in and check out - which was extremely helpful. Overall a perfect stay and 5-star host 😊

review: the place was absolutely amazing. super cute! the shower head is truly the best one ive EVER used!!  the space is super cute, I love the colors. big comfy couch.

review: Stayed here for 2 weeks leading up to the bar exam (I took it at Empire State and it was walking distance; very convenient)  Honestly the space was lovely and I was able to quietly study. One thing to note is that the ceiling is high but a lot of noise could come through from the upstairs neighbor (eg. Foot steps). It didn’t bother me much during the day but I told Michael about it and he tried to resolve it! Wearing earplugs could help somewhat. Other than that, truly a fantastic place to live!!

review: Super close to Albany med. Clean and nice look forward to booking again! Exactly what I wanted and needed.

Two kitchens, a billiard room, OLED TVs, luxurious mattresses and eclectic décor make this home truly one of a kind. 35 minutes to Saratoga Race Track with loads of other fantastic attractions within an hour drive.
review: From beginning to end Thomas made this stay an evening that myself and all my friends will not soon forget.  I rented his home for a night to host a bachelor/birthday party for one of my good buddies, who simply wanted a good cut of meat and a well-made martini to celebrate the occasion.  I was initially planning to make all the food and drinks myself, but upon hearing this, Thomas went absolutely above and beyond and offered to coordinate getting us a private chef and a bartender!  The menu the chef put together for us, and the drinks masterfully mixed by the bartender, were amazing, and not having to worry about taking care of those things myself allowed me to just relax and enjoy making memories with my friends.  The house and the grounds themselves are stunning, from the beautifully and artfully decorated farmhouse to the oasis of the backyard patios and pool space appointed with tropical trees and plants, you would never know you were staying in a home in the center of Albany!  We really did not want to leave the following day, which is why it was so nice that Thomas allowed us to stay a bit longer to enjoy the pool on such a hot morning. 😊    Thomas’ cohost, Delvin, is lovely.  He allowed me to check in early so I could set some things up ahead of everyone else arriving.  When I showed up, he was still in the middle of cleaning and preparing the house for us but took the time out to warmly welcome me and give me a tour of the house and accommodations.  He also stayed throughout the dinner service to assist the chef in preparing the table and clearing everything down when it was over.  It was wonderful having his company while we were there.  If I could give Thomas, Delvin, their property, and this experience more than 5 stars, I would.  Highly recommend!!

review: Tim's place was great for our stay.  We were in town for a couple days to see Dave Matthews in Saratoga.  The house was easily accessible and relatively close to the highway. No-one stayed at the house the day before our check-in, so he allowed us to check in early so we could get settled and not have to worry about it after we got back from the show around midnight.  The house was very clean and exactly as described.  The driveway is very narrow, however.  We have a mid-size suv and had to fold the mirrors in and guide the driver in and out of the driveway as to not hit either house with only a few inches on each side.  Not a huge issue though,  just an FYI.  The area was ok, not the greatest, but we had no issues.

review: Pros: Fantastic value!  Great host responsiveness!  A decent little apartment.  We got in pretty late and were grateful for the 5 minute walk to Hill Street Cafe, which served decent-priced food.  Comfortable bed.  Not squeaky-clean, but fine.  A couple light switches and the bedroom TV didn't work, but there was plenty of light and a large TV in the living room.   Con: the coffee maker was ready to go but there was no coffee!  There's usually coffee in hotels and AirBnBs, so I didn't expect to have to bring my own and was unprepared.  (There's a 13 minute walk to Dunkin Donuts, which opens at 5am).

A CVS, pizza place and Dunkin donuts are within a 7-minute walk. A great bagel shop is a 4 minutes drive or a 15-minute walk away.
review: I stayed with Cristian for 6 or 7 months. Cristian exceeded all expectations from the very beginning and never let us down. He works with you and will do his very best to see to it that you are comfortable. I'd definitely try to book him again and highly recommend you doing the same! If you're a travel nurse, this spot is for you!

review: Fantastic rooftop deck and beautiful backyard!  Quiet location in the city and nice walkable neighborhood.  Overall a great place to stay!

review: Love our staying. House was clean. Thank you for hosting us.

review: This was a really lovely home. We felt at home right away. Great experience!

The apartment looks just as it does in Michael's pictures and includes all listed amenities including a gated parking area in the back. I would 100% stay here again in the future.

Located in a peaceful neighborhood in Albany, it's a great place to relax or get some work done.  What you’ll get: - Bedroom, Livingroom, and bathroom, - Comfortable bed and linens - Small sitting area - Washer and Dryer - Smart - TV - Wi-Fi - Mini fridge, microwave, and coffee/tea setup - Full Private bathroom  - Shared entrance and available parking  Come enjoy a simple, calm stay at The Dove’s Nest.
review: Roland’s home was perfectly suited to our needs. It was clean, safe, and very close to the university. I will be staying again.

review: What a hidden gem! This apartment was definitely modernized as shown. There were so many upgraded amenities. There were two 65-inch televisions (living room and bedroom).The bed was extremely comfortable. The kitchen has everything you need and more. The bathroom has a highly pressurized shower with music. The laundry area has a folding table, rolling laundry basket and a washer and dryer with WI-FI capabilities which allow you to monitor them from your apartment. Michael’s apartment is in walking distance to The Empire State Plaza(Capitol), The Egg , NY State Museum, MVP Arena, Washington Park, WWII Memorial, USS Slater, and the Dutch Apple Cruise down the Hudson River. While there in July , the City of Albany held FREE CONCERTS every Wednesday  with numerous food trucks ( I enjoyed the band Starship) they also hosted a Kids’ Day featuring Dino Ranch, pony rides, bounce houses and petting zoo! I took Bus 114 to Crossgate Mall and even visited the largest Walmart in the world! Don’t sleep on Albany, New York and Michael’s affordable Airbnb!!!

review: Lovely apartment.  Host is very accessible and super communicative. A fun escape to a bustling city!

review: This place is amazing! The building itself is historic and then the apartment/condo is very nicely decorated. I'd definitely stay there again when I am in town.
